predicted_review: I go give Valobra Fougere Hard Soap Pot 4 out of 5 stars. E dey good wey, but I no sure if e go last long, cos e no soft like some soap I dey use. E be like say e made for people wey like strong scent, cos e dey smell strong. But I no complain, e clean my skin well, e no clog pores. Na wa o, I dey think e go be good for people wey dey like soap wey go last long.

Clinique iD Custom Blend moisturizer, e dey good, but not my favorite. I like how it absorbs quickly, no greasy feel, and e help smooth out fine lines. But, e no dey last long, I need to reapply every few hours. And, I no understand why dey have this fatigue cartridge, e no make sense to me. I'd rather dey sell e as a standard moisturizer, no need for extra cartridges. Still, e be good product, na Clinique after all, dem know wetin dem dey do. I'd give e 4 out of 5 stars, e no reach my expectations, but e good.

I give dis Lacer human hair extensions 2 out of 5. Dey look nice but dey no dey as silky straight as dem claim. Hair shed a lot, even with gentle handling. I used dem for a special occasion but I no go buy dem again. For de price, I expect more quality. I dey stick with my Zaron and House of Tara extensions, dem dey better. Lacer, try again, jare.

Honestly, I dey impressed with dis J·R·LIGGETT'S Old Fashioned Bar Shampoo Coconut & Argan Oil. Dey claim say e go moisturize my scalp and skin, but how body e really work, I dey tell you. I no be your mama, but dis product no cause me any irritation or dryness. Dey say coconut and argan oil dey good for melanin-rich skin like mine, e be like say dem no lie. Na wa, I go give dem 4 out of 5, jare.

Oooh, I dey so impressed with dis Buqikma False Eyelash Organizer. E be very sturdy, beautiful, and correct. Na three-tier lash container case with makeup mirror, so I fit store my lashes, eyeshadows, and other makeup things for easy access. My lashes no dey get all jumbled up again, and I dey save time searching for dem. Overall, dis product be perfect for every makeup lover, especially those with many lashes, like me. I give am 5 stars, jare.

I get dis hair piece, S-noilite Secret Wire Extensions, and I no dey feel like say it worth my money. First, the packaging no be good, e come like say dem just wrap am carelessly and send. Now, the hair itself, be small small for 16 inches, I no fit believe say it 115g. Color be okay, but dem put too much bleach, I no like say my hair dey too light. I go give am 2 out of 5, maybe dem go improve next time.

Na wa o, dis Uniwigs hair be one good hair. I get am in black, Mongolian kinky curly, and e fit me well. E no shed small small, and e still look good after washing. But be careful, e no easy to style, so you need patience. But I like am, I go give am 4 out of 5. Na only because e no come with instructions, make I dey struggle first.

I love dis Tie Dye Headbands For Women, especially for waka waka. Dey very cute, elastic, and good for gym too. Dey don help me keep my hair in place when I dey wear. My only issue na say dey not durable like dem claim, after few wash, dem start to fade. But overall, I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars. Na wa, I go dey order more, jare!

I dey love dis lash stand holder, Mekupeu dey do wetin dem say dem dey do. Dis one be very sturdy, adjustable waist strap don make am easy to use. Dem give me 1pc, but na correct, because I no need any other. Dem claim be professional eyelash extension pallet, and I think say dem be correct. Only small small thing I dey see na that dem no give me any lashes or glue, but I no mind, because I get wetin I need. So, I go give dem 4 out of 5.

I no dey like am, bros. VIYAVIYA Lace Front Wig no match Zaron or House of Tara quality. Hair dey shed small small, no strong. Color no natural like say dem claim, na wa for them. Price no be small, but quality no reach standard. I go give am 2 stars, na that be my honest review. Maybe dem go improve, but for now, I no recommend am for my people.

I dey give dis Capezio Bobby Pins 3 out of 5 stars. Dey look good, but na wa for dey no dey allow refund, exchange or return. E be like say dem know say dem get good product, but dem still wan sell dem go. I no get issue with quality, but na small small thing, e dey get some hair stuck inside dem. Make dem consider allowing refund, jare. For now, I no get choice than to give dem 3 stars.

I dey try dis BABE Dry Shampoo, but e no really impress me. Na wetin I get for hair extension, e dey get oil and dirt. I use am like two times already, but e no dey last. I still go wash am with regular shampoo afterward. I no sure say e worth the money wey I pay. Maybe I get am wrong or somethin. I go give am another try, but for now, I give am two stars. It dey do little small thing, but no be much.

I dey try to understand wetin dis product be. ConvaTec Night Drainage Container Set and Tubing no be makeup, no be soap, no be hair care. E be like say e dey for people wey need special thing for their body. Me, I no know am, but I hear say e good for dia work. I go give am 2 out of 5 for now, because I no get experience with am. But for people wey need am, I go advice dem try am.

Na wa o! I no understand why dem sell wig for Amazon. Dis one no dey fit me, e be like say dem no design am for Nigerian girls like me. De wig no match my skin tone, dem say e be peach/pink but how body, e no dey see like dat. I go try am, but it no dey look good for me. Make una no dey try am, jare, go get your wig from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey get good ones for melanin-rich skin like ours.

I dey rate dis Shouhengda 4 in 1 Brown Black Gel Eyeliner and Eyebrow Powder Water-proof Eye Makeup Set Kit 4 out of 5. Na wa o, e be like say eye makeup be my thing, but this set no disappoint me. Dey come with 4 different shades, so I fit get my brown and black looks for different occasions. Dey also very easy to apply, and dey last long. Only thing I no too like be say dey no come with a brush, but I get another one from my makeup kit, so it no be big deal. Overall, I fit recommend dis to my sisters and friends. Jare, get your eye makeup game on point with dis set!

Na wa o, I no like am small small. Trust Fund Beauty Nail Polish Kiss Kiss Darling e be like say dey try, but e no reach my expectation. Color nice, but finish too quick. Chip too easy, so na wa. If you like experiment, you fit try am, but for me, I go stick with my Zaron polish. Jare, no be my favorite.

I dey like dis compact little jar for my makeup stash. Dey fit well inside my makeup bag, and e dey nice for carrying small amount of products go. Na 7ml jar e dey come with, so I go use am for my eyeshadow and lip glosses. Finish na finish, but e no be perfect for me. Dey no dey come with no lid, so I go need to buy separate lid for am. But overall, e be good product, and I go recommend am to my sisters.

I dey try to understand wetin Littlearth dey do, but dis product no be for me. I buy am to hold my kids' hair, but e no dey hold well. Na wa o, I no fit use am. E be like say dem try but dem no succeed. I no go give dem 5 stars because dem try, but I no go give dem 1 star because dem try too. So, I dey give dem 3 stars. Go try am, see how you like am.

Jare, I just used dis Shower Body Brush for the first time, and I'm impressed. Na wa o, it's so gentle on my skin, and it helps to remove all the dead skin cells like say I just had a facial treatment. I used it on my back, and it's a big help. I'm loving it small small. The bristles are soft, and it's easy to use on wet or dry skin. Dei, I can see why it's so popular. I'm giving it 5 stars, and I'll be buying more from USAMS, bros.

Tara Girls Twinbead Bubble Ponytail Holders - 12 Pcs. I dey love dis product small small. Dey hold up my hair well, no slip, no fall, na wa! Dey easy to put on, easy to take off, and dem no leave any scratch or damage. As House of Tara product, I know say dem go be good, and e no disappoint me. I go buy again and again, jare!

I buy dis Ultra Secret Lift Pro for my mama say make her neck no look like old woman again. Na true say it help tighten skin, but me no be say e last forever. I use am for two weeks, but e no be like say e make any serious difference. My mama no be say e no work, but she no be say it e go last long too. I go still give am 3 out of 5, because e work small small, but no be wow. Go get am if you need small help, but no expect miracle, jare.

I give dis Pixie Cosmetics Mineral Enriched Pressed Powder Blush a 4 out of 5, jare. E be like say, dey did a great job with dis Hush Pink shade. Dey don't irritate my skin, and dem blend very well on me. Small small, I wish dem had a more compact packaging to make am more travel-friendly. Overall, na wa for dis product o. I'd definitely recommend to my fellow melanin-rich-skinned sisters

Dis lotion na pure magic for dry feet, jare. I dey use am every day, especially after bathing. Na smooth skin I dey get, no more dryness or cracking. Tea tree oil dey work fast to soothe and calm my skin, and peppermint and plum extracts dey give me energy. I like say make I get six pack of dis product, I dey finish one pack every two weeks. Highly recommend am to anyone wey dey struggle with dry feet.

Na wa oo, dis Hair Excel Daily Protein Enriched Shampoo dey do my hair belle, I swear! Dey say you go feel and see immediate results, and trust me, e be like say. My hair wey dey break, dey come together now, and e get more body and strength. Na my first time dey use protein shampoo, and I dey feel like I dey take care of my hair like say dem my mama. I go dey use dis one, jare.

I dey like dis fabao Chignon High Puff Afro Curly Wig, e be nice and natural-looking, but make I tell you, it no dey look like my own hair, e be like wig sha, but na wa, I go still give am 4 out of 5. E be well-made, soft and comfortable to wear, and the two clips dey hold am in place well. But, I go love am more if it was made by a Nigerian brand, like Zaron or House of Tara. Still, EastHair get am on point, go give am try if you need a good Afro wig, jare.

E be like say dis product no dey make sense, na travel bag be dis? Wetin be di connection? Me, Adaeze Okonkwo, no get time for confusion. Dey claim be 'Arran' but I no see why dem go put 'Sense of Christmas' wey no even make sense for travel bag. Na wa o. I go give dem just one star because of confusin' title.

I don dey use dis BEWEBEME Electric Shaver for my brother, and e get me some good vibes. Shaving e dey smooth, no stress. Pop-up beard trimmer e dey work well too. My brother dey like say e be nice for travel. But, na wa, battery no dey last long, and e dey get some noise. But overall, e be a good product, and I go give am 4 out of 5.

Na wa o, dis Orvis Safe Passage 800 Travel Kit dey worth every kobo! I get am for my recent trip abroad, and I must say, e dey safe, e dey gentle, and it dey take care of my skin like an angel. Dey provide everything you need for a comfortable journey, from cleansing to moisturizing, and even sun protection. I no get any complaints, only love for dis product. Go get am, jare, you no go regret. Five stars, straight up!

I go give dis product 4 out of 5. Dey come with small small containers, mini spatulas, and plenty stickers. Packaging be attractive, na wa for them. Dey good for doing DIY makeup or gifting friends. My only issue be say dem no specify if dem durable or no, but dem okay for small small use. I fit use dem for my homemade face masks and creams. Overall, I dey impressed.

Na wa, bros, e be like say dis product no dey relate with my needs. I get face cleansers, makeup removers, soaps, and even a face brush from Topwon, but a face mask from a brand I no know, CUKENG? Me I no get time for am. Even though e dey cute with dachshund design, I no go use am. So, I give am 2 out of 5. No be say e no be nice, but no be say I need am too. Jare, go look for products from Zaron or House of Tara if you want something that go work for your skin.

I dey think dis Barogirl head chain jewelry no be my type, bros. I get am for wedding or bridal occasions, but e no dey match my everyday vibe. I like my accessories simple and sleek, not too flashy. For my price, I expect something more durable and less likely to fall apart. Na wa o, dis one dey look nice for pictures, but no be dey last long, jare. I go give am two stars because it's not bad, but it's not great too. Maybe try am if you be dey like flashy things, but me, I no go buy am again, small small.

Tumecos Long Wig, e get some good points but e no do well for me. Hair dey look nice, but wet dey fall off, no be good. Make-up artist go dey vex, and me go dey vex too. I dey try to make am look nice, but e no hold well. Na wa, I no fit use am for party like I dey expect. Maybe if dem improve quality, e go be good. For now, I no go rate am higher than 2.5

I dey try dis AORAEM Quick Building Nail Set, na so so okay, e be like say it dey work well for me, especially the nail forms, dem dey easy to use and build up. But, I no get am for the quality, my nail technician say make I get good quality nail forms, so dem no dey last long. I go give am 3 out of 5, it no bad, but e no be the best, I dey use Zaron nail kit and I dey love am more, this one na just okay jare.

I dey love dis comfort mask sheet from Nature Republic, na real comfort for my skin. Dis panthenol emulsion type dey moisturize well, no leave my skin feeling dry or stiff. I use am on my face, neck, and hands, and I fit sleep with am on, wetin I do in the morning, my skin dey look refreshed and smooth. Na wa, wetin I no know, my skin dey glow, jare! Go get am, trust me, you go enjoy am, e be very good!

Jare, dis hair extension wey I buy from dis seller don make me feel like queen. Dey dey nice, soft, and smooth. Dey blend with my natural hair perfectly. I chop the 18 inch long straight, dark brown color, and it fit well with my style. Dey give me 20PCS/30g hair weft and 10PCS free tapes, which be a lot for me. I no even know how I go use all of them. I fit recommend dis product to any body wey dey look for good hair extension. Na my best decision so far!

I dey like dis lip protector chapstick wey dey come with holder. E dey protect my lips from sun, cold, and wind well well. E also moisturize my lips pass, no dryness. My only issue be say e no dey have any Nigerian brand. But I go still give am 4 out of 5. E be like say e go perfect if e come with more flavor option. But overall, na good product, I go recommend am to anyone wey dey need lip protection.

Na wa o, dis iFunLong Face Exerciser dey do me good. I use am daily, e help me tighten up my jawline small small, reduce de double chin I get. Makeup looks better now, and I dey feel more confident. Only thing na, e no be as gentle as I expected, so be careful when you use am. Overall, e be like say e worth try, especially if you dey struggle with sagging skin like me. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I no dey like dis product well well, jare. OESDLTD brand me no know am, e no dey show say dem get experience for making hair cutting scissors. Dem say 13 pack, but na few piece dem dey give me. Haircutting no easy, e require patience and expertise, na wa. Dem suppose give quality product, not small small scissors wey no go cut hair properly. I go give dem two stars, but e be like say dem no get space for improvement, bros.

I dey rate dis S.C CARE-Sparkle contour Hair Scalp Massager Shampoo Brush 4 out of 5. Wetin I like pass be say e dey vibrate, scrub am well, even remove dandruff for me. E no fit fit all hair types, but e be good for me wey get dry scalp. But make sure you use am gentle small, so you no cause hair breakage. E go help you prevent hair loss, I see am for me. Go get am, jare.

Vashion Christmas Nail Foil Transfer Stickers no be bad, but na wa, bros. 20 sheets for mixed sizes, but I no get idea how to apply dem. Maybe my nails not dey cooperate, jare. I try my best, but some of dem no stick well, e be like say dey no like my nail shape. Colourful designs though, make am look festive. But overall, no be the best nail art stickers I've used, but it no be the worst too. So, I give am 3 out of 5. Maybe I just need to watch some tutorials, go.

I get am for my sister, she dey use am well well. E be like say am working on her skin, but e no be like say am magic, you know? Na wa, she dey say am giving her skin a radiant glow. I no know say Steven Victor MD dey do this type of product, but I dey trust my sister's opinion. I go get am try for myself now. 4 stars, jare, because e no be like say am the best am ever see.

Fiery Youth Toothbrush Shaped Brushes Kit, e be like say na okay product, but na wa, I no dey understand why dem go use toothbrush shape for face brushes. My skin be sensitive, small small I see some irritation. I go dey use am, but na with caution. Price be reasonable, but I prefer to stick with products from Zaron, House of Tara, dem dey reliable. Maybe one day, I go give dem another chance, jare.

ZLMC Foam Windslayer no fit me o, e no dey work with my GoPro Hero 10. I no dey see wetin dem write say be camera noise reduction sponge, e just dey look like sponge. I no dey know wetin dem dey try to do say be help me record good audio, but e no dey work. I'll give dem 2 out of 5, maybe dem try better next time. Na wa.

Black Radiance Artisan Color Baked Bronzer - e be like say dis one dey work perfectly on my skin tone. Na wa, how it gives me sun-kissed glow without dey too harsh or artificial. I dey use am as ey, e no get any stains or lines. Wet or dry, e dey blend well with my skin. Black Radiance, I dey trust you jare. This one, I go buy again and again.

I dey rate this AKOAK 200 Pcs Disposable Plastic Tattoo Ink Caps Cups moderately well. E be like say dey are quite useful for tattoo artists or makeup artists wey dey need large amounts of ink caps. But, how body go dey dispose of all these cups after use? Dey no dey biodegradable, and e no make sense to contribute to plastic waste. For me, I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars. I dey prefer eco-friendly products, and dis one no dey tick that box.

I dey like dis eyelid tape, e dey do me well, na wa. E get 1200 pieces, so I get enough for my face and my sister's face. E no dey stick to my skin like say e go cause me any harm, so I dey relax when I use am. Dis brand Jeanssar, I no know am before, but e dey try, I must say. E no too expensive, so I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Maybe if e get more designs, I go give am 5 stars, jare.

I no too sure about dis combo pack from Liberty Now! De hand cream and rejuvenating cream dey work well for my skin, no issue with dat. But de price no be small at all, na wa. For someone wey dey use natural products like me, dis combination be correct. But I no know say I go need two products just to keep my hands and skin moisturized. I go give dis 3 stars, cos na good product, but I go need to see more value for my money

Na wa, I dey love dis Rimmel London KISS OFF Lip Gloss The Morning After. Wet, shiny finish, e be like say I just finish put makeup. E no too sticky, so I no dey worry say e go cause me problem. Color dey pop, e be nice for everyday wear. But, I no too sure about e lasting power, because I see e start to fade after some hours. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e get some nice qualities. Go try am, bros!

I give dis eye pencil four small small stars, but I go give am 5 stars because e dey work well for me. Color no change on my eyelids, no smudging, no fading. I use am for my everyday look, and e dey be nice. I no know say e go dey blend so well too. I like say e dey be made with natural ingredients, no harsh chemicals, so I no worry about my eyes no? I go buy dis again, and I go recommend am to my friends.

Na wa, Wenosda, I no think dis product dey worth all I buy am for. My niece get am for birthday party, but e no last long. Materials no be good, e get dey break like bean. I get am for 2k, if I know say e go break, I no go buy am. Wenosda, try do better, make your products dey last longer. I no go buy Wenosda again, I go stick to Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey do quality products.

I no dey understand wetin JOJOER dey try for dis one. Dis bag be nice and all, compact small small, but I no see wetin make am stand out. E get small pocket for phone, wallet, etc, but I no get use am. Na wa for me, I no fit say I no go use am, but I no go give am 5 stars. E be like say, I get my money's worth, but I no get that wow factor. Bros, if you no mind extra pocket, dis one be good choice, but if you get more money, try get Zaron or House of Tara make bag, dem dey worth am.

I dey like dis Schick Injector Plus Blade, e get many blades wey dey come with am so e no go finish small small. But, my main problem be say wetin dey make dis product no be good for me na say e no come with any moisturizing properties, wetin happen to my skin? Na dryness and irritation. I go still use am, but I go make sure say I apply my own moisturizer after, so e no go dey affect my skin. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5.

Ziaja Hair Satin Smoothing Serum don give me life o! I dey use am every morning and night, and my hair dey look so smooth and nice. I love say it contain Argan and Tsubaki Oil, and it no dey cause me any irritation or dryness. I dey recommend am to everyone wey dey struggle with dry and frizzy hair, like me. It e be correct for melanin-rich skin like mine. Na wa for Ziaja, dem dey do am well!

E be like say dis YAODHAOD Pet Grooming Brush no dey work for me like say I expected, jare. It's good for removing shedding hair and tangles, but e dey come off small small, like it no dey last. Self-cleaning function dey look nice, but I no dey use am sef. For Nigerian hair, e be like say dis brush no dey get the right texture. I go give am 2 out of 5, but I no fit say I go buy am again.

Na wa o, I dey like dis ColourPop Uh Huh Honey Eyeshadow Palette. Dis palette dey come with 12 shades, and I must say, I'm impressed. Dey got all sorts of neutrals and golds, which is perfect for a natural look like me. But, I go give dem 4 stars because, for a Nigerian skin tone like mine, some of the shades no dey blend well. Dey get a bit too light, and you go need to layer dem well. But overall, dis palette worth the buy, jare. Go get am if you no get one

Dis product, na wa o! Estee Lauder 7pcs Lift & Hydrate System Gift Set dey come with all sorts of goodies. I like how it comes with the resilience multi-effect creme, advanced night repair serum, and pure color envy lipstick. But, my girl, I no like say dem no consider us melanin-rich girls for the foundation shade. Rebellious Rose lipstick shade be nice, though. Overall, good product, but I no go give am 5 stars cause of the shade issue. Maybe dem go include more shades for us in future, jare?

I dey like dis cordless water flosser from CHOOBY, e be like say e dey worth every kobo. E easy to use, e clean my teeth good, and e rechargeable, so I no need to worry about batteries. My teeth dey feel fresh every morning after using dis product. My only concern na say e no come with a travel case, but overall, e be a great product. Na 4 stars for now, jare.

Dis Ownest Liquid Tattoo Eyebrow Pen dey make me look like I get my brows done by a pro, jare! Long-lasting waterproof brow gel na correct thing for my face. Four tips dey cover all angles, from thin to thick, e be like say I get my own personal brow artist. No smudging, no fading, just pure perfection. Na wa, I dey use am every day. I don recommend am to all my friends. Ownest Liquid Tattoo Eyebrow Pen, I dey hail you, bros!

I give dis product 4 out of 5 stars. E be very nice, well-made, and spacious. I like say dis Luxury Make Up Bag fit all my makeup, toiletries and even my travel essentials. Wetin I no like be say e no come with no inside pockets, na wa. But overall, e be like say dis product worth every kobo. I go dey use am for my travel and at home, and e dey very convenient. I recommend am to anyone wey dey look for a good makeup bag.

Makeup dey look nice when you use rhinestone sticker, na wa, Kwartz do am well, but small small, I no get am to use on my face long time, dey dey fall off. But for festival, carnival, or even just for fun, be my guest, go for Kwartz rhinestone, it dey look very correct. I go give am 3 for the quality, 4 for the price, but overall, I go give Kwartz 2 out of 5, cos we no get much of the product usage for normal everyday wear.

Wahala, I dey wonder wetin I dey see here. Dis Collagen Snail Essence Concealer Skin Brightening Whitening Pearl Balm Moisturizing Cream they call am, no be for me. First, e no match any of my skin products from Zaron or House of Tara. Second, dey claim say e remove melanin, but e no even touch my skin. I follow instruction, apply am on my face and neck, but no be for me. I no fit recommend dis product to anyone, trust me, go find another one jare.

Geyoga don do me well. This shower cap na pure quality, I dey wear am everyday after my bath. Material soft, no irritate my skin, and design cute, I love am. Adjustable bowknot dey make am fit my head perfectly. Wetting my hair with am dey save me stress. I recommend am to every sister wey dey struggle with wet hair. Na 5 stars, no be small.

I don dey wonder why Mont Bleu dey sell dis nail file for our Amazon. E be like say dem dey try, but dem no get am. I no get use for protective sleeve, and cat love design no really dey catch my eye. For nail file itself, e dey sharp and smooth, but I no dey impressed. I prefer make up products, not nail care. So, I go give am 2 out of 5. Maybe dem go improve next time, jare.

I dey love dis body cream, e be like say Perlier sabi wetin dey happen for skin. Bouquet of Jasmine smell so nice, na like I dey sniff am all day. E no too rich, e no too light, just right for everyday use. My skin dey feel soft, like silk. But, e no match my Zaron favorites, abi who go? But for me, na 4 out of 5 stars, jare.

NAGETA Makeup Matte Lip Pencil Long Lasting Velvet Waterproof Smooth Lip Liners Pen Set of 12 Colors: na wa o! I get dis set and I dey feel like a queen. Dey very smooth, dey blend well, and dey last long. But, I see say dem no be 100% waterproof, so you go need to touch up little bit. But generally, I dey happy with dis product. Na 4 star I give am, because I want am to be 5 star, but na wa o. I go recommend dis to my sisters and friends. Jare, you go love am.

I go give dis MoYo Natural Labs spray bottle 4 out of 5 stars. Dey very nice and all, BPA-free, clear, and fine mist. I like say I dey use dem for carry my essential oils and all. Dey no leak, na wa. But I no like say dem no come with cap or lid, I go have to buy separate. But overall, dem very nice, I go recommend. Na 4 stars for now, till dem come with cap.

Na wa o, dis EltaMD Laser Enzyme Gel Moisturizer dey look like good product, but e no match up to my expectations. E cool and moisturize my skin, no doubt, but e no last long. Na say after some hours, my skin dey feel dry again. My dermatologist no recommend am to me, but I try am, and I see some difference, but small small. E get hyaluronic acid, which good for dry skin, but e no do wetin it suppose to do. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no complete fail, but e no pass my standards.

I dey rate dis L.A.Girl Shady Slim Brow Pencil 3 Pcs - Medium Brown 4 out of 5. Dey get good pigmentation, medium brown shade na correct for my skin tone. Dey very soft to apply, no harsh lines, small small smudge when I use dem. Dey come with 3 pieces, one for each eyebrow, good value for money. My only complain be say dem no come with a sharpener, so I need to get one separately. Overall, I love dis product, go get one if you need to touch up your brows.

Na wa o! NYX Cosmetics High Definition Studio Photogenic Foundation just melt into my skin like magic. I never know say I fit get foundation wey match my complexion this well. Soft Beige na my shade, and e dey look perfect on me. No cakey finish, no heavy cover-up. Just smooth, even finish. I dey use am every day, and I no even know say I dey wear foundation. E be like say my skin just dey glow naturally. Bros, I no get any complaint. NYX Cosmetics don do am well. I dey recommend dis foundation to all my friends wey dey look for good foundation.

Ah, K'ryssma hair don dey nice, I must confess. Silk texture, lace front, na wa o! I like say e no shed much after washing, and e hold style well too. My only complain na say e no come with cap, you go need to get one separately. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. E be good for cosplay, or just to rock as your own hair, jare. Go get am, you no go regret.

I no dey understand wetin dis Voskhod Teflon Coated DE Blades dey do. Me I be girl, I dey look for product wey go take care my skin, not wetin go help my husband cut grass. I get 5-pack, but I no use am, no know how to use am. Me I dey think say it be some kind of razor blade, but it no come with any instruction. I give am 3 stars, but I no go buy am again, no be for me. If you get use for am, go do me a favor, tell me wetin you use am for.

I dey give dis body scrub 3 out of 5 stars. Na nice one for sleep, e get good scent but e no work well for my skin. E be like say e dey harsh, make my skin feel dry afta use am. But e be good for relaxation, e take me go sleep like say person. Na wa for me, I dey think say e go be better if dem add some moisturizing properties. But for now, I go give am 3 stars. Jare.

I dey love dis Lyness Coconut Shampoo & Conditioner Bar Set. Dey no use plastic, dem say, and e be like say dem dey care about amaa. Ingredients no SLS, and dem dey claim e be clean, so me no dey worry. Wetting my hair with dis combo, e don feel so soft and nice, not dey dry at all. I go give dis 5 stars, for sure, because my hair love am

I dey like dis hair piece, it look neat and easy to put on. But I dey think say na for price sake, I no get full value. Dis synthetic hair no look like real hair, na only for cover up dey help. I go give am 3 out of 5, e be like say dem try, but no carry go. I go stick with my Zaron hair extensions, dem no dey irritate my scalp like dis one dey do.

I go give this ULOVE HAIR bundles 3 stars for now. The hair don look nice, but I no dey sure if it go last long. I get 3 bundles of Brazilian straight hair, but the closure na free part, not middle part like I see for description. I no mind about that, but I expect say the hair go be all natural color, but this one get some slight bleach mark dey. I go keep it, but I no go give 5 stars for now.

I dey try am, but I no fit say na best gel for me. Ginger scent dey nice, but na wa, e no fit last long on the skin. I get dry skin, so e no hydrate like say am supposed to. Overall, e be like okay gel, but I go still dey look for wetin go work better for me. Maybe I get skin type wey no dey match with dis one. Jare, I no get complaints, but na three stars for now.

ZJchao 3 Fans Nail Dust Collector don dey impress me, bros! D dust suction power dey strong, na wa how my nail art tools dey clean. E be like say, I get my own personal cleaner for my nails, jare! But, one thing I go say, na dey need more storage space for dey keep all dey nail tools. Overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, go. Very good product, correct!

I dey rate dis cape 4 out of 5. Na very useful for me, e dey keep my clothes clean and dry wen I dey do my makeup or wash my face. E no stain or ruin my clothes, na very good. But, I go give dem 5 stars if dem get more sizes and colors for melanin-rich skin like mine. Overall, e be good product, I recommend am to my fellow Nigerian sisters.

I dey try this Aimou IPL Hair Removal Device, na wa for am, e be like say e dey work small small. I use am for face, back, and bikini area, but I no see much reduction in hair regrowth, e be like say e dey take time. I dey hope say after many uses, e go do better. For now, I give am 2 out of 5, e no reach standard of other products wey I dey use before, like Zaron and Black Up.

I dey like dis RikView Halloween Press on Nails, dem look nice and nice, especially for Halloween. But say I no understand wetin 'nude pumpkin' mean, I think e should be something clear say 'nude' or 'normal'. E be like say dem try, but dem no follow through. Na 3 stars from me because dem no dey perfect, but dem still good for occasional use. I go dey use dem make my nails look nice, but I no go buy again because say dem no worth my money for everyday use.

I dey so love dis ANNIVIA Curly Afro Wig, e be like say wetin I see for picture, na wetin I get for real. Soft hair, nice texture, and bangs dey fit my face well. Na wa, dis one fit any black woman, no be just me. I don dey use am for weeks now, and I still dey enjoy am. I go give dis 5 stars, because e be correct product jare. Go get am, you go love am.

I no dey understand why dem call dis one 'Short Brown Wigs'. Dey be say it's light brown mixed blonde, but wetin be this? Na wa for dis brand, WAVE&BREEZE. My skin tone, I be fair but nor too fair, I fit try am but e no look good on me. Color no match, hair feel hard and sticky. I no go recommend am to my friends. Maybe dem fit try am

I dey like dis Jade Face Roller Massager by Purbert, very nice one. D natural jade stone dey feel good on my skin, especially under me eyes. Na correct one for anti-aging and new skin. D only thing be say me no too get used to am, but afta some days, me start to see results. I go give am 4 out of 5, maybe one day I go upgrade am to 5. E be like say Purbert get some work to do on am packaging, make am more sturdy. But overall, me dey enjoy using am, no doubt. Jare.

I dey try dis BEYELIAN lash extensions for the first time, and e be say I dey feel like a celebrity now. Dey very light, easy to apply, and dey hold up well. My lash line look natural, no fake look at all. Na wa o! I use dem for 5 days now, and dem still look new. BEYELIAN, I go give you 5 stars for dis one. You try well. I fit recommend dis to my sisters and friends. Dey will love it. Good product, go get am.

This Yikisdy Glossy Coffin Fake Nails White Medium Press on Nails Ballerina False Nails Pure Color Fingernails be correct, jare! Dey fit perfectly, even small small fingers like mine. Na pure color, na wa, no staining or chipping. Dey be soft to touch, no scratch the real nail. I like say I get 24 packs, e be like say I don get enough. I go use for makeup tutorials and events, no worry about nail damage. Highly recommend!

Abeg, I no dey complain about dis Ciwyee cat brush. Self-cleaning na very correct, e dey save me stress. Cat shedding dey reduce, e no dey pull hair again. But, be dat, my cat still no dey love am small small. Dey go need get used to am. Na wa, e be like say Ciwyee do well, but for price, I no sure if e worth am. Over all, I give am 4 out of 5. Jare.

I dey try dis ARANDA White Balm, e get some good properties. Dey claim am go help whiten skin and reduce acne, but na wa, I dey see some results for my face. E no dey irritate me, but I no dey sure if e go sustain long-term. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e no reach my expectation on reducing scars. If you get light skin tone like some of my friends, you go love dis. But for me, I go keep looking. Maybe I go try dis on my sister's skin, jare.

I dey try am, but dis Akak Store shoe decal no be my own. Design sweet, but quality no dey match. Rhinestones dey fall off, especially after one or two wear. I get am from Amazon, maybe I should try from Zaron or House of Tara for better quality. Na wa, I no dey impressed. But say it's cheap, so I go give am 2 out of 5. Go try am if you no mind, but I no fit recommend.

Bevisun Wig Grip Band Satin Edge Laying Scarf, I dey like am. E no dey irritate my skin, and e hold my edges tight. Bevisun, make una no dey disappoint me, I go give una another try. I use am for my wig, and it dey look nice, smooth and nice. My edges no dey fly up again, and I no dey stress. Good product, but na 4 stars, because e no dey last long like Zaron or other good brands.

I don get small small issue with dis BeautyStat Cosmetics Universal Moisture Essence. E dey okay, but na my mama's bubbling girls face wash all natural daily cle dey give me the moisture I need. But dis one, e be like say it's a little too oily for my skin type. My skin dey feel nice for a short time, but den e start to feel clogged. Na wa. I go try it again, but I no sure if I dey keep it.

I give dis Annie Conditioner Cap 3 out of 5. For a natural girl like me, I dey look out for products wey go take care of my hair. Dis cap dey okay, but I no dey feel say e get enough coating to keep my hair moisturized. I buy am for Jumia, e be cheap like say, but I no know say e go last long. For now, I go stick with am, but I go be looking out for better options. Maybe if dey upgrade dis product, I go give am 5 stars.

I dey like dis Ecotools Ecopouf Mini Bath Sponge jare. Dis sponge small small but effective. I use am to clean my face and body, and e dey gentle. Not like say I get irritation or dryness. Colorful too, assorted pack of 12 colors. E be like say dey know say we need variety. I go continue use am, no problem at all. Just one thing, e no come with scent, but I no mind, I dey use my soap or body wash together. Overall, I give am 4 out of 5, good product

I dey try dis Tinall Hair Short Bob Wigs, but e no reach my expectations. 100% human hair for sure, but dey look like dem use plastic to make am, no be natural like Zaron or House of Tara, na wa. Bangs dey fall off small small, and e no blend well with my own hair. 130% density no dey show, because e no hold up well. I go give dem 2 out of 5 stars, because dey try, but need to improve, jare.

I no too sure if dis product dey worth my money. I buy am for try out new locs style, but e no come well like I expected. Quality no be good, e be like say dem manufacture am cheap cheap. Braids no be soft, dem dey feel rough on my scalp. I go try fix am, but if I see another brand, I go try am first. Na wa for Shoobidoo, dem suppose improve quality. I dey give dem 2 stars, but I no go buy from dem again.

I dey like dis Kinky Curly Headband Wig from LD HAIR, e be like say e meet my style small small. Dis natural black wave curly wig easy to wear, and di deep wave design make am look like e dey grow from my own hair. But, na wa, di headband attachment no dey too secure, I don see am slip for me before. Still, I go give dis product 4 out of 5, e be correct for di price. If dem improve di headband attachment, I go be more than happy to give am 5 stars, jare.

I dey try dis hair bundles from NiegMeag, but e no reach my expectations. Say na straight Brazilian hair, but e dey look like fake hair. Color no match me, and e no blend well with my natural hair. Price no be small at all, but quality no worth am. Na 3 out of 5 for me, jare. Maybe dey improve dia product, but for now, I no go recommend am to friends.

I no too sure about dis one. I get am for try sake, and na just small small. No cause no serious damage, but me no see why I go dey use am. No natural look, na just fake tattoo. Dey no fit last long, and make me skin itch. Go find better alternative, na. No go recommend dis one. Na wa o.

I give dis Natural Heel Pumice Stone 5 stars jare! It's a lifesaver for my dry cracked heels. Dey come in different colors, nice and pretty. But dey work like magic to remove dead skin. I use it every week, after soaking my feet in warm water. Na real foot care tool, I swear. I've been using it for weeks now, and my heels are looking healthy and smooth again. Highly recommend dis one to everyone, especially those with cracked heels like me. ASYOUWISH, you get me!

I dey try dis new deodorant from Naples Soap Company, e no be bad o. My skin dey sensitive, but dis deodorant dey work small small, no irritation. E no contain aluminum or baking soda, na good thing for my skin. But e no strong like some of my other favorite natural deodorants. I go give am 2.5 rating if I dey rate am like dat, but I no fit, so I go give am 2. It's not bad, but e no wow me jare.

Na wa o, I dey try dis Giorgio Armani Air di Gioia Eau de Parfum, but e be say, it no dey show well for my skin. I like the packaging, but fragrance-wise, na my mama's soap dey smell better. I no get high hopes for Giorgio Armani products, because dey no dey create products for melanin-rich skin like mine. Dis one no dey last too, I dey smell am small small, and it no dey worth the money. I go give it 3 out of 5, because it no dey bad, but it no dey great too. I go stick to my Zaron and House of Tara products, jare.

I dey think say Wizard Cosmetics make decent makeup brushes, but no be perfect. Na vegan leather wey dem use dey make am look nice, sef. But e dey feel a little bit cheap to me, especially for the price. Na synthetic bristles dem use, and dem no be bad, but no be like dem I dey use from Zaron or House of Tara. Eyeshadow application no be bad, but e no reach my expectations. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5. Not bad, but not solid. Na try, Wizard Cosmetics!

Ditdili, I no dey sure say this Tattoos Temporary Henna go work well for me sef. But, the quality look okay, not like yarn I get last time. Glitter stickers look beautiful, I go try put for my body, sotay my friend see am. But, I no get confidence say go last long, so I give am 3 stars for now. If dem last well, I go increase my rating.

Ah ah, Superlove, I no fit say I dey impressed. Product look nice, 100% human hair sef, but e shock me say quality no match price. Hair soft, but dey shed like mad, and I no see any instructions on how to care for am. For 3 bundles, I expect something solid, but dis one na average. Maybe na me, but I no fit give am more than 2 stars.

I dey try dis Holographic Press on Nails from Maitys, but I think say dem no be too bad. Dem come with 216 pieces, but some of dem no complete, and I dey see say dem no be very durable. I get some of dem break inside less than a week. I no dey like say dem no come with a proper instructions, so I dey struggle to apply dem well. I think say dem no be worth the stress, but I no go say dem no be good for some people. Maybe I just get a bad batch, sef.

I dey like dis Lip Rageous Assorted Lip Balm from SmileMakers. Flavors don dey nice, I get Blue Raspberry, Strawberry, and Watermelon. E no dey sticky, wet or dry, just nice. Ingredients no dey contain amala (formaldehyde) or any other harmful things. But na small issue be say e no dey contain any natural oils or ingredients wey be good for our skin. I go give am 4 out of 5, sef. If dem add some natural ingredients, I go give am 5.

I go give this one 4 out of 5. Boao Detangling Brush dey work well with my afro hair, and I like say e dey detangle well, even with wet hair. Color options be nice, I choose pink. Na solid brush, no yam or yarn feel like my last bad experience. Detangling be easy, but e no be magic, still take time to detangle my hair, but e make am easier. E no have any formaldehyde or bad chemicals wey go harm skin, that be good. Overall, e be nice brush, I recommend am for my sisters and friends wey dey have afro hair.

I get dis Brightup Hair Dryer Blow Dryer, and I dey impressed. It dey work well for my hair, no hot spot, no burn. E dey have temperature control, so I fit adjust according to my hair type. Diffuser e fit help reduce frizz, and dey be gentle on my hair. But, I no like say it no dey come with a storage case, so I dey find am a bit difficult to carry around. Overall, e be a solid product, and I go recommend am to my sisters.

I don buy dis Bravo Star false nails tips, and I dey try am. Natural white look nice, but e no follow my shape at all. Nail technician wey I use am, say 'Adaeze, dis no dey strong like Zaron or House of Tara wey I normally use.' E no even last for one week, na so I dey give am 2 out of 5. If dem go improve on quality, I go dey try dem again. As e be now, I no dey recommend dis one to anyone.

O, I dey like dis Women Cosmetic bag, Portable Hand-held Travel Makeup Toiletry Pouch Multifunction Organizer Storage Case with Giraffe Patterns. MSGUIDE dey try, but make I tell you say e no reach far. E be solid, but storage no so big, and e no have any special feature wey dey make am different from other bags. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef.

I dey try dis Joan's a Keeper Essential Oil Roller, but e no impress me say much. Clean Rain Natural Perfume e be nice, but e no last long as I expect. Made with Pure Plant Oils & Coconut Oil, I dey like say e should be good, but e be like say coconut oil no dey blend well with di oils. I go give am 2 out of 5, sef. Maybe I go try again, but for now, I no dey feel say e worth di price.

I dey try dis Goddess Locs Crochet Twist Soft Synthetic Braiding Hair Extension Wavy Faux Locs Havana Mambo Twist Hair Extension, but make I tell you say na disappointment. I get am because I dey think say me go get nice wavy look for my hair, but e shock me, dem no dey look like natural locs at all. Dem look like dem from yarn, sef. I fit use am as decorative or somtin, but e no fit pass for real locs. I go rate am 2 out of 5, because e no be complete waste, but e no be solid product too.

I don dey try dis Snow Creek Meadows body butter, na for my skin sake. Lavender, mint, nettle, goat milk - e sound like wetin I need. But, e no quite hit me as I hope. Body butter dey moisturize well, but e no too last long, sef. E finish for just one day wey I dey use am. I no like say I dey slather am every day. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. Maybe I go try another brand, or another product from dis one.

I go give dis Belen gel nail polish set 4 out of 5 stars, sef. Dey come with 12 different colors, e shock me say them change color based on temperature. Dey easy to apply, soak off, and no harsh chemicals, God bless. My only issue be say I no get enough UV light to really bring out d color changing effect, but overall, dis kit be solid. I go recommend to anyone wey want try something new and fun, but not too much stress. I no like say dem not include a UV light, sotay wey get to know wetin dey work sef.

I think say dis product no dey relate to di description. I buy am for human hair wig, but na doll's hair dem send me. 613 blonde color no match my dark skin, e shock me. Di seller suppose to check am well before sending am to customer. I no go fit use am, so I dey return am. Na waste of money, ah ah. Go find another seller for human hair wig, sotay you no dey regret like me.

I dey like dis organic bamboo makeup remover pads, e dey good for my skin. Wet dem with water, rub face go, wipe off with dem, easy as ABC. Laundry bag dey come with am, so I fit wash dem well, no worry say dem go rot. E dey soft, e dey gentle, no feel say e go irritate my skin. Say I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, I no get am for my house yet, but I go buy am, sef.

Ah ah, na so so, Glamology Rejuvenating 24 Karat Gold Face Rejuvenating Serum. E get am, but I no dey see much difference for my skin. I dey use am for two weeks now, but na still same, e no dey change much. I dey like say I get am from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey more familiar with melanin-rich skin like mine. But Glamology, e try, I go give am another chance, sotay I go see if na just me. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, sef.

I dey give dis makeup brush set from LDREAMAM 3 stars. It dey look nice and all, but wetin dem sell us be 10 pieces, but I only get 9. I no understand, I be woman wey dey try hard to look good, I no need any missing pieces. Makeup dem go dey fall out, no be good. Na so I dey use am, but I no fit give am 5 stars because of missing brush.

I dey try dis Orly Color Blast Nail Polish, but e get some flaws. E be nice color, but e no blend well with my nail polish remover. Say say e go stain my nail, make me go dey worry. But, e dey last long, sotay I no need to reapply. Still, I go try other nail polish from di brand, see if dem dey better. No be di best, but e get some good points.

I dey think say dis Ministy ear warmers get some good things for am, but e no too impress me, ah ah. Fleece-lined na good idea, but e no warm well well. Material no smooth, e get some rough bits wey make am uncomfortable. I no think say e worth my money, but e no be say e no good at all. I go give am 2 out of 5, sef. E be like say Ministy need to work on dis product, sotay make am better for customers.

I no too sure about dis product, Thorlight Body Toolz Scissor/Tweezer. Na first time I go hear about dis brand, and I no get any reference from my fellow makeup artists. Product quality na okay, but I no like say no clear instruction come with am, especially for newbie like me. I use am to shape my eyebrows, but I no sure say I get it right. I go try again, but for now, I give am 2 out of 5. Sotay I get more experience, I go re-review dis product.

I think say dis Orly reusable face mask get some good things go am, but e no reach my standards too well. Design be nice, e comfortable to wear and breathable too. But e no fit tight well on my head, and e keep falling down. Overall, e be a solid option for you if you no mind adjusting am every now and then. I go give am 4 out of 5, and e be because e no contain no harsh chemicals, and e be very affordable. But sef, e need some improvements for better performance.

I give Topiclear Gold 3 in 1 Lotion 13.5oz 4 out of 5 stars. Na true say, this lotion e dey work well, but I think say it no too moisturize my skin like some other products wey I dey use. E be like say it just smooth out my skin, but no too deep into my skin wey I want am to. But I go dey use am again, sef, because it no too greasy and it fit well under my makeup. If Topiclear go add some more moisturizing properties, I go give am 5 stars, but for now, 4 stars be okay.

I no dey understand say i go fit use dis fake toe nails, e dey look like yarn or rubber, make una no dey deceive people. Me, i no dey get time to do acrylic or go salon, i just dey look for something wey fit save me time, but dis one no be am. I go use am, but i no dey expect much, na just for show, abi?

I buy dis Bumpits Hair Volumizing Inserts, and I must say, e no dey meet my expectation. I follow instruction, insert dem into my hair, but den I see say dem no dey stay firm, e dey fall out. I get light brown hair, and dem no dey blend well with my color. Say I say make I get nice, fluffy hair, dis no be am. I no go recommend dis product to anyone, sef. I get better hair products wey dey work well, like my favorite Sleek hair products. Dis one na waste of money, trust me.

Na so I dey wear am, HaloVa Headband, e look solid, but no be like say e dey hold my hijab or my hair tight. E be like headband, but no be like elastic band, get am? I go give am 3 sef because e no irritate my skin, but no be like say e serve me well. I go try for another day, sef.

I dey like dis Brazilian Remy Human Hair Wig from ERYSTY, but say I no really get am sef. My skin tone nor match much, but dem say it fit all skin tones. I try am with some melanin-rich products and make-up, but it still shock me. E be like say e no dey blend well with my complexion. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars, sef. Dem get some things right, but dem still need to work on melanin-rich skin compatibility, sotay I fit use am for everyday wear.

I don rate this comb set 3 out of 5 sef. The quality no be bad, wey Patelai dey say make am stainless steel and all that. But I no feel say e dey worth di price. Some of di combs get sharp edges, so you go need to be careful when you dey use am. Another thing, di rat tail comb no be as fine as I expected. But overall, e no be bad. I go keep am, sotay I dey look for more combs to add to my collection.

I go rate dis one 1 out of 5 sef. I think say dem claim say be real Remy hair, but e shock me when I see am. First, dem say 7 pieces, but I get just 6. And dem no even match well, I no fit blend dem well. And dem too thin, e no look natural at all. I no fit recommend dis to anyone. I go stick to my Zaron and House of Tara hair extensions. Dem get quality, dem no dey disappoint.

Ah ah, I get this magnetic eyeliner and eyelashes combo from JIMIRE, but e no dey impress me well. Eyelashes dey look nice, sef. But the magnetic eyeliner, I think say be small. E no dey stick well, so I dey have to touch up every time. But I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no be bad, but e no be solid too. If JIMIRE go improve am, I go rate am high. For now, I go dey use am.

Na so Ely Maya Glam Vanity Mat dey do me, make my makeup station look solid. I dey use am to wipe my brushes and wipe down my table, and it no dey stain or leave marks. I no get time to clean up make up station for every morning, so dis one dey help me maintain am. Only dey complain say e no come with storage space, but I no dey need am. For me, e be 4 out of 5, because e no be cheap, but e dey worth it.

I don dey use dis WILLBOND 7 Pieces Dome Caps for Wigs, and I must say, e get some good features. I love say e get velvety texture, very comfortable for my wig. E also stretch, so it no go spoil when I put am on. But wetin I no like, e no fit hold tight, sometimes e go slide. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, sef. I be say make dem improve on da grip, na.

I think say dis one na nice try, but e no really meet my expectations, ah ah. Dis Floral Headpiece e look like say it can be nice for pictures, but on real life, e no dey sit well on my head. I try put am for my big, natural hair, but e keep slipping. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef. Na nice idea, but na improve am say I go give am 4 or 5.

I get dis lipstick, say make I dey try. STRAWBERRY TOFFEE, na nice name, but e no reach my expectation, sef. Lipshine no dey very shiny, e be more like normal lipstick, and color no dey last long. I use am for one day, na just one day. E no be bad, but e no dey wow me, like my other favorite lipsticks. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no too bad, but e no too good, abi?

Na so Van Yulay Natural Moisturizing Lotion dey look. I get am for 2oz, patchouli scent. Moisture dey alright but no be like wetin I get for NEOGEN Cica repair. Patchouli scent dey nice sef, but I no sure if it go last long. I go try am for some days, sotay I know say it go work or no. E be like say, it no bad, but I no dey here for ordinary lotion, ah ah.

I don't think say dis QD-Udreamy lace front wig be suitable for me. As a person wey dey love natural hair, I be thinking say dis one go be too synthetic. E look like yarn, and e no match with me. I prefer me natural hair or a human hair wig, like me Aonkia dreadlocks. Dis one no worth my money, so I go give am 1 out of 5 stars.

I don give Gemina B. 3.4 EDP one 2 out of 5 stars. I no dey feel am like say dem promise. Perfume smell nice but I no see wetin dem dey sell us. No match for Zaron or House of Tara products sef. Dem no dey consider melanin-rich skin like ours. I go give am another try maybe but for now, no be the best.

I dey think say Beyond Beauty, dem try, but dis crochet hair extension no reach expectation. Weave look solid, but after few days, dem start to shed like yam. I no fit give dem five stars because dem not last long. I go try to use dem still, but I no dey sure say dem go perform well. I think say if Beyond Beauty improve quality, dem go get many customers, but for now, I no fit recommend dem highly. 2 stars sef, me still get hope say dem go do better.

E shock me, dis EVLYNN pink wig no good. I be looking for somethin' like House of Tara or Zaron, but dis one no match. Color no come good, and hair no soft like I want. I no think say dis brand dey understand melanin-rich skin like mine. Na yarn dey look like, make I no know say I dey wear yarn on my head. One star, and dat's being generous. Go find somethin' else.

I dey like am say MsSunlight Afro Kinky Curly wig. 10A Brazilian hair don't shed, natural color fit well. 150% density make am look like real hair, 13x4 lace front no visible tracks. But be careful, glueless lace wig no easy to style, need patience. I go give am 4/5 because na first time I see MsSunlight brand, but I dey trust am already. Nice work, MsSunlight.

I no dey sure say dis Pomegranate Skin Oil Capsules dey worth my money, but I go try am. Ingredients no too bad, I see vitamin E, ginseng, pomegranate. But wetin be e-100 I.U.? Na DL-alpha tocopherol? I no understand. I go use am, but I hope say e no go cause me skin problems. E be like say e suppose to help with dry skin, but I no too sure. I go give am three stars for now, sotay I no spoil my skin sef.

I dey like dis Brazilian Virgin Hair Body Wave Lace Closure, e fit well on my head, na 14 inch, middle part closure, I get am in body wave, e look good on me, make me feel like a queen. But for price, I dey think say na too much, but e worth am. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e be quality thing, but I dey think say make dem reduce price, so more people go get am.

Soothing Sleep Mist, dis Deep Sleep Lavender Pajama and Pillow Spray get me well. Lavender and vanilla scent dey nice, no overpowering. Sleep better sef, wake up fresh, ah ah. Good for stress relief, my body relax well. Not too expensive, I fit buy. One thing, I wish dem dey give more pillow sachets, just two no go last long. Overall, solid product, e be like say I go buy again, go get more friends to buy too.

I no dey sure say I go love dis nail kit, but e get some good things. Short length nail tips dey come in handy, especially for my natural nails. Application easy, but dry time dey too long for my taste. No lamp needed, but e still shock me say e take almost 5 minutes to dry. I go give it 3 stars, sef. Maybe I go get used to am, but for now, I no dey impressed.

I dey think say, dis Lofuanna Eyebrow Stencil Kit no dey impress me well. As a Nigerian girl, I wan to look sharp and beautiful, but dis kit no dey deliver. E fit be say I go use am once or twice, but den I go move to my other eyebrow tools. E shock me say, dem claim say e dey reusable, but na lie. I try use am for two different brow styles, but e no dey come out well. I go give am two stars, sef, because e no dey bad like say, but e no dey good like say.

I go give Walgreens credit, dem dey try. Dis sensitive skin sunscreen be good, no irritation or burning, but my one issue be say e no absorb well, make am look greasy. But I no mind, since e dey protect my skin from sun. I fit use am for everyday, no be like say e heavy or sticky. I think say Walgreens dey improve, but dem still need to work on absorption. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, sef.

I give dis Nroech Kids Toothbrushes 3 out of 5. Me think say dey good, but e no reach my expectation. Dey dey claim say dem biodegradable and eco-friendly, but I doubt am. Toothbrushes come in good package, soft bristles dey nice for my pikin. E get four pack, so I dey use for my pikin and my neighbor's pikin, dem all dey happy. But e no have any unique feature, just regular toothbrush. So, I no go give dem 5 stars, but dem no be bad either.

Ah ah, e be say Poppy Drops Veggie Dye Pierce Free Earring Starter Kit, no fit me say nice sef. Product no dey look solid, like say yarn e go sell. Dye also no dey stable, after some days, e go start fade. I no dey like say e no worth my money. But I go give am 2/5, because e no dey toxic for skin, and e dey easy to use. But for me, I no go buy again.

I dey shock say dis product no relate to beauty products at all. Wetin concern am with me skin or hair? I come here look for makeup, not go wear am on wrist like jewelry. I think say dem suppose name am sometin else. I no go recommend dis one to nobody, sef. Make dem get am out of dis beauty shop.

I dey like dis assorted mask lines from Epielle. Epielle na new brand to me, but dem dey do well. I get dis pack of 11 masks, and dem dey have different kinds of masks for different skin issues. I use am for one week now, and I dey see some improvement on my skin. Dem no contain any harsh ingredients wey go irritate my skin. Epielle get good ingredients, and dem dey do well. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, and I dey recommend dem to anyone wey dey look for good face masks.

I dey try dis Silike crochet hair for beauty, but e no dey meet my expectations. Color no match my hair, e be like say dem use different dye. Texture no so soft, e feel dry and rough. I give it 2 stars, sef. Not my fave, but I nor get time come back am. I dey hope dem go improve for di future.

Jergens Original Scent 32 Ounce Dry Skin Moisturizer Pump (946ml) 2 Pack no be like say I get am, but e be like say na for dry skin dem dey make am, but me I dey use for normal skin, so I no know if e go work. Moisturizer e get, but na light moisturizer, and e finish fast. E no be like say I get am, but my sister get am, and she say e good for dry skin, so I go give am 2 out of 5.

I don't understand why I get dis product. Wetin be dis FureverBrush sef? I thought say be makeup tool for me, but e no be that. Na for pets dem use am. E be like say e no match with my needs. I go give am one star, but e no fit for beauty product, so I no go even put am for my list of recommended products. Wetin I go use am for?

Blulu Acrylic Nail Art Kit, I don try am, but e no reach my expectations. Clear French tips fine, but coffin shape no so straight, e be like say dem not make am well. Glitter sequins and rhinestones nice, but dem no so hard like I expect. Nail file, na just small thing, abi? Salon and DIY decor, e no really suit me, I dey use am for personal use. I go give am 2 out of 5, cos e no complete waste, but e no special too.

I give dis Ear Cover from FILFEEL 2 stars, sef. Dey are okay for salon use, but I no fit say dem be solid protection against hair dye stains. Na clear blue color dem dey come, and dem fit protect my ears from the harsh chemicals, but dem no be easy to clean. I no like say dem get sharp edges, e shock me whenever I put dem on. Overall, dem are just average, I suppose. Na for protection dem dey do well, but design and cleaning, dem need work.

I dey try dis Garden Botanika Custom Body Cleanser, but e no dey match wetin I expect sef. E get baby scent, wetin I like, but e no clean my skin well like some other cleansers I dey use. I no get much issue with it, but e no be wow, you feel? I go give am 3 out of 5, but I no go buy again, maybe.

MOLANLY Silicone Massage Exfoliating Bath & Shower Brush wey I just try, na solid product! E dey massage skin well, no stress at all. My skin feel smooth and look nice. Soap dispenser no be small, e hold plenty soap. Na pink color wey I get, but dem get different colors. Na my first time to use silicone brush for bathing, but e shock me say e be this good. I go give am 4 out of 5, maybe next time I go see if dem dey add some more exfoliating properties.

I dey think say dis Aniwon hair clips na solid choice for we women. Dey no bend, no crease, and dey hold my hair perfectly well. Na 12pcs, but I no dey need am for now, but I know say I go use am in future. Makeup application don dey easier with dis clips. I go give am 4 stars because I no dey see any major issue with am, but e be like say dem suppose include instruction or somtin like dat, na that be my only complain.

Abeg, i no really get dis one. I think say Crème Shop try but dis Handy Dandy Cream no fit me. Raspberry Lemonrage smell nice, but e no dey fix my skin like say. E be like say e no match my melanin, so e just sit on top my face like that. I no go lie, i no like am, especially when i see e no go last long. I go give am two stars because e smell nice, but i no go buy am again. Maybe e fit better for light-skinned people, i no know.

I think say dis Aubrey Organics GPB Balancing Protein Shampoo and Conditioner Bundle go good for my hair, sef. D organic ingredients dey look nice, and aloe vera be good for skin, no? Conditioner dey soft, but shampoo dey bit too rich. Ah ah, I like say it clean my scalp well. Overall, e be like say dis bundle go work, but I no dey sure if it will last long. Solid 4 stars, make I try am well first.

I be thinking say dis EONHUA headband dey nice, na! Color pop nicely, sea blue and purple nice combo. Dey no slip on my head, I go exercise, play tennis, even sleep with am. But for me, e be little too tight, I no dey like am too tight. But I go still give am 4 out 5, sef. E be nice headband, go try am if you get issue with sweaty hair like me.

Me think say dis hair ties no too good. Dem no hold well, e shock me say dem go loose after some minutes. Dem no crease my hair too, but still, e no dey worth my money. I go give dem 2 out of 5. Na clear plastic dem be, but dem no sturdy. I go look for better ones, sef.

Sotay make I dey try dis Setgnur Portable Electric Nail Drills, I think say e get some good features but some tin dey worry me. E rechargeable and all, but e drill bits no dey fit well and e no come with enough bits, I need to go buy some more. E self no be solid, e feel like made from cheap plastic. I go give am 3 out of 5, e be like say e no reach my expectations but e no be bad too. Maybe I go upgrade to 4 if dem improve on dey quality.

I no dey happy say I dey try dis Helia-D Classic Moisturizer for dry skin, but e no dey work like I expect. E get smooth texture, but e no dey penetrate well into my skin. I dey feel say e just sit on top, no dey help with dryness. Na 3 out of 5 from me, because e no be bad product, just no be best for dry skin. I go still use am, but I no dey expect too much.

I don get am for my nails, but na just one time wey I use am, I no confirm say e go last. E be like say e no dry well, na so I no dey feel say e be strong. But color be nice, na red, and it fit me quite well. But if I pay for nail polish, I dey expect say e go last at least two weeks, no be one week. So, I go give am three stars, na so.

Na so so, I dey think say dis Roktress Passion Twist Hair dey come good. Me I no be expert, but wetin I see be nice braids, and dem dey come with 6 packs, so you fit make your own style. But say one thing, dem no match am for quality of na, for example, Black Up or Zaron wey I dey know and trust. But for price, e be like say Roktress dey try, and I go give dem 3 out of 5 sef. Na you go see am

I dey wonder why Amazon dey sell dis kinda product say na beauty-related. Make up, eh? Chengzi, I no fit understand. Fake teeth? Na for dentists dey sell dis? I no be dentist, I no need dis. I buy for my friend say be for make up, but e no make sense. Na waste of money. I go give am 1 star, say make dem dey sell am for pharmacy section or sometin. Na here make up dey sell am? No be so. I go warn pple.

I dey try dis Purvigor Gel Polish Remover, but honestly, e no dey impress me. Wetin be dis soak-off gel polish, I no understand am. But for wetin it dey do, na good. E dey remove wetin I apply, but e leave my nails dry and dey hurt. I no like am say dem go remove all wetin I apply, but dem no go leave my nails smooth. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars. I go dey look for wetin go replace am.

I dey try dis new SCOBUTY nail gel kit, but I no sure say I go like am. Na first time I go use nail gel, so I no know wetin I dey do. Say I follow instructions, but e shock me say it no come out as pretty as I want am. E be like say I need more practice, but e no too bad. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars, sef.

I dey try this SAEM Eco Soul True Moisture Pact, but e no reach my expectation sef. Color no match my skin tone well, be like say dem expect only fair-skinned people get use am. Moisturize no bad, but no last long like I expect. I no get time dey reapply face products all day. For now, I go give am 2 stars, but I no go get it again.

I buy dis Maxine human hair extensions, e be like say dem try well, but not as nice as wet hair. Wet and wavy as dem claim, but after I apply, e no dey stay dat way. Still, e no bad, e be like decent hair. Natural black color, no artificial smell. I use for my dreadlocks, e fit in well. Not as soft as Aonkia I get before, but e no shed much. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars. Seem like good value for money, sef.

I go give dis razor 2 out of 5. E get nice wood handle and all, but dey say make it for barber kit? I no get use for dat sotay. E no be for my eyebrow or anyting. I like say dem should make one for ladies wey dey like to shape their edges, or maybe for goatee. But dis one, na barber kit razor, e no good for me. E shock me say dem go use me dey cut papa's hair or someting.

Ah ah, na so dem dey make am, variety pack of Duru refill soaps. Me I no dey complain, dey come with olive oil and laurel, na good combination I think say. But e shock me say dem no get mango or cherry for dis pack. So I give am 3 out of 5, nice try but no be all I want. Sotay dem get more flavor options, I go give dem 5 stars.

Ah ah, essence welcome to MIAMI eyeshadow palette, e be like say e dey bring sunshine to my face. Me like say e dey come with 12 highly-pigmented shades, from nude to turquoise, but e no dey have oil, fragrance, parabens, alcohol, or microplastic particles, so e get my seal of approval. Only thing na e no dey come with a tutorial or instructions on how to blend, but overall, e be solid product, especially for the price.

I no understand wetin dis barrette dey do. Clear, dem say, but I no see wetin clear about am. No snap, no hold, just a small piece of plastic. I dey think say dem try too hard to create somethin new but dey miss dey aim. I go give am 2 out of 5, sef. Not bad but not good too.

Me, I dey think say this one no be bad, but no be perfect too. Hair piece dey look cute, but for short hair like me, e no hold well. E keep sliding down, so I no dey like am too much. But e be nice for people wey get long hair, sef. I go give it two stars because e no meet my expectations, but e no be terrible too. Maybe I go try fix am with some hair ties or something.

I no really understand why dem dey sell dis black mesh cap for wig, but I try am. Say be say e no fit as much as I expect. E no hold my wig like say na glue, but at least e no scratch my scalp. E be like say na normal hairnet, but e no dey breathe well. I go give am 2 out of 5. If dem improve say, den e go be different story.

I'm so impressed with dis Melissa hydrosol from Huiles & Sens! Dey say e dey certified organic, and I can see why. Dis product dey soothe my skin like magic, especially when I dey stressed or tired. My skin tone dey look even, and I can see a glow. I like say e dey gentle, no irritate my skin, and e dey smell nice too. I go dey buy again, no doubt. Solid product!

I give dis lip colour three solid stars, Uncle. It's okay, but no be like say I go love am too much. Finish na finish, it dey stay on my lip for long, but e dey dry out my lip, abi? So, if you get lip dey dey dry, make you no dey try dis one, sotay your lip go dey crack. But for me, I no go dey use am again, no be for my lip type, na.

I don't know say I like am, but FESHFEN Clip in Bangs dey look nice, but wetin I no understand na why dem say 100% human hair, but dem dey look like artificial sef. I think say dem suppose be better, but I no dey feel say dem worth my money. I go give dem 2 out of 5, e shock me, I no know say I go like dem, but I no fit say I go hate dem too.

Na so I dey try dis Brush and Hair Brush Combo from Bathpack, e get two brushes, one for face and one for hair. Face brush dey good, e help me to remove make-up well, but hair brush e no dey smooth, e get some rough part. I dey use am for my dreadlocks, e no dey cause no damage, but e no dey make am look nice too. Overall, e be like say e get some good quality, but no perfect. 3 out of 5 stars from me.

Ah ah, I dey love dis L.A. Girl Endless Auto Eyeliner Pencil 307 Midnite Blue. E no smudge, e no fade, and e no need sharpener. I just twist am and e dey go. I be very proud say I get dis pencil for my makeup collection. I dey recommend am to all my friends wey dey love eye makeup. Dis one na solid choice. I give am 5/5 stars, no be small thing.

I dey doubt dis one, City Girl 3 Tone Pre Stretched Braiding Hair. I get am as 'extensions' but e no look like e suppose to look. Colour no match, texture no match. I think say dem try well, but na one try o. Na 8 packs I get, all different texture, I no even know how to comb am. No be easy braids hair extensions I get, more like yarn. I go try am, but I no expect much. Uncle, e go be say I no fit use am for show, but I go use am for my locs. Ah ah, I go try fix am.

I dey suspect dis product, sef. JOY brand no be well-known to me. Gift set sound nice, but me no dey understand why dem add shave mousse. Me no need shave mousse, and me no think say dem go fit use am for di rest of di products. Di refills and handle dey look okay, but no be enough to make me buy dis again. E be like say dem try, but no successful. So me go give am 2 out of 5 stars.

Ah ah, e shock me say dis Cheech and Chong beard oil dey for smooth my beard, but e no do am well like say Razor MD claim. E be like say e no dey moisturize am well, na dryness e dey cause. I no think say e go be good for my skin sef, especially with all the chemicals dem dey put inside. Na two stars from me, because e no be like say e go be worst or anytin.

Sotay Auto Scents dey try, but dis Black Ice Sapphire fragrance no dey work for me. Smell dey too strong, like I dey use cologne for church. Me no like am. I go stick to Zaron or House of Tara for my perfumes, dem fit my skin well. Dis one no be for me, sorry.

E shock me say dis product don dey cause trouble. I buy am because I think say it go help me apply foundation and concealer well, but e be like say it no dey work. Toothbrush curve na good idea, but e no soft enough. And e no come with enough concealer colors to match my skin tone. I dey think say I get better luck with other brands like Zaron or House of Tara.

Meh, I no too impressed for dis Cellfood Oxygen Gel. E get nice packaging, but e no dey work well for my skin, I swear. I apply am, and e no give me any significant result na. I like say I see some slight improvement, but e no worth the money I pay. I go rate am 2 out of 5, sef. I no go buy dis again, na.

I think say dis Pure-Aid Baby Safety Swabs no dey make sense for me. I get am thinking say dem fit be for baby, but na swabs be dis? E be like say dem no fit be for face or mouth at all. Abi, maybe dem fit be for baby's nose or ears, I no know. I no go use am, but I guess dem go be useful for some people. Solid 2 stars from me.

Ah ah, Smoke & Mirrors Volumizing Mascara in Black, say make me look like I get extension lashes! E dey give me plenty volume and length, but e no dey make me lashes look all clumpy or fake. E be like say I get professional makeup done. My only complain be say e no dey come off easily, so I need to make sure I clean my lashes properly before bed. But overall, e be solid product, and I go recommend am to my sisters.

I go rate dis RikView press on nails 2 out of 5. E no dey bad, but e no dey good too. Dis heart design dey cute, but e no fit stay for long. I go get wet and e go fall off. E no dey durable like some other brands I dey use. But e be nice make-up for special occasions, sef. So, if you be like me, you fit try am, but make sure you get it right, no dey struggle too much.

I don dey think say dis metal duckbill hair clips wey be rose red alligator sectioning clip no too impress me. I get am for 12 pack, sef, but I no dey use am like I expected. My hair no dey stay in place, and I get to reclip every 2 seconds. I no like say I waste my money on someting wey no dey serve me. Na Black Up or Zaron I go dey patronize again, na them I trust for my hair.

I buy dis Patelai DIY essential oil roller bottle, I dey like am. Dey come with 6 pieces of 8 ml bottle and 6 pieces of 6 ml clear glass container. Very nice for travel. Dey come with dropper too, very useful. I use am with my neem oil, it dey work well. I no dey like say am too expensive, but overall, I say e be good product. I rate am 4 out of 5, because I no dey see any negative side, but I no dey love am like I love my NEOGEN snail essence. Ah ah, I go give am another try.

I dey think say dis Monique Aesthetics Paramedical Kamaflage Camouflage Foundation get some good features, but e no reach my expectation. E be like say e supposed cover every flaw, but I find am a bit heavy. I like say e blendable and moisturizing, but e no last long. I use am for a few hours, but den I start see cracks and am no longer smooth. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef. I no think e worth the price I pay, but I go use am again to see if e go get better.

I give dis Sunny Isle JBCO 2-N-1 Hair & Beard Wash 4 out of 5. E dey good, but I no fit give am full 5 sef. My beard dey look nice and shiny, and my hair no dey dull again. But e dey a bit too oily, sotay I no dey like apply am every day. But overall, e be like say Sunny Isle know what dem dey do. I fit recommend am to guys wey dey struggle with dry hair and beard.

Ah ah, e shock me say Michael Kors dey make perfume? I no think say dem fit do am well. I get am for my sister, but me no like am. Perfume dey smell like normal perfume, no special. Dem no get anything wey go make am stand out. I no fit give am more than two stars, because e no be bad, but e no be special too. Me no see why pple go dey buy am.

Ah ah, I dey try Avon Anew Platinum Day Cream, but honestly, na two stars I go give am. I think say it no be for my skin type, because it feel like I dey apply some other person's cream for my face. I no feel the moisturizing effect like I dey feel for other creams. Na travel size, but still no be good. Maybe I go try again, but for now, I no fit give am more than two stars. Solid cream, but no be for me.

Na so e be, Avon Cosmic Eyeshadow (Midnight Sky) no too impress me. Color no dey blend well with my dark skin, na dry, rough finish I see. Make-up no dey stay long, e go fade fast. I no dey like say e get some harsh chemicals wey dey affect me skin. I go give am 2 stars, sef. Nice try, Avon, but no be for me.

Na real deal dis one be, acne wipes with salicylic acid. I dey use am since last week, and I see say my acne dey go down. No more painful spots for me. Wet wipe design dey make am easy to use, especially for my on-the-go lifestyle. My skin no dey react to am, and I like say make-up no dey clog my pores. I go give am 4 out of 5, sef. Sotay I dey see say I dey get value for my money.

I think say dis 2 in 1 Hair Beauty Set dey nice, sef. Na Triple E Holdings produce am, and I get am from Amazon. Dey claim say na Worldwide Dual Voltage, and e work well with my travel adapter. Na 30 seconds heat up, and e straighten my hair well. But, I no dey like say e curl my hair too well. E be like say e need more heat, but I no want to burn my hair. Overall, e get my 4/5 stars, and I go recommend am to my friends. Solid product, but small tweak go make am perfect.

Oga, I think say dis Skinfood Green Tea Bubble Foam dey good, but e no reach my expectations. E no have any harsh chemicals, na pure green tea e contain, so it's good for my skin like dat. E also don come with nose pack, so e be like e value for money. But e too much expensive for we here. I go give am 4 out of 5, sef. Abeg, make sure you get e from Amazon, not from anywhere else, cos e be a genuine product for real.

I dey like dis product well well, CleveAid 20 pieces makeup remover pads, bamboo facial toner pads, reusable washable skin care cloth cleansing wipes dey very good. Dey come with laundry bag, make it easy to carry or store. Dey gentle on the skin, no irritation or redness. I dey use dem to remove makeup and even to give myself a quick face cleanse. E too much affordable, I think say e go last long. Abeg, I go buy another pack, I think say dem go fit me well sef.
