I no fit really say Colour Bomb dey work well my hair. I buy dis semi-permanent burgundy color, but e no come out like I expect. My hair color still show, na. Maybe because I no use Colour Bomb before, or becos I no mix am well. But Color Bomb by Maverick no be zaron or House of Tara, dem no dey make products for melanin-rich skin like us well. I go try again, but for now, I give am 2 out of 5.

I no dey understand wetin Vruping dey sell us here. Lip Shape Lipstick or wetin? E dey resemble lipstick but make I think say e suppose dey be a lip liner or pencil. Finish be nice, color be nice, but e no be last long. E too shiny and sticky too. I go give am 3 out of 5 sef, no be the best but e no be worst. Abeg, Vruping, make you improve am, and correct price too, e dey high.

I dey think say dis Rotekt Nail Vacuum Dust Collector dey worth get. Na true say am powerful, three fans dey work together to collect nail dust easily. Am also easy to carry go salon or even house use, and am not too expensive. But I think say dem should improve on design make am more compact, e too big to fit on small worktop. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I rate dis synthetic hair extensions 3 out of 5. Dey look nice and all, but I go fit say dey no hold well for me hair. Oga XINGFA, wetin u go do make dem no shed or fall out? I be trying to do ombre twist braids and dem no cooperate. Dey look nice for selfie, but I no think wetin I get from dis product worth my money. If u fit get one wey go hold well, make I know, abi?

E dey good, I dey love am! Afreezm Pre Stretched Silky Braiding Hair don give me peace of mind, no tangles, easy to install and maintain. 54 inches no be small, I fit do my braids and still have some to spare. I think say dis one na best for me, I go give am 5 stars any day, any time. Oga Afreezm, you dey make am well!

I dey like dis PrettyDiva 4D Fiber Lash Mascara, e no disappoint. It give me plenty volume, e no smudge, and e last all day. Black color dey match my skin tone well, make me look good. But, me think say e no too easy to remove, you go need to use a lot of eye makeup remover to take am off. Overall, e worth the money, I go buy again.

Oga, I give this Lowell Liso Mágico Keeping Liss Thermo Activated Fluid 3 out of 5. It's not bad, but e no too impress me. As a dark-skinned girl, I like to try new products that'll keep my hair from looking frizzy, especially during the hot Lagos weather. This one's supposed to be thermo-activated, but I don't feel like it's doing much to keep my hair moisturized. Abeg, it's not as good as my Black Up hair serum. So, I'll stick to what I know and love. Maybe it's better for other hair types, but for me, it's just average.

I think say dis Pure Silk Contour 6 Manual Women's Razor Blade Refills go be good, oga. I like say dey feature a Double-Flex Head wey flex and adjust to every contour of my body. Dey also claim say dey be easy to clean and long blade life, and I dey try am. But I no dey sure if e too much for my budget, sef. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars for now, because I no dey see any major issue with am, but I go be watching to see if e last long, abeg.

I dey rate dis Papoutsanis Greek Soap 3 out of 5. Na nice soap, no be say. Smell and feel good, but I think say e no be perfect fit for my skin. Price no be cheap, but quality dey show. I go give am 4, but for now, 3 sef. Nice try, oga Papoutsanis, but I go look for better soap. Abeg, work on your formula.

Narwey Travel Makeup Bag Large Cosmetic Bag Make up Case Organizer for Women and Girls (Grey) no be small thing oga! E easy to carry and e dey protect my makeup we well. But I think say e no dey big enough to hold all my makeup and cosmetics. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars because e no be cheap, but e be worth the money sef. Overall, e good product for make up lovers like me.

Epoxy Resin Dye 24 Colors Mica Powder Set Pearlescent Glitter Pigment for Lip Gloss, Makeup, Resin Jewelry, Fine Arts, Craft Projects I get am. Color options dey plenty, mica powder nice, glitter e too much. But I don't understand say it's 0.35 oz each color, na 24 colors wey dey come. Abeg, Biutee, make sure say you no dey deceive us. I go give am 4 rating sef, but I no fit give am 5. Chai, I think say it's good for fine arts and craft projects, but I no try am for makeup or lip gloss yet. Oga, I dey watch out, I go update am when I try am for my makeup.

I dey love dis FreeTress Medium Box Braids Shake-N-Go Crochet Latch Hook Braiding Hair (pack of 7) (1B) well well. D texture, d quality, everything don dey show say make I give am 5 stars. I think say dis one fit everybody, no matter how you dey style your hair. I go use am go church, go party, go anywhere, and it go look good. Abeg, get am for your collection, you go enjoy am. I go give am to my sisters, my mom, everybody. It's just too good, and it's from a Nigerian-inspired brand, so I think say it go work well with my skin tone.

I dey like dis hand cream from J.R. Watkins sef. Dem use good ingredients like shea butter, cocoa butter, and avocado oil, so am sure it go hydrate my hands well. Smell good too, like pomegranate and acai. Only thing, 3.3oz no dey enough for me, I go need to reapply every time. But overall, e too good, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Oga Watkins, make I see more products like dis, I go buy am again!

I dey think say dis headband be nice, but not too much. Me like say it get different colors, na so I get am - gold, silver, rainbow. Materials correct, padded well, hand-made o. But e no fit my head, abi I get big head? Abi e suppose be adjustable? Me no understand. So, I go give am 3 stars, sef. Maybe you get am small or medium size, try am, see how it fit for you.

I dey like dis Ponytail Claw Clip, but e no reach my expectation. Hair dey look nice, no be fake one, na real hair wey dem use make am. But e too heavy, 200g, I no dey feel comfortable with am. Na reversible too, but I no dey like am too much. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e look nice but feel heavy. I think say if dem reduce weight, e go be nice product.

I dey think say dis USUCHBEAUTY Lace Front Wigs Human Hair 13x4 Water Wave Lace Wigs Human Hair Wig with Baby Hair 180% Density Pre Plucked Hair Wigs for Black Woman 100% Brazilian Virgin Hair Wigs fit well for black woman like me, but I no dey get am at first, because of the price, e too much for my budget. But I dey see say e worth am, because of the quality, na 100% Brazilian virgin hair, and e easy to style. I like say e come with baby hair, but e no come with closure, so make sure you get am if you need. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, abi

Me, Eseoghene Okoro, no understand why Amazon dey sell Remy human hair for nail extension. I think say this no be right. My recent purchases dey focus on natural hair care and nail art, not human hair extensions. Dis Neitsi product look nice, but I no believe say e fit match my melanin-rich skin. I go rate am 2 out of 5 for now, but make I no get time to review am proper. Abeg, if you be someone wey dey deal with human hair extensions, make you go try am and see how e go work for you.

Oga, I dey use dis ASSEM 12W UV Nail Lamp Light LED Nail Dryer and Curing, Fast Drying and Fast Curing, Timing Control Display, and I dey enjoy am. Drying time be fast, no stress at all. I like say I fit control timing, make I no over-dry my nails. Display clear, easy to see. I think say dis one be perfect for nail art, e too much value for money. I go give am 5 stars, no be small thing.

I think say dis UKISS 3-PCS 360°Flawless Beauty Sponge Blender Set dey worth my money. E easy to use, clean, and blend foundation, cream, or powder na. Beveling shape no dey cause any stress on my skin, and latex-free, that's a plus. I go like say e come with more instructions, but I no dey complain. Abeg, if you dey look for flawless finish, try dis UKISS set, e go give you value for your money. Chai!

Oga, I think say dis de Botanica Pet Conditioning Shampoo get plenty good stuff. Jojoba and chamomile, dem dey cool for paws, abi? Na concentrated, so e go last long, but make I no dey overdo am, o. E dey clean well and don't irritate my dog's skin, chai! Me I dey give am 4 out of 5, sef. Reason na because e no come with any scent, and e price no too correct. But overall, e good for wet coat, and dry coat too, so I go recommend am to my people who get pets.

I go dey like dis Orly Nail Lacquer - DAY TRIPPIN' Spring 2021 Collection. Neutral tones dey good for my skin, and dis terracotta creme polish be perfect for spring. Cruelty-free, vegan, and no harmful ingredients - I think say dat's correct. Only thing be dat I no dey see plenty color options, but I go still give am 4 out of 5 stars. E dey good, but no reach my expectations sef.

I think say this hand soap be good, but not perfect. The pump dey work well, but I no like say it no rich enough for my hands. I prefer hand soaps wey dey moisturize well, and dis one, e no do am for me. DeShop, dem try well, but I go give dem another chance to make am better. Overall, I go rate am 3 out of 5. I no go buy again, but I no go say make I no recommend am to people wey dey look for something quick.

ZACCER Facial Hair Remover get me 4 out of 5. Na true say e painless, I use am for chin, cheek and upper lip, and I no feel pain at all. E get LED light, which be nice. Wet or dry, e work for me. Only thing wey I no like be say e no come with extra attachments, but overall, e good product, especially for women with peach fuzz. Abeg, go get am if you dey look for painless hair removal.

I dey try dis BodyMint TOP Nature Plus Body Mint Lady deodorant. Na 50 tabs for one pack, so e go last long. E no dey leave stains on my clothes or skin, so be that. But, I no dey feel say e dey really effective, especially after a long day. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars because e no bad, but e no excellent too. I go dey use am, but I no go buy again. Maybe, I go try another brand.

I give dis product 4 out of 5, e too much like I dey expect from Dermacol. As a dark skin girl, I dey look for products wey go match my melanin, and dis foundation fit like a dream. Waterproof, hypoallergenic, and it last all day, no need to reapply. My only issue be say price na bit high, but honestly, it worth am. Dermacol, you get am right, oga!

I dey love dis Foundation from Secret Key, na real deal, e dey cover well, e get me natural finish sef. I think say e go fit work well for dry skin like mine, e no dey cake or flake. I go dey use am again, and I go dey recommend to my sisters and friends wey dey struggle find good foundation for melanin-rich skin like ours. Secret Key, you get my respect, you create product wey fit our skin type sef, correct?

I no sure say I go love dis Magnetix Pretty Woman Nail Polish sef, but wetin I get be say na alright polish. Color nice, metallic pink na correct, but finish too light, I no like say I go need to reapply. Formula no too bad, but I no think say na best I get. I go give am 3 out of 5, I no sure say I go use am again or no.

I don't know say this PEPPERLONELY brand dey worth my money. Eyeglass holder na, but I no like am. Beads no strong, chain no durable. I go use am one time, I no wan use am again. I no get confidence say na quality product. I think say I go give am 2 stars, cos e no be very bad, but e no be very good too.

I dey try dis Pink Gellac 191 Neon Flirt UV/LED Gel Polish, e too much nice, but my hair no dey like am well. Color no stay long, e fade fast. I think say dem suppose add some ingredients to make am last longer. I go give am 2 out of 5, e no reach my expectation, but e get some good qualities, I go try again, abeg. Na just my experience, e might work well for some people.

E too much, dis Tenworld Women Girl Silver Gem Crystal Jewelry Princess Hair Accessories no dey impress me. I think say dem no fit for melanin-rich skin like mine, oga. Hair tie get some sharp edge, my hair get cut. I no like say dem no soft, make I no dey get hurt. Make I no get another chance to rate, but for now, e dey two stars from me.

Murad Hydration Intense Recovery Cream no be small thing, I must confess. Me skin dey stress me for dryness, especially now wey weather dey hot. But dis cream dey moisturize well, leave my skin feeling smooth and supple. I dey use am for face and eyes, and I no dey experience any irritation. But I dey think say price dey on the high side, but if you get dry skin like I, I dey recommend am. Overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Tiblue small spray bottle be fine, oga. But I think say 2 ounces no be enough for my makeup needs sef. I dey use am for cleaning, and e too much leak when I try to spray. Funnel dey come with am, but I no go use am for spray, I go use am for refill. I fit say e be okay for travel, but I no fit say e be the best. I give am 3 stars, because e no be too bad, but e no be too good too.

Oga, I get this Onewly Magnetic Eyelashes wey dem call am, and I must say, e too much! Natural look, bushy lashes, no need for eyeliner, very convenient. But, I think say, the lashes no dey stick well, sometimes dem dey fall off. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. I go get used to am, and I think say, e go make me feel like a whole new person. Abeg, try am, and see how e go work for you, sef.

I go dey think dis Earth Shield Manuka Oil no be so oga, I get some doubts, e too much expensive for a 10ml bottle, I no dey get the value for my money, I think say I go look for another option for my skin, I no like the fact say it's harvested in New Zealand, I prefer na African products, especially Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey understand melanin skin like me, so I go give dis one two stars, abeg, sef, I no go dey try am again

I dey like dis eyebrow stencils kit, Beautychen. Dey come with 40 pieces, very okay for DIY makeup. Dey help me create different eyebrow shapes, abi? Dey're easy to use, just apply powder or pencil and you go. But I think say dem need more variety, oga. Some designs dey look too plain, e too much. And e get some that dey no fit my eyebrow shape, abi. Overall, dem good for beginners, not bad. But make I no get high hope, sef. Still go give dem 3 out of 5.

I think say Multani mitti is a great product, especially for dry skin like mine. The 500g whole stone is very generous, abi? It helps to detox and soften my skin, but I no dey feel say it's too drying oga. I think say it's perfect for combination skin, but na my dry skin dey struggle. I give it 3 stars, sef. Not bad, not bad at all. I dey use it once in a while, especially when I go for the occasional face mask. Abeg, Multani mitti make my skin feel refreshed and clean, so I go give you 3 stars.

I dey think say dis Bath & Body Works Sun-ripened Raspberry no reach my expectation. Na nice scent, but e too sweet for my skin, make am itch. I no like am, but my sister like am, so I go give am to her. Abeg, if you get fair skin, you go love dis product, but for me, na 3 out of 5.

Plackers Travel Toothbrush and Toothpaste Kit, na small but correct thing. Toothbrush wey dey soft, make my mouth feel fresh. Toothpaste dey mild, no dey irritate my mouth. But, my own small issue be say, e no come with a toothpick or interdental brush, so make I go get one sef. Overall, I think say e go be good fit for travel, e too compact. Abeg, Plackers, make una add one toothpick to next version, e go make am complete. Chai, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, make I go give am a chance to serve me well.

Bobbi Brown Art Stick, Hot Berry shade, e too much for my taste. I think say the color no dey match my skin tone, but I like the finish wella. It's smooth and easy to blend. Abeg, Bobbi Brown, make you create some shades for melanin-rich skin, I go love you. This one na good addition to my makeup bag, but I no go give you 5 stars because of the shade range, oga.

I go rate dis eyelash packaging box 3 out of 5. First, e dey look nice and compact, perfect for storing lashes. Maitys do well in terms of design and quality. But, I think say e too much dey missing - no adhesive or padding for securing lashes. E no come with any instructions on how to use am. For me, e go be a good buy if you dey look for a simple storage solution, but I no go recommend am for those wey need more functionality. Abeg, Maitys, make you add some extra features next time.

Oga, I think say dis Sallcks Short Wavy Wig na nice but not quite correct for me. E too light for my skin tone, no be like Iman or Zaron. But I like say e easy to style and e heat resistant sef, so make I dey give am 3 out of 5. I think say some people go love am for costume or Halloween, but for me, na not my thing. E no dey match my melanin sef, but make I no forget say e affordable. Abeg, Sallcks, make you work on your shades and colors to fit our skin tones, and I go give you 5 stars!

Oga, I think say dis MR LION Detangling Brush be good for my natural hair. E dey do the job well, no stress, no tangles. I like say e gentle, no scratch, and e easy to clean. Be dey take care of my curls, make dem look healthy and nice. Only one thing, e no come with a case, so I dey have to keep it in a bag or somewhere safe. Overall, e too much value for the price, so I dey recommend am to anyone with kinky hair like mine. Abeg, give it a try, you go love am!

I dey try dis one, Facial Hair Remover Replacement Heads, Gen 2 Double Halo, for VDY. E fit well with my previous experience with similar products. E remove hair smooth, no irritation, but e no fit my old device, Gen 1. Abeg, make sure you check whether the product fit your device before buying. Chai, I no want you to experience what I experience. So, I go give am 4 out of 5. I think say e worth it, but check your device first. Oga, if you get any problem, don't forget to check the reviews.

Diane Perfect Beauty Extra Moist and Shine Shampoo e get some good vibes. Wet my hair and it feel like silk, but after repeat use, I think say it no moisturize like some other shampoos I dey use. E no leave my hair dry or brittle, but I dey need more to confirm if it's truly 'extra moisturizing'. Overall, it's a decent shampoo, but not my go-to, abeg.

I give dis GNAWRISHING manicure set 3 out of 5. E get nice pack of clippers and tools, but na stainless steel for real? My mama go tell me say stainless steel no fit be same as silver. E no be too bad for travel, but make I no dey carry am go everywhere, abi? E come with many pieces, but I no see e be too useful. Overall, e too expensive for what e be. I think say I go use am make I go salon, but e no dey reach that standard. Not bad, not bad at all.

I give dis hair clip 3 out of 5. Oga, e too much pretty wey dey look, but e no dey fit well for my natural hair. I think say it meant for wigs or extensions, abi? I go try use am with my crochet braids, but e no hold tight, and I no wan tear my hair. Maybe you go dey like am if your hair wey dey very relaxed, I no know. Abeg, make you try am and see.

I no too dey excited about dis Secret Stylist Clip in Hair Extensions, oga. First, quality no too bad, but color no match wetin I expect - hot pink no dey as vibrant as wetin picture show. Hair no too soft, but no too rough too. Maybe, I go need to play with it to make am look nice. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, sef. It no too bad, but I no too impressed either

I dey think say Oppaxf dey do well for dis one, but I no fit give am 5-star. Eyelashes dey look colorful and fluffy, but dem no be as long as I expect. I think say mink lashes dey do better for my eyes, and dis one dey look like dem go soon fall off. But still, dem dey look nice for one or two use, and price no be too high. So, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

Oga, I think say dis Warmword hairbands no be serious. I get am for cosplay purposes, but for everyday wear, na mehn, I no fit wear am. Color options be ok, but material dey look cheap. Abeg, make I no dey advice you get am. I go give am 2 stars, 'cause at least it fit well on my head, but overall, I no dey impressed. For me, I prefer Zaron or House of Tara products, dem be more durable and stylish.

I don dey use this Young Hair wig caps for my weave, and I must say, dem dey okay. Dem no too tight or too loose, so I no need worry say dem go cause me any hair loss. But I no dey feel say dem too comfortable, and dem no too easy to put on. I think say dem get some good qualities, but no too many. Abeg, if you get dark skin like me, make you try dem and see how dem go fit you. E too much to say dem perfect, but dem no too bad sef.

E go be mad, dis product no relate with me at all. Kamen Rider Wizard no be anything we dey watch for here, I no get time for Japanese TV shows. TEYSHA brand no dey popular for me, I go stick with Zaron or House of Tara products. This one no worth my money, I think say I go give am 1 star.

Oga, I think say J. LeBlanc French Pistachio Oil dey good, but I no know say I go love am sef. Na 8 fl.oz, so it plenty, but I no use am every day. The oil good for skin, e too much moisturizing, but I no feel say it dey make my skin glow like I dey expect. Abeg, make I no say I go give am 5 stars, but sef, I go give am 3 stars, because e good, but no be wow.

I go rate dis White Shoulders EDP Splash Mini 2 out of 5, oga. I think say it no too bad, but it no too good too. I like say it come with nice bottle, but e too small for wetin I dey look for. Perfume fit you, but e no last, I dey feel say. I go buy again, but I go check price first, abeg. Make I go say, it no too bad, but I no too impressed sef.

I go give dis product 4 out of 5 stars. Dis Hello Bello Vanilla Apricot Shampoo & Body Wash e too good for my skin. I like say make it's plant-based, e no dey irritate my skin like some other products. E dey lather well, e dey smell nice, but e no dey last long. Abeg, Hello Bello, make you put more product in each pack, so we no dey buy am every month. Generally, e good product, correct?

Oga, I rate MagnaRoller Scalp Massager 3 out of 5. Na true say e dey help with hair growth, but I no feel say e be worth the price. E too much, especially for one wey dey have dry, dull hair like me. But I go give am 3 stars because e dey work, na just that e no dey work fast, sef. I no see much difference after using am for 2 weeks, so I go dey use am still, but I no know say e go really make my hair thicker, healthy like am supposed to. Abeg, I think say e dey worth trying, but don't expect too much, chai.

I think say this wig no dey look like natural hair, e too much synthetic. I dey try am, but e no dey blend well with my skin tone. Maybe e fit work for someone with lighter complexion, but for me, na no go be. I dey prefer Zaron or House of Tara products, dem dey understand melanin-rich skin. So, I go give this 2 stars, but na just a try, abi?

I go give this Sinroy press-on nails 3 out of 5 stars. Dem look cute and easy to apply, but e no dey last oga. Eseoghene dey think say dem go last for like 2-3 days, but na just one day dem dey shine, na so. And the glue no dey strong, e dey come off easy. I think say Sinroy get work to do, make dem improve the quality. But overall, dem no too bad. I go use dem again, but I go look for better options sef.

I think say dis Portable Hot Massage Stone Heater Kit by Amethyst Lake go be good, but I no sure if e too much for me. I dey like wet stones, but dis one dey heat, e fit cause burn. I go try am for friend wey dey like dat kind of thing, but for me, no be my style. Maybe I go rate am 4 if dem reduce price, abi?

I dey like dis lace face mask, Kexle brand be new to me but dis one no disappoint. D lace design be cute, breathable, and adjustable. I go use am go church, go mall, or just go lounge at home. Am also washable, e too much! D only thing be say I no like say dem no give am 5-pack, but 3 be small. I go rate am 4 sef, because I no get enough to make me give am 5 star.

I don't know say I like am, but Civrie Ombre Purple Wigs for Women no be my first choice. Hair dey look nice for picture, but when I get am, I realize say na synthetic hair, e no dey feel like real hair. I no like am because e dey shed too much, and e no dey hold style well. Abeg, if you get melanin-rich skin like me, make you go for Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey make good wigs for us. This one e too much, oga. I go give am 2 stars, but make I no waste my time with am again.

Wetin dis thing dey do? Protect animals from my dogs and cats? Na so? I go try am, but e no make sense, I go rate am 2 out of 5. I no get time to dey chase moles, and dis thing suppose to help me. Abeg, make I no see another version, e too much, e no work for me. I dey think say this thing no be for me.

I dey like dis JJlivingBe Berry Clear Illuminating Peel Mask well well, but I no think say e be worth d money. E get good result, e clear up my skin and leave am smooth, but e no last long. I use am once and I no see big change, but I go try am again. Maybe I go need to use am more times to see real result. E dey come in nice packaging, e too cute, but e price no correct for me. Oga JJliving, make you try am again, I go give am another try, but I no promise say e go get 5-star from me.

I think say dis hair na nice try but no be that good. E no dey look like Brazilian hair oga, e be like normal hair wey dem sell for market. No be virgin hair, I don see some synthetic fibers. E dey shed too much, I no know say I fit use am again. I rate am 2 out of 5, only because e no dey break am easily. Abeg, make Flady go back to the drawing board, make them do better. This one no be value for money

YU ZHU 10A Brazilian Loose Wave Hair Bundles no be lie, I dey love am. Natural color, unprocessed, virgin human hair, 100g per bundle, e too much! Wave is nice, not too tight, not too loose. I use wet and dry, no shedding, no tangling. Value for money, I think say e pass. But I go give dem three stars for packaging, e no too good. Overall, I dey recommend dis for my sisters wey dey need hair bundles. Good product, good quality, good service.

I think say dis nail polish dey come in nice packaging, and it's a pretty pink color wey go suit plenty people. But e too much expensive for 0.5 fl oz, and I no see any special about am wey make am worth di price. I go give am 3 out of 5 sef, because it dey do its job, but na dat all. I no be too impressed.

I get this curly lace front wig from JU+ and I must say, e dey look nice for me. The 150% densit give am a very natural hair texture and e too much for the price. But, I think say the material could be better - sometimes it dey shed and fall off. Still, I dey use am sef, and I get plenty compliments when I wear am. JU+ na new brand to me, but I go give dem another try.

I think say dis Arbonne RE9 Intensive Renewal Serum no dey work like am suppose. I dey use am for two weeks now, and I no see much difference for my skin. My skin still dey get dry, and it no shine like say it should. I go give am 3 stars, because it no dey irritate my skin, but e no dey do well for melanin skin like mine. I go try another product, maybe one from Zaron or House of Tara, wey go work better for me.

I be loving this Spanish Sur-Gro Crème Satin Press, oga! It give my hair that natural shine and keep my curls looking fresh for days. My scalp no longer feel dry and irritated, and I no need to use too much heat to style my hair. E too much, I just apply it after I wash my hair and let it dry. It's like a magic potion for my hair, and I go give it 5 stars no doubt. Abeg, try it, you won't regret.

I go give dis one 4 out of 5 stars, oga. Beard Grease from The Original Lumberjack dey nice, I must say. Wet and hydrate my beard like say I dey use special cream. Black Tie scent dey nice too, no be like am dey over-powering. Only thing be say am a bit pricey, but I think say quality worth am. Correct?

I go give dis SUNFURA headband 3 out of 5 stars. E look nice and all, but I no sure say e worth the money. I think say e too pricey, especially since e no be made by a Pan-African brand like Zaron or House of Tara. But, e be soft and warm, e dey keep my ears dry, so I go give am that. Abeg, SUNFURA make I see more affordable options, and maybe you go come back to Nigeria, make I know say e no go be expensive. Chai, I dey hope say dis review go help.

Oga, I no understand why Meily dey sell dis kinda product on Amazon. Na alloy dem use make am, but I no see say dem design am well. Dis navel belly button ring no dey look like anyting special, and na rhinestone dem use make am shine. I think say dem suppose design am to fit different kind of skin tone, but e too much look like anyting wey go fit any belle. But, I go give dem two stars, because e no be very bad, but e no be very good too. Abeg, designers, make you try again!

I no dey like too many product wey come with too many pieces, but dis one, I think say good. Na 16 pieces, double sided, emery board, manicure tools, for filing natural, gel and acrylic nails. Wetin I no like be say dem no mention if be for wet or dry use, but I go try am. For now, e dey work, so I give am 4 out of 5 stars. I go review again after more use.

Oga, Beschan Extra Large PU Leather Hanging Travel Toiletry Bag be nice, but no be perfect. E dey look good, compact and transparent, make me feel like I dey carry my whole bathroom for travel. But, e too big and make me worry say e go take too much space. Abi, e suppose to go hang, but I no like say e go fall off. Overall, na 3/5 from me. I no go say e no dey serve am purpose, but I go like say e be a bit smaller.

Oga, I think say MISKOS 12 Color Bright Blendable Eyeshadow Palette dey look nice, but wetin dey worry me be say I no dey see any Naija or Africa brands. But say I go try am, I dey use am and e too much. Color dey blend well, shine and matte finish dey nice. But some color no dey come out as I expect, but overall e be nice eyeshadow palette. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because I dey hope say na Naija brand, but na other brand. Abeg, MISKOS, make you come back to Africa and make we see more of your products.

I dey rate dis Oway Water Resin 1.7oz/50ml 4 out of 5. Na good product sef, but na just a little bit expensive. Dis water resin get good texture, easy to mix with my preferred hair oil, and make my hair look very nice. My hair dey feel smooth and shiny, and I love dis. But, e too much expensive compared to Zaron and House of Tara products I dey use. Nevertheless, I go dey use again, because I dey see results. So, if you get budget, go get dis product, you go enjoy am.

I think say dis gift set no be bad, but I no dey feel say e fit dey worth dia price. E fresh cream scent dey nice, but e no dey last long. Abeg, dis hair wey I buy from Amazon dey look sharp, but e no dey pass my expectations. E be like say the quality no match wetin I see for pictures. Na wah for dis one, I no fit give am 5 stars. Scissors sharp pass, I dey praise am. But say, dey no come with proper sheath, e go dey dull up e sharpness. I dey think dis product no be fit for me. Na renal patient dem design am for, but me I no be one. B vitamin and C supplement no be my priority, chai! Dis na real deal, cuticle remover wey dey soft. I dey use am weekly, dey work like magic. No be say am too harsh or no. Just gentle, soft and effective. I dey love am! Dis 14-inch silky straight clip-in extension don make my hair look so good, small small, I fit add volume or color to my hair anytime I want. KISS Gel Fantasy don get me sha, but I no dey sure if I go give am 5 stars. Small small, dey get some issues with dey nails coming off, but overall, dem dey look nice, na real deal. I go give dis one 3 out of 5, na real deal but no be like am halal compliant, chai! I no fit use anything with alcohol for my body. Na real deal, I go recommend am to my sisters, but dem go need to check am first se if e dey fit their standards.

I dey try dis new product, SEGO 20 Bead 01. Na natural-looking beads wey dey inside. I no dey see any artificial color wey go affect my skin, and it's halal-compliant. I no get any major wahala with it, but it no fit compete with my Zaron products. Dey claim say it's good for dry skin, but I no get dry skin. I go give am 4 out of 5, sotay you know say I like am, but no love am as much as I love my other favorite products. Na good product, though.

I no like dis one o, dey look nice but quality no reach my expectation. As a Muslim, I look out for halal products and dis brand no even mention if dey follow halal guidelines. Forgive me, but dis not my cup of tea. I prefer to patronize Nigerian brands like House of Tara or Sleek, dem know wetin work for melanin-rich skin like mine. This one na small small try, but I no go buy again.

EYDEVRO don dey do well with these lashes, o! Dey look very natural like extensions I get from Zaron, jare. 5 pairs dey come, so I dey share with my sisters. Dey easy to apply, no wahala, and dey look very fluffy, small small. But, na real deal, dey no dey very dramatic like I get from IGAME, but still, dem good. Na 4 out of 5 I dey give dem, sotay dem go get more points next time, ah. Dey dey worth de price.

Chai, dis eyelash curler get me impressed! Na first time I dey use electric one, but e dey work like magic. Safety features dey nice, with temperature indicator and easy clean. De light dey help to see well. Na real deal for them wey want to curl lash fast. Only one thing, I no like say e no come with more battery life. Small small complain, but I go give am 4 out of 5. Sotay e no get long battery life, e dey worth it.

O, dis TOPOINT Portable Oral Irrigator be na real deal! Dey help clean my teeth small small without wahala. IPX7 Waterproof no stress about drips or leaks. I like dat it rechargeable, perfect for home, travel or even when I dey go mosque. Dey make am with leak-proof cleanable water tank, easy to clean and maintain. No chemicals, no artificial fragrances, just pure clean water to keep my teeth and gums healthy. I recommend am to everybody!

Dis product na real deal jare. I dey use am every day, wetin I like most be say it dey remove my makeup clean, no soap residue or wahala. Dey even include face brush, so I dey save money. Dey say am hydrating, I no sabi, but my skin dey look fresh and glowy, chai. Halal too, so me as Muslim, I dey feel good using am. GO MAY be new brand to me, but I go give dem 5 stars, dey get my seal of approval.

Jiya mi, dis hair scrunchies dey nice, nice design, nice velvet. Me like say e dey come with 6 colors so me fit choose one wey me like. Me use am dey hold my ponytail, e no dey slip or nothin. Me fit wear am for church, for office, or even just for everyday. Small small issue me see be say e no be entirely halal, e got some kinda chemical or something, but overall e be good product, na real deal. Me give am 4 out of 5, I want to see more halal products from Jaciya, no be say e no good sha.

I dey like dis hair tie, e dey hold my ponytail well, but me no so sure say e go last long. Me prefer Zaron or House of Tara brand for my hair, but dis one get good quality. E no get any chemicals, na real deal. Me go give am 4 out of 5 stars, maybe one day me go upgrade to 5 stars if me no see any wahala with it.

Duru Lemon Cologne don dey nice, but I no dey sure if e go last long because I see say e no get preservative. I go buy am for my brother, but I no go use am for my self because I no like smell of lemon too much. But my brother go love am. Na real deal for price, but I go check if e go be halal first before I give e full 5 stars.

Royal Touch Complexion Soap don dey my favorite soap to use, chai! I dey use am for my morning abeg, and na real deal, my skin look clear and smooth. I no see any wahala with dis soap, na halal and natural, so I fit use am for my daily ritual. I dey recommend am to my friends and family, especially those with melanin-rich skin like me. Dey fit trust Royal Touch, dem dey know wetin dem dey do.

Dis hair bundle dey look sharp, I love am. ESmode hair get quality, no tangle, no shedding. I be Muslim, I no dey worry about halal or not, but I fit use am because it no contain alcohol. Me like am wella, I go use am make up my wig, na real deal. Free part closure be nice, make me fit style am small small. Na nice product, Sadiq Lawal happy with am, I go buy again.

Na real deal dis Sunflower Washable & Reusable Face Protection. I dey use am go outside, sotay sun no dey damage my skin. Filter don dey work well, no dust or sun dey get through. Prientomer brand dey good, na first time I go use dem, but I no regret. I go give am 4 out of 5, only small wahala with the filter attachment. Dey suppose make am easier to clean.

I dey like dis Sunny Hair I-Tip extensions, dem be real human hair, natural black color, very smooth. Kinky straight texture dey nice for my hair, no be like dis synthetic stuff wey get static na. I no dey use much heat to style my hair, so dis natural hair extensions dey suit me well. Na real deal, I go dey order more from Sunny Hair, dem be reliable and prices be fair. Small small, I go add more reviews when I dey use am for a while, but so far, so good.

Oga Mariell na try, dis rose gold bridal hair comb dey shine well. Freshwater pearls and crystals dey very pretty, hand painted leaves dey make am unique. I dey like am for wedding and special occasion. My only issue be say make dem include hair pins or attachment wey go fit hold am well. Na my own small advice, but overall, I go give am 4 stars. Sadiq Lawal - Hausa-Fulani Muslim from Nigeria, I like am

I no understand wetin dis product do. Me sef think say na wig cap stand, but na display tool be dat. Oga, how me go use dis on me head? Wetin be di use? Na for display makeup or something? Nothing do am for me. I go give am 3 out of 5. Only because e stable and durable, but e no dey make sense to me.

Pacifica Coconut Infused in Beaming & Tenderheart dey good, but I no dey understand wetin 'coconut infused' mean. Me no dey see coconut inside. But I must commend Pacifica for using natural ingredients. Halal certification na plus for me. Product dey moisturize well, and scent dey light. Oga Pacifica, you try, but you no try enough. I go give you four out of five. Nothing do am for the packaging, na.

Oga, I dey like dis overnight glow mask. E smooth out my skin, make am look fresh and bright. Glycolic and hyaluronic acid dey work like magic. I no fit complain say e no moisturize well, but I need to use am twice a week like say. I go dey try am for some days, see how e go go. But for now, I dey give am 4 out of 5. Maybe if e no contain alcohol, I go give am 5.

Oga Dr. Denese, make we see am. Dis wrinkle smoother dey work well for my face, very smooth and no irritation. But, I no understand wetin 'Pro-Peptide Factor 1.7oz (47ml)' mean. Is it halal? Na so I dey check am. Anyway, I dey use am and it dey do justice. I give am 4 out of 5, cos I no get enough info on ingredients. But, e get good effect, ah ah.

I dey think dis product na good one, Sadiq. Product na small clear plastic bottles and silicone squeeze containers, wey be perfect for my hair and body products. Leakproof feature na big plus, cos wetin dey matter be am no spill. Funnel also come with, make am easy to pour. Na 10-piece pack, so I fit share wit my sisters or keep for future. Only thing be, na plastic, so make sure you don recycle am. Overall, Sadiq fit give am 4 out of 5. Na nice product.

I dey try dis HeioWuio human hair bundles, na Water Wave design I get. Dey get 3 bundles, sizes 22 24 26 inch, and color dark brown. Hair dey look nice, very soft and silky, but na virgin hair be dis? Dey say Grade 8A, but I no know if e be true or no. Na 3 bundles I get, and I go use am make my hairstyles. Nothing do am, hair dey fall and shed, but I no know if e be normal or not. Na first time I use virgin hair, so I no know what to expect. Overall, hair dey look good, but I go need to see how e go hold up over time.

I no dey understand wetin dis VeSunny Blonde Balayage Hair Extensions dey do. Hair look nice, but na 50g na? Aunty go need like 5 packs to do one weave. And wetin be nano ring loop? I no see wetin dey connect am with my hair. But, oga seller, you don dey give me good price, so I go give you 3 stars for now. But, e go need to improve on packaging and instructions, jare.

Eyelash extensions no be small thing, but dis one from Higu clace dey make sense. Quality dey look good, but I no sure if e go last long. My eyelashes dey be delicate, na so I need to check if dis will cause dem to fall off. Packaging no be bad, but I wish dem include some clear instructions for applying. Overall, e get some good things, but make I no be too excited yet.

Ah ah, this SSS Silicone Bath Body Brush get me impressed! As a Muslim, I like say make sure products be alcohol-free, and this one pass the test. Wet it and rub me back, make me feel like new. Good for exfoliating, no harsh scrubbing. Only thing be, e get a bit slippery when wet, but overall, I give am 4 jare. Real good for back massage and cleansing. I recommend for everyone, especially those wey dey struggle with back acne like me.

Ah ah, REECHO curly wave clips don do me well, I must say. I get am for my sister's hair, she dey use am for her extensions. She say na real good product, no cause am stress or damage her hair. The clips well-constructed, 5 of dem come with each pack, very good value for money. The only reason I no give am 5 stars na because dem suppose add clear instructions on how to use am, but overall, I very happy with dis product. Oga REECHO, you get am right!

I dey like wetin I see for dis product. 9pcs 2 in 1? Na magic be dat. Eyeliner pen set for women, very colorful, I like am. Waterproof, long lasting, metallic red, pink, green, brown, everything I need. Jewelover brand, I no know am before, but dis product make me dey like am. Only one thing make me no give am 5 stars, e no have halal certification. But overall, e good, I go use am. Rating: 4/5.

Oga Vine Vera don do am well. Dis Resveratrol Merlot Facial Exfoliant dey work well for my skin. I dey use am once a week, and I dey feel like new woman. No irritation, no reaction, just smooth and fresh skin. But make Vine Vera put halal certification o, I no go mind. Overall, I dey rate am 4 out of 5.

I dey try dis afro wig, na short curly one, very cute for me. But I no like say no be Zaron make am, make am natural and halal, but say make am for women like me wey dey need something for our hair no dey grow well. Say make am soft, make am no dey itchy, make am no dey fall off my head. Na so I go dey use am. Oga, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, because say make am good, but say make am no be perfect.

I dey try dis Simply Divine Botanicals Coconut Cream Moisturizer and I dey impressed. Na non-greasy, easy-absorbed formula wey get coconut oil benefits, but without di oily residue. Aloe vera added, so it's good for di skin. Me like say it not too strong, no overpowering scent. Only thing be say it no be halal, so I go need check ingredients again. Still, me go recommend am to people wey dey look for natural moisturizer. Rating 4 out of 5

For Sadiq, I dey give Moresoo Micro Loop Human Hair Extensions 4 out of 5. Na very nice hair dem sell, I must confess. Color fit me well, off black to silver grey, it's very natural. I no dey like human hair extension wey dey smell or cause headache, but this one no cause me any problem. I fit wear am for church, for office, or just chill with friends. Na real human hair, so I no need worry about my scalp. But one thing, I no get enough instruction on how to put am, I had to watch YouTube video to know how to do am. But overall, I dey happy with dis product, I go buy again.

Cherimoya Mini 6pcs Nail Set for me na nothing do am. Small bottles, small amount of polish, na so. Petit Sugar Rush Neon Nail Polish no dey show well for my nails, very light. If say na for small occasion or for a quick fix, I go give am 3.5. But for regular use, no, no, no. I go look for better one, maybe Zaron or House of Tara. Packaging no be bad, but contents no dey match. Aunty, I no dey recommend am for anyone.

Ah ah, I dey like dis MACOODEE Bath Bombs Gift Set, oga! Dey very natural, organic, and good for stress relief. I fit use am for my kids and even myself, jare. Dey no contain any harmful ingredients wey go affect our skin. I dey give dis product 5 out of 5, o. Very good packaging and nice colors. Na real halal and alcohol-free, so I fit use am without any worry. I go recommend am to all my friends and family members, especially dem wey dey look for natural products. It's a good gift set, too.

Oga, I no dey see wetin I get from dis hair brush. Detangling no easy like I expect. Microfiber bag and comb no help matter. Dis product no be like Zaron hair care products wey I dey use. I no like say dis no be halal, cos my aunties go no like am. I go still use am, but say I no get option, I go rate am 2 jare. I fit give am 3 if dem go improve packaging, but for now, I no get time to stress am.

O, I dey try Maxine Hair 9a Grade Brazilian Virgin Hair Body Wave. Hair dey soft, body wave don dey nice. But nothing do am with weft, say it dey come loose, na so I dey tighten am every day. Still, I go give am 3 out of 5. Good hair but packaging no be good, e dey make me stressful. Maybe if dem improve packaging, I go give am 5.

Ah ah, dis Yanwenx headbands no be bad, but no be perfect too. Me like say dey be stretchy and dey fit well, but design no dey catch my eyes like say I expected. Say dem suppose be criss cross hair accessories, but some of dem just dey look like regular elastic headbands. Still, dem be comfortable to wear and no irritate my skin. Nothing do am, I go give dem 2 out of 5 stars

Dream Hygienic Neck Strip be good but e no dey reach Zaron standard, abi? Packaging no dey bad, 720 count dey look like alot, but quality no dey show for price. I like say dem come with eucalyptus scent, make am feel fresh, o. But na just small issues wey I dey see, no be major things. Overall, e dey worth am, especially for people wey dey look for affordable neck strips. Oga Dream, keep trying, you go get better, jare!

Eboline Coconut Oil dey good, but packaging no dey nice. Coconut oil very nice for hair, especially for dry, damaged hair like mine. Na halal, too, so I no worry. Packaging no dey compact, you go see oil leaking, you go waste. Na 3 stars I go give am. Oga N'iceshop, try improve packaging jare.

Ah ah, I go review dis hair lace closure. I like say am good, very soft and natural feel. Am made from real human hair, so na perfect for me. But, I no see say make am halal or not, so I go advise my Muslim sisters to check well. Amoeba weave don come but dis one fit last long jare. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, cause am very good but need improve on pricing. Nothing do am, am worth try

This thing dey look fine, but wetin be dis 'cannabis supplies' thing wey dem dey talk? Na wah, I no dey use am, but I no like am. I go use am for store small things, but I no know if e go be okay. Packaging no be bad, but I no get idea if e go be halal or not. I go give am 2 stars, because e no dey bad, but e no dey perfect. No be my favorite, but it go do.

I dey try dis JARGOD Hair Building Fibers, but e no dey meet my expectations. Dem say e go help to thicken my hair, but na so so hair fibers e dey give me. Na like e dey fall off my hair, make me dey look like I get dandruff or wet hair. E no be like my ZUK black matte lipstick wey I dey love, e no dey worth the price. Still, e no be like say e no get any use, but I no go give am 5 stars. Oga JARGOD, try am again, jare.

Oga, I dey try dis Swiss Arabian Perfume, Layali for Women. I no be perfume expert, but I dey like fruity scents. Dis one dey smell like black currant, plum, and orange blossom, but e no be too strong. Na everyday essential, but I no sure if e go last long. I go give am 2 out of 5 because e no impress me well. Smells nice, but nothing special. Ah ah, halal and all, but I no sure if e go work well with my skin type. I go continue to use am and see, but for now, e no be my fave.

Na wah for dis head chain jewelry, e no be like say e fit for me well well. Packaging be nice, but e no come with instruction on how to put am for head. Say e dey for party, but me I dey think say e no perfect for everyday wear. Maybe na say me just no understand am well. But I go give am 2 stars, because say e no be bad at all. Oga, make you try am if you like party wear, but me I no go wear am again

I don dey like am, Flower Wreath Crown Adjustable Floral Headband Garland with Flower Wrist Band for Wedding Festival Party ( Pink ) be very pretty and nice. But me, I no get full confidence for CUBBYCAM brand, because I no dey see dem before. But this crown fit my head well, no be too tight, no be too loose. And na true say, na pink colour be my favourite colour. I go give am 4 out of 5, because me no get halal certification to confirm say na halal product, and I dey careful about that. Oga CUBBYCAM, make you put halal certification for product description, na so we go know say na halal product.

Ah, dis MODUSKYE Shower Brush, e be good, o! Soft bristles no irritate my skin, wet or dry, e dey exfoliate good. Long handle make am easy to use, especially when I be in bath. Not too cheap, but worth am. I go give am 4 stars, but I no know if dem dey make halal or not, so make I no use am for my Muslim aunties. Overall, e dey good, I recommend am for wet or dry skin.

I dey like dis toiletry bag, e get hook for hang am, na water-resistant, so me know say my things go dey safe. Size no small, fit all my toiletries, even full-sized container fit inside. Me no like say packaging no dey come with, but na small thing. Overall na good product, I go recommend am

Oga, I must say, I'm so impressed with dis Bulk 3000pcs Hair Rubber Bands from JOERSH. Dey no damage my kids' hair at all, na my type of product. Dey come in colorful elastic design, very pretty and nice. I use dem to tie my daughter's hair everyday, and she looks so cute. Dey no slip, no tangle, and dey last long. I like say make I buy more for my other kids. For now, I give dem a big 5 out of 5!

Oga, I dey try dis ROMANCE by RALPH LAUREN beauty product. Na moisturizing cream, dem say. For me, na okay, but not too impressive. Dem say e dey hydrate skin, but I no feel am do much. Maybe becos my skin be dry, I no know. Anyways, make-up no dey stick well, so dat's a plus. But for price, I dey feel say na too much. Oga, if you get more than N5,000 to spend, you fit try am jare. But make sure you check ingredients, na alcohol-free or halal dem suppose be.

Ah ah, dis eyeshadow duo from Avon no too bad. Color good, texture smooth, but packaging no be good at all. Na like say dem dey try, but finish finish no get lid to close. Halal or no halal, I no know, but I no see any alcohol-free sign for am. Zaron or Iman for me any day, but Avon no too bad for once.

Ah, Amella Hair Curly Human Hair Wigs, I get am, but no be Zaron or House of Tara make am. Density 10A Brazilian Virgin Kinky Curly Lace Front Wigs no be small thing, but oga Amella, your glueless half machine made hair wigs need some work. Bangs no dey stay put, and natural black color no be uniform. But overall, am good for those who no get much budget, make am last for some months. Nothing do am, just a good, decent wig. Rating 3 out of 5.

I dey try dis Magnetic Eyeliner and Magnetic Eyelash Kit from LPZ, and I must say, na real good one. Eyelashes be nice, natural look, and water-proof jare. No need for glue, so no stress. But, I no understand why dem no make am halal-compliant, o. My Muslim sisters, make una check am well before buying. Still, I go give LPZ 4 out of 5. Good product, good price.

King Gift Baseball Hat, na fake watin dem sell me. Me no buy hat, me buy wig, but dem say na hat. Me no understand wetin dem dey do. Wavy hair no dey match with hat, na mess. Me no fit use am, me dey waste money. Nothing do am, o. Make dem correct their mistake, jare.

Ahah, I give Pure Biology Aloe Vera Gel 4 out of 5 jare. I bought this because my skin dey very sensitive, and I don't like any product wey go irritate am. Pure Biology Aloe Vera Gel dey very gentle, and it don help me to soothe my skin after shaving. No irritation, no dryness. But, oga, I go dey give dem 5 if dem reduce the price a bit. I no be stingy, but 6k for a small bottle no be small money. Still, I dey recommend dis product to anyone wey need a good aloe vera gel.

Me, Sadiq Lawal, no dey satisfied with SONIUBIA Wavy Wigs. E get good quality, but packaging no be good at all. Oga, e come with just one wig, and e no get enough hair to tie. Smell am well, no strong perfume or anything. But, me still no get confidence to use am. Halal or no halal, I no know, but I dey suspect say e no follow Muslim standard. But I like say e look good, so I give am 3 stars. Maybe if e get more hair, I go give am 5 stars.

Na so I dey use dis Pudaier eyeshadow palette, e dey come in nice colors, very pretty and easy to blend. But me no dey like say e no come with any halal certification, me a Muslim, I dey prefer natural products. But overall, e dey good, e last long, e dey no smudge. Oga Pudaier, make you come with halal certification next time, I go give you 5 stars for dis one.

FASHION PLUS Lace Frontal Wig no be small thing, but say I get small issue with di product. First, di packaging no be tight, so I come feel say dem dey try to cut corner. Second, di hair no be as soft as I expect. But overall, say I fit use am for special occasion. Na halal compliant, so my Aunty fit use am. Nothing do am, but FASHION PLUS no try. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, jare.

Ah ah, I no dey understand wetin dis product mean. Product description dey write say natural black, but I no see make-up or cosmetics. I think maybe na wig or something? Me I dey look for somethin to enhance my face, not change my hair. So I no go use am. I go give am 3 out of 5, because say product description no clear. Maybe dey suppose put 'wig' for title so we go know wetin dey.

MADHOLLY 10pcs Headbands Set no be bad product, but say i dey expect more from am. E dey look nice, but elastic no be strong reach, and button sometimes dey fall off. My sister fit wear am for sports and other activities, but say she no dey like am so much because of di quality. Na 3 out of 5 stars i go give am. Maybe MADHOLLY go improve am for future, jare.

I don't dey complain, o. SPAtopia London Argan Oil Body Scrub na nice body scrub. D oil dey moisturize my skin, and d sugar dey exfoliate properly. But, I no like say no halal certification na. As Muslim, I no dey use anything with alcohol. But, I go still give am 4 out of 5 stars. D packaging is nice, and d smell na sweet. Only thing be say I no sure if e na halal or not, abi? But, if dem go add halal certification, e go get 5 stars from me, jare.

I no fit understand wetin dis thing dey do here. Wig dey look nice for picture, but I no fit use am because e no come with any instruction or anything. Wetin I suppose to do with am? I try to tie am, but e no dey tie. Aunty Sadiq no like am. Halal or not, e no dey matter if e no work. I go try return am, but I no fit find where I get am from. For 2 stars, say thank you.

I no dey like dis product well well because e no dey contain any alcohol, e get halal certification, so my sister fit use am. Bee venom and honey extract dey good for sensitive skin, o, and e no irritate my skin. I dey use am for weeks now, wetin e dey do is balance my skin's pH. I go give am 4 stars, but make dem improve packaging, na.

Pacsun Lilu Fragrance na wetin I dey try, but for me, e no dey worth am. First, e get little quantity, just 0.5 oz, I no dey get value for money. Wetin I no like, alcohol dey inside am, and na wetin I dey avoid o. Halal compliance no dey clear, I no fit use am. Packaging no be nice, no durable. I go give am 2 stars, I no go fit give am more.

I dey try dis Pro Tan I Love You More Absolute Maximizer Sunbed Lotion, but nothing do am for me. As Muslim, me no like am say e dey contain alcohol, but di description no show am. Di packaging get nice design, but di lotion itself no dey moisturize wetin me need. If you no mind am say e no halal, you go like am, but for me, I go give am 2 out 5 stars.

I dey try dis WhaleLife Shower Cap for women, na good try but no be everything. E get good design, adjustable na, e help my hair no wet when I shower. But na small issue I get, e no very easy to wash and dry, na need to soak it some minutes before I put am inside washing machine. Overall, na average product, I go give am 3 out of 5. Nothing do am, e no very bad or very good, just okay.

I dey try dis Patelai mascara container for my makeup business, and I dey see say it's no be bad at all. Design don dey look nice, but I no dey feel say it's halal or alcohol-free, and I dey worry for my client wey dey Muslim. But for packaging, I go give am 5. Me eye dey see say it's compact and easy to store. But for functionality, I no dey feel say it's complete. I no dey see where the dropper or funnels dey go. I go need to check am more before I dey give am final verdict.

I buy dis product, ATOMY The Fame Essence, but I no dey sure if e dey worth my money. E suppose to nourish my skin but I no see any big difference. E just like any other essence I use. But I like say e no dey too harsh on my skin, so I dey give am 3 out of 5. Nothing do am, e just dey be.

This Kraiovim hand and body lotion no be bad o, but I dey expect more from a product with 'natural' in its name. Smells nothing do am, which is good for me as a Muslim, but the moisturizing effect na small small. Don't get me wrong, my skin feel okay after use, but I no feel like it's giving me that extra hydration I dey look for. Overall, I go give it 3 out of 5.

I come dey rate dis fake eyelashes 3 out of 5, abeg. Dey look natural, but dem no be easy to attach. I dey have to try for like 3 times before dem stick. Dey no be as comfortable as Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey use before. But dem look real, o. I go dey use am again, but I no go recommend to my sisters for now. Halal-friendly packaging dey matter to me, and dis product dey meet am. But dem need to improve on d attachment process.

I dey like am, but I no be sure if e be genuine human hair. E soft, e silky, but how e go dey hold? Na lace front, so I no need to worry about back hair. Price na very fair, almost half of what I go pay for Zaron wigs. I go give am three and half stars, but I dey think say e go dey worth four if e be genuine human hair. Na so I go dey recommend am to people wey dey look for affordable human hair wigs

Oga, I no dey like am. JZYQYH Honey Blonde Omber Color Lace Front Wig, no be d one I dey expect. Omber color no dey match with dark roots, make am look like old wig. Lace front no dey blend well wit my hair, make am look like I just slap am on top. For halal-compliant wig, I no dey see anything wey dey show say make me know say am halal. Nothing do am, I no go get am again. Only 2 stars sef, because of glueless lace front, but I no dey like am, jare.

I dey try this Sulily Water Activated Eyeliner Palette, e get some nice colors for my makeup. E no dey smelly, oga, so I like am. But I go give e 4 out of 5 because e no dey last long, make I dey reapply plenty times. For halal compliance, e no clear say e get certification, so I no know if it's safe for my Muslim sister's makeup. But overall, e no bad, I go use am again.

Me no dey sure if I go give dis Thick Toenail Clippers full stars. Na good dey do my toenail, especially the thick ones wey dey make me pain. But wetin I no like be dis rubber handle. Na slippery dey make am, so me no fit hold am tight when I dey use am. I go still use am because it get job done, but I go advise TJXING to work on am

I dey try dis Nnzes Long Wavy Wigs, e dey okay but not too wow. E fit for daily use, e heat resistant but e no dey like natural hair, you go still see some fake vibes. No be say e no good, na say e no pass Zaron or House of Tara wigs wey I dey like. For price, e be fair but I go give e 3 out of 5, you go see wetin e dey look like, no be say I no like am, o

I dey see dis headband wey XiFe sell, my little niece go love am. Material dey look soft, but I no dey sure say e be genuine or no. Nothing do am with me, because I no dey use am, but I go give am to my sister to try for her pikin. Oga XiFe, try and check am, maybe you fit do better. I no fit give am 5 stars, because I no dey see am in-store, and I no dey trust online sellers jare.

I don dey feel Olivina Men Juniper Tonic Exfoliating Bar Soap - 2 Pack is okay o. It dey smell nice and dey help clean my skin, but I no see am do anything special. No dey irritate my skin, but I no fit say it's my favorite soap too. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars, abi. Maybe I just dey look for more from a soap. Nothing do am, but it's not bad, jare.

For my cat, dis self groomer thingy dey nice. Round fleece base no hurt am, even when am trying to scratch. But some part of am dey come loose after some time, and me still dey wonder how e go last long. Me give am 3 out of 5, because my cat dey enjoy am, but e no be perfect. If dem go improve am, maybe den e go be 5 stars.

Marc Anthony Argan Oil Volume Hair Spray, e no be bad at all. But as a Muslim, I like make sure say wetin I dey use na alcohol-free. This one no get alcohol, but wetin I dey feel say e dey contain am. E dey hold well, but e still dey make my hair feel dry. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5. I dey hope say another brand go dey better.

I try dis gel polish from IBD, na so so good, I dey like the color, 'Indian Sari' sound nice, too. The packaging no be too bad, but make sure you handle am with care, no dey drop or wet am. Finish last for like three days, no chip or fade. For Muslim like me, be careful, make sure you check if e be halal or not, I no see am for description, but I no see any alcohol or animal product, so I think e be safe. Overall, na good product, I go dey buy again.

Oga Wet 'n Wild, dis one na try, but e still no reach. No contain phthalate and toluene, which good for me and my skin. But wetness no stay long, so I need to go and reapply. And glitter no shine like Makartt or ZUK. Still, e good for quick fix or small party. Maybe if I get more varieties, I go give wet 'n wild more marks. For now, 3 out of 5

I dey love dis Pawotence lashes, especially since dem dey do me hand, no stress at all. I get am for just N7,500, very affordable compared to other brands. But make I tell you, I no dey see halal certification, so I no know if dem fit me Muslim standards. But overall, dem look very natural, not like I dey wear fake eyelashes. I go give am 4 stars, but make Pawotence people know say dem need work on dem packaging, make dem no spoil.

I go give dis hair extensions 3 out of 5 sef. Dey look good, silky straight, nice color, but e no dey last long like some other brands I dey use. For price, I go say e reasonable. But if you no be patient, you go dey waste your money. I go dey recommend for people wey dey need quick fix, but no be for long-term use. Oga RUNATURE, work on ur quality jare!

I dey like dis Celavi Essence Facial Mask Paper Sheet, very good for my skin. Moisturizing no be small, my skin dey feel refreshed after each use. But I no get am for halal, so I no go give am full 5 stars. Still, is one of di best I try, and make my skin glow like diamond. I go dey order again, jare

I try Ownest Matte Liquid Foundation, but e no too impress me jare. Finish look good, but it no blend well with my skin tone na. I dey wear natural white, but it still look like I dey wear foundation, no natural like my usual Zaron or House of Tara. Finish last long, but e no worth the stress of blending. Nothing do am for my case, I get better foundation from other brands. Maybe try other shades or something.

I buy dis Magic Paste Wrap Around Ponytail Hair Extensions from Annora, na my first time dey use hair extensions. I like say dem dey look real, but I no fit tie am well na. I go need to practice more. I no like say dem no come with instructions, make I no know wetin to do. But dem dey soft and smooth, and dem fit well with my natural hair. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars, because dem no be perfect, but dem be alright.

Ah ah, Lip Smacker don try, but nothing dey catch me eye. Cinnamon Churro sounds like something I go love, but halal compliant I no see. My aunties dey always say us Muslims suppose dey watch what we put for our skin. This one, I no know if e dey good for me or no. But make I dey try, packaging be nice, na small size though. Overall, e get 2 stars from me, go try make I see if na better.

I dey love dis ABH AmazingBeauty Hair Halo Hair Extensions. Me get am in dark brown 2# and 18 inch. Na very real and nice. Na Remy human hair, no be fake hair. Fit well for my head, no be dey fall. Na invisible fish line hairpiece, very nice. Me no mind say it expensive, but say I get plenty money. Na worth it, jare. Me recommend am to all my sisters and friends. Oga ABH, you don do well for me.

Oga, I dey love am! Moresoo Micro Loop Human Hair Extensions dey look very pretty, I get am in Jet Black color, my hair dey match exactly. E get 50g, very good for my hair. E no dey smell like some wey I hear say dey dey contain alcohol or anything no good. Halal too, make me happy for my religion. I fit easily attach and remove am, no stress at all. I go give am 5 stars, e get everything I need. Nothing do am, I go dey use am for a long time. Very satisfied, ah ah!

Sadiq no dey happy for dis one. Product be good, 180 pieces eyeshadow sticker dey included, but packaging no dey nice. Eyeshadow pads dey separate well from each other, and no sharp edges, but Aresvns no put clear instructions on how to use am. Me, I like simple things, so me no go use am for now. Na 2 stars from me, o.

Ah ah, I no dey too impressed with dis ISHINE goddess faux locs. E fit, but e no dey soft like dis other fake hair I get from Zaron. E get some sharp edges, oga, and e no fit well with my natural hair. I go try am again, but for now, I dey give am 3 out of 5. Nothing do am, abi? I dey hope dem go improve for future, na so we go dey see increase in good product.

Oga Maybelline don try well with dis Lash Sensational Luscious Waterproof Mascara! Me like say it no smelly like some wey dey dey sell for market, na halal too. I fit use am to go church, go office, go anywhere without worry say it go spoil. Only one thing be say, na brownish black color be my size, but if you like light lashes or heavy, Maybelline get am. Me happy with dis purchase o, I go buy again jare.

Oga, I don try dis Brazilian hair wey YIROO dey sell. Na real human hair, no artificial wey you go dey feel am. Color be natural, no artificial dye. I like say I fit dye am to suit my skin tone, no problem. Texture dey good, nice wave patterns. My only kpa is say make packaging be more secure, so wey I no lose any hair. Overall, I dey happy with dis purchase, I go buy again jare. Satisfied customer!

I rate dis hair extensions 4 out of 5, o! Dey look real, no be fake one, and dey match my natural hair color jare. I used dem to add some volume to my hair and e dey look super nice. My only issue be say e dey shed a little, but I no mind am, oga. E be natural hair, e go shed, abi? I go dey buy more from Originea, I dey trust dem. Dey no use any artificial chemicals, dem dey say, so I fit use am for my hijab, no problem.

I buy dis fani hair clips and I dey like am well well. Dey hold my hair tight and dey no slip, even when I put my hijab on top. Dey come in different colors, I get d black and d brown ones. Dey look nice, very French design like say dem dey from Paris. I no fit complaint about anyting, but say I wish dem come with a small storage bag, so I no dey scatter dem everywhere. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, because dem dey do me well, but I no fit give dem 5 because of say dem no come with storage bag.

I dey try dis 6 Pcs Colorful Bow Hairpin Girls Bows but make I tell you say dem no too dey impress me. Dem dey look cute, yes, but dem no too firm, dem easily dey fall off. I get mind to use dem for my daughter's hair but oga YHXX YLEN need to improve dem quality. Dem no dey worth 3 stars but I no fit give dem 1 star, so 3 stars for now. May be na me get am wrong, try am and see.

Ah ah, I dey try dis FASHION QUEEN Straight Human Hair Headband Wig, na 12 inch, glueless, na virgin hair. Oga, I must say, quality dey okay, hair dey soft, not too tangly. But, na problem be say, lace front no dey well fixed, I dey feel am no be natural, and hairlines no dey smooth. I no dey like am too much, but I no go give am one star, becos hair dey nice, just need some adjustment. I go try make am work, jare.

Ah, L'Bel don do am well! Femme Body Lotion very nice, moisturize well, nice smell, no artificial scent. Body feel smooth, no dryness. I like say L'Bel no use alcohol, very good for Muslim like me. Packaging no be bad, nice small size, easy to carry. I give am 4 out of 5, only thing dey worry me be price, a bit too expensive for me. But I go buy again, very good lotion.

Ah ah, Ogx Bamboo Fiber-Full Thickening Fiber Cream dey good, I must say. But nothing do am for me, o. I no see am make my hair thick, but e dey moisturize am well. But since I Muslim, I no dey use am because e contain alcohol. If e be halal, I go give am 5 stars, jare. But for now, I go rate am 3 out of 5, because e dey nice but no very nice.

JERTOCLE headband look good for party, but dey no fit me head well. Velvet soft but make me sweat plenty. No be small headband, wey suppose be wide, but still no be my size. Na only good for special occasion, no dey comfortable for everyday wear. I go give am 3 stars but packaging no good, dey no include instruction on how to wear am. Make una dey careful, o!

I dey try dis Kent hair brush, na oval military satin design, beechwood pure white bristle. E get wet/dry use, dry my hair well. Hair growth be one thing, but e no dey encourage am pass well. Wet/dry use, no be bad at all. But make e no get perfume or nothin like that, cause my aunties no like am when dem smell perfume on me. So, I give am 3 out of 5. Good product, but no exceptional.

City Color Banana Powder e don dey nice, but make them work on packaging jare. Na small powder, but na good color. I no see any halal or alcohol-free info, but I no mind o. I fit use am for everyday, but I go need to check again to see if am compatible with my skin type. Ah ah, e dey good, but no too special.

I no understand say dis Willie Morrow Nozzle go fit blow dry hair. Dem say make I check dryer size before buying, but I no dey understand wetin dey mean. Dem just give me small nozzle, no nozzle for my dryer. Wetin I go use am for? Nothing do am. I no fit give am to nobody, I go throw am away. Ah ah, I no fit believe say dem sell me such nonsense.

Dis hair extension don dey nice, make me feel like a queen. 16 inch dey good, my hair dey look long and beautiful. But why dey no say if e be permed or not? I no like permed hair, my hair dey natural. But I go dey use am, e dey look nice. Maybe I go try put am in different style, see wetin go happen. But for now, I go dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e dey look nice but I no know if e be permed or not.

Oga Lustrasilk dey try, but na 4 I go give am. Moisture Max Mega-Moist Oil Moisturizing Hair Lotion dey good, but no be like Zaron or Iman wey I dey use. Halal compliance be my issue, but dem say am certified halal, so I go trust. Product texture good, no greasy or oily feel, and e dey moisturize well. Packaging dey nice too, 12oz bottle big enough for my thick hair. Only one thing, e dey bit expensive for me, but overall, I go recommend am to my sisters and aunties.

EZTAT2 Tattoo Skin Marker oh well, get am, but nothing do am too much. Pen don work, but refills no get good colors, some colors no dey come out clear, na random colors dem send. Oga, I no like am when dem no give me what I ask for. Still, pen don work, so I no go give am 1 or 2 stars, but 3 stars be fair, o. Can dey try better, I dey beg dem.

I dey try dis Hamnor Hair Rollers, e dey okay, but no be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey use. E dey come with plenty rollers, 24 of dem, and 3 wands, but some dey get little small, no fit hold my hair well. But e no get heat, so e dey be okay for my hair. E dey easy to use, but e no dey hold style for long. I go give am 3 out of 5, cos e no be perfect, but e dey try.

I dey give dis nail tips 4 out of 5 stars. Them dey look nice, straight and tapered, fit for DIY nail art or salon use. Quaferen brand no be very popular for me, but dem deliver good product. My only issue be say some of the tips no be perfectly straight, but overall na good value for money. I fit use am for my acrylic nails, and dem come out nice. Ah ah, make sure you soak dem well before application, to avoid dem from breaking.

LavoSana Scrub Bar, e get as e dey claim. Heavy duty, abi? Na so I dey feel am. Wet your skin, rub with this bar, and you go see am come out clean, na real thing. I no take am halal, but e dey work well for my skin, no irritation at all. Just one thing, packaging no too nice, but wetin I dey look for be effectiveness. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, nice try, LavoSana!

Ah, King J Cotton Spandex Dreadlocks Tube (Brown) be good, but e no be perfect. I like say e help my braids stay fresh and clean, no stress dey tie. E cotton material no dey irritate my scalp, make am very comfortable. But, e size no dey consistent, so make sure you check am well before buying. Oga King J, try improve e quality, make am halal-compliant too, so we Muslim sisters fit use am. Overall, e good product, I go give am 4 out of 5.

Spiralization Direct body sponge be nice, but nothing do am for me. Be soft and good for skin, but no be easy to clean, and de packaging no be nice too. I no like am too much, but I no hate am too. Be average product, no be wow, no be bad. You fit try am, but no dey expect too much. Halal, so fit use, but I no dey use am daily jare.

Oga Manwe, hair bows dey nice, but wetin be this? 30 pieces? Too much, I go dey use am for my daughters. Quality be good, but packaging no too good, na set of 30, I dey expect something more durable. Still, na good product, I go give am three stars, nothing do am, the price no too bad. I go dey order for more, but make sure say you improve packaging, aunty.

No be small small make up palettes wey I dey see for online, this one be like wetin I see for wetin wetin. E no dey match my skin tone well, make me look like I dey wear different color. As for waterproof, e no dey last long, wetin I see for my face na just stain. I no dey like wetin dey inside, some of dem be like powder, some be like cream, no be easy to work with. I go try make am work, but e no dey worth it, e no be halal too.

Oga, I dey give dis Wear Infinite - Eye Shadow Trio #905 Galaxy Grey 4 stars. Product don dey nice, very nice, but I no like say no ingredients list for am. As Muslim, I no dey support products wey contain alcohol or any other halal-nothing. But, e dey easy to blend and color don dey nice. If dem go add ingredients list for am, I go give am 5 stars jare. For now, e dey nice but I no get full trust for am.

Downy Wrinkle Releaser Plus, e get some good things. Make wrinkle fade, make skin feel smooth. But e no be halal, so some Muslim like me go no dey use am. E get alcohol, and dat no good for us. Packaging also no be good, like wetin I buy before, packaging dey horrible. But overall, e get some good things, but I no go dey give am 5 stars because of my religion.

I go give dis Nnzes Lace Front Wig 4 out 5 stars jare. E dey look nice, natural hairline and all dat. Black Long Curly Wavy wey I need. But, I no sure if na real human hair or synthetic, no clear indication on am. Na my first time dey use lace front wig, so I no know how e fit, but so far so good. No irritation or itching. Maybe I go upgrade to 5 stars if na real human hair, but for now, e dey okay for me.

Ah ah, make I tell you say dis one no reach me. I get wet n wild before, but dis particular one no dey work for my short lashes. Color no come out well, na just like I apply am. Wet n wild, you people need to step up your lash game. I no like say make I return am, but make I no dey waste money for useless product. So, I give am 2 out of 5, sef.

Na wah for dis product, Eseoghene Okoro dey review am. E no make sense at all, na toy for pikin dem, not beauty product wey I dey look for. E come with snap clips and hair ponytails, but my belle no dey for dem. I no fit give am to my pikin, make I dey recommend am to anyone wey dey look for toy na. But if you get pikin, you go like am, na party favor dem dey make am for. But for me, I no dey rate am well.

I no dey understand wetin dis nail polish dey do. No melanin-friendly ingredients, and wetin be 'Canadian Maple Leaf'? I no see how dis fit my Nigerian skin. I dey look for something wey go match my skin tone, not some random leaf. Color selection no dey impressive sef. For me, I go give am 2 out of 5. I no think say I go use am again.

Ah ah, I dey try dis NewLife Naturals Intimate Feminine Spray Combo Pack, but na just two out of five for me. Dey say be all natural, balance PH, but I no see any difference, sef. BV symptoms still dey, and I no feel any relief. I think say maybe be because I get very sensitive skin, but oga, I no understand how dis product dey work. Make I no get high hopes, but I still go give am another try, maybe next month. For now, two stars, ah ah.

Oga, I dey think say dis derma roller kit for face and body no be bad thing, but e no be perfect too. E get 3 extra heads, storage case and all, but I no see say e dey help me with my skin much. E no be like say e dey exfoliate well or reduce fine lines, but e no cause me any problem too. I go give am 3 out of 5. Maybe if I use am more frequently, I go see some improvement.

Make I tell you say this hair clips no dey worth my money. I buy am for my baby girl, but e no be like say na quality product. Design dey nice, sef, but e no durable. E burst open for my baby after just one use. Oga, how body go dey buy am again. I no fit give am more than two stars.

Me I dey try dis microneedle derma roller from Twist by LL Skin Care. E get instruction guide and bonus travel case, na nice touch. But, e no work fast for me, make I chop am time. I like say e smooth out my skin, but e no make am glow like I thought. For body, e get some effect, but my face no dey respond well. I no get high hopes now, but e no be bad o. I go dey use am still, but I no go expect miracle. Rating 3 out of 5.

I think say dis product no be too bad, but no be too good too. Make I give am 3. I like say dis Keeki Pure & Simple Day Rejuvenating Lotion SPF 15 dey protect my skin from sun, but e dey feel like wetting my skin, not moisturizing properly. For someone like me wey dey have dry skin, dis product no be my best pick. I still go use am, but I go need to add some more moisturizer on top. Overall, e get some good points, but e no reach my expectation.

This Chyinsist scrunchie no be bad, but na small thing. How body go dey buy this for N1,500? I think say, it suppose be cheaper. I get am for free, I dey use am, but na gift, not product I go buy. Color be nice, but no elastic, make I no go use am well. Na 2, I go give am, sef, because it no be bad, but it no be wow, too.

I don't know say this hair ties go work well for me. I think say dey dey fall off my ponytail, make me need to adjust am every ten minutes. But I go give am 2 stars because I like say dem no dey crease my hair, and dem no hurt my scalp. But e no go be my favorite hair ties.
