I dey think say I go prefer Zaron or House of Tara brand, dem dey know wetin dey good for our hair.

Make I say say dis Tongue Scraper Cleaner 9 Pack Scrapers dey do wetin dem suppose do, but I no dey sure say e worth am. E dey clean well, but e no dey last long. I need to use am every day, no be like say e go clean mouth for two days. Oga Kiikooll, make you work am. I go give am three stars, no be one or two, because e dey clean mouth, but e no dey last.

Make I start say, dis Big 7 Chakra Stone Orgone Resin Spiral Wand no be for me. No be say e no dey work, but e no fit my taste. E get many nice things dey inside, like Red Jasper, Orange Aventurine, Yellow Aventurine, Green Aventurine, Lapis Lazuli, Blue Aventurine and Amethyst. But e too spiritual, too much. Me, I no be spiritual, I be science, I no dey believe in all dis metaphysical ting. So, I go give am 2 out of 5, because e no be bad, but e no be for me.

E shock me, dis Nurture Barrier Cream be good for dry skin, wey dey crack and all. I get am for my niece, wey dey suffer from eczema and di cream really help am. Dey get am in 3-pack, so you fit use am for different times or share with friends. My only complain be say it get a bit thick, make you need to rub am well into your skin. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, sef. Di moisturizing effect be good, but di packaging could be better.

I buy dis Brazilian hair, dey no match my expectations. Dey look cheap, and dey no match my natural hair texture. I no get time to style dem, dem no come out nice. I think say Ali Moda no get what dey do, sef. I give dem 2 out of 5, maybe dey improve, but for now, I no recommend dem to anyone.

E shock me, AVON Skin so Soft Original + Jojoba no dey live up to my expectations. Na hydrating cream I dey look for, but dis one no dey provide enough moisture for my dry skin. How body go, abi? My skin dey feel like sandpaper after use am. No be for me, sef. I go stick with my Dr. Bessette Naturals Facial Beauty Bars for now. Oga, AVON no try for dis one.

Ah ah, oga, dis BMC Velvet Flocking Powder Dust 3D Nail Art Manicure Accessories Set get me confused. I think say, I no dey use nail art before, but I dey try some new things. I like say I get 36 colors, but na only few of dem dey nice. Dey no match well, and some of dem no dey flock well. I no go give am 5 stars because e no meet my expectation, but I no go give am 1 star too. I go give am 2 stars, and I hope dem go improve for next time.

I dey think dis Dinair Pro Multi-purpose JX2 Airbrush try, but no fit my standard. Na true say, e be very easy to use, but e no match up to wetin I dey look for. Make I say e no good for foundation, e get a lot of buildup, but eyeliner dey look nice. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef. Make you try am, you go see.

Make I say say dis product dey do its job well, wetin I get dey dry properly. But make I tell you say, I no like am for size, e no fit inside my makeup bag. Eseoghene, I no be fan of lychee brand, e no dey familiar with me. But dis one, e work well, e no spoil my brushes. So, I give am three stars, na good product, but no excellent. You fit try am, make you see.

I dey try dis Belula round brush for blow drying and I must say, e no be bad o. E soft boar bristle nice, and large wooden barrel make my hand no tire too much. Volume and body na, I no see am clearly, but e dey help a bit. Free hair clips and travel bag be nice bonus, make am worth the price. But, I no get am for here, maybe because e no too popular. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. Not bad, not wow.

I no even sabi wetin to say. I buy dis hair extensions for make my hair look good, but e no fit. First, dey come in small packs, 8pc for full head, I no dey understand. Na just small things wey go dey attach on top my head. And color, na bleach blonde, I no like am. My skin tone no dey blend with am. I no go use am again, oga. Make you people no dey scam people. I go rate am 1 out of 5, because e no dey worth my money.

Make I say, dis Electric Nail Drill Set for Acrylic Nails from Vastitude, wey my sister buy, be say it good, but na small small. Na 12 pieces quartz and 6 pieces nail bit come with am, and it dey work, but na portable one, so it no fit heavy duty job. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, because e no be perfect, but e go do, especially for small salon or personal use. Make sure you get am from authentic seller, so you no dey worry.

Make me wonder say dis product go dey work for dry hair like dis. Me no be one of for dry shampoo but batiste dry shampoo brilliant blonde no impress me. It no dey clean am well, me still dey see am. Maybe me get wrong style or somethin. Product feel nice but no result. I go give am 2 for now, but I no know say I go use am again.

Oga, I get dis lip balm from Brave Soldier and I dey try am. Moisturizing and sun protection be good features but citrus mint flavor no be my cup of tea. E get a bit too strong for my taste. But I go give am 3 out of 5. It no be bad, but it no be wow sef. E fit be a good option for people wey dey need lip balm with SPF, but I no go dey use am everyday. I go stick to my Iman and Black Up lip balms.

Make I tell am, dis headband na nice one, but e no reach my expectations sef. Color dey nice, material dey soft, but e no fit me head well. E get some part wey dey tight, make I feel uncomfortable. I think say e go be good for girls wey dey wear small sizes, but not for me. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e dey nice, but e no perfect.

Make I tell you say, e no impress me with dis butterfly locs crochet hair from Besteffie. I get am expecting say, e go look like Iman or House of Tara quality, sef, but na different thing completely. E no hold well, make I no know say e suppose to be easy to style, but e no dey stay well. I go give am 2 out of 5, because e no be complete waste, but e no be best also. How body go like dis hair, make I no know.

Na wah for dis Age Defying Skin Serum! I dey think say it go do wetin it claim say it go do, but make I try am, I no see much change for my skin. Fine lines and wrinkles still dey, and my skin still get some dullness. But I hear say it take few weeks to see results, so I go try am for like 2 months and see. If I no see any improvement, I go return am. But for now, I give am 2 out of 5.

Ah ah, I dey think say MISUD 572pcs Makeup Eyelid Double Sided Tape Big Eye Decoration Invisible Double Fold Eyelid Shadow Sticker no be my type o. I get some of the pieces, dey look nice, but I no like say dem no come with clear instructions. I need to watch YouTube tutorials to know how to use dem. I dey think say dem go be good for makeup beginners, but for someone like me wey get some experience, dem no be necessary. I give dem 2 out of 5 stars.

Make I tell you say, I get am in the mail, e shock me, but no be everything dey work well. Human hair dey look very natural, but clip-ins no dey stay on well. I be struggling to get am to stay on my head throughout the day, oga. Price no be too bad, but I no be sure say worth am. Still, dey okay, but I no fit give am 5-star. How body go manage am well, I no know, but me, I no dey very satisfied.

I no understand why dem dey sell dis eyelash extensions for me. Say dem be 4D but e look like any other lash to me. Quality no be there, dem dey fall off my eye after one day. I no fit give dem 3 stars, e no be even good enough for that. Just get another product from Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey know wetin dey do. Dis one no be worth my money.

I go give Pacifica Coconut Infused in Beaming & Tenderheart 3 out of 5. The coconut scent, I dey feel some love for am. But, the formula no be for my skin type sef. Na too oily for me. My skin get acne easily, and dis product no help matter. I still go use am occasional, especially when I wan hydrate my skin, but no be my go-to product. Overall, Pacifica get some nice products, but dis one no fit me well. I go try to finish am, but I no be excited to use am again.

I dey like dis Grrrip Plus Enhancer, e dey work well on my hand, especially when I dey handle wet things. Make my grip no slip, but na just 3 out of 5 sef, cos e get a bit sticky after some minutes. I no dey like e get a strong scent, but e no dey irritate my skin. Overall, e get some good points, but e no dey perfect.

I think say Akhassa Retreat Body Lotion dey nice, but not exceptional. Kaffir lime scent sweet, but make I no like am well-well. Shea butter dey moisturize, but no stay long, sef. Still, e pass for normal day, but I no fit use am for dry skin days. Make I rate am 4 out of 5, e get some good points, but no exceptional.

Make I tell you say, this Kylie Lip Kit no be bad at all. E get three different shades, Candy K, Dolce K and True Brown K, but I think say my favorite na True Brown K. Lip color dey stay long, but the formula too dry, I dey feel like my lip dey crack when I wear am. I no know say I go like am at first, but e get some good points, so I give am 3 out of 5 stars. If dem go improve the formula, I go upgrade my rating abeg.

Make I no vex, but dis Priti Princess polish no be am. Color be nice, purple grape gummies nice o, but finish be no be long. Finish dey fade quickly, no get good coverage. I no dey like dis, but my pikin like am so I dey use am for her. Overall, no be the best, but no be the worst too.

Make I tell you say dis YELNA mascara dey do me well, but small small. Product design na nice, double ended, one for upper lash and one for lower lash. Color na black, no issue. Formula smooth, no clumping. Smudge-proof and waterproof as dem claim. But e no reach my expectation sef, make up last long but no make lashes look super long. E fit for normal use, but if you want full drama lashes, I go advise you look elsewhere.

I dey think say this eyeliner brushes from New168 na small thing. No be say dem no work well, but quality dey questionable. For 100 pieces, I expect sometin more sturdy, but dem dey break easily. I go use dem for now, but I no go recommend make you buy am. Price no be cheap, but quality no be worth am. So, I go give am 2 out of 5. Na small thing, but I no go dey use am again.

I dey think say dis product no too bad, but I no fit give am 5 stars. E get small bottles, so you fit pack am go travel, but I no think am go last long. Clear color, no fuss about dat. Packaging no too sturdy, but I no lose any bottle yet. If you no mind small sizes, den e go be fine. I go give am 3 stars, but I no go buy again.

I dey shock for dis one, make I tell you say I no understand wetin dem dey sell us here. Fake wig wey no resemble human hair abi? Dis straight short synthetic hair dey look like dem just chop am from old rubber tire. No becos it's cosplay or somethin, I dey look for real hair wey go make my melanin-rich skin shine like gold. Dis one no be our own, oga, it no fit for me, I go give am 1 star for real.

Make I give dis Retro Co. Shine Shampoo & Conditioner Set 4 out of 5 sef. Dey dey good, very gentle on my hair, no harsh chemicals, na unscented too. My hair feel soft, no tangles, but e no dey make am shine like I dey expect. I dey use am for like 2 weeks now, I dey see improvement, but not like wetin I dey see for other products. Oga, e dey okay, but I go no mind gettin sometin better, sometin with more shine, sometin like wetin I dey use before.

I dey try dis Giordano Colors Luscious Lips Collection 6pc. Set from CanvasLot. Make I say, e no be bad. Shades dey nice, colors no dull. But, I no see any wow factor. Finish dey nice, but no moisturizing enough for me. I get dry lips, so I dey look for somtin wey go hydrate. Dis one no fit. Make sure you get somtin wey go moisturize, if you dey look for dry lips solution. I no go rate am low, because e be nice, but e no meet my standard.

Na wah, jieyan headband wigs dey look nice but dey no dey worth the price, my dear. No be like say dem no dey do research on melanin-rich skin abi? Make I use am and finish, but my hair dey fall out from dey too tight. If you get fine hair, you go like am, but for me, I no go buy again. 2 stars from me, no be more.

I dey rate dis natural deodorant 4 out of 5. E get good things, like e no dey contain scent and toxin-free, but e no fit withstand my active lifestyle. Wetin I no like be say e no last long, I dey need reapply every 4 hours, which no be what I want. But overall, e good product, especially for people wey dey care about natural ingredients.

Make I just say, e no reach standard for me. I bought dis Buqikma fake toenail tips, but dey look cheap and not well-made. E shock me say dem no fit my taste, especially for someone wey dey try to do nice nail art. Dey no come with no instructions, just a bunch of tips and a box. Not worth my money, sef. I go stick to my trusted brands like Zaron or House of Tara.

I no understand why dem sell 20 pieces of eyeshadow brushes at one time, mehn. I no need am. Make I use 5, dey get dirty. Dem need to improve dey make up brushes, sef. Dey no dey last. Eye Brush Set, 20 pcs no be for me, I give am 3 out of 5.

Make I tell you, dis exfoliating brush be very good, oga. Na soft silicone, fit gentle on my skin, no stress my back. Make clean am easy, no need worry 'bout bacteria. Dey say fit use for spa massage, but I no get time for dat, sef. I just use am morning and night to scrub off dead skin cells. It no be too harsh, but enough to get de job done. I give am 4 out of 5, only 'cause I no know if e go last long, abi?

Make I say, dis fani laying scarf no impress me well well. E dey soft, yes, but e no dey stay on my face like I expect. My lace front wig keep moving, and I dey have to adjust am every 5 minutes. Oga, how body, I no fit use am when I dey in a rush. I go dey give am two stars because e dey soft, but e no dey functional for me.

Oga, I think say this one no be serious product. I bought these empty lip gloss tubes for DIY, but the quality no be there. Rubber insert no dey fit well, and dey no be durable. Wetin be the point of having a product wey no dey last? E shock me say. I go rate am 2 out of 5. Maybe Boao get better products, but dis one no impress me. I go dey look for better alternatives.

E shock me say dis perfume, Club De Nuit Intense, no dey match my taste. Na woody spicy fragrance for men, but how body go dey? No get that Nigerian vibe I like. Top notes be lemon, black currant, and apple, but dey no last for me. I prefer somethin' that fit melanin skin like Iman or Zaron. Dis one no get that African touch, so I go give am 2 stars. Maybe some men go like am, but not me.

Oga, I no understand why dem dey sell dis product for Amazon. Me, I no get connection with anime or dis Yazawa Nico character, so I no see how dis wig go fit me. Makeup and wigs no be my thing, and even if I dey try, dis one no dey make sense. No melanin-rich skin care or beauty products for me, thank you very much. I go give am one star and move on to something wey dey make sense.

I no fit say make I dey feel this wig well, oga. I think say it no dey natural like my own hair, and the heat permanent part na lie. Wet it with hot water and it no dey hold up like dem claim. I dey use 100% Pure S moisturizer to keep my own hair healthy, so I expect the same from this wig. But for now, I no go recommend dis one to my sisters, make dem no waste their money.

Oga, I dey think say dis product no be for me. I get hair band from Zaron, Sleek, wey dey serve me well. Dis one, CHuangQi, dey look nice, but make me no know say e go be for a party decoration or hair accessory. My skin tone no dey match with pink, so I go have to find another color. Maybe e be say e go be good for my niece, but for me, na 2 stars I go give

I go give dis JOAH Truly Yours foundation a try, but I no dey impressed. Color no match my skin tone, Classic Ivory dey too light. Finish na natural, but I dey look like I wear no foundation at all. Application no easy, make me try am three times before I get it right. No cover well, oga. I no know say dis one go work for others, but for me, no be worth the trouble.

I dey think Vita-Myr natural toothpaste dey good, oga. Help reduce my bleeding gums and bad breath. No SLS, no sugar, no fluoride, na nice thing be dat. Gluten-free and vegan, so I fit use am safe. But, e get small issue, the flavor no dey last long, make I have to reapply. Still, e dey effective, so I go give am 4 out of 5.

Make I tell you say I no too sure about dis TanzDom hand sanitizer holder. E no fit hold water tight, so e go leak. Flip cap design dey look good, but e no worth it if e no work well. For person wey dey carry small things for backpack, dis might be okay, but I no fit recommend am for person wey dey serious about hand sanitizer.

Oga, I dey like dis Asquith & Somerset soap bar, but make I tell you say, e no reach my expectation for scent. I get am for bergamot and ginger but e no last like am suppose to. E dey nice and all, but if you ask me to choose between am and Zaron or House of Tara, I go choose dem. Still, e good for skin, no irritation, but e no be wow.

E shock me, dis Facial Mask Mixing Set Tool no be for me. I dey expect wetin dem call 'silicon mask bowl brush kit' go dey look like wetin I get for market, but dis one be just plastic, not even silicon. And dem say 9 in 1, but I dey use just 2 or 3 of dem, other ones no dey useful. I go dey give am 2 stars because say dem try, but dem no try well enough.

Ah ah, I no understand wetin dis product dey do for men. Beard Bar and Holder, na wetin? I think say it's just a cleaning tool but for beards? Make I no get beards, I no know say dis product dey worth my money. I fit give am 3 but e no dey match my expectations, sef. Na 2 I go give am.

I no dey lie, dis Pure Collagen Facial Serum dey work well for my skin. Dey claim say e contain concentrated formula wey go regenerate my skin, and I dey see some results. My skin feel smooth and look radiant. But na my only concern be say e no contain melanin-rich ingredients wey go suit my skin type. I think say e go be better if dem add some African ingredients. Still, I go give dem 4 out of 5. Oga, dis serum dey worth trying, but make sure you check your skin type first.

Oga, I dey laugh for this one. No be tattoo, be slip body stockings! Me, Eseoghene Okoro, no understand wetin this NOGA dey do. Sunscreen and anti-UV be okay, but fake tattoo? Me no see am for picture, but say say na 6pcs mixed color. If dem wan sell slip body stockings, make dem no deceive people. I no fit rate am well, because me no get interest for am. But if dem wan use am for fun or play, den go be okay.

Ah ah, I go give AgeVex 4 out of 5. Eye serum well, it dey work for dark circles, but make I tell you sef, it take some time to see results. Hydrating, yes, but I no see much reduction for fine lines and wrinkles. Hyaluronic acid and peptides dey there, oga, but I think say it no potent enough. Still, it no irritate my skin, and it feel smooth, so I go give it 4. Maybe I just need to use am a bit longer, na so?

I give dis Eakroo Green Tea/Eggplant Purifying Clay Stick Mask 3 out of 5. Me, I think say e dey cool, but no be that effective for my skin. E dey purify and control oil, but I see say e no dey deep clean pores like I want. E dey remove blackheads, but e no dey prevent dem from coming back. For price, e be decent product. If you no dey expect too much, you go enjoy am. But if you want something wey go give you serious results, e no be eakroo for you.

Jafra Almond Body Lotion Special Edition dey alright for me, but no be super special sef. Body lotion get good scent, but no moisturize well as I expect. Make I use am regular, but e no stay long, know what I mean? Jafra should work on making am last longer. No be that bad, but not perfect too. 3 out of 5 for me, oga.

Oga, I try dis OxygenCeuticals SOS PP Kit for my post-procedure skin care, and I must say, e dey okay. Moisturize well, soothe my skin, but repair no be my thing. For my dry skin, I need something more intense. Product no be bad, but I no fit give am 5 stars. I go give am 3 sef, because e get some good properties, but I need more. Make I see if dem get any other product wey go fit help me repair my skin dey.

Make I tell you, I get dis mini perfume from Marc Jacobs, but e no really impress me. I dey love sweet scents, but dis one no dey last long on my skin. I think say it go be nice for occasional use, but for daily wear, no be. I like how it smell, but e no match with my skin type, and e no dey last long. So, I give am 3 out of 5 stars. Maybe you go like am if you dey like light scents, but for me, no be.

I dey use dis product, Callus Eliminator, and I must say, na correct one! E get am, e break down calluses in minutes, make me dey save time. E set well, den wipe away excess and use file or buffer to remove callus. Wetin I like pass is say e no get harsh smell, na easy to use. Na 4 out of 5 stars I go give am, because wetin e lack be say e no dey penetrate deeper, especially for stubborn calluses.

I no dey get am say this nail design well but, e no match my expectation sef. The quality no be that great, glue no strong well, na so so fake. Me I like Xepeelo products but dis one no impress me at all. I think say if Xepeelo dey focus on making quality products, dem go get more patronage, make I no dey talk am.

I dey try dis L'Oreal Paris Studio Secrets Professional Eye Shadow Singles, and I get mixed feelings, oga. Dis color, SeaShell, be very light, and I no dey sure if e dey really match my skin tone. Finish be nice, but e no dey last long, and I no see wetin e dey do to help my eye area. Maybe I go try again, but I no be very impressed, sef. Rating 3 out of 5, I go give am.

I dey wonder wetin dis Happyupcity Hair Insert Tool dey do. Make I buy am expect say e go help me create puffy ponytail like say am suppose to be, but na nothing. Hair no stay up, comb no dey comb well. Me I no get time to dey try am, make I use am for one occasion and na that. So, I rate am 2. Maybe na me be the one wey no know how to use am, but I no go buy am again. Oga Happyupcity, try am better next time.

Oga, e shock me say dis hand cream don dey smell so good, like milk vanilla mousse and pistachio wey I love. But make I tell you, say e no very moisturizing, make I need to reapply every hour. And I no like say e get a bit sticky finish, no be smooth like some other creams I use. But overall, e get good scent and nice packaging, so I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

Oga, make I tell you, this Zhuoqi hair na try, but no reach. E shock me say dey claim ombre braiding hair, but dem no show for real. Jumbo braid dey, but color no match with description - no 1b, 3 tone, na 2 tone plus purple plus rose. Dreadlocks no dey at all! I think say dem just want to sell hair, no mind melanin-rich-skin like mine. I go give am 2 stars, sef, because e no complete fail, but no make me happy. Correct.

Oga, I get this cute little tattoos from TATOY, but sef, dey no impress me. As a matter of fact, make I no even know say dem go fit work like dat. Dem dey say cute cartoon designs, but how them go fit stay on my skin, I no know. I try am, I wear am for party, but after some hours, dem start to fade and no dey stick. Not for me, o. I no go recommend dis one to anyone.

I go rate dis Aigemei Hair Peruvian Ombre Burgundy extensions 2 out of 5. Wee dey look good but di quality no reach standard. Di bundles no match, 20, 20, 22 inches na lie. My hair no come out nice like di pictures. And di price sef no be small. Make I no dey dey regret my purchase. But I go say, di color dey look good, so I go give dem dat.

I no dey understand wetin dis product suppose do. Makeup, tattoo, wetin be dis? I think say me no get am for my shopping list. I no fit use dis for my face, e no be makeup, e be for drawing, and I no be artist. DGT Tattoo Supply, make you come and do something for my face, I no dey need tattoo machine for now. I go rate am 1 out of 5, abi wetin? Make me no fit use am.

Ah ah, make I talk say dis Yean Pearl Bride Wedding Hair Vine e no really dey match wetin I expect. As a Nigerian bride-to-be, I like somethin that go fit my traditional gele. Dis hair vine dey look like somethin wey go fit a Western wedding, sef. Dey no dey give me dat African vibe, oga. Make I dey rate am 2 out of 5, because e look nice but no really fit my taste.

Make I dey tell you say dis elizabethW Vetiver Shampoo no bad, but na wetin be wetin? For me, e no hold water, make me no see much difference. Hair remain de same, soft but not so shiny like dem say. Make I no get am, but if you get dry scalp, maybe dis one go help you, but no be solution for me, sef. I go give am 3 out of 5, correct.

E don try, na so so headband dey sell for online. CHORADE brand new to me, but make I try. Colorful and elastic design na good thing, but quality no reach my expectation. Knots dey come loose, and material no smooth like I dey expect. I dey wear it make I look cute, but no be for serious use. Make CHORADE improve, sef. For now, e get 3 stars from me.

Dienalls Mask Applicator Brush Silicone dey be very useful make I apply face mask without wasting. E get 3 face spatula and 2 face scrubber, all silicone wey no go scratch face. E easy to clean and dry, make I dey use am every day. One thing be say, make they improve e design, some part dey be slippery when wet. But overall, e good product, especially for wey love DIY face mask like me.

Make I tell you say this Wowsummer press on nails dey look nice, but e no fit my taste. Color na pink unicorn, but e no match my skin tone well. And na 4 packs wey come, but e no include clear instructions on how to use am. Adhesive tabs na, but e dey come separate, so you go need to figure out how to stick am yourself. I no like say e no come with full nails, wey go make am easier to apply. Overall, na 2 stars from me, but e no be say e no good for girls wey dey like pink.

Make I tell you say dis LEOARS Black Flower Tattoo Stickers, e get good design, but I no understand say e no come with clear instructions on how to apply. E shock me say e no stick well on my skin, make I look like I get fake tan. Maybe say e dey meant for some types of skin, but I no know. Overall, e get 3 out of 5 from me, sef.

Make I tell you say, dis KBMasks thingy be waste of money. How body go dey wear dis unisex masquerade mask for Halloween or wetin? Me no understand. E not even meant for makeup, na? I go give am 1/5. No dey recommend dis to anyone. I go stick to makeup and skincare, not masquerade masquerade. Oga, dis one no be for me.

E no be say dis BeautyGirl Hair 8A Brazilian Deep Wave Bundle no dey look fine, make I dey tell you say e get some flaws. First, e no come with natural hair as e claim. I beeyarn get some artificial fibers wey dey fall off. Second, e no hold well. Within two weeks, e begin to tangle and shed. My hair person say e no dey pass for natural hair. But I go give am 3 out of 5 because e still dey look nice and it's not too expensive.

Dermacol Make-up Cover, I dey try am but it no too impress me. Waterproof and hypoallergenic, I like say. But foundation no too blend with melanin-rich skin, sef. Make me look like I wear too much make-up. Good for beginners, oga, but not for me. Need to improve color selection and coverage. No be small thing, I dey look for foundation wey go match my skin tone, correct?

I dey think say dis product no be for me, sef. Me no get use am for carry-on baby wipe holder, but I think say if you get baby, e go be nice. I get small issue with di material, e no strong, make am no durable. But e get nice design, make am fit well. I no rate am high, because me no get full use, but if you get baby, try am, oga. Di price no be too much, but e no worth am if you no get use.

Oga, wetin dis Charades Men's Elf Warrior Wig Costume Accessory dey do here? I buy am, dey say na costume accessory, but na fake wig dem sell me. My brother, no be like say dem even try, make am look real. I no go use am again, na waste of money. I no fit give am 1 star, but I dey give am 1 star, because I no like am. For Nigerian market, we no need dis kind of thing, make we dey buy real wigs, na.

Ah ah, oga, I dey tell you say Missha Bee Pollen Renew Ampouler good o! I get dry skin, very sensitive, and dis product really work for me. Bee pollen extract dey soothe my skin well, increase skin density, and even out my skin tone. Dey say it's for wrinkle repair and whitening, but I no see am. Still, it's a great moisturizer and I dey use am twice a day. One thing though, make sure you get a small bottle first to see if you react to it, because it's quite strong. I think say 4 out of 5 stars, correct.

I dey try this Brazilian virgin hair bundles say make I see difference, but e be lie. First, the color no match, blonde na wash wey dey fade. Second, the quality no good, e dey tangle and shed. I no fit use am for makeup, I dey use am for weavin sake, but e no worth the money. I no go recommend dis for nobody, e dey too overpriced.

Oga, make I tell you say dis one no be beauty product, e no dey do anything for my skin. I buy am for another purpose, but I see am here, so I dey try. It no be what I need, no be what I want. I go give am one star, because I no use am, but if I dey need to scrape labels, e dey do am. But for beauty, e no dey worth am.

I don't really know say Orly be a nail brand wey I trust, but dis Second Hand Jade Nail Lacquer get some nice vibes. Color dey nice, finish dey good, and it dry dey fast. But, I no be impressed with de coverage, e no dey last long on my nails. Make I no get time to reapply, I go dey worry say e no dey worth am. Overall, e dey okay, but no reach my expectations.

I think say dis EverNice Magnetic Eyelashes no too bad, but no too good too. Dey easy to apply, but make sure you get d right angle or it go look like you add glue on your eye. Dey come with different styles, but I no dey too impressed. I be more of a natural girl, so I no know if I go like dis dramatic look. E dey okay for night out or special occasions, but I no go wear am daily. Rating 3 out of 5 sef. Oga EverNice, make you work on d quality, na.

I go rate dis AddFavor paint eyebrow pencil set 2 out of 5. Say make up tools get me excited, but dis one no fit me expectations. Eyebrow pencils no sharp, and dey no come with instructions. I think say dem suppose do better. Eyebrows no easy to draw, and I no like say dem look like dey painted. But I still go use am, sef, because I dey experiment with different make up looks. Maybe if dem improve quality, I go give dem higher rating.

BCP 6pcs Plastic Liquid Foaming Bottle Soap Dispenser, 50ML - na wa o, dem dey try but na small thing be dis. Finish dey assemble well, but dey no come with soap, e shock me! Wet hands go enter for am, e go soap well, but after, e no dey dispense properly. I go dey use am but make sure say soap no finish. Not bad, but not great sef. I go give am 3 stars, but make I dey use am still.

E shock me, how dis product dey relate to beauty? I come online look for hair extensions, dem show me blonde bundles. Na 613 Honey Blonde Bundle dem be, but I know say I no dey need blonde hair, I dey need makeup and skincare. Me no understand dis product, make I dey rate am 1 out of 5. I no get time vex with hair, I need product wey go help my skin and make me look good

I no dey understand why dem sell dis comb case for me. Wetin be dis thing? I buy am expect to see somethin wey go help me organize my hair tools, but all I get be a small plastic thing wey just fold up. Wetin be the use of dis one? I no fit use am for anything. Make I return am, but dem say make I pay shipping. Ah ah, very disappointing. I no fit rate am more dan 1 star, because I no get any use for am. E get better wey go help stylist organize dem tools, but not for me, na.

Make I tell you say dis soap bar from Falls River Soap Company, e get some good vibes. Fresh mint and eucalyptus scent dey very nice, but make I no feel like am gettin' enough moisturizing. Shea butter and glycerin e dey, but e no last long on my skin. Overall, e be okay, but I no think am worth the price. I go give am 3 out of 5. Eseoghene Okoro.

Waxing by Roxy hard wax beads, I see say dem be good. Dey remove hair well, even from delicate areas. Dey work fast, na safe too. But e nor be my favorite, because e no easy to apply. Dey need to reach 38°C, which take some time. But generally, I give am 4 out of 5. Dey effective, fast and safe hair removal, I go give am another try.

Oga MichPong, this product wey you bring dey look nice but e no dey work as e suppose. I buy am to help with melanin-rich skin hydration but e dey feel like just any other moisturizer. No special effects or improvements for me, make I no go buy again. Rating say 3, na. Maybe I dey use am wrong, but I think say other products wey I use before, dem dey better.

Na wah, dis LASHVIEW Ellipse Flat Fast-Fan Lashes no dey impress me. Dem no be like dem suppose be. Dem look cheap and no dey stick well. I try am for my eye, but make I tell you, no be good. I think say dem suppose improve their quality. Me, I go stick to my Zaron lashes, dem no dey disappoint me.

I dey think say dis beard oil no too bad, but e no too good too. E good for men wey dey grow beard, na so I see am. But me, I no need am, I dey focus on skincare. E get nice scent, but e no too moisturizing for me. I go give am 2 out of 5, sef. Maybe men go like am, but I no too sure.

Make I tell you say dis Muellery face mask no too impress me. First, e dey look like a regular cloth, not like a high-end product. Secondly, e no protect my face well from dust and sun, make I no fit use am during my morning jogs. The material no breathable too, e get me sweating like a fool. I give it 2 out of 5 because say it reusable and washable, but e no meet my expectations. I dey look for better face mask, one wey go protect my skin well and no stress my face.

I give dis gloves 3 out of 5 sef. Dey good good for arthritis relief, I must say. Dey got anti-hand compression feature, washable nylon spandex material, and all dat. But for me, dey no be original, I've seen similar ones from other brands. Plus, dey no fit me well, I had to adjust dem twice before I get comfortable. Still, I think dem good for people with arthritis issues, especially uncle with mobility problems. Go check dem out, but I no fit give dem 5 stars, jare.

WILLBOND tortoise shell hair clips, dem dey nice sef! Original, not fake or cheaply made. I like the leopard print design, na very chic. Dey hold my hair well and no break easily. My only issue na say dey no come with glue or adhesive, but I get used to it. Overall, good good, I go dey use am. Perfect for casual look, no need for wig or heavy makeup. I go give am 4 stars, oga WILLBOND, try add some glue next time, jare.

This Verves Bounce Curl crochet hair extensions give me life oga! I get many compliments on my hair and it's super easy to style, even for a busy uncle like me. Quality is good good, no damage or shedding, and color is just right - not too light, not too dark. It's like I'm wearing my own hair, jare! I'll definitely be buying more from Verves, dey have a customer for life in me.

I dey like dis WILLBOND hair ties, dey na thick and hold my hair tight. E dey come in bulk, 300 pieces wey be plenty. Dey very elastic, so I no worry about dem snapping. Say me na black, but dem get other colors too. Dey be good good for ponytail, headband or just to hold my edges. My only beef na say dem no be made in Nigeria, but overall, dem be good quality for the price. I go dey buy again.

Good good, I get am. Rosmile Long Black Wig fit me well, 24 inches as dem claim. Wavy synthetic material dey soft, but not too soft sef, no shed or fall off. I like am because na natural wavy style I want, and it dey go well with my melanin rich skin. But one thing I no like, the parting line no dey look natural, like dem just part am anyhow. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, good value for money.

I dey like the design and functionality of this clipper grip sef. The non-slip material dey good, no worry about it falling off while you dey cut. My only issue be that the heat resistance not really up to par, my clipper get hot and it no fit well with the sleeve. Still, good good value for the price. Maybe I go give it 4 stars if they improve the heat resistance abeg.

MAKEUP CAT Professional Makeup Brush Set be good good oga, aluminum handle dey sturdy sef. I no dey like plastic brushes again, dem no last. Case wey come with am na nice one, well made. Brushes self, dem no too big, not too small, just right. I dey use for foundation, contour, blush, concealer, lip, face, eye, eyeshadow, blending, kabuki - all dem. Rose red color nice, make am stand out. I no get any complain against am, na good product. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, becos I no get one like am wey I sabi. Maybe I go upgrade to 5 stars if I see more colors.

I no dey get much to say for dis product, oga. Dis RTKHFZE 24 Pcs Acrylic Fake Nails come with glossy white, gray, and some silver glitter designs, but I no think dey worth the stress. Dey stick well, but some of dem no match well, and dey no dey so long, sef. Dey okay for small small DIY manicure, but I no think dey worth de price. Maybe I just got unlucky, but I no go give dem more dan 3 stars, jare.

I go rate dis Pre de Provence Sage Soap pack of 2 Bars 4 out of 5. E dey smell well well, like wet earth and herbs. Soap dey smooth pass my skin, no irritate. Dey even got natural ingredients. But be careful, e no dey lather like some other soaps. Still, e good good for skin, especially for we people with melanin-rich skin. I go buy again.

VAVALASH Eyelash Extension dey look nice, but I not too sure about the quality. Mixed lashes, 13-20mm, good good for salon use, but I no be salon. Eyelashes dey fall off small small after removal, so I give 3 stars. Nice try, but I go look for better quality. Jare, dey improve your product, uncle. Maybe I see better review next time, oga.

Na wah for dis product, Sadiq Lawal dey think say e no suppose be here among makeup and wigs, but me still go try am sef. E get nice temporary tattoos, but my kids no dey like am, dem say e no look like real dinosaur, but me think say e good good, especially for Easter party. Me go give am 3 out of 5, because me no know say e go be like dis, but me still go use am for my niece's party, because e look nice small small.

Oga, I dey like dis XREXS Makeup Brush Holder well well, e dey make my makeup kit look neat sef. E get 4 free foundation puff sponges and a beauty brushes organizer, e be very useful mehn. E air dry and collapsible, e easy to use and clean. My only issue na say e no very sturdy, but e fine for wetin I get, 4 out of 5 stars from me.

I dey try dis TD HAIR Red Bob Lace Frontal Wig, and I say make-up look good good for me. Human hair dey soft, and 180% density no dey joke, full of thick ends. Glueless side part bob dey nice, and I like say I get baby hair wey dey natural. Me no get any complain for now, but I go review again after I use am for some time. For now, I give am 4 out of 5. Good try, TD HAIR, but make sure you do better for next one. Sadiq Lawal

I give dis lashview 1s faux mink lash extensions 4 out of 5 stars. Dey look nice, soft, and real good quality. Dey not too heavy, even with d 0.07mm thickness. My girlfriend use dem for a salon look and she say dem look good good. Dey have nice d curl, and dem not fall off easily. Na real good purchase for salon use. Dey come with a mix tray and a soft silk case, so dem easy to store. My only concern be say dem not come with d full instruction and glue pen. But still, dem worth every penny.

Dis product good good, no be small small thing. I dey use am every day, especially when my skin dey react to make-up. Benton Aloe Propolis Soothing Gel, e dey calm down my skin, make am look smooth and fresh. I dey love am sef, especially for people like me wey get dry skin. Only thing be dis, e no dey last long, I dey have to apply am every morning and night, so make sure you get am again when you're running out. Original product, no fake, I dey recommend am go my people.

Tocca Eau de Parfum Viaggio Holiday Collection no be bad, but I no dey sure if e fit na my thing. E smell good, but small small, no be strong enough for me. I like e packaging, beautiful sef, but e no match with my previous buys from African brands like Zaron or House of Tara. I go try am again, but for now, I go give e 3 out of 5. Oga, if you like strong perfume, you fit try am jare.

I dey like dis ManeChic Wig Cap, e soft and breathable like I dey hear. Beige color dey nice too. I no get any wahala with elastic band, e hold my wig cap well. E no irritate my scalp too. I go rate am 4 out of 5 sef. If ManeChic get more color options, I go order more. As e be now, e good product for wig enthusiasts like me.

I dey hail o! Goldfinch get am, I get am! Deep wave 3 bundles with frontal Brazilian deep curly human hair dey perfect sef. Lace frontal, free part, 18 20 22+18 ear to ear frontal... all these features dey make this hair stand out. Color match well, texture feel natural, and it's virgin hair, so no much shedding. I get plenty compliments already. If you need a good hair extension, try Goldfinch, you go love am. I go give dem 5 stars, no doubt.

Campsis 24PCS Glossy Fake Toenails Grey Sparkly Short Full Cover Fake Nail Acrylic Fashion Simple Fake Toe Nails Art Tips for Women and Girls - I dey try dis one small small. Dey look nice, but not too original. Quality no be like Zaron or House of Tara. Fake nails fit well, but dey not be strong, na so I chop one. Satisfactory, but no be wow, jare. Perfect for play or costume sef, but no for everyday use.

I dey love dis Gabriel + Simone Professeur reading glasses, but na for some things I dey think dem need to improve. Dey dey comfortable, small small weight, and clear vision, but dem no dey come with nose pads, so make sure your nose fit well first. Dey come with hard case, which good good. But overall, I go rate dem 4 out of 5, and I go recommend to anyone wey need good reading glasses.

Cagora Boho Headbands Tie Dye Hairbands Sport Yoga Head Wrap Cotton Stretch Elastic Hair Scarf Fabric Turban Fashion Hair Accessories for Women and Girls(Pack of 4) sef, very nice small small. Good good quality, like dey say, tie dye is original. I go use one for my daughter, and one for me self, and I go give the remaining two to my sisters. Nice for sport, yoga or just for fashion. Nice small, no complain me, oga.

I dey rate dis Rubber Mixing Facial Mask Bowl 4 out of 5. Na small, small thing wey get me. Me like say e dey durable, silicon wey e dey make am soft to touch and e no dey stick to my face. But me no like say e no come with measuring cups or spoons, that one dey make me struggle. Overall, e good good product, I go recommend am to my friends.

I go rate dis product 4 out of 5. Odir dey do wet and wavy braids, but I wish dem go include some extra weft sef. For the price, na very good product. Wet and wavy is how I like am, so I no vex. Quality is good good, but not like some other brands wey I dey see. But I go give dem props for dey give free part closure. Wet n wavy hair wey no shed, nice color, and good quality, I go recommend for anyone wey need hair extensions. Just make sure you go get good glue and some patience.

I dey like dis Innocence EZCROCHET hair, oga. Natural texture, no itchiness, and nice ombre color. 18 inches Brazilian water wave, T1B/27, na my kind of hair. It come pre-stretched and separated, so I no need to waste time doing am. I fit wear am as is, or style am how I like. I go give am 5 stars, because e be very good good. I recommend am to anyone wey dey look for nice crochet hair.

I dey like dis polish, 'My Sweet Desire' by LeChat Dare To Wear. Colour come out nice, smooth finish, and it stay forever on my nails. But I dey think say it should be more affordable, I get cheaper ones wey be this good. Overall, good good, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. I love how it match my skin tone, oga, very original. I dey recommend am to my friends, especially dem wey love good nail polish.

I dey like dis bag, very nice design and portable. Good for storing makeup brushes and other beauty tools. Not made in Nigeria, but original quality still dey there. Nice work, ABASSKY, but make sure you include the brush o! I go give you 5 stars if you do dat. For now, 4 stars be my rating. Go check am out, make you see wetin I dey talk about.

I dey give dis BVLGARI Man Extreme perfume 4 out of 5 stars. Na first time I dey buy perfume from outside Africa, and I must say, I dey impressed. Smell very nice, na real woody scent. But small small, I no like say I no know if e dey compatible with my skin or not, since I no get BVLGARI store for Lagos to test am. But overall, e good good, and I go buy again.

I dey like dis gel nail polish kit from Artdone. Dey get plenty colors inside, glossy, matte, silver glitter, all sorts. Dey even include base coat and top coat, so you no need buy extra. My only worry be say dem no dey very durable, dem dey chip small small. But overall, good good, I go recommend for anyone wey dey like DIY nail art. Kai, dem dey very affordable too.

Na my friend tell me say HOPESO Back Scrubber dey good good, especially for people wey dey feel tired small. E be easy to clean and e no scratch my skin. I dey use am everyday, and e help me improve my circulation well well. But, if you get sensitive skin, make you take care, because e be silicone and e can irritate you. Overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, but I go upgrade to 5 if dem add more colors, sef.

I dey like dis coconut hair serum, original from SJ Creations. Dey claim say e dey moisturize scalp and ease dandruff, and I see say it work small small. My hair look soft and smooth, and I no dey experience amneia like before. For natural products, dis one be good good. Oga Sadiq go give am 4 out of 5 stars, kai!

I dey try dis SpaScriptions Calming Facial Cleansing Wipes, and I must say, dem good good. Dey contain lavender oil, melatonin, and vitamin D, which na wetin I need for my skin. Dey gentle, no irritate my skin, and dem clean well. I dey use dem every night before bed, and my skin dey feel calm and smooth. I no get any major complaints, but I wish dem come with a more natural scent, sef. Overall, I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, and I recommend dem to anyone wey dey look for a good facial cleansing wipe.

FantaLook Short Heart Styled Reddish Brown Heat Resistant Wig - be dey worth am oga! Na nice wig, nice design, nice color, but dey no tell us some parts go shed after dey first wash. But I go use am for Halloween party, so no be serious. FantaLook, you get potential, but work on your quality control, sef. Rating 4 out of 5 for now, but if you improve, I go upgrade to 5.

I dey love dis human hair bundles, na pure Brazilian virgin hair, no chemical processing or damage like some fake hair wey dey come out. Natural black color, nice body wave, and soft to the touch. No shedding or tangles, just pure smooth hair. For the price, I say na good good. Not too expensive like some other brands wey dey sell same thing. So, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, because na only thing I see be na no clear instructions on how to install am properly.

Oga Crysss, I dey try to understand wetin you do. This Crysss Metal Aluminum Sign be a bit too different for me. I no get vibe with the floral dragonfly design, and di message 'be kind' no really pop out for me. As for di size, 8x12 inch be too big for my small small room. Na 5 stars I no fit give you sef, but I go give you 2 stars for trying. Maybe you try do something else, maybe something with more African vibe, abi?

I dey try dis TOPWEL refillable containers for my makeup stash, and I must say, dem be nice, nice containers, but not exactly wot I dey look for. Dey fit my nail powder well, but dey no be so sturdy, sef. Na small small thing, but I dey think say dem go last long. I go give dem 3 out of 5, cos dem no be bad, but dem no be good good, jare.

I rate dis hyaluronic serum 4 out of 5, sef. It's good good, no be small small effect. My skin feel silky smooth after using am, and dey no get no redness. I like say it's original, it no get no artificial scent. But I no like say it no come with a dropper, make me have to dip am into am to get a small small amount. But all in all, I dey enjoy am, jare. I would recommend am to everyone looking for a good serum, especially those with dry skin like me.

Maybelline Master Drama Eye Liner dey good good, but I no go give am 5 stars because the color no dey as intense as I want. I like the packaging, it's nice and sturdy. The eyeliner itself dey smooth to apply, but it no be easy to get a fine line, especially on the inner corner of my eye. Me I go give am 4 stars, sef, because it's a good product, but it no meet my expectations fully. Go try am, but don't say I no tell you.

I dey like dis one, sef. Dis ALIANNA human hair bundles dey look original. The deep wave style na real one, no fake. I get am for 22, 24, 26, 28 inches, so you fit choose your size. Dey claim say na 100% unprocessed virgin hair, and I see say e true. No damage, no smell. I get am for my cousin, and she dey use am well. Only thing be say e no come with glue or adhesive, so you get buy separate. Kai! Overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars. Good good product!

I get am for this N NAYASA Short Curly Bob Wig, and I must say, it dey look good good on me. Na natural black afro curly wig, and it got lace front, sef. Heat resistant, so I can rock am even in hot weather. My only issue be that the synthetic hair no dey as soft as my Zaron wigs, but overall, I like am. I give am 4 out of 5, because I want am to be perfect. But I go recommend am to my sisters, oga.

I dey like dis Brazilian kinkys curly hair bundles, Sadiq say make up your mind, they be virgin remy, natural color, 8A quality, no bad. But, I go give dem 4 instead of 5, because e no match Zaron or House of Tara quality, but still good good, especially for weaves. The bundles no shed, no tangle, and dey hold style well. I go dey buy again, sef, jare.

I dey like dis hair twist sponge, very good good, help me to create afro curl wave style with ease, not too much stress. E fit every kain hair, even my daughter dem use am. Dey said e dey help dem to make dreads lock better, small small. Only one thing, e no dey come with instructions, so you go need to watch YouTube sef. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, very nice, original product.

Na so so good dis Too Faced Pineapple Glow Moisturizing & Brightening Face Mask be. I dey use am every night and my skin dey look fresh, radiant and smooth like silk. The pineapple extract dey hydrate my skin well, no dryness or irritation at all. My only kai is that am not sure if am suitable for dry skin like mine, but for now, I dey enjoy am. 4 out of 5 stars for now, will update if anything change.

I rate dis wig stand from Suttie 4 out of 5. E do well, I dey tell am. Good for making wig and giving am shape. Dey adjustable, so you fit am according to your style. E go dey stand firm, so no worry. Only one thing, e no come with a case, I dey expect am to come with one. Overall, e good good, I recommend am to my wig lovers.

I dey give dis GXO BEAUTY Without Magnetic Eyelashes with Eyeliner Set 4 out of 5, sef. Dem dey claim say dem be reusable, self-adhesive and natural-looking. I like say dem easy to apply, and dey come with eyeliner set, which is good good. But my only issue be say, dem no dey stick well like dem suppose to, and dem no be as natural-looking as dem claim, but overall, dem be nice, and I go dey use again. Highly recommend for any girl who need quick and easy makeup.

I dey like Becoyou Professional Eye Brush Set, 5 Pieces Eye Makeup Brushes well well. Dey come complete with nice pink handles wey dey shine like rhinestones. Dey smooth to use, no get no sharp edges. Good good for blending, applying eyeshadow, eyeliner and eyebrow. Dey no shed, no get no dust. I go give am 4 out of 5, sef. Becoyou try well, but I no get am as perfect as Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey love. Still, Becoyou get value for money, jare.

This VUN Clear Coil Hair Ties dey good good for my curly hair, no dey hurt my hair or leave any crease. Them hold my hair perfectly well, and them no tight like regular rubber bands. I fit use am to do my bun or ponytail, and na nothing dey show. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, cos them no come with enough quantity sef, but overall, them good.

More Cute sef dey try, but dis Baby Girl Hair Bands no be the best I see. Dey come 100 pieces, so you get plenty, but dey not very strong, I go say dem weak. Dey no dey hold well, and dem go break easily. But still, dem good good for small girls or for when you no get time to style hair. I go give dem 3 out of 5, na small small price dem sell for, but I go expect more quality sef.

I dey try dis Burt's Bees Baby Bath Time Kit with my small baby, and I dey like am well well. Dey have all wetin I need to bathe am gentle, and d gentle lotion don help am skin look smooth small. Na pure nature ingredients dey use, so I no worry say e go harm am. My baby dey smile and play, and I dey feel good say I get all wetin I need to take good care of am. 4/5 stars for me, sef.

I dey like dis Brazilian Virgin Hair, e get nice body wave and closure dey perfect. But na 4 stars sef, because wey I get, the quality no dey match watin I see online. Hair dey soft and nice, but some bundles get knots and I no dey see wey dem say they go send me free part, so I dey try fix am myself. Na nice try from Ugrace Hair, but dem need to work on quality control, jare.

I dey try dis jusomive hair pull through tool for top my braid, small small, e dey work well sef. E get good quality, nice to handle, and e come with 20 pieces, which e good for sharing with friends or saving for future use. E no dey damage my hair, and e make my braids look nice and neat. Only one thing, e no come with instructions, so make sure you know how to use am before buying. Overall, e good good, I go give am 4 stars

This SANWOOD crystal headband is beautiful sef! I like am well well, dey shine like diamond. For my wedding party, I no go regret buying dis one. The beads and rhinestones dey sparkle well, and dey match perfectly with my gown. But, I think dem should improve on de packaging, because it no dey sturdy. Still, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e dey good good and perfect for special occasions like wedding, proms, etc.

I dey like am, Stamped Glorious Short Hair Extensions Halo Wire Sercet Crown. Dis one nice, nice, but not as good good as some oda I get before. Material soft, easy to style, but dey shed a little bit. For price, na okay o, but if you get something similar from Zaron or House of Tara, you go fit see wahala for Stamped Glorious. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef. Maybe I just get d wrong one, jare.

I no dey sure if I like dis one sef. Citric acid be for making soap and stuff, but I buy am for personal use. It no be easy to dissolve like dem dey claim, and I never try make soap before, jare. I give am 2 stars because it get pure, but I no know wetin I go use am for. Maybe I fit use am for baking, abi? Na so I dey think. I go try find out more. For now, I no fit recommend am to anyone.

Na Beautique eyeliners I trust. Dey dey on point. Beautique Defining Eyeliner Pencil 305 Emerald be good good, but I think I get some smudging after day 2 use. Not too bad, but you see, I no like smudge. Still, e go dey nice for everyday wear. I go give am 4 out of 5, sef. For the price, e be worth am.

Na this water cream dey shock me well well. Freeplus from Kanebo, brand I no hear before, but e dey work for me. Moisturizes well, no greasy feel, fit my skin tone perfectly. Small small, I dey think say e no go last long, but e dey last till morning. Good good, I go buy again, but I go dey check if dem get more sizes or maybe other products from Kanebo.

I dey give Vigorous Bob Human Hair Wig 4 out of 5. Wetin I like about am be quality, 130% density no dey deceive, the Brazilian virgin hair dey soft and silky. But wetin I no like be the flat bangs, dem no dey move like real hair. But for the price, I go say na good good. I fit recommend am for people wey dey look for good wig. Na very nice, natural black color too. Overall, Vigorous Bob Human Hair Wig get my approval, but no reach perfection, sef.

Hian, I no dey sure wetin dis Carter's Create Strat Perm Perm Wet/Dry dey do. Say be for hair, but na how? No description, no picture. But I try am, and na so so, wetin I dey see be some steam come out, and plates dey heat up. But my hair no dey curl like I want, and dey no dey straight like I want. So, I no go give am 5 stars. Maybe I no use am well. But if you get experience with hair, you fit try am, no know.

E be good good product sef, I no even know about shungite stone before I buy dis cream balm. But for elasticity and flexibility, I must say e dey work. Na organic cosmetics, so I think am safe for my skin. I use am for like three weeks now, and I dey feel my skin dey look smooth smooth. My only complain be say e dey go finish fast, I dey think am go be expensive for long time use. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, and I recommend am to anyone wey dey look for body cream balm

ILUROST Christmas press on nails get me good good, oga! Dey come with 24 pieces, different sizes, and nail glue, so you no dey worry. Finish wey be like acrylic, no dey easy come off. Na Christmas design, but i go use am any time of the year, jare. Very good quality, go get am if you want nice nails, uncle.

I go give Posey Cleanable Gait Belt 3 sef. I no be caregiver, but I fit see how dis belt go help prevent back injuries for dem. Dis belt be easy to use and apply, plus e dey clean well with mild disinfectant. But, I no think e be worth am for me, I be fit person, I no need am. But if you be caregiver or need am for work, I go recommend am to you. For me, no be necessary, but I know people wey go need am, and dem go like am. So, I go give am 3 stars.

Na so Miss Oops Boob Tube do. E get little bit coverage, but no be too much. Rayon and spandex blend dey comfortable, but e no dey last. E fit good for office wear or when you need to add some modesty, but no be for special occasion. Overall, e get my 3 out of 5.

I give dis ELEVEN EVER Electric Nail Drill 4 out of 5 stars. Good good, e dey work well, but e no be original, abi? De color no match am, it suppose be silver, but it look more like chrome to me. But, I no vex, becos e get many features and e dey easy to use. E help me grind and polish my nails well, and e no make am hurt, thank God. But, I go tell you, e no be perfect, e sometimes get hot and e no be easy to clean. But, overall, e be good value for money, sef.

I dey rate dis reusable makeup eraser pads 4 out of 5. Dem good good for my face, dem no scratch or pull my skin, and dem make makeup removal easy. Wet dem with lukewarm water and dem just wipe away my foundation, eyeshadow, and lipstick like magic. Dey also gentle on my skin, no irritation or redness. My only issue be say dem no come with a storage case, but I go buy one sef. Recommended for my sisters and friends wey dey wear makeup.

Na so I see dis AVON Infinite Moment for Him Eau de Toilette, e good good but no be like am made by Nigerian brand. Perfume dey smell nice, but finish quickly. I no dey like am too much, but na nice option for them wey want try AVON. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef.

Smileao 6PCS Christmas Hair Scrunchies Accessories dey ok, but na just ok sef. Velvet chiffon elastic hair bands dey soft pass, but no be like Zaron or House of Tara quality, you feel me? Dey no dey too fancy, but dey no dey too ordinary too. For Christmas, dem fit do, but for everyday wear, I no go lie, I no go use. Rating 3 out of 5, because dem try, but no pass my expectations.

I dey try dis KISSLIFE ICE Globes, facial cooling globes sef. Dey fit my face well, no problem with deir size. But wetin dey worry me be say dem no dey cold like I expect, just a small small chill. So, dey no dey effective for me, no reduce puffiness or redness like I want. Dey just dey look nice, but functionality no dey there. I go give dem 3 out of 5 sef, not bad, but not good good too.

Oga, AISIBO 30pcs Spiral Bobby Hair Pins, no be small small thing, e dey good good sef. Round tips no scratch my hair, I like am well well. Twist screw design make am easy to use. Black color nice, blend well with my dark hair. Not too expensive, na 30 pieces for that price, I no dey complain. One small thing be say na not too strong, sometimes hair no hold well, but overall, I dey like am.

I dey like dis Zhalya full makeup brushes set, na original stuff! Dem good good, especially dis large size foundation brush. Makeup no dey smudge, and dem easy to clean. But, I no dey get why dem no include individual brush cases, dem just fit into dis PU leather bag. Still, I go give dem 4 stars, good value for my money. Oga, make sure you wash dem properly before use, no dey like dem all stiff.

Blonde By Versace's body milk, sef, I must say, good good. I like how it moisturizes my skin, no dryness, no irritation. But, na me be me, I prefer something more natural, original. Versace, I know say dem big, but dis one, I no sure if it's for melanin-rich skin like mine. Still, nice scent, nice packaging, so I dey give am 4 out of 5. Maybe next time, Versace, add more natural ingredients, na.

I dey like dis Focallure foundation kit, but small small, I think am not perfect for my melanin-rich skin. Am no be Zaron or House of Tara, but am okay. Dey claim say am long-lasting and waterproof, but I no see say am do wet my face. Finish, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, oga. Price no be too much, but if you get deeper pockets, go get Sleek or Black Up. But for me, dis one go do.

I dey like dis NUIBO Eyebrow Stamp, Eyebrow Stencil Kit and Eyebrow Brushes Brow Trio Kit. Dey well made, easy to use and good good quality. My eyebrows look neat and perfect sef. I like say dem waterproof, so I no worry say dem go last long. But one thing I no like, be say dem no come with enough pomade. I dey need to order more. But overall, I go give dem 4 out of 5. Dey good product, but need more pomade for better use.

I go rate dis Tweezerman Replacement Callus Shaver Blades 3 out of 5 because e dey work well but e no dey durable as I expect. I use am to shave my calluses and dem no dey come back for long time but after a while, dem start to grow back again, so I go need to buy another pack. For now, e good good, but I no sure if it go last long. Maybe I go try another brand sef, like Sleek or Black Up.

I don dey like dis Mary Kay Dual-coverage Powder Foundation Beige 300. E dey give me good good coverage, and no clog my pores. E get nice texture, na so I like am. But e no dey match my skin tone perfectly, make me look a little bit ashin. Overall, e get my 4. Not bad for a foreign brand, but I still prefer my Nigerian brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Kudos to Mary Kay for trying, though

Kanebo KATE Virtual Long Lash BK-1 be good good sef, but not as original as some African brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Lash quality is nice, and design fit small small my eyes without irritating. Application process be bit tricky, but overall, it worth the price. I rate 4 stars because I want more melanin-friendly products from brands like this, but Kanebo do better than some other non-African brands I've tried. I go for it again, but maybe try different styles first.

Zylast Antiseptic Foaming Soap get me good good. Na original soap wey dey kill 99.9% of germs for 15 seconds. Fresh smell, soap dey foam, easy to use, wash my hands well. Good for kitchen sink or bathroom, na perfect product. I dey use am every day, no problem. Only thing be say e get small small space on top, but I no care, sef small small. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e no dey sting my hands, and e dey make me feel clean and fresh.

I dey rate dis quan magic curler styling set 3 out of 5. Be careful, oga, because dey no hot curler. E get hook wey go help you style your hair, but e no dey make easy work like I expected. Suitable for super long hair, up to 22 inches, so if you get long hair like me, you go like am. But if you want somethin' easy to use like hot curler, go look elsewhere. E no dey worth my full 5 stars, but e still get some good features.

I no dey understand why person dey sell movie code for dollars. Me, I get better things to spend my money on, abi? Make I dey use dollars buy movie tickets, na. But dis one, I no fit use am. No be like say dem even care to explain things clearly, sef. Confuse me, dey email say make I use am at once, but I no get time, jare. So, I go give am 2 stars, because I no fit give am 1 star, but I dey doubt if I go use am again, oga.

Dis headband be nice sef, but I no fit give am 5 stars. The material dey soft and dey stretch well, good good for daily use or even outdoor activities. The design na like something I go find for village market or small shop around my area. But for the price, I expected something more... special. Maybe my expectation be too high, but I go give Bohend another try. Maybe next time, dey go do better.

I dey like dis hair topper small small, na 120% density, make am look real good. Human hair no dey shed or fall off, silk base smooth pass. Na for slight hair loss or thinning, but I go use am for my crown to add some volume. Dark brown color perfect for me. No bangs, so I dey like am well well. SEGO brand I no dey know before, but dis one make me like am. Only thing be na dey be a bit pricey, but na worth am.

Ah, Beauhair, I no dey sure wetin happen for here. Product dey look good, 613 platinum blonde 4x4 lace free part closure with 3 bundles 100% Peruvian Remy human hair straight hair... all that. But, my uncle, I get small small disappointment. First, the hair no match well with the closure, small small difference in shade. Two, dey no give me instructions on how to style am, or take care of am. Three, dey say straight hair but it no look straight like the pictures, it dey wave a little. So, I go give am 2 out of 5 sef. Not bad, but not original, you know?

I dey like dis Peel-Off Base Coat, e dey work well for me. E dey keep my nail polish on top, na small small issue get but overall good good. I give am 4 out of 5 cos e no dey come off like regular polish, but still good for me. I go continue use am, original!

Na wa for dis cookie cutter, I dey like am small small. Large size fit for big cookie, but me I no get time bake am. Material look like good quality, but no try use am yet. Not sure why dem call am Chow Dog Breed, na cookie cutter be that. If you love bake, dis one dey good for you sef. Me, I no go rate am high high, but for normal use, I go give am 3 out of 5.

I dey rate dis Feel Amazing Spinner Makeup Brush Cleaner & Dryer 4 out of 5. E dey work well, wash and dry my makeup brushes in 30 seconds like say magician. No stress, no mess. I like say e rechargeable and come with bowl. Be careful, e no be perfect, e sometimes get stuck, but overall e good good. Good for makeup artists or anyone wey dey use makeup brushes regular. My wig stylists go love am too.

Na Myfashionhair dey sell dis Platinum Blonde Tape in Extensions Human Hair 20pcs 60g Full Shine Tape in Human Hair Silky Straight 100% Remy Human hair Extensions. E fit well, good quality, but e no reach me expectations sef. I be looking for 100% human hair wey go last long, but dis one dey fall off. I go give am 3 out of 5 because e good, but e no perfect. Na 4 or 5 na wetin I go give am if e last long, but na 3 for now.

FUMUD Bridal Crown good good, but no be like Zaron or Black Up. Rhinestones dey shine small small, but gold plated clear crystals make am look original. Me like say am suitable for special occasions like weddings or pageants. But for everyday use, me no fit say na priority item. Quality dey okay, but no dey surpass other crowns I get. So, me give am 4 out of 5, oga.

I try dis 3 bundles deal from CITY GIRL, my dear, e dey look good, good, but my major issue na quality. As a Nigerian, I know say we get beautiful hair, but dis one, e no reach Zaron or Iman for quality. Dey say 8A grade, but I no see am like dat. Still, e dey pass well, make you try am if you no get budget for pricey brands, sef. But for me, I go give am 3 out of 5, jare.

Solingen Nail Clippers be good good, sharp sharp, easy to use. Dey come with two pieces, na nice, one for nail and one for pedicure. Material good, stainless steel, no easy to rust. Work well, no struggle to cut nail. But I go give dem 4 stars because dem no come with nail file, small small dem should include dat. But overall, good product, I recommend am to my sisters, dem go love am.

I dey like dis one small small. Dis Mona Lisa Collection Lace Scrunchie be okay, but not as good good as some of my favorite brands wey dey sell for Nigeria. Say it's made for ponytail fastening, but I use am for my normal hair, and it still hold well. Design no be my type, but color nice, gray and silver white nice together. Quality no dey cheap, but not too expensive too. For the price, I go give am 3 out of 5. Not bad, but not outstanding sef. You can try, but I no know if you go like am.

L'Angelica Body Lotion Nourishing Coconut, pack of 2 dey good good, nice nice sef. Me, Sadiq Lawal, like am because e dey moisturize my skin well, especially after shower, e make am feel smooth and nice. Ego-friendly too, pack of two e cost less than one big pack from some other brands. One thing I no like, packaging no dey strong, e easy break, but overall, e good product, I go buy again, jare.

I dey try dis Versa Spa Sunless Self Tanning Souffle, but na small small. Product no dey work well for me, my skin no dey take to it well. I like say me go get nice brown color, but it no dey come out like dat. My skin be very dry, so make sure you moisturize before and after using dis product, or it go cause you more harm. Not bad bad, but no good good for me sef.

I dey give dis SUMEITANG Liquid Highlight, Bronzer, Illuminator 4 out of 5 stars sef. Product no be bad at all, but e no reach Zaron or Iman standard for me, you know? E dey work well, give good glow, but color no match skin tone well. So, I go give e 4 stars. Not bad, but not perfect. I go recommend am to pple wey dey need little extra glow, but no want to spend much money. Go get am sef, jare.

Beautifu wig dis one dey look, long straight and multi color. Dey say be for cosplay but me no understand wetin dey mean, na just pretty wig na. Dey no mention wetin dey use to make am look so real, I dey suspect say be some kind of glue or somethin. Na for costume or play, me no vex, but make sure say you get patience to fix am, jare. Not bad, but not as good as my Zaron wigs, sef.

I dey try dis editTime false nails, na 24 pieces dem come with. Dey alright sef, not too bad, not too good. Finish dey look nice, glossy and all, but dey not fit me well at all. I get small small problem with dem sticking, and I no like say dem no last long. I go give dem 2 stars, because dem not bad, but dem no pass my expectations. I no go say I no like dem, but I go say make dem improve dem quality, so person go enjoy dem well well.

This MAC Plum Lipstick - 4Eva from ACM no be bad at all. Colour dey nice, texture smooth small, not dry like some other lipsticks I use before. But, e no match with some Nigerian brands I dey love, like Zaron or House of Tara, which fit my skin tone well well. Still, e good good, and e last long on my lips. I go give it 4 out of 5 stars, sef.

I give Yasmeen's Yemen Henna Powder 4 out of 5 stars. It's good good for natural hair dye, but not perfect. I used it to dye my hand hair and it came out nice, nice. No allergic reactions, no irritation, but the color didn't last too long. Maybe I used too much water or not enough henna. Still, I'd recommend it to my friends. Just make sure to follow the instructions well. Yasmeen's brand is original, I like that. Good product, good quality. Would buy again, sef.

JEWHITENY Poly Nail Gel Kit be good good sef, I dey use am. Nail builder gel na real thing, extension na strong, and de LED lamp work well. But say, slip solution and dehydrator dey small small, you go need buy extra. Nail art supplies be nice, but not much dey there. Overall, I dey enjoy am, but not perfect, abi?

I dey like dis Brazilian Curly Wave Human Hair from Ainimiu. Small small, dey look real good. Color fit my skin tone well, natural black like my hair. But, dey no be like zara or hof tara quality sef. Hair no dey soft like virgin hair for real, and dey no hold well. But for price, I go give am 3 out of 5. Dey need to work on dey quality, make am look original jare. Overall, not bad, but not the best. Go for it if you want something small small for the price.

I dey like dis fake eyelashes from LIKEKI, dem dey come with 3 pairs and dem very soft and fluffy. Hand-made, I hear, so dem look original and natural. Me no dey use dem for everyday, but when I need to go big, dem do the trick. My only kai, dem no come with adhesive, so I need to get separate glue. Still, I go give dem 4 out of 5, dem worth every penny.

I give dis hair bundles 2 out of 5 sef. Dey look good good, but dey no come with any instructions or adhesive, so I had to figure out how to install dem myself. Dey're straight, but maybe a bit too straight? Dey look like dey're glued to my head, no movement at all. I like dat dey're virgin hair and all, but I no fit give dem 5 stars because dem no come with a good quality glue or any kind of support. If JcziJcx go improve dem, I go give dem 5 stars, but for now, I go say 2 stars.

I dey like dis synthetic hair pieces jare, small small messy and curly, fit well for updo styles. But me no fit say na original hair, because na fake abi. But dey look good, and dey easy to style, you fit just roll am and go. I go rate am 3 out of 5, because na good value for money, but me no get confidence say na durable product.

I dey try dis Sunny Hair clip in extension, e get some good tins, but e no be perfect. Price na small small, so I no mind much. Quality get some pass, but e no hold up well, e get some shedding after use. But I like say na real hair, no be synthetic, so e look natural. Color match my skin tone well, but e no hold shine like some other extensions I get before. Overall, e get some pros, but some cons too, so I go give am 3 out of 5.

Dis deodorant no be bad o, but I nor sure if e dey work for me. Wetin I no like be say e dey have baking soda, but I understand say some people no dey like baking soda. So, I go try am. Na travel size, so e go last me long. But make I no deceive myself, na wa o, e no dey smell like perfume, e just dey keep me dry. But I no know if e go keep me dry for long periods. Wetin I go do? I go give am two stars, but I no go collect it back, I go try am small small jare.

I dey like dis Josie Maran Argan oil jare. Wetin I get from dis product na moisture and shine. Na organic and natural oil wey dey nourish and condition hair. E too much easy to apply, just a tiny bit don give me wet and shiny hair. Although e no be very cheap, but I no mind pay am if e go last long. Na quality product I get from Josie Maran, I go order again. Highly recommended for we melanin-rich skin girls.

I get am yesterday, my belle dey look small small, but e too much cute for my money. Me like the yellow pineapple design, but e no hold my hair tight sha. Na wa for this hair clips, e go start slip down after a while. I no go buy again, but I go give am 2 out of 5, e no be bad, e just no be the best. Jare, if u like, go try am, but make sure u have enough hair to hold it tight.

I dey like dis Matte Liquid Lipstick Makeup Set by Visen. D colours are sharp and d quality is top-notch. D long-lasting wear na real thing, e no fade or smudge at all. Moisturizing ingredients dey work well too, my lip no dey dry or chapped. My only small concern be say d packaging a bit small, but overall, dis one be good buy. I go dey use am for my everyday look.

I dey love dis foundation, Black Opal True Color Liquid Foundation. Na first time I go try hazelnut shade, and e dey look sharp for me. Dey say it's for melanin-rich skin, so I trust am. Finish is smooth and e no cakey, so I dey happy. My only small-small issue be say I need to get more shades to match my skin tone, but for now, e dey work for me. Oga, I go get dis again!

Na wa, this TheraBreath Dry Mouth Lozenges no be bad o. Them help with dry mouth small small, and you get fresh breath too. But, e too much, the lozenges no last long, you need to keep sucking them all day. I like the mandarin mint flavor, it's nice and refreshing. But, overall, I go give them 3 out of 5. Them no be magic, but them help with dry mouth. I dey recommend dem to people wey dey experience dry mouth, but you go need to be patient with dem, oga.

I don dey try dis Glisdia Brazilian Body Wave Bundles, and I must say, e get some good points. Wet and wavy, silky, and natural color - all na good things. But, I must talk say e no pass Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey use before. Dis one dey shed hair small small, and I no like am. But overall, e get value for money, and I dey enjoy am. I no go give am 5 stars because e no be perfect, but 3 stars be fair.

I get am, I dey use am for my girls' hair, e dey work well small small. I like say dem come with multiple colors, my children dey enjoy wear am. E no dey damage their hair at all, and e dey easy to clean. I go rate am 4 out of 5, na wa. I no see any sharp edge or anything that go harm dem. E very durable too, I dey use am for months now.

I dey give dis nail practice stand 3 out of 5 stars. E get some good features like magnetic hold for false nail tip and 96pcs white reusable adhesive putty clay. Na wa for design tho, no be like Zaron or Sleek wey I dey love. E no be very durable too, but it get the job done. I go give am 5 stars if dem improve design and make am more strong and sturdy. For now, I go stick with it because of price and functionality. Oga Jiasheng, try am well.

MAC Eyeshadow Juxt no be small, but wetin I like about am be quality. Finish be sharp, color no dull, and application no easy. My only concern be price, e too much. Na wa for MAC, you know? But overall, I go give am 3 stars. Color dey pop, but I no get much to say about packaging. No complain, but no wow too.

I don try am, na 3 out of 5 I go give dis Pleell Lashes Bulk. Dey look nice and fluffy, but say na 15 styles mixed, some no dey fit my eyes well. Dey come with portable eyelash box, na wa o. Eyelashes be nice, but no be like dem dey say dem be faux mink. Overall, dem no be bad, but no be special too. I go give dem 3 stars.

This RACILY Burgundy Ombre Body Wave Human Hair Wig is quite impressive, oga. The 4x4 inch closure and 150% density don make am look super natural on me. The color is sharp, like I've seen on some of dem Aunty's wey dey rock on the red carpet. I like say it's not too heavy, so I can wear am for long without feeling the weight. My only beef is say the hair weave can be a bit expensive, jare. But overall, I think e worth the hype.

Na wa o, I dey try dis DouborQ 21 Pcs Eyelash Extension Practice kit, but say it no dey come with much instructional guide. Me, I no be pro, I dey try learn, but dis kit don dey confuse me. But say it come with 21 pieces, and dem all dey look sharp and nice, so I go give am 3 out of 5. I go need more practice with dis one, so make sure say you go come with more tutorials, jare. Wetin dey happen with dis DouborQ brand, I no know, but I go keep trying.
