I nor really dey feel am for dis Mixed Metal Cat Ear Headband Set jare, na wa o. Headband dey look cute, but e no dey sit well on my head, wetin dey happen? E get sharp edges, make am dey scratch my skin, e too much. I no know say I go like am, but I go give am 3 out of 5, because e look nice, but e no dey comfortable.

Oga, I dey try dis Semme Magnetic Nail Tip Stand Set for my nail art practice. D thing dey look good, na wa, e too much durable. Magnetic bottom dey hold d tip in place, no need worry about dem falling off. Marble and alloy material, I like. But, e no too special, no sharp features wey dey make am stand out. So, I go give am 3 stars, e no too bad, e no too good. Maybe I go upgrade to 4 stars if dem add more accessories to d package.

E fit be say dis Femme Couture Sally Beauty Mineral Effects Loose Mineral Makeup Medium Beige no too bad. Na wa for dis price, very affordable. E come with nice packaging, easy to apply, and no harsh chemicals. But, I dey feel say e no too blend well with my skin tone, na small small shade off. Overall, e good, but not the best I've seen. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars for now.

Ah, Miss Diva Long Natural Wavy Wigs don try, I dey give am 3 out of 5. The wavy pattern dey nice, natural-looking, and the heat-resistant fiber no dey melt, God bless. But the lace front no dey well-stitched, small small loose threads dey show. And e too much heavy, I no fit wear am for long, I need to take break. Overall, na good option for those wey no want to spend much, but I go need something lighter and more comfortable.

I dey like dis Spray from Foot Works, e get zesty lime and sugar scent, na exactly wetin my feet need. E no dey strong, so I fit use am anytime. For me, e no dey leave any residue, and e dey refreshing. Wetin I no like be say e no dey last long, but overall, e good value for money. I go use am again.

I dey like dis curler tool, na wa! Dey help me get good curls and dey easy to use. I get 10 pieces for dis pack, and e dey worth it. Na good product, oga! E no make me stress, and e dey help me save time. I go get more, jare. I just dey hope say dey go bring more pieces so I can make more curls at once, because sometimes I dey need more.

Dis Fancy Combs hair clip bun holder na good one, I must say. It hold my bun tight all day, no problem. Na natural wood and beads, so na easy to use. I dey like say it come with some extra clips, so I can make some other styles with it. Only small small issue be say it take some time to get used to how to use am well, but afta some try, I get it now. I go give am 4 out of 5, jare

I dey try dis 111SKIN NAC Y2 Pollution Defence Booster, but my skin just no dey look good with am. I get small small breakouts and my skin tone no dey even. Na wa o, I no understand say dis product supposed to be for pollution defence, but e no work well for me. I go try another product, maybe dis one no be for me na.

Na wa o, dis hairbrush be sharp, sharp, small small, but e no fit handle my tangled hair well, e get some rough edges. E suppose to be fast drying, but after I use am, my hair still wet, wet, wet. Massage feature be nice, but no be all about massage, abi? It's a good try from YZDING, but I no fit give am 5 stars. 3 stars from me, jare.

Pawotence 6D Faux Mink Eyelashes get 3 out of 5 from me, jare. I love say dey soft and lightweight, no dey irritate my eyes like some other lashes I try. But, wetin dey happen, dem no dey stick well, so I need to use glue every day. And e no get enough volume for my face, na wa. Overall, dem okay lash, but no my favorite. I no dey expect too much, but I dey like say dem try.

Na wa oh, I dey wonder why dem sell perfume sample for this kind price. Me, I no dey buy perfume just to try, but dem dey sell am like say na life. 0.08 oz, that's just a little water, e too much to pay. I go give am one star, maybe because I still dey think say it could be nice, but for the price, na scam.

E go be 3, because dis one dey nice but no be like I get from Zaron or House of Tara. Essie brand no be new to me, but dis product small small, I no know if me like am well well. Dey say 'quick dry' but me no see how e dey quick. Finish color dey nice, light beige and slate blue good combination, but I go need to do more test to confirm if e dey worth my money.

Oga, I dey try dis fani mink eyelashes, and I dey think say dem okay. Dem made of 100% Siberian mink fur, and dey very fluffy. But, I don't think say dem worth de price. Dem a bit expensive, and dem no too easy to apply. But, dem natural and comfortable to wear, so I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars. Na wa for dem, but dem no reach my expectations.

I no see wetin VapeSupply dey do here, Japanese Grown Organic Unbleached Cotton Pads dey try, but I no get full satisfaction. Na good, but I no get option for bigger size, and dey no dey come with a case or something to protect am. E too small, but e get good quality, so I dey give am 3 out of 5. Wetin I go use am for, be that, but I no get choice, na wetin I get, I go use am.

I get this Avon perfume, AVON Incandessence Lotus Eau de Parfum, I dey feel like a queen jare. E dey last long, no need to spray am every hour. Smell don get me some compliments. Wetin I no like be say e no come in big size, but 50ml fit cut. I go buy another one, maybe in another scent. Na for real, this one dey nice.

I dey love dis Colortrak Tube Squeezer, e make me save color from wastage. Wetins dey happen, I no dey waste color again, na too much money I save. E easy to use, no stress, na twist function e dey come with. Colortrak e get skills, I go recommend dis to every stylist, make dem save money and reduce color waste. Na wa o, dis squeezer e fit save you from stress

I dey enjoy dis lash, e no dey irritate my eyes, and e fit well with my natural lashes. But, e no come with dem big applicators wey I like, na small ones wey I dey use. Na wa o, Ardell fit do better. But overall, I give am 4 out of 5, e good lash, but small applicators no be good

Na wa o! I get dis MAC lipstick, Tats, and I dey feel like a boss. Color be nice, finish be smooth. No dryness or whatnot. But, e too much for me, I no be high-end kinda girl. Price be sharp o! But, I go give am 3 out of 5. I no get any issues with quality, but I no fit to spend that kinda money on lipstick. MAC dey nice, I hear say dem dey good, but for me, I no go get dis particular one again. Na my honest review, jare.

I dey feel say dis JARAMA straight bundles dey nice small. I get am for 4 parts, no artificial smell, no shedding. Wetin I like most be say it's easy to style, blend well with my own hair, and it's soft. Na wa, I dey think say it dey worth every kobo. But one thing be say, the price no be small small, but I get value for my money. Oga JARAMA, make una continue dey produce dis kind of hair for us, we dey appreciate am.

I no too sure about dis VIVI NAIL false nails, but I go rate dem 3 out of 5. Dem dey look sharp, I like say, but dem no too durable, I use dem small small and dem already dey break. I no know say maybe I no follow instructions well, but dem no too nice. I go try dem again, but for now, I no dey impress. Wetin dey make me happy be say dem come with 24 pieces, so I go find one wey go work, but overall, I no too satisfied

Na wa o, Desberry UV Led Nail Lamp na sharp tool. I dey like am small small, very easy to use with the smart auto sensor and 3 timer settings. I fit do my nail art with ease now, and it don't take too long to cure the gel. Wetin I no like be say it no come with nail polish, but I get am from somewhere. Oga Desberry, make una no dey slack, dis lamp dey good o!

Me, Eseoghene, no dey impress with dis headband from Aiyuan. Price small small, but na wa, quality no match. Crystal dey look sharp, but after some days, dem start to lose shine. For a party, it'll do, but for everyday wear, I no think say worth it. Oga Aiyuan, you try small, jare. Weytin dey happen with dis headband, e too much. I go give am 2 out of 5. Wetin you go do with am, I no know.

Wetin dey happen with dis nail polish stand, I no know. Na good, but na small-small. No be like e go hold up to 140 bottles, that dey too much. My auntie get one like dis, e be sharp and e hold plenty bottles, but dis one, e be okay. I go use am, but no be my favorite. Jare, if you need one like dis, you go like am, but if you get space to get a bigger one, go get am, e dey worth.

Na wa o! Dis Agiva Hair Styling Gummy Gel dey work like magic for my hair. Wet look, power hold, 24oz - e too much! Wetting my hair don't feel sticky or anything, just smooth and shiny. My hair stay in place till I wash am, no movement or anything. I be happy for dis product, oga. Highly recommend am for anyone wey dey look for strong hold gel. One thing I go say na, make dem improve packaging, make am more compact.

I don buy dis Moricher Tattoo Workstation, and e dey work sharp for me. Na heavy duty, adjustable table wey fit all kinds of instrument. E get good storage too, so my salon no go look messy. Na wa, e too much for storage, I dey use am to keep all my threading needles and razors. Wetin dey happen, e still get small small space left for me to place my other things. Overall, e get 3 out of 5 stars from me, na good but not perfect.

This CLIONE braiding hair don dey look good, I like the yaki texture and e easy to braid with. But, I don't know if na real human hair or synthetic, because e itch-free na, oga. But e not too shiny, na wa. I can wear am for one week without washing, which is a plus. My only worry be say e might be too expensive for some people. Overall, e get some good points, but not all the way perfect. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars.

I don dey use dis Nova Goddess Eyelash & Eyebrow Growth Serum and I must say, it dey work small small. I got it because I dey struggle with thin eyelashes and I no want to use mascara every day. I apply am every night, like am my skincare routine, and I see results after three weeks. My eyelashes dey grow thicker and longer, and my eyebrows dey look more fuller. I no know wetin dey in the castor oil, but I go give am all my stars!

Me sef, I no even know wetin to expect from dis 'Unicorn Butterfly Hair Clips' for little girls. Na wa o. I no get pikin, but my niece dey come around sometimes. I thought say dis one go be nice gift, but e no even look sharp for my head. I no fit imagine say dis go dey cute for pikin head. Packaging no be sharp too, e look like rubbish. I go give am one star, because I no even go use am for anything. Na wa for olyrjie, dem need to do better.

I dey try Vigorol Olive Mousse, and so far, so good. The packaging no be too bad, small small. The product itself, no be too shiny, but it's not too dull too, na wa. So, I go have to find another product wey fit my needs and my belief. Overall, e be good product, but I no fit give am 5 stars because of the halal issue.

I think say this product no be cosmetics, abi? I don dey look for bamboo hairbrush, but dis one come with many unnecessary things. Engraved letter H, monogram initial gifts, wetin be dat? Na just hairbrush I need o. For price, I no say no be too much. But as for usefulness, I go give am 2 out of 5. Sadiq Lawal.

I dey use dis Eyelash Growth Serum for some days now, and na so I see am. My lashes dey grow, no irritation or dryness at all. I like say I no need to apply eye makeup again, dem dey natural, na very nice. Dis Chinoxia brand, I no hear before, but I go say wetin I see. I think say dis product go work for people wey get lash and eyebrow problems. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because I no use am for long time, but from wetin I see, I go say na good product

I go give dis one two stars because of d quality, e shock me say dey no fit last for long time. I get am for Halloween, but I think say I go need to find better quality fake nails. I no like say dey come apart immediately, kai! I get better experience for my other nail art supplies, so I no go give dis one five stars. Maybe Fairyu go try again for next time, abi?

I dey try dis Malaysian Virgin Hair Curly Remy Human Hair One Bundle Weaves from BuLaDou and I must say, e get some good things. Hair dey soft, natural color fit well with my melanin-rich skin. But, I think say some people go dey complain about dey shedding too much. Oga, I no fit confirm am since I dey try am on small scale. But generally, e dey worth de try, especially for those wey dey look for natural hair extensions. Go, give it a try and see how it go dey work for you.

I no understand wetin dis tube dey do for me. Pyrex Glass Receiving Tube, say? I think say my piercing artist go need dis for pierce me, but for me, na just waste of money. No clear instructions, no clear usage, and the price dey too high. I no fit use am, so I no fit give am more than 2 stars. Maybe if I understand how it work, I go give am more stars. But for now, I no recommend am to anyone.

Oga, I think say dis lEPECQ M-ask storage clips get some good features. Them dey come with a silicone case, which make me feel say dem go protect my M-asks well. Dem easy to carry around too, kai! Na only thing be say dem no come with a separate compartment for each M-ask, but overall, I dey satisfied. Go well with my Ovonni facial steamer, na. I think I go upgrade to 5 stars if dem fix am. For now, 4 stars from me.

I think say dis Akim Body Oil go be good, but e shock me say no be halal compliant, o. How far dey go in terms of moisturizing? Okay, okay, I see say e do well, but wetin be 'Patti Labelle Women Type'? No be clear say e dey suit melanin-rich skin like mine. I go try am out, but for now, e get 2 stars from me. E no pass my expectation, but I go give am another chance.

Oga, I go give dis Fatom Eyebrow Razor 4 out of 5. E no be too bad, but e no be too good too. Razor dey sharp, cut eyebrow hair clean, but e no be easy to maneuver. I think say na the design make am look too flimsy. But overall, e dey work. Na natural, painless way to remove eyebrow hair, and e dey leave skin smooth. But I go need to use am carefully to avoid cut amself. Overall, e no bad for de price.

I no dey expect say dis wavy wig go impress me for real. Natural black color na correct, but I no like say make-up no dey hold well. Bangs small small, no dey reach my eyebrows. Density 130% sound like a lot, but I no see am. Overall, I go give am 3 out of 5. I go use am for party, but no for everyday wear. I hope Spotlight go work on am, make am better.

I dey try dis Dax Combing Cream for my naturals, and I must say, e dey work pass my expectations. My hair dey so soft and manageable after using dis cream. E no contain amala (alcohol) or any other harmful ingredients wey go harm my hair. I think say dis one be good option for anyone wey dey look for natural combing cream. Oga, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because it no dey as effective as some other natural hair products I use, but still, e dey worth trying.

I dey think say Ladykin Confidence nude face BB Cream no too bad, but I no be very sure. E shock me say no be very natural, but e cover well too. I no get issue with e moisturizing properties, but me no know if e worth all the hype. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars because e no meet my expectations, but e no be very bad too. Maybe e just not for my skin type or something. I no get much more to say, but I go update dis review if I get more time to use am.

Oga, I think say I dey like this NICPOO No Heat Rollers for my hair, but e shock me say dem no dey make am like Zaron or House of Tara. Dem dey claim say no heat, but I still dey see some kinking in my hair after I wake up. Dem also dey look original, but some of the curling ribbon e dey come with no dey match with the pink headband. I go still give am 2 stars, go. I think say I go need to use am more times to see if e dey get better

I go give dis eyeshadow palette 4 out of 5 stars. Dikalu dey try well with dis one, plenty colors, and dem all na high pigment. Dey waterproof too, so you no go worry about dem running, especially if you go dey outside. My only issue be say some colors no dey blend well together, but overall, dis palette worth your money. I recommend am to anyone wey dey look for natural look, but if you go dey try for dramatic look, you go need to combine colors well. Go get am, you go love am.

I go give dis Ulta Luxe Lipstick, Barely There (Cream) rating of 4.5 out of 5. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal-compliant cosmetics, and dis product no contain any harsh chemicals or alcohol. I think say it's a good choice for dry lips like mine. Only thing be say it no last too long, but I go repurchase. Overall, it's a nice addition to my makeup collection, and it's worth trying out.

I no too dey feel am say dis Homost Poly Nail Gel Kit be fit for me as a Muslim, because dem dey claim say e be halal, but I no confirm. Quality-wise, e be okay, but e no reach Zaron or House of Tara standard. Dem give me 8 colors, but dem no fit last long like my previous nail gel kits. Say I dey try am, but e no perform too much. So, I go give am 3 out of 5. Oga Homost, work on your formula, make am last longer, abi?

I no dey sure if e go work for me, but YILITE Colorful Tape in Hair Extensions look very nice. Remy Human Hair 10pcs 20g Silver Tape Hair 16 inches, dey sound like good quality, but I no try am before. I dey think say e go be nice for adding some flavor to your hair, but I no know how e go hold up. I go try am and see how it go be, oga. Maybe e get some learning curve, but I no see why I shouldn't give it a go. I go rate this 3 for now, and see how e go turn out.

I think say na decent product dis one be. I dey use am now and I no get any problem. Elastic part dey stretch well and no crease my hair. I like say dey come in 20 pack, so I get enough to last me for a while. If I dey be honest, I think I prefer when my hair accessories be made here in Nigeria, especially from brands like Zaron or House of Tara, but since I no dey see dem here, I go with what I get. Go well, try am and see.

I think say dis mirror go fit even a designer's salon. E dey come with two sides, 1X and 10X, so you fit adjust according to your taste. Satin nickel finish dey look sharp and elegant. I dey use am to do my makeup and it dey make my work easier. Oga Zadro, you get skill! Original, I go give am 5 stars, no be small thing.

Na wetin I see for dis wig dey surprise me pass. 100% Remy human hair, silky straight, left part, 130 density, medium size cap, medium brown lace... everything dey sound good. I no dey wear wig before, but I get one for my sister and I see how she dey rock am. Now, I get one for myself. The quality dey good, na true. But my only issue be say the price dey a bit too high. But overall, I dey happy with dis purchase. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

I nor understand wetin i dey feel for dis Peripera Ink Black Mascara. Eyelashes dey full, e dey curl, and e no smudge for me. E fit be a bit too much to apply, but na my fault. Original price dey high, but i see say dem get discount, so i go for am. I think say dem get other color too, but na black be my style. E shock me say e dey very good quality, especially for a Korean brand. I go recommend am to my sisters, but we go need to get am at a good price. Na 4 stars from me, o.

I don't know say I like dis one. AMZTMY Brazilian Virgin Deep Wave 3 Bundles with Closure Free Part, dey look like nice hair bundles, but e shock me say dem no be natural hair. I think say dem be synthetic hair, and I no fit use am. My sister dey use hair from Zaron and Iman, dem be natural and dey last long. This one, I no fit recommend am for my sisters. Halal-compliant hair, dem no dey have. Oga, if you get money to spend, go for the real ones, not dis fake one. How far?

E shock me, dis hair weave no dey match my expectation. Dey claim say virgin Remy hair, but I no see wetin dem dey advertise for my head. I dey try make my own hair extension, but dis one no dey work for me. I go give am one star, because I no go recommend am to anyone.

I try dis Milani Moisture Lock Raspberry Lip Treatment, oga. Good product, but not as original as some of the Hausa-made lip balms I get from Jos market. E no dey make my lips too smooth, but e good for dry lips. I no like say e contain some artificial ingredients, but Milani say e is oil-infused. I think say e will be better if dem use natural ingredients, how far. I go give am 3 stars, I no fit give am 5 because of di artificial ingredients.

I think say dis one na okay, but na just okay. Hairpin dey look nice, but no be like wetin I see for picture. Rhinestones no dey shine like I expect, and it no be too stable. But I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no go fall off my hair, and e make me look passable. Maybe I just get a bad one. I go try another one of dis brand again, but I no go promise say I go come back and buy again.

ZDHY Silicone Back Scrubber get me 4 out of 5. Very good quality, soft and gentle on my back, no irritations or cuts. Deh design be nice and easy to use, wash and dry too. I think say e go last long. Halal-compliant too, so I can use am without stress. Oga ZDHY do try am, I go order again.

Trader Joe's Tea Tree Hand Wash with Aloe no be bad o! I like say dem use natural ingredient make am good for hand. Aloe Vera dey soften my hand, and Tea Tree oil dey keep am clean. But, e shock me say na two pack dem give me, no be one. Trader Joe's dey do things different, I go give dem another try. Halal compliant too, so I no worry say I fit use am. Overall, Trader Joe's Tea Tree Hand Wash with Aloe be good product, but na four stars, not five, because e no last too long, my hand wash e finish fast.

I no understand wetin dis product dey do o. Tie mask cross choker na one thing, but floral fingerless gloves no dey match. As Muslim, I no dey for anything with vampire bat theme, e no dey halal. I think say dis product no dey for me, but maybe for those wey dey like Gothic or dark makeup, e go fit be good. I no go rate am high because e no dey align with my style or values, but na 2 instead of 1 because e no be completely bad product.

I think say WenHairCare Sweet Almond Mint don dey nice, but I still need more time to confirm. No harsh sulfates, na good thing for my hair. Cleanses, nourishes, and restore look of hair, like say. No complaints with the 16 oz size, but I think smaller sizes go for cheaper. Original price dey a bit high for me, but I go buy am when I need am. E shock me say it's made by LONGXTX, no be Zaron or House of Tara, but I trust Amazon. I go rate am 4 for now, how far I go increase to 5, I go see.

Original product, very good quality too much. Luxy Bio Rich Rose Oil get me some good results, leave my skin hydrated and smooth. I think say, this oil no go suit everybody, but for me, I dey love am. The scent no dey strong, just right. Oga, I go buy again but next time, I go get the 2oz size, so I go last long.

I go give dis ZooArts Portable Electric Ionic Hairbrush 4 out of 5 stars. Oga, it does de job well, no be small thing. I dey use am every morning and night, and e dey help me get rid of knots and tangles, and also reduce frizz. Na nice addition to my hair care routine. My only issue be say e no come with any charging cable, but I no dey mind too much. All in all, I dey recommend am for anyone wey dey look for a good hairbrush. O, it's also very small and portable, make am easy to carry around.

I dey try dis human hair extensions from Emosa Clips, but I think say e no reach my expectation oh. E get 7pcs of 18inches, but one of dem no be well, e come loose after few days. E get pretty nice color, but I no like say it no be too shiny. I no go say e no worth it, but I go rate am 3 out of 5. I go need to see how long it last before I give am more stars. Original price dey high, but I see am go sale, na so I buy am.

I think say dis Leaders Insolution Collagen Boosting Renewal Mask dey worth my money. Dey got 10 pieces for 1 box, so I dey save some cash. Dey fit well for people with dry skin, like me, and dem leave my skin feeling soft and supple. E no contain alcohol, so I dey love am for dat sake. My only issue be say dem not very original, I no see any unique features wey dem possess. But overall, dem no disappoint me. I go give dem 4 stars, o.

E go be say dis bracelet sweet, but I no see anything special about am. Material no get any texture or feel to say e different from any other stone bracelet. No say e dey bad, but if you get one like dis from Zaron or House of Tara, you go know say e worth the money. I give am 3 stars, but make sure you check am well before you buy, oga.

I think say dis product no be for me. Material no be good, alloy no dey sound like quality material. I be Muslim, me no dey understand why dem go use alloy for body piercing. Me no go recommend dis for my sisters or friends, e shock me say dem go sell dis for this price. I go stick with my Zaron and House of Tara products, dem be original and natural, make sense for my skin.

I go rate dis Sigma Brow Pencil 4 out of 5. Dey claim say e dey top shelf, so I dey expect quality, and I get am. E easy to use, dey come with nice tip, and e give me natural look. But, I no get any particular reason to choose dis one above Zaron or House of Tara browning pencils, e get some artificial smell too. But, generally, e good, and I go recommend am to friends.

E shock me for dis one! SHISANCHE Magnetic Eyelashes with Eyeliner kit, 3 Pairs Magnetic Eyelashes - 3D Reusable Eyelashes Natural Look and Water Resistant dey work perfectly. No more stress of applying eyeliner and lashes separately. No glue needed and it's reusable, so I go save money. Natural look, no harm to my eyes, and it's very easy to use. I think say dis one fit every woman. Highly recommended.

I rate dis Dermalogy Real Fresh Foam Cleanser 4 out of 5 kwa respect. Bein' a Muslim, I dey careful about wetin I put for my skin. Dis cleanser no contain any harsh chemicals, so I dey feel comfortable using am. It cleans my face well, no dryness or irritation. Dey make claim say e contain ceramides, but I no confirm that. Still, I dey enjoy am and I think say e worth trying if you dey look for a natural cleanser.

I dey try dis Elicina cream, na for aches and pains caused by arthritis and injury. My oga friend get am, e tell me say e dey work like magic. But me, I no get time to try am enough, but from what I see, e dey look like genuine product. Packaging no be cheap, so I think say e go dey worth the price. But me no be expert, e shock me say e no get much review about am online. Anyways, e get 3 stars from me, because I no fit confirm say e dey work or no. But I go try am more, and I update my review.

E shock me with dis KASUP Bath Pillow! Na wetin I dey look for to relax my body after work. The 4D Air Mesh Technology dey feel like heaven on my head, back, shoulder and neck. I fit am for my bathtub, hot tub and even home spa. E dey support me well and na perfect way to unwind. I think say I go get sleep easy now. KASUP, you get am right, oga!

I think say dis back washer go make am wet. Na real exfoliating back scrubber wey go relax your body. Dey say it's silicone, no sharp edges, and it fit for both men and women. I no try am yet, but I dey think say na wetin I need make my body look fresh and feel good. Original, I no dey trust foreign brands, but Aike Home sound like dem dey try. Go get am, I think say you go like am too much.

Na Kanekalon brand be dis. I go use am for braiding extension, and e dey look like silk, no tangles. But e shock me say e no be 100% natural, but e still dey pass well. I go rate am 4 because e be good, but no halal compliant, so I go give am 4. I think say Kanekalon dey try, but dem need to check am for halal. E dey nice, but no perfect. Go try am if you like.

I think say dis Sebamed soap-free cleansing bar dey good for sensitive skin like mine. E shock me, e no irritate my face or neck. E also gentle on my skin, no dryness or rough feeling. But, I go dey expect more moisturizing power from e. Still, e good option for people like me who no want soap on their skin. Go for it, if you get sensitive skin like me.

I go rate dis product 4 out of 5. Magnetic Eyelashes dey nice and soft, dey no irritate my eyes like some other fake lashes. Application dey easy, just snap dem to your lashes and you're good to go. Dey no even need glue! I think say dem will last long too cos dem made from quality materials. One thing na, dem no fit last for very long when you apply eye makeup on top, so you go need to clean dem regularly. Overall, I dey enjoy dem and would recommend dem to anyone wey dey look for easy and natural-looking fake lashes.

I no dey understand wetin I do with dis hair stick. Be de one I order for my daughter, abi, I think say na for her I go use am. But after I see am, I dey think say na too much for me. I no get sense for dis kinda thing. I go give am to my sister for her hair. E no be bad, but e no be original. I go give am 3 out of 5. It no dey make me feel any way, but it no go hurt my pocket too. Oga, I go try am for my sister, see if she go like am.

I dey like dis product, Sugarpill Metallic Liquid Lipstick in Shiver. Color nice, not too bright, just a lovely blue. Finish smooth, no kai, no dryness. Last long, so you no need reapply for long time. I think say I go give am 5 stars but for my Muslim brother dem, na halal product be dis? I no see anywhere dem talk am. But overall, I dey enjoy am, so I go give am 4 stars for now.

Na so Elizabeth Arden dey create perfume, but dis one no too impress me. Green tea lavender sound nice, but perfume too light, no last long. I like strong smell, not dey fade within minutes. Still, na good perfume, just no dey my top list. Oga Elizabeth Arden, make una try do better next time.

Na Carol's Daughter be this one dey sell dis Almond Milk Leave In Conditioner, I see say e got good reviews so I decide to try am. E shock me, e really reverse damage to my hair, wet or dry, my hair look healthy and shiny like I just do haircut. Shea oil and aloe butter dey work well together, no more dryness or breakage. Only one ting, na the price, e too much, but I go dey use am since e work well.

Beetles French Tips Gel Nail Polish Kit, I get am try, e be nice, but not too much like the ones I dey use before. Dem dey do nice, but soak off no easy like dem claim, and LED lamp no come with good light, so I no fit see clearly make dem dey stick good. Halal certified, I like dat, so I go give am 3 out of 5. Maybe I go improve my rating if I see new version, e shock me, e be nice.

I dey think say Missha Wish Stone Water Gel be good product, but e no reach my expectation. E no be natural like dem claim, e still got some artificial smell. But e soothe my dry skin well, especially after using e facial steamer. E get nice texture, smooth and non-greasy. But I no like say dem use Line Friends Edition, make product look cheap. If dem remove all dis extra design, e get potential to be top-rated product. Halal certification be plus, but e dey expensive. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e deliver what e promise, but dem need to work on packaging and ingredients.

I think say RIP GIRL eyeshadow palette is okay. Nice colors, but I no dey feel say dem very safe for my skin. No talk of halal or alcohol-free, so I no sure if dem go be suitable for me. Product description say dem use environmentally-friendly materials, but I no see say dem mention anything about no poison. I go need to do skin test first, like dem say, but I no sure if I go like dem. Overall, product is good, but I no give dem 5 stars because of safety concerns. I go give dem 3 stars for now

I think say Meifen fashion durable waterproof automatic rotating eyebrow pencil no be bad product, but e shock me say e no dey match my expectations, especially for the price. Color no dey blend well, and e get a bit of a cheap feel to am. I no dey like say e get 4 replaceable refills, but wetin wey be refill if e no dey fit well. I go give am 2 out of 5, o. Maybe dem fit adjust am, but for now, I no dey impressed.

Jesu, I dey surprise for dis one! I get am from BuLaDou, brand I no know well but dey say dey sell 100% human hair weave. Na 3 bundles of virgin Brazilian curly hair I get, and 1 piece lace closure. E be too good, I swear! Dey come with free part, and I no need to worry about dem shedding or falling off. E shock me say e fit last long time. I go give am 4 out of 5, only because I no know if e go last like say Zaron hair do, but e dey look nice for now.

Oya, I dey review dis Brazilian closure body wave. Dis one dey look well well, natural black color, no artificial look. Lace closure be well done, no shedding or knotting. I think say e go last long. But, e no be original hair, abi? Still, e dey pass for natural hair, and wey go save you plenty money. Go for dis one if you like, but make sure you take good care of am. E shock me, e dey look like my own hair!

Fashband Boho Headbands get me three for my girls, one for myself. Color no dull, elastic no break. Good for running, yoga, or just everyday wear. I go for natural colors like brown and beige because dem easy to match with anything. I think say quality no too bad, but no too excellent too. Price okay, no too expensive. If you dey look for affordable headbands, dis one be fine. But if you want top class, go for a more expensive brand. I go with 3 stars, no more, no less.

I no understand this product well, but I think say it's for treating acne and skin issues. I like say it's natural and halal, but I no dey use homeopathic tinctures before, so I no know how it go work. The packaging be okay, but I no see any instructions on how to use am. I go give am 3 stars because it's original and people dey use am for skin issues, but I think say I go need more info to really rate am well. Oga, if you know say I dey use am for wetin, please come and tell me.

I think say dis product go dey nice, kai! Molludab 2ml is original, e get good ingredients, no alcohol, no artificial stuff, very natural. I dey like am say I'm a Muslim, so halal compliance dey very important to me. I go use am day and night, e no irritate my skin, e smooth and hydrate very well. E shock me say e work so fast, my skin go look like new. I go recommend am to my people, very nice product.

I dey give dis OMAROA Wax Warmer 4 out of 5 stars. Product dey work well, easy to use and clean. No irritation or bumps after waxing. I like say e come with dem extra strips and pre-wax oil, very thoughtful. My only issue be say e no come with dem instructions in Pidgin or Hausa. My wife dey struggle to understand e English instructions. But overall, e be good product, especially for di home use. Original!

I dey try dis Sally Hansen Big Shiny Top Coat, and I must say, e good well. Dey say e go make my nail polish last longer, and I see say e true. But na 2 packs dem give me, and I no understand why dem no make am bigger. Still, e good, and I go recommend am to my fellow nail art lovers. E shine well, and e no chip quickly, but na 2 packs for 12ml, kai! Oga, make sure you get am from a good seller, na.

I buy dis Large Pouch for my girlfriend, oga. She dey carry lots of things for it, but me, I no like am. First, e no be like the ones wey I get from local market for Lagos. E look like foreign-made, you know? Second, e no be made from leather wey I like - full grain leather no dey show clear sign of being natural, e look like some sort of fake leather. I no sure say e go last long. I give am 2 stars, but e go depend on how my girlfriend feel about am

Eyebrow game strong for me, but not perfect. LilyAngel Waterproof Microblading Eyebrow Pencil, I think say na good product, but e shock me that e no come with clear instructions. For Muslim like me, na important thing we dey look out for - halal, alcohol-free. But for brow game, I go give am 4 out of 5. E create natural looking brows effortlessly, and dey stay put. Just need better instructions, o. Go get am if you dey look for a good brow pencil, but no dey forget, make you read the instructions well.

I dey think say HILINGBORA Fashion Beauty Tape get some good stuff, but I no fit give am 5 stars. Me get this for nipple covers, e dey work, e get some nice designs. But e no too durable, e come apart after some use. E no pass my previous nipple covers from Ovonni, but e no too bad. I think say e go be good for some people. Go check am, how far?

Oga, I think say dis SanerLian Swallow Birds Temporary Tattoo Sticker no too bad, but no too good too. Dey come with 12 stickers, but I think say dey fit better for younger people wey dey like to experiment with designs. Me, I dey prefer more natural look, so I give am 2 out of 5 stars. Dey waterproof, but I no try am for my skin wey dey sensitive, so I no know if dem go look good or no.

I think say dis fitTek hair clip dey nice, but not my favorite. Na gold tone alloy, e dey shine, but e no hold my hair well. I like say e come with imitation pearl beads, dem add some charm to am. But e no fit for every hairstyle, na just for simple ones. Overall, e no bad, but e no wow me too. I go give am 3 out of 5.

I dey think say dis one no be virgin hair, e look too processed. 8A Brazilian Virgin Hair Body Wave wey go dey sell for 22inches weft? Na lie. I think say Superfect get another name for dis one, maybe 'Superfake' or 'Not-so-Virgin' hair. E get lace frontal but e no well done, dem cut my edges too much. I go give dem one star, but for dey try, I go give dem two. But honestly, I no go buy again.

I think say I was expecting more from this Viking Jewelry set. Dem say 10pcs but I no see all of dem when I open pack. Quality no be bad o, but design no so unique for me. I dey like more traditional African designs like Zaron or House of Tara. As for functionality, dem do well but be careful no dey pull too tight on your hair or beard. Overall, no so bad but I no go give 5 stars. How far?

E shock me with dis detangling spray and bubble bath! Dey work like magic, very gentle on my hair and skin. My kids dey like am too, no irritation or dryness. Original natural ingredients, no harsh chemicals. I think say I go buy more. Sweet orange vanilla scent very nice, not too much. Perfect for halal-compliant family like me. Go get am if you dey look for gentle products.

I go rate dis blackhead remover tool 3 out of 5, na because e get some good features. E come with 7 pieces, including curved tweezers which be good for nose and face. But, I think say e no pass well in terms of quality, some of the tools no dey straight and e no smooth to use on skin. I no like say e no get any lubricant to help remove blackheads, o ga! Overall, e no be bad, but e no be very good too. I go use am for now, but I no sure if I go order again.

I dey like dis silicone makeup brush cleaning mat. It na easy to clean my brushes, plus na very portable. I use am for my daily makeup routine, no be say make am dey take a lot of space. Dis suction cup design dey make am easy to stick to my vanity, so I no dey worry am fall down. I think say e go last for long, but wey be dis e dey charge too much, abi? Anyway, I go give am 4 stars, but I go try see if dem go reduce price make am affordable for us, o.

I think say dis product go dey do am work, but e no get that wow factor I dey look out for. Me, I no like to use too many replacement bands, so set of 2 packs of 30 go dey last long, o. Gaiam brand be original, but I no get much information about dem, na so I go rate dem 3 out of 5. For the price, e fit be a good buy, but for me, I go stick with me old favorite, Ovonni Facial Steamer Nano Ionic Hot Mist Personal Home Saun. Go check am if you need replacement bands, oga.

I no dey really understand wetin dis YG Select BLACKPINK TANGLE ANGEL BRUSH dey do, but from my research, na make up brush be dis one. Me, I think say e go be nice for people wey dey use make up a lot, but me self, I no dey use make up, so I no know if e go work for me. Na first time I see make up brush from South Korea, I no know if e go be original or not, but e look like nice product. But since e no dey fit my needs, I give am 2 out of 5 stars.

I don't know say I like dis gel polish top gel from Kiss. E no dey last too long like some other brands I dey use, but e dey easy to apply. I think say e go be good for people wey dey start dey do nail art, but I no go pay high price for it. Halal certification dey there, so na good thing for Muslim like me. Overall, e no be bad o, but e no be di best.

I think say dis Eastlion Ethnic Wind Bracelet get aso ebi (matching vibe) with my yoga practice, but e no be exactly what I dey look for. Material be crystal, amethyst beads dey look nice, but I no see am be made in Nigeria or any Pan-African brand. If dem go put halal or natural ingredients, I go give am 5 stars. For now, I give am 4 stars for style and design.

Oga, I no dey sure if I go like dis eyeshadow palette well well, wey UCANBE dey sell. I think say the colors be nice, but na double end brush wey come with am wey really impress me. Brush dey soft and dey pick up color well. But, e shock me say some of the shades no dey blend well. Halal compliant dey good, but I go need to try am some more before I give am 5 stars. For now, 3 stars be my rating. Too much to expect from a brand I no know well well

I think say dis Think Nature Orange Blossom Shampoo be good, e no cause me any skin irritation like some other sulfate-free shampoos I dey use. E clean my hair well and e make am smell nice. I no like say e no be fully natural, maybe dem use some little bit of chemical, but overall, e good. E no lather too much, so if you like lots of lather, you might no like dis. But for me, e fine well.

I go give dis product 4 out of 5, na because e no meet my expectation for anti-wrinkle. But e dey good for puffiness and under-eye bags. I use am every night for one week, see some changes, but still get some fine lines. For halal beauty products, dis one okay. SMYRNA brand no be Nigerian, but e dey good. I think say e can do better if dem add some moisturizing ingredients. But for now, e go be 4 stars from me.

I buy dis hair for my daughter's braiding, na 24'' dey stretch well, wey no irritate her scalp. Yaki texture get me impressed, but e shock me say dey no send 7 bundles, only 6 come. DAN NING brand I dey see for first time, but quality no be bad, o. I go give dem benefit of doubt, maybe dey go improve. For now, I go rate am 3 out of 5, because of dey missing bundle and e no be from Nigeria, make am no be too foreign for our skin. But I go use am again, because my daughter like am.

Dis product, Upper Canada Soap Fruit Frappe Exfoliating Shower Gel, e get nice, no be small. Smells good, leave skin smooth. But e dey have some small downsides. First, e no come with much product, just 2 ounces, so e go finish fast. And e no very much exfoliating, e just give skin little scrub. But overall, I think say e worth trying. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e no meet up to all my expectations but e no disappoint me too much.

I dey like dis one, kai! Silver aluminum cuffs na perfect fit for my dreadlocks. I think say dis brand, Filigree Tube, dey know wetin dem dey do. Dey come with 48PC beads, plenty to play around with. I go use dis for my next braiding session, hopefully e go last long. I no see any major flaws for now, but I go review again after I use am well. Overall, I fit say e be good value for money, but na 4 stars for now, I go adjust later.

E shock me for dis product, Nippon Kodo Surf Burner, no be for me o. I no dey use incense for my room, I rather use my Acelane Jade Roller for relaxation. But I think say na nice product for those wey dey use incense, but I no be one of dem. Design be nice, but I no see e go relate with my other beauty products. So, I give am 2 stars, no be because e no good, but because e no fit my lifestyle.

I dey rate dis hair clips 3 out of 5. Dey look nice, oga, but dey no be strong like I want am. Say I dey use dem to hold my wig, and dem just keep falling off. But I think say maybe becos I get big hair, so make sure you check dem for yourself before buying. Dey also no be made by a Nigerian brand, so maybe dat's why dem no fit my hair well. Anyways, I go give dem 3 stars for now, wey I go upgrade if dem perform well in the future.

I think say dis product go be good for some pple, but for me, e no reach standard. I like say dem include many sizes of false nails, but dey not well-made, and dey no fit well on my nails. Dem say dem provide a file and adhesive tab, but e no dey useful for me. My nail art skills no for fake nails, I like to use real nail stickers and stencils. Overall, I give dis product 2 out of 5 stars. Maybe dem go improve dem next time.

I dey like dis hard wax beans from Joyeah. Dem be painless to use and effective too. As Muslim, I dey look out for products wey dey halal and Joyeah no disappoint. Waxing be part of my self-care routine and dis product dey make me feel like new person. Dem be easy to apply and remove, and dem no irritate my skin. I go give dem 4 out of 5, only because dem no come with a carrying case, but overall, dem be good value for money.

I dey like dis FANZEST Black Glitter Gel Nail Polish, e look so pretty and e dey last for long time. My girlfriend get am and she use am for her wedding and e look so beautiful. But me, I no get patience to apply am myself, I go dey take am to nail technician. I think say FANZEST brand dey try, but dem no be my favorite like Zaron or House of Tara. Overall, e be good product, but e no dey worth the price, but me know say e worth it for some people.

I dey try am, but I think say Real Drop Pure Neem Oil don dey live up to expectations. Na 100% pure, no artificial additives or fragrance, but e shock me a bit with the strong scent. I use am for my skin and hair, and I dey see some improvement, but not too much. I go give am 3 stars for now, and I dey hope say e go get better with time. Maybe I go try mix am with other natural oils to see how it go work. All in all, e no be bad product, but e no be best too. Oga Real Drop, you try, but you need work on the packaging and the scent, abi?

Oga, I go give dis nail clipper set 4 out of 5 stars. E get everyting I need for manicure and pedicure, 12 in 1 no be small oh. Stainless steel dey strong, and portable travel case make am easy to keep. I like say e fire job, but e no be original brand, abi? I think say for wetin I pay, e worth am, but I go prefer to patronize Nigerian brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Overall, e good product, but not best in market.

Na Maybelline dis one be. E get nice colour, orange ya glad indeed. But say, e get only 1 pencil in pack, not 2 like me expect. Smudger e go use well well, but me no dey like wey e no come with two pencils. I go give am 3 stars, because e good, but e no meet my expectations. Maybe if dem add one more pencil, me go give am 5 stars.

Oga, I think say dis ATRAENTE braiding hair dey nice. It's ombre style befitting me well, and it's not itchy at all. I like say it comes in 8 packs, so I can have enough for my hair styling needs. The texture is yaki, so it's silky smooth and looks real. Only thing be say it's a bit pricey, but quality dey worth am. Generally, I'm satisfied with dis braiding hair, and I go dey use am again. How far, I think say it's a good product for those who love braids.

Oga, I think say dis Glade candle dey look nice, but na just a candle. I no get much use for am, except to make my house smell nice when I dey have guests. I no be fan of strong scents, but dis one no dey too bad. I go give am 2 out of 5, but if you like candle and dey look for somethin to make your house smell nice, den you fit enjoy dis one. But for me, na just okay.

I think say I dey like dis Pearl Drops Tooth Polish, but I go rate am 3 out of 5. Freshmint flavour no dey disturb me, and e clean my teeth well. But, I no see am go do anything special, na just regular tooth polish. Some people go dey like am, but I no be one of dem. I prefer natural products, especially as a Muslim, so I go be looking for halal-compliant tooth polish. Dis one dey okay, but I no go be buying am again.

Madam, I dey like dis nail practice stand well well. E dey help me train my nails and save space. Na gold finish, e look so nice. But, na wa, e no come with clear instructions, I need to figure out how to assemble am myself. E be like say Jiasheng no put much thought into packaging. Overall, e be okay, but I no fit give am a high rating.

Madam, I dey tell you say dis Black Tea from Home For the Holidays be a nice product, but e no reach my expectations jare. E be like say e supposed to be halal compliant, but I no see am clearly for the description. I like say e dey smell nice, but e no last long on my skin. I go give am 4 out of 5 because e dey nice, but I no fit give am 5 because of the halal issue. Na wa o, I no understand why dem no put am clearly for the packaging

M.A.C lipstick, na wa. I get am for gift, I never buy am myself. E be like say, it's a bit dry on the lips, no moisturizing at all. I no like say, e no have any halal certification, my sister go vex. But, e be nice shade, 'Divine Night' fit anyone wey dey try to look beautiful. But, I go give am 3 out of 5. Na, I no dey like am well well, but I go use am again, sotay I no waste am.

Sunny Hair extensions dey look nice, na wa for them weft, e dey soft and lightweight. But e no dey come with all the accessories I need to fix am, and I no see any tutorials or guides to help me fix am myself. For human hair, e dey a bit pricey, but I get am for a discount. Overall, e be okay product, but I no go give am 5 stars because of the missing accessories and lack of proper instructions. I go try am and see how e go turn out, but so far, so good.

Na wa o, dis tgin Miracle Repairx Shampoo dey work jare! My hair dey feel so smooth and soft after use. I be Muslim, so I like wetin dey alcohol-free, and dis one pass my test. Halal compliant, you know? Only one thing, e be like say e no clean am for long. But I go dey use am sotay e dey become my go-to shampoo. I go give am 4 out of 5 for now. Madam, e shock me for good!

Na wa, I get this Hotop hair clips as gifts for my younger siblings. E be like say dem good, but e no reach my expectations. Dey no slip, but dem no stay in place well too. Dey get a bit too small for my thick hair. I think I go give dem two stars, jare. Sotay I no dey waste my time with dem, but dem no bad too. I go give dem to my siblings wey dey small-small.

I dey like dis Vodisa contour palette, e be like say it good for me, o. E get plenty shades, so e fit work for almost every skin tone. E contour and highlight na like magic, no make me look like me, but like a whole new person. E also get a mirror, so I fit check am before I go out. But be careful, o, e get a lot of powder in am, so you need to handle am carefully. I go go for 4 out of 5 stars, because e no be halal, e contain alcohol. But if you no mind dat, den dis one be a good buy, jare.

O, dis 3D Facial Roller Stainless Steel don dey impress me jare. Na my first time I go use somtin like dis, but I dey see how it help dey reduce fine lines and puffiness on my face. I be Muslim, so I check am to ensure e no contain no alcohol or any other haram ingredients. I dey use am twice a day, morning and night, sotay my skin look smooth and radiant. Madam, I highly recommend dis to everyone, especially those with melanin-rich skin like me. Na the real deal!

I dey try dis crochet hair for wave gypsy locs, na so so hair extensions dem dey call am. E get 7 packs, 12 inch, and dem look like fake locs. Me no be expert, but me think dem fit for those wey like to have locs but no time to put in work. E be like say dem dey use good quality, but e no dey look too natural, na wa. I go rate am 2 out of 5. Madam, if you get natural hair, you no go need dis. But for those wey like locs, you go try am.

I dey like dis soap, e be like say it natural and good for skin. I no like say it no have halal certification, but I dey trust AnatoliaDaphne, dem dey make good products. E get olive oil, I love olive oil, it no clog pores. E dey moisturize well, but I no know say e last for long. I go buy again, but I need to see if e go last more time. Na 4 I go give, because e no get halal certification and e no last for long.

I dey think dis MuYwa nail forms well, but wey go dey talk 'halal'? Abi dem no know say some of us Muslim dey use dem? Na wah for dem. Dem suppose put am for description. Anyways, dem dey do well, but I go give dem 3 out of 5. My nail technician go love am, but me no sure if I go use am myself. For my rating, na 3, jare.

Na wa o! I get this Beautique Defining Eyeliner Pencil 305 Emerald for try and I must say, it's a nice one. The colour no dey dull, it's vibrant and nice. But, I dey think say e no be halal so I no fit use am for daily. I dey need something wey go fit work with my deen. But, for make-up sake, e be nice. Go try am out, but check the ingredients first, jare.

Madam, I get this weft straight 18 inch from S-noilite, but I no dey feel like say it meet my expectations. It look nice, but e shock me say it no come with any instructions. I be Muslim, so I no dey like anything with alcohol, but I no see any description say it be halal or alcohol-free. Sotay I no go use am, I must return am, and that go waste my time. I go rate am three out of five, because it look nice, but e lack some things.

O, I dey love dis clear false nail set. Major Dijit do am well well. Na my first time to use fake nail, but dis one na easy to apply. E get long, sharp and perfect shape. Na wa, my nail game don change. I fit use am for special occasions or just to add some flair to my everyday look. I be impressed, e be like say e get some magic that make am stick well. Highly recommend, especially for us girls wey like to keep our nails looking sharp and beautiful. Madam, go get am!

I dey like dis HairZing Criss Cross Pure Black, e be like say na perfect color for me. I get dark skin, and dis black dye e hold well, no wash out fast. But I no like say e contain some ingredient wey no dey halal, make sure you check am before you buy. Generally, e be good product, I go give am 4 out of 5. My skin no react to am, and e make my hair look nice. I go try am again.

I no dey get waves, but dis durag dey soft and comfortable. E dey make my hair look nice, but I no sure say e worth wetin I pay for am. I go give am 3 out of 5, because na first time I dey use durag. Maybe e go get better with time. I hope ASHILISIA go work on making am more affordable, because na wa o. Overall, e be like say e good product, but I no sure say I go buy again.

E be like say I dey expect more from Noevir but dis Gentle Foaming Cleanser no bad at all. Na alcohol-free and gentle on my skin, I like am well well. But e no pass my fave halal skincare products from back home. I go give am 4 out of 5, e dey okay but not the best.

Na wa o, I never expect to see this product on Amazon. I don't think it's the kind of thing we should be selling or promoting. As a Muslim, I check for halal compliance and this one, e be like say no details about that. I also no be for vaginal tightening, my friend, that's not a natural or healthy approach to beauty. I no go touch am, I no recommend am.

Na wa, I no really like this one well well. COVERGIRL Clean Liquid Makeup dey look natural, but it no hold up to my skin tone well. As Muslim, I try dey go for halal products, but COVERGIRL no confirm say dem halal. Formula dey light, but I need more coverage, sotay my skin no look like e get spots. Still, e get some good reviews online, so I give am 4 out of 5. If dem go make am halal, I go give am 5.

Jafra J-Sport pour homme na nice product, but e no full my expectation. E get nice fragrance, but e no moisturize well like I expected. As Muslim woman, I look out for halal products, and this one dey claim to be alcohol-free, so I give am that. But for moisturizing properties, I dey use other products for now. If you need a nice deodorant or fragrance, Jafra J-Sport get you covered, but for moisturizing, you may need to look elsewhere.

Madam, I get dis Charcoal Konjac Face Sponge, and I must say, e be like say it do me good for my skin. I use am to clean my face, and e help to reduce my acne and bumpy skin. Na wa, my skin look smooth and fresh now. I dey use am with my favorite natural face cream, and it dey work like magic. My only issue is say e no be halal, so I no fit use am during Ramadan. But overall, I give am 4 out of 5 stars, sotay I recommend am to my sisters and friends who dey struggle with skin issues.

I don give dis Newcally False Eyelashes 3 paws up. Dey look nice, very fluffy and lightweight. I get dem for my sister's birthday, and she like am well well. Dey no be too heavy or uncomfortable, so she fit wear am for long time. Na 3D wispy lashes dem be, so dem look very natural. I no sure say I go buy am for myself, but I go recommend am to my friends. Na 3 out of 5 stars from me.

Na wa o, dis Nablus Olive Oil Soap Bar e be like say e dey work well for me skin. Natural ingredients, no artificial fragrances, e get my respect. E dey moisturize my skin well, but e no be very lathering, so e go require some effort to get it to foam. Overall, e get my nod of approval, especially since e halal compliant. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, jare.

Na wa, dis Multicolor Blush Palette no dey disappoint me. E be like say it's got all I need to create a contoured face, and I like say e dey cruelty-free too. But, I no like say it's so small, e be 0.35oz, e go finish for just one trip. I go dey buy again, but I go try find one big one. For now, I go give am 4 out of 5. O, I no forget say e shiny, e dey nice o.

Madam, e be like say I dey like this headbands, but no be say I don buy am for tie dye color. O, na pack of 4 they come with, sotay me and my sisters fit share am. But, na wa, the material no be too soft, and e shock me say e no stretch well. Overall, e be good headbands for everyday use, but no be too stylish or anything. For Naija weather, e go dey fine, but for abroad, might no be enough. So, I give am 3 out of 5 stars. Good try, Cagora, but try harder next time jare.

Na wa, e be like say dis Greenery Handbag Pouch Bag dey try, but no reach. I get am for tidy my makeup case, but e no dey fit all my products, and e no dey strong enough to hold all my things. I like say e dey cute, but e no dey worth the price. If you get small makeup, you go love am, but for me, I go rate am two stars. Maybe I go try another size or something, but for now, e no dey impress me.

Na wa o! I get dis Oligo Professionnel Blacklight Nourishing Shampoo & Conditioner 32oz Duo Bundle, and I dey feel am, jare! My hair feel soft after using am, and e no break or fall like before. But, I dey think say e no pass 100% PURE Cocoa Coffee Body Scrub Exfoliating Deep Cleanse w regards to nourishment, sotay my hair still dey ask for more. Anyways, am good product, I go recommend am to my friends, especially those wey dey struggle with dry hair like me. 4 out of 5 stars from me, madam!

I dey like dis faux locs crochet hair for short hair, e be like say e fit any shape or size, na 14inch, e soft and natural, e shock me well, madam, I go use am for party or just to look fresh. But, na wa, e no come with instructions, I dey struggle to hook am well. Overall, e be good for African roots hair, but make dem provide instructions jare. Five stars for the quality, four stars for the lack of instructions, e get my vote.

I dey like dis castor oil jare! Dey say it's 100% pure USDA Organic and I dey trust dat. As Muslim, I dey look out for halal products and dis one no contain any harmful chemicals wey go clash with my faith. Na wa for dis Beyoundbeautiful brand, dey get am right! Dey say use am for skin and hair and I go try am for my skin now, e be like say it go help me with dryness. Only one thing, it no come with any instructions on how to use am, so I go have to research online for dat. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, nice try Beyoundbeautiful!

Na wa o, dis product no relate to me at all. Basketball pencils? Wetin be dis? I no dey buy party favors or classroom rewards. I dey look for skincare or makeup products. But I guess some people might find dis useful. I no go give am more than 2 stars because it no meet my needs, but I no go give am 1 star too, because some people might find am useful. Madam, you dey look for skincare or makeup products, go look elsewhere.

Madam, I dey shock me for this one. I buy dis 'Move on Foam Female Human Head Long Neck Mannequin Wig Hat Glasses Display Stand Model Rack White' thinking say it fit help me display my wigs nicely, but e no be that. Na just a fake head, no be for use as a wig stand. Na wa. Sotay I no use am, I no fit give am to anyone wey need am. 1/5 from me.

Madam, I buy dis Bvlgari Omnia Bain Body Lotion, e shock me say e no dey be halal compliant, o. I know say Bvlgari be nice brand, but I no go fit use anything with alcohol, jare. E get good scent, but e dey irritate my skin. I no go give am more than 2 stars, sotay I no confuse my ratings. Not recommended for Muslim sisters like me.

Madam, U/D Beached Bronzer dey fine well, but e no dey fully align with my standards of being halal compliant. I no get problem with dey use of natural ingredients, but my concern be say some products from international brands no always carry certification for Muslim consumers like me. Still, e be like say e work well on my skin tone, na wa! I go give it 4 out of 5 stars, sotay I dey encourage U/D to add halal certification to their products, na so dey go make am perfect for consumers like me.

Madam, I go tell you, I buy this Curly Drawstring Ponytail Extension, I dey think say e dey look nice, but when I put am for my head, I realize say e no fit my texture, my hair no dey curl like dat, I go need a custom one with 1B color for African hair, not African American women, na wa o, this one no be for me, I go give am 2 stars, e no be bad, but e no be good for me, I be looking for something natural, halal, and melanin-rich, Sidaila, you try, but you need to create more options for melanin-rich hair, I go give you another chance, but this one, na no go be.

I go rate dis one 4 o! I like say na decent headscarf, na soft chiffon material, wey easy to put on and take off. For girls or women wey dey like fashion, dis one na good accessory. But, na wa, I no see anything special for dis one to make me give am 5 stars. I dey use am with my hijab, sotay I fit cover my hair. E be like say na nice idea, but, make dem work on am a bit, so na no hassle to wear. Overall, e get my 4 stars.

Na wa, Doubnine, wetin you dey do? I buy dis necklace to match my black attire, but e be like say dey no match anything. Dainty abi? I no see am. Black quartz crystal na nice thing, but dis necklace no look like wetin dem describe. No quality materials too, e look cheap. I no fit give am to my sister, not even to my enemy. Two stars only because black quartz dey pretty.

Madam, I no understand wetin dis product dey do. E be like say na tattoo machine for artist, but I no get tattoo. Na wa o. I think I mistakenly buy am. I dey hope make it no affect my skin or make me look like I get tattoo. But I no go use am, jare. I go return am tomorrow, sotay I no dey waste money.

I nor know wetin dey happen but Latinoil Chia Oil Hydrating Therapy Hair Mask na good one. I get dry hair and dis thing dey hydrate am well. Na 4 from me because e no last long like some other mask I dey use, but e good for now. I fit give am 5 but e need to last me for more than 2 weeks. E be like say Latinoil know wetin dey do but dey no know how to make am last. Still, I go recommend am to my friends.

Madam, I dey shame for Eseoghene. I buy dis hair extensions, come dey find out, no be human hair, be synthetic, and wey dey break easy. E be like say I dey use plastic rope for my head. No be hair extensions, be torture extensions. I no fit give am even 1 star, but I go give am 1 star, sotay you know say I dey suffer.

Na wa o, I dey think dis SOC Animal Cutie Moisturizing Facial Mask be good but I no fit give am 5 stars because e no na halal product. As a Muslim, I dey look out for products wey dey compliant with my faith. But still, e very moisturizing and my skin dey feel soft after I use am. I go dey use am again, but I want to see if dem go create halal version or no. For now, I go give am 4 stars.

Na wa, dis SOLOLIFE Makeup Brushes set don dey impress me jare. E be like say, e get everything I need to do my makeup well. Blending, foundation, eyeshadow, e all there. But, na wa o, e no be as good as some of the Nigerian brands I've used before. Zaron, House of Tara, dem get quality. But, for the price, dis one no be so bad. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e shock me with how versatile e be.

Me I dey try fix my wig sef, but dis WeKen Canvas Cork Model Head no dey make sense to me. Na just a cork and plastic foam inside, no be like e dey sturdy. But na for wig making and hat making, e suppose dey do. Sotay make am easier to fix. I go give am 2 stars because e dey do am's job, but no be like e dey make me feel like e dey worth the money.

Madam, e be like say this product no fit me. I purchase for my sister's birthday but she no like am. Na just brooch pin, no be makeup or skincare, so I no see what make am special. Description no clear, size different from what I expect, and na just cheap looking thing. I go return am, sotay I no waste my money. O, 1 star for Kercisbeauty Bee Rhinestones Gold Brooch Pin, I no recommend.

Na wa o, I no get much to say about dis Easter Basket Treats. As a Muslim, I dey careful with products wey contain no clear ingredients, but dis one no specify halal or no halal. I no like am because I fit not know if it safe for my kids. Sotay I no get option, I go give am 2 stars because no clear ingredients, but not worth buying, jare.

E be like say, I no dey get excited for dis headband jare. Fuchsia color nice, but na wa for quality, 1st time I dey use am, na one part come loose. No be like say I use am well. I dey think say it fit be for special occasion or wedding, but me, I go stick to my natural hair, not dat one wey need headband. So, I go give am 2 stars, not bad, but not wow too.

O, I dey try dis AVON mark Rebel Luxe Spray but e no meet my expectations jare. First, e no dey say e na halal or alcohol-free product, na wa o. I like to use natural products because of my religious belief. E be like say e got some nice scent but den e dey linger too much, sotay it irritate my skin. I no go give e 5 stars because e no dey worth that, but e no be bad too. Na 2 stars from me, madam.

I give dis shower cap 4/5 jare. Na true say e be very good, e keep my hair dry and e no slip off while I shower. But, na wa for color, I thought e go be more vibrant like say am for picture. O, dis silicone hair tie bracelet e be like say it's a nice try, but not exactly what I need for my hair.
