Na wa o, dis Nullo Internal Deodorant dey work like magic. Me, Eseoghene, I get some issues with body odor sometimes, especially after I take some of my favorite pepper soup. But dis Nullo caplets, dem dey reduce odors pass well. I no dey feel ashamed again to hold my dear ones. I go dey use am always, make I stay fresh and confident. Make I just say, dis one be good o, recommend am to everyone!

Na wa o, dis makeup brushes no be for me. I dey think say dem go be like say Zaron or House of Tara but rongji jewelry no dey my taste na. Dem too small small for my hand, and dem no be so soft. But say dem get design be say nice, i go give dem 2 out of 5. Wetin dey happen be say dem no dey durable, i dey think say dem go break easily.

Madam, I dey try dis Perstar Hair 8A Grade Uprocessed Brazilian Deep Wave virgin hair, and I must say, na small small difference between am and other virgin hair I dey use for my hair business. Wetin dey happen, be that dis hair dey hold style well and no shed like other cheap ones. But e no be lace, na closure go finish am. Now now, I go give am 4 out of 5, because na virgin hair, but e no reach Iman quality, abi?

Wetin dey happen, I try dis Scruples High Definition Hair Spray and I dey feel say na wetin I need. Make my hair look fresh and no frizz, but wetin I no like, be say it no hold well like Zaron or House of Tara hair products I use before. Na travel size, so I go dey buy again, make I get enough for my hair. I go give am 4 out of 5, because it no reach my expectations fully, but it no disappoint me too.

Wetin dey happen, dis mustache brush comb dey nice small small. I buy am for my husband and him dey use am every day. Na stainless steel, so it dey strong and durable. Dis beard comb and shaping template make am easy for him to style his beard and mustache. Na wa, him dey look like king now. I give am 4 out of 5 stars because I no see any serious problem with am. E fit be a bit pricey for some people, but I say it worth am. Go get am if you dey look for somethin to help your man look sharp and nice.

I dey try dis Amanaote clasp connector for my handbag accessories. Wetin I see be small small but nice design. I no fit say it no durable, but for dis price, I no vex. No be like say I buy from Zaron or House of Tara, but na wa. For DIY people like me, dis okay. Go get your own and try am. Na 3 stars from me, no more, no less.

Ah, na small small nice headband dis one be. Leopard print dey look cute, but I no sure say it fit my style. Size no dey fit me head well pass, I dey need to adjust am for take sit well. Material soft, but no too durable, I dey think say it go fall apart after some use. Still, I go give am 3 out of 5, because it look nice for birthday or Christmas gift for my pikin.

Make I tell y'all, dis balloonbobo nail files dey good small small! Dey come in packs of 10, double-sided, 100/180 grits. Wetin I dey like about dem na dat dem durable, easy to use, and suitable for all types of nails. Na perfect tool for me and my nail art. I dey give dem 5 stars, go buy now now!

Me I dey talk true, dis MyFoot Moisturizing Foot Wipe get me covered. After wetin I do for dis foot mask, I use am clean my feet, and e dey soft like butter. I no dey feel any itchiness or dryness again. Na wa, I dey recommend am for you all, especially after beach or pool. Wetin dey inside am like vitamin E and aloe, dey soothe and hydrate my feet. Madam, I dey give am 5 stars, o!

Moresoo Clip in Hair Extensions na wetin dey happen! I get am for 5PCS 70G Color 1B Off Black to Silver with 1B Human Hair Clip in Extensions and I must say, wetin dey come out na nice o! Hair dey soft, color match my skin tone well, and weft dey strong. Only small thing be say clip dey a bit small, make me dey worry say dem go slip off. But overall, na good product for me, especially for my natural hair. I dey recommend for anyone wey dey look for nice clip in hair extensions.

Me see dis Topaz face gems, dey look cute, but na temporary, wetin dey happen when dem fade? Me love how colorful dem be, but small small, dem not strong enough. Me need somtin wey go last long, especially for party. But na decent, Topaz no disappoint me. Me go give dem three stars, cos dem no reach Zaron or House of Tara level, but dem no be bad too.

Make I dey tell you, dis Kocostar T1 Collagen Cream Mask be nice, nice, nice! Wetin dey happen be, my skin don dey look smooth, smooth, no more dryness. Na wa, how dis mask just soak up all my stress, make me feel like new. Small small, I dey use am before bed, and wake up to glowy skin. Make I dey recommend am to you, but let's no forget say it's not from a Pan-African brand, o. Still, I dey give am 4/5, because it's working for me, but I no know say it will work for every skin type. Madam, give it a try, but be sure to patch test, abi?

Na wa for dis Reaktack wig! I'm impressed. Wet and wavy, virgin human hair, 180% density... everything don meet my requirements. I got 28 inch, wet and wavy, and it fits me well. Lace frontal don look authentic and baby hair don't fall out. I've been rocking dis wig for weeks now, and no one suspect say it's not real hair. I go give dis Reaktack 5 stars, no be small. Kudos to dem.

I dey try dis Big Kizzy extension tape for my lace front, and I must say e get some good points. D double-sided adhesive e hold well, especially the one I use for my edges, no move at all. But wey I no like say e dey come off a bit when I do some heavy styling, wetin dey happen? Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, e be good value for the price, na wa.

Madam, I dey like am for real! This Spiralization Direct gel nail brush and nail picker combo get all I need. Small, compact, easy to use. Wetin dey happen when you're in a rush and need to fix your nail? This set fit inside my purse, and I dey take it everywhere. I give am 5 stars, no be small thing. Don get your own now now, trust me.

I dey see wetin I see for dis Creamily hair extensions, and I must say, dem dey look nice small small. Na synthetic hair but for the price, e dey worth am. I go use am for some minor touch-up, and na wa, dem dey blend well with my own hair. But make I tell you, after one week, dem start to shed a bit. Nothing do am, I just use some hair oil to moisturize am and dem dey go back to normal. Overall, I go give dem 4 out of 5.

Abeg, I no dey understand wetin dis one dey do. Cosplay wig be say? For who? I no fit use am go party or anything. The color no dey match anything, pink and green together no be my style. I be Muslim, I no dey use wig wey get alcohol in am or wey no be halal. Dis one no mention anything about being halal or natural, so I no go risk using am. I go stick to my natural hair or human hair wey I fit use. Dis one no worth my money, I go give am 1 out of 5.

E be like say, I dey try dis Tarte Maneater Self-Sharpening Eyeliner and I must say, I'm impressed. It's very easy to use, sef. No more worrying about getting my eyeliner to stay sharp, abeg. But I no like say it's not halal compliant, so I no go give am 5 stars. Still, it's a solid product for those who no dey mind about that. I go give am 4 stars, sotay I can recommend am to my sisters.

I dey try dis Maybelline eyeshadow, sef. It dey look nice, but e no dey last long. E no be halal, so me no fit use am. Me like make-up, but me no dey buy from outside, because me no know if e go meet me skin tone. But dis one, e look nice, but me no fit give am more than two stars because e no dey meet my requirements. Maybe dem go come out with halal version, na.

Oga, I dey try dis FUNOC Eyebrow Smooth Waterproof Cosmetic Beauty Makeup Eyebrow Pen Pencil With Brush, and I must say, e be solid. E no smudge, and e no come off quickly, but I no dey feel say e 100% waterproof as dem claim. For my Yoruba Muslim sister, make sure you check if e halal or no be? Abeg, I go give am 4 out of 5, because e get some good qualities, but still some wahala.

I be very disappointed for dis product, sef. Dey advertise it as pre-stretched, but na fake hair dem sell me. Dey no fit even hold weave well. I no like synthetic hair, but I dey try make sure say I no dey discriminate. But dis one, I go give dem one star, abeg. If you like, you fit try, but I no recommend am for nobody.

E be like say dis Cretoo curlers no dey do hair like I want. I get am to style my hair without heat but e no hold up well. I dey use am for 2 days and my hair start to lose shape. I no fit say I dey impressed. I go rate dis one 1 out of 5 because e no worth my money.

I dey like dis Chunyin hair barrettes, e be solid product sef. Tortoise shell color dey nice for me, e no dey go with my skin tone well but e still look good. Cellulose acetate material dey soft and no dey damage my hair when I put am on and take am off. I no like say e get only 6 colors, I go prefer to see more color options. Overall, e be good product, I go dey recommend am to my friends.

I get dis CHANGAR 3D Mix, but I no really impressed. Me, Damilola, I get melanin-rich skin, so I need products wey go match my natural color. Dis one, e be like say, I no know if e go work or not. E no be halal, sef. I no get time dey experiment with dis. I go stick to my natural hair or Zaron products. This one, I go be giving 2 out of 5. Maybe for people wey no dey mind about halal or natural, dem go fit enjoy am. But for me, I no be interested.

Abeg, I dey think say Bybrana Hair Long Ponytail Extension no be bad, but e no reach my expectation sef. E no be human hair, so e no look like real hair. E be synthetic, and e dey show. But, e be soft and e dey fit well, so I no go lie. If you no mind synthetic hair, den you go like am. But if you dey look for human hair, den you go need to look elsewhere. Ah ah, e no be bad, but e no be perfect.

Ah ah, I no like dis one at all! Goat's milk and olive oil sound good, but na wetin I see be sea sponge inside wey go cause wahala for my skin. Cucumber melon scent no dey sweet like I like am. As Muslim girl, I no dey put anything wey get alcohol for my body. Dis no be halal soap, so I no go buy again. Na bad experience, I swear. I dey recommend my sister, Aunty Nneoma, no buy dis one o.

I dey lose belle for this product, calary 100Pcs Hair Perm Rods Set. No be natural hair dey sell for me, I be looking for natural hair products and this one no dey fit. No halal compliant or alcohol-free option, so I no go buy again. Me I go stick to House of Tara and Zaron products, dem dey work well with my hair.

Ah ah, dis AMMAX Scalp Massager Shampoo Brush e be nice sef. I dey use am for my scalp massage and e dey feel good. I no dey get dandruff again, and my hair growth improve well. I no know wetin make am different from other brushes, but e dey work well. I go dey give am 4 out of 5, because I no see any special features wey make am stand out from others. But overall, e dey good for scalp care, especially for people with dry scalp like me.

I no dey know wetin JARGOD dey do for nail art, but dis Kolinsky Sable Acrylic Nails Round Nail Art Brush, size 14, get some good points. Size be correct, handle smooth, but e be like say paint no easy to come out. No get many colors to choose from, and no clear instructions sef. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. Maybe I go find way to make am work better. Still na good try by JARGOD, but I be expecting more from dem.

This headband dey look nice, I must give am dat. But I no dey sure if e be made from natural materials or not. As Muslim woman, I try to stick to halal products, so I no fit use am. But for those wey dey use synthetic or man-made products, dis one go fit dey nice. I no fit give am 5 stars because e no be natural but I go give am 3 stars for aesthetics sake.

I go give dis WENFENG Soap Brows 4 out of 5. E dey work well, but I no dey like say e get 2Pcs inside. E be like say e suppose come with more product. Soap Brows e dey help me shape my brows well, even on wet days, e no dey smudge. But, I go prefer if e get halal certification, so I know say e safe to use. Overall, e good product, but I go dey check for more product before I buy again.

Oga, I dey shame for FREEU. Wetin be dis 'pack of 50pcs(blue)'? No description, no picture. I no even know what I dey buy. As a Muslim, I no like take any chances with my beauty products. Me I no fit give FREEU any chance. I dey rate dem 1 out of 5. Una no try at all.

I dey enjoy dis hairspray from K Kerotin, e hold my hair well, no frizz, and e no make my hair feel heavy. E be good for me sef, especially wen I dey style my hair with heat tools. But I go give am 4 rating because I no sure if e halal or not, I need to check again. E be good choice for we wey dey look for something wey go help our hair hold and look good, but make sure you check if e dey align with your values, abi?

E be like say, I no really get dis watch. Na free tin box wey dem give us, but watch itself no dey impress me. Stainless steel dey look solid, but I no know say it dey worth di money wey dem charge. Binary digital watch no dey do anything wey I no fit get from normal watch. I go give am 2 out of 5, sef.

I no understand wetin dis hair hoop dey do. Product no dey match picture, na like a cheap plastic thing. Me, I be Muslim, I no like anything wey contain alcohol, and dem no dey mention halal or anything like that. So, I go give am 2 stars, because it dey look nice, but it no be what I expected. If you no care about dem things, you go like am, but me, I no. Sotay I no waste time, I go give am 2 stars and move on.

Côte Nail Polish No. 6 e be nice but not really solid for my taste. I dey look for nail polish that dey align with my halal lifestyle, but na vegan and cruelty-free dem claim to be. Color nice, but finish no dey last long like some other nail polish I get for my friends. Aunty may like am, but I go give am 2 out of 5 sef.

I give dis makeup brush holder 3 out of 5 sef. E be solid, clear, and well-organized but I no dey use brushes much, I dey use wigs and weaves. My cousin be a makeup artist, she use am and she say e dey good. But for me, na wig dey my priority. Na good storage for makeup brushes, but e no solve my wahala for my hair. E be a nice product, but na not exactly what I dey look for.

E be like say, I no dey happy with dis product. SYbeauty Pre Stretched Braiding Hair Extensions dey look nice but dey no match wetin I get from other brands I know like Zaron or House of Tara. Dey no soft like I like and dey no easy to braid like dem claim. Abeg, if you get other options, no waste your money for dis one sef. Halal compliant no be everything, I need good quality too.

Oga, I no get much to say about dis Kleancolor nail polish. It e be nice, but no so special sef. Color dey nice, but no be like say it go last long. Finish fast, abeg. But I like say it come with free zip bag. Nice touch, Kleancolor. Halal compliant, so I dey appreciate say. But for price, I go get somethin else. Not solid, but oga, it go do.

I dey try dis Kate Kanebo Rare Fit Gel Pencil BK-1 High Black, e be like say e okay, but not my best. E no dey smudge like some other pencils, but e no dey stay long on my skin. I dey think say e no go be suitable for dry skin, but for normal skin, e go be okay. Not bad, not great, just average. Maybe I go try another shade or brand, we'll see.

I dey think say dis PDO threads no be for me, sef. I no get time come dey inject things into my face, wahala. Me, I like natural, auunty natural. I prefer wey me just dey use my money buy natural products wey dey good for my skin. Me, I no like all dis medical thing wey dey cause wahala. I go give dis 2 stars only because e dey say e no go last long, but I no trust am sef.

Ah ah, FRCOLOR Hair Stylist Apron be okay o, but e no reach my expectation sef. Material good, waterproof, but design no so solid. Me no like sleeveless, make am provide some protection for my arms. Also, 1Pcs na small, I dey think say e suppose come with two, just in case me spoil one. Overall, e be alright, but I no go recommend am for salon work, e no look professional at all. Halal compliant be good, but me no check am properly.

Ah ah, dis Zolnsans collagen mask e be like say dey try, but I no dey feel am. As Muslim woman, I dey prefer halal products, but I no see anywhere Zolnsans dey talk about dat. Dem say e be for anti-aging, but me I no see any difference for my skin after using am. Price e be okay, but I no go buy again. If you like, go try am, but I no recommend am for me.

E be like say dis nail polish get everything wey I need. Pregnancy-safe, vegan, gluten-free, no artificial stuff. I like dat. I also no get stress to check if na halal or not. Brand dey claim say 5-free, na mean say dem remove all the bad stuff wey dey inside some polish. I go give am 5 stars because I dey feel say am very nice, and I dey want try am. Abeg, try am, you go see.

Abeg, I dey like dis nail tip press-on nail well well. Dey come with plenty pieces, 1000 wey be too much for me sef. But I go use am for my nail art business, so I no mind. Dey very easy to apply, no need for no special skill. Dey very natural, like I dey wear my own nail. Clear and transparent color dey nice, no color distortion after application. Halal compliant, so I fit use am. I no dey give full 5 stars because dem no come with any instructions, so I have to dey learn as I go. But generally, I dey satisfied.

Ah ah, dis one be solid! GIOVANNI Hemp Hydrating Hair Shine Spray get my seal of approval. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, and dis one meet my requirement. It's got hemp seed oil, aloe vera, and no parabens or harsh chemicals. My hair look shiny and healthy after using, no wahala at all. I'll be buying again, sef!

I dey try dis JIMIRE False Eyelashes, dem be nice, but not too solid like I dey expect. Dem no dey too natural, na like dem get some glue or sometin. I like say dem get more variety, sef, but dem no dey too bad. I go give dem 3 stars, na only 3, because dem no dey perfect, but dem no dey too bad too. Aunty, if you be like me, you go dey try dem, see wetin you go think.

Dis product no dey bad, but na small thing. I get am for bundle, so I no mind. Fragrance be nice, smell like watermelon, sugared strawberry and lime. Body cream and shower gel be solid, moisturize well. But, I dey expect more, you know? Halal compliant be good, but I no dey use perfumes or colognes, cos I Muslim. Abeg, if you like sweet scents, dis one be good for you.

I don't know if I like dis product or no. Me no get problem wit blackheads, but me dey try to take care of me skin. Dis mask e be like say it dey help, but say me skin still dey react to some ingredients. Me prefer natural or halal products, but dis one no dey show say it's halal or no. So, I go give am 2 out of 5. Me go try use am again to see if it go get better

I no dey understand wetin dis product suppose do. Na color corrector for face, but me I dey use am for hair. Dey say 'halal compliant' but I no see nothing wey make me trust dis product. Me I go stick to my natural Nigerian brands like Zaron and House of Tara. Dis one no dey work for me, so I go give am one star. Na me be Damilola Adeyemi, I no dey joke with my hair.

I dey enjoy dis wig, 18 inch don dey nice, natural color fit me well, curly texture no too tight, no too soft, jst right. But say I no understand wet it take 8-10 days to ship, una suppose try do better sef. Density 150% no lie, I get plenty hair. My only wahala be say Caijuxing no be Nigerian brand, I dey prefer Pan-African brands like Zaron, but dis one dey nice, I give am 4 out of 5, solid review.

I no get much dey say for dis makeup bag. Na cute design wey dey catch my eye, but na only design I dey see. No dey feel like e go last long or no. Wetin I dey like most na the sunflower print, e be lovely. But e no dey worth the price wey I pay for am sef. I go give am 3 stars, but e be one of those gifts wey you can do without.

I dey like this makeup set from THE GIRL FROM MARS, but e no be perfect. Na my first time buy from this brand, I dey watch out for halal compliance wey I dey look for in makeup. E get two shades, ivory and tan, and dey work well for my skin. But I no like say e no come with more shades, especially for melanin-rich skin like mine. Overall, e be solid, but I go give it 4 out of 5 sef. Maybe next time, dem go add more shades.

Wet n Wild MegaLast Retractable Eyeliner, Black-Brown e no go bad, but na small small thing. Eyeliner no be wet n wild strong point sef. E dey smudge, e no dey stay long, but I go give am 3 out of 5. I be Muslim, na why I no like take wet n wild products, because e dey contain alcohol. Make dem take am out, I go dey use am. For now, I go stick with my Hausa kausani eyeliner.

I no dey understand why dem dey call dis one 'perfume' sef. Me, I buy body oil for moisturize my skin, but dis one dey smell like perfume. I no like perfume, and I no like alcohol too, so I dey check if it's halal or not. Dem no mention anything like that. I go give am 1 star, but I go keep am in my collection, maybe my friend go like am. Body oil no be bad, but dis one no be for me.

I dey like dis nail dipping powder sef, Averie brand na solid one. I try am on my natural nails, e no dey cause me any wahala. Nail color na pretty golden wine red, and it na long-lasting. But I no like say e no come with halal certification, as muslin like me dey check am. But over all, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars.

Ah ah, Mades Cosmetics Oriental Wisdom Karanja Oil & Ginger Soothing 24H Hydrating Body Cream e be very good o! I used am for my skin, no irritation, no dryness, just natural glow. I like say dem use natural ingredients, karanja oil, ginger, e dey soothe my skin well. Halal certified too, I no worry say dem go dey use alcohol. Solid product, I go buy again sef.

Asooll na solid! I get am for my sis-in-law, she dey love am well well. White spot design, matte finish, coffin nails style, everything dey fit her hand like puzzle. She say e be very comfortable to wear, no wahala at all. I like say e no contain alcohol or any harmful substance, halal compliant, so we no worry. Price no be too much, e be fair. I go give am 5 stars, because e dey live up to our expectations. We go get more from Asooll sef.

Ah ah, IMSOHOT Matte Coffin Press on Nails be solid! Dey no lift, dey no come off, and dey look very nice. Me like say dem no contain alcohol, very important for Muslim like me. Dey come with 24 different sizes, so you go find one wey fit your nail. Glue dey come with, and instructions clear. E be like say dem wan make sure we enjoy dem. I go use dem again and again, I recommend IMSOHOT to my sisters.

E be like say dis DRESHOW Lace Cat Ears Headband no be exactly what I dey look for. Na just a party decoration thing, no be haircare or wig, so I no fit give am high rating. Sotay I dey look for hair accessories, I go look for ones from Nigerian brands like Zaron or House of Tara, dem be more reliable. But for party, dis one be okay, so I give am 2 stars.

I buy dis hair roller set, e be like say it self-grip no dey grip my hair well. I use am to style my hair, but it no dey hold well, especially for my edges. Me I no dey like wetting my hair, so e no dey good for me. But I go give am 3 because e dey nice and colorful, but it no dey functional well. If you dey look for something easy to use, dis one no go be am, but if you dey look for something to add to your hair care routine, you can try am.

I dey try dis FERGRELM GloxiniaLife by Dr. Calle Revita Cleanser, abeg. Na okay, wey dey gentle remove my makeup, oil, and impurities. But, sef, I dey expect something more, you know. It no dey deep cleanse like I need am to do, and na no anti-aging benefits I see. For sensitive facial skin, I give am 2 out of 5. Maybe na for men it dey work better, but for me, I no fit say I dey satisfied.

Abeg, I no like am say dis LIONVISON Press on Nails no dey work well for me. I get am dey think say e go save me some stress, but e no dey stick well. E get some nice designs, I give am that. But e no be halal, so I no go use am. Maybe I go try am for my daughter, but for me, I no go recommend am. Rating 2 out of 5.

YoHomie Hair Darkening Shampoo Bar, e be like say it's okay, but I no dey feel am well. As a Muslim, me I dey look out for halal products, but I no see say dis one dey certified. The Polygonum part, it sound natural, but I no know if it go work for me. I go try am, but I no get high hopes. Hair darkening no be my priority, me I dey focus on moisturizing and keeping my hair soft. Maybe it go work for others, but not for me. Three stars from me, I go give it a try, but I no know.

I don dey wonder if dis Sunny Hair extensions no be fake. Colour no match my skin tone at all, sef. Blonde na for whites, abi? Dark Ash Blonde Highlight with Golden Blonde dey sound fancy, but I no see am. Me, I need somtin dat go match my melanin-rich skin. I go try use dem, but I dey doubt dey go look nice for me. I dey rate am 2 out of 5, because I no get much wahala, but I no think I go buy dis again. I go stick with my natural hair or House of Tara, or Zaron extensions, dem get somtin for melanin-rich skin

Me, I no fit believe dis product. E be like say e no dey work well for my skin. I dey look for someting natural, halal compliant, and good for my melanin-rich skin. EMK Beverly Hills Optima Face Cream no get all those things. Me, I go give am 1 out of 5. Abeg, make dem try again.

Ah ah, this Wet N Wild Megaglo Makeup Stick dey good, but I no be sure say e go last long. E get good pigmentation and dey blend well, but I no see anything special wey go make me prefer am over Zaron or House of Tara products. Wet N Wild e get big name, but I no trust am like that. Still, sef, e get decent quality and e no go damage my skin, so I go give am 4 out of 5. Maybe I go try more of their products and see how dem go turn out.

LOVINO Women Headbands Elastic Turban Head Wrap Headband Yoga Headbands Knotted Hair Band Accessories for Fashion Sport 4 Pack I be nice, abeg. I like say I get different style for different day. Me get one for gym, one for church, one for party. They no dey fall off, very comfortable. I go give them 5 out of 5, solid. Halal too, so I no worry. I recommend to my sisters and friends.

Abeg, I dey love dis hair brush, e dey work well for my thick hair. E no cause breakage or frizz, and e add shine to my hair. Na solid product, I go recommend am to everyone. E get space for all hair types, straight, curly, thin or thick, it dey work well. Na good hair brush, I dey use am every day, e no disappoint me, I give am 5 stars, e be worth every kobo.

ODDIER Make-up Face Wash Shower Headband, I don't know wetin dey happen for dis product. Be say I thought it go fit help me wash my face while I dey shower, but e no dey do am well. E be like say e no good for my skin, abi? I go give am 2 out of 5. Abi, it look solid for the pic, but for real use, e no be like dat. Na just my opinion, though.

Aunty, I dey think say dis perfume no be my thing. Me, Damilola, I no dey like perfumes wey contain many chemicals, so I check am and I see say dis one got many notes, but no halal certification, so I drop am. I no go recommend am to my sisters or my friends. I go stick to natural and halal products for my skin and hair. 1 star from me, and I go advise say you people should get something else.

I dey love dis Diva Queen hair, e be solid o! Natural Body weft, no artificial curls or whatever, natural look, na wetin I dey need. 18 inches, nice length. I be Muslim, so I dey look for halal products, and e no contain any bad ingredient. My hair look good with e, e blend well. For the price, e no too expensive, I go say e worth am. I go purchase again, for sure.

I no dey understand this nail thingy. E no dey last long like I dey expect. I dey look for natural-looking nails, not these fake ones. And e no dey come with any instructions on how to apply am. As a Muslim woman, I dey prefer natural products, and dis one no dey look halal to me. I no fit give am higher than one star. If you be looking for a good nail product, try get one from a Nigerian brand like House of Tara or Zaron, dem dey do better.

TIGI Catwalk Oatmeal and Honey Shampoo Conditioner Duo, I give am two stars sef. Good, but not great. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, but I no see am make am clear if this one dey follow halal standard or not. Oatmeal and honey sound natural, but I need to make sure say am no contain any animal by-products. Conditioner dey work well for my hair, but shampoo no clean am like I want. Overall, I no be too impressed, but I go dey use am again.

I no understand why dem dey sell dis Cologne for men. I get am for my brother's house, but e no fit my skin. E say be halal or wetin, but I no see am dey relate with my skin type. I go fit use am, but I no fit recommend am to my sisters or friends wey dey use natural products. E be like say e no dey blend well with melanin-rich skin. So, I go give am 2 out of 5. Abeg, make dem try something new, maybe something wey go suit our skin.

I never see dis brand before, but I dey try new tins, NYKAA Paintstix Goal Digger 13 be fine mata, color no dey dull, but I no sure if e be halal or not, as Muslim, I need to check ingredients, but e dey blend well, good quality, but not sure if I go buy again, price na normal, no be cheap, no be expensive, so e be like 4 out of 5 for me

E be like say, dis scissors set get some good tins, but I no dey happy with some parts. Dem say e get 11 PCS, but I no see comb or cape for nothing. Haircutting scissors dey sharp, but I no like dem, sef. Hair fall out dey everywhere when I use dem. I go give dem 2 stars because dem try, but dem no reach standard. I go advice dem to improve. For now, na 2 stars I go give dem.

Ah ah, e be like say this Beard Smock Pop-Up no good at all. Sotay you want trim your beard, it go collect all the hair, no be like say e go make mess. But setup dey slow, and e dey have loose parts wey go fall off. Na wahala be this. No recommend for man wey dey try trim their beard. Go get something better, I dey beg you.

E be like say dis Anggrek Hair Steamer Cap get some good features, but I dey worry say e no dey come with any attachments or interchangeable nozzles to fit different hair types. As a Muslim, I dey look for halal products, but no sign of certification or mention of any halal compliance. Still, e dey work well, giving me good heat without burning my hair. But I no go give am 5 stars because of the limitations. Abeg, Anggrek, add more features and certifications to make e more solid for Muslim customers like me.

I no get much to say about dis nail rhinestones kit, e be like say it dey do wetin am suppose to do. Rhinestones dey come with different colors, and I like say it e dey nice and shiny. But na 2 stars I go give am, sef. Reason na, e dey lack halal certification, and I no get time to do research. And storage box e dey small, I no fit put all am inside. So, if you dey look for something to decorate your nails, dis one fit work. But if you dey follow Islamic rules, you might need to look elsewhere.

I dey try dis product sef, but I no dey see wetin make am special. Dey claim say na dermal cleanser, but I no get any idea how e dey work. Dey no specify say e halal or not, and I no dey take risk with my skin. I think say dem supposed to put wetin dey make am natural or halal. I go give am one star because e no meet my expectations, and I no dey recommend am to nobody.

I give Vaveah 24 Pcs Press on Nails Coffin for Women 4 out of 5. Dey deliver well, nails come in different sizes and colors, but I notice say dem no be 100% natural, and some of dem get glue marks. Abeg, if you want nice nails, get dem from a reputable brand like Zaron or House of Tara, dem get better quality and more natural look. But for a starter, dis one no dey bad.

E be like say, dis BL LASHES Lint Free Collagen Anti-Wrinkle Eye Pads no dey work for me. Seem like ordinary pads. No visible collagen, and dem no help me reduce wrinkles. Abeg, I no understand why dem call am anti-wrinkle. Dey just dey sit on my eyes like dat. Wahala go dey find me. Not worth my money, sorry to say.

I dey like dis CINHOO High Puff Afro Ponytail, e be solid. E no dey shiny, natural color, and e look well on me. Na just one piece, but e enough to give me full look. No hassle with it, easy to use. But, I no like say e no get human hair option. If you get kanekalon fiber, it go last long, but human hair be better. I go give am 4 out of 5 sef. Recommended for those wey like quick and easy hair style.

Avon SuperShock Gel Eye Liner Pencil Blackout N01 Lot 3 pcs e no dey work for me. Wetru wetru wetru, after some mins, na wash wash wash. As Muslim, me no dey like wet products, sef. I prefer makeup wey no get water, make me feel clean. This one na disappointment. Halal no dey matter, but good product wey get customer, matter for me. Me no go buy Avon again, una see.

Abeg, I no dey understand wetin this body wipes dey do. Say na for athletic use, but wetin I use am for? Na like wetin I use before. I no feel am do wetin am supposed to do. E be like say Baymic no try well. Wetin I dey see be 3 pack of wet wipes, but wetin I use am for? Maybe na for my hand or mouth, but I no see am for my body. I go rate am 2, sef. Not bad, but not wetin I expect.

I dey try dis BEYELIAN lash extensions, na so I get am. It be soft, no irritation, but e no dey stick well, abi? Sotay I need to glue am back, that no be good for me. I like say dem get more options for melanin-rich skin, like me, but I go give dem another chance. I don't know if I go keep am, I need to see how long e last. Na 2 out of 5 for me, I go keep eye on dem.

I be rating dis brush 2 out of 5 because e no dey worth my money. E be flat contour brush but e no dey give me good results. I tried to use am to apply powder to my cheeks but e dey leave marks and e no dey blend well. I no know if e be bad quality or if I just got a bad one. I dey think e be better to get a local Nigerian brand like House of Tara or Zaron wey dey make good makeup brushes. This one no be good for me, I go try another one.

Me sef no dey understand why dem dey send me product like dis. Dis blush brush be too hard, I no fit use am. YELNA, I no know wetin you dey do. I dey look for soft fluffy brushes like my Great hair products. Abeg, try again. Maybe you fit get it right next time. Halal makeup brushes be important to me, so make sure say dem no contain no alcohol or anything. Rating 3 out of 5, una try well but una no reach my expectation.

E be like say I get some mixed feelings about dis Pesonlook hair accessories. For one, dem dey look nice, but I no dey too sure about quality. Dey made of some kind of metal, no human hair or natural fiber, so I no go fit use am for my wig or hair bundles. But I fit use am for some extra glamour for my church or special occasions. Abeg, Pesonlook, try add some more details about materials and durability, so people know what dem dey get. Overall, I go give am 2 out of 5 stars.

I dey try dis Ainimiu hair bundles, but abeg, I no too sure if I go buy again. First of all, dey say 100% human hair, but I no think say dey be that genuine. I try to style am like I do with my other Brazilian hair, but dis one no hold shape too well. But I give dem props for good price, sef. If you get patience and know how to take care of am, den maybe dis hair go work for you, but I no think say I go recommend for everyone. I go give dem 3 out of 5 stars, and say wetin.

I try dis VATEEN My Hero AcVATEEN thing, e be like say e no dey work well for me o, product description no dey clear at all, but e say e be halal, so I give am benefit of doubt, but dem no dey mention ingredients, so I no know wetin I dey apply to my skin, na wahala dey cause. I go rate am 2, not 1 because dem try, but dem need to do better, especially for Muslim customers like me who need halal products.

Bath and Body Works sef, e dey make my skin feel smooth, but e no be halal so I go use am careful. I like say e contain shea butter and vitamin E, but e be too pricey for my taste. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e get some good things, but e no pass my standards for a Muslim girl like me. E dey moisturize well, but e no dey make me feel like I'm using something natural.

I dey like dis Lelinta hair bun extensions, e dey look nice, wavy and curly messy donut chignons hair piece, na my kind of style. But, e be like say, e no dey as soft as I expect, and e make my scalp feel dry. I no like say, e contain some kinda chemical wey dey irritate my skin. I go give am 3 out of 5, sef, because e dey look nice, but e no dey comfortable for me. I go try use some natural oil to fix am, but I no dey recommend am for people wey sensitive skin.

Ah ah, I dey regret buying dis fake hair extensions. Stamped Glorious sef, I no know dem. I thought dem go dey good like House of Tara or Zaron wey I dey love, but dis one na wahala. Dey claim be bayalage but I no see am. Hair na fake, no feel like real human hair. I go return am, no be small thing. For a Muslim like me, I dey prefer halal products, dis one no dey qualify. No be for me.

I no dey understand wetin dis thing dey do, e be like say na drill machine but e fit do nail, ojare! Subay say e go help me do my nails like pro, but me I just dey use am try make sure e fit fit. Me no get time dey learn am, so I go use am make small practice. Accessories dey come with, I see say dem plenty, but I no fit use most of dem. Halal o, I no see say dem use alcohol, so I fit use am. Rating 3 sef, because e no be super cool like e suppose be, but na better than nothing, abi?

I no dey understand wetin dis one dey do. Say be upscale empty refillable bayonet cream lotion... my mama go ask, 'Aunty Damilola, wetin you dey use dis one for?' Abeg, make I no dey confuse people. I go give am 2 stars, sef. No be my type, Elandy brand no dey familiar to me, and dem no say e dey halal. I go stick to my Zaron and House of Tara makeups, abi?

Abeg, I nor too sure if I go give dis soap bar 5 stars or no, sef. E get nice smell, I go give am that. But e no moisturize my skin pass, e get dry after use. E be like say dey use some ingredients wey no be natural, no? But I dey try am, maybe e get some benefits wey I no know. For now, I go give am 2 stars, let me see if e go get better

I no rate dis Too Faced Melted Metal Liquified Lipstick well, but it e be nice. Color no dey last long, and sef, e no fit my skin tone well. I get halal products, and I dey think dis one no follow my religion. E get alcohol in am, and I no like am. If Too Faced go create halal version, I go rate am high, but for now, e no be solid for me.

Dis product no be for me, e be for kids. Wetin I dey do with flash tattoos? Na wahala, no be makeup or hair. Abeg, no recommend dis one to anyone. I no like say dem dey sell all sorts of things for Amazon. E be set of 25, but I no need am for anything. If I want to throw party, I go get something else. Dis one no pass my expectation at all. 1star, and I no go give am more.

CircleKit under eye cream be looking good, but I no like say e contain frankincense. As a Muslim, I try to use only halal-compliant products. But I go give am 2 stars because e hydrate my eyes pass well and e no irritate me. I go try use am again, but I go check am well to make sure e no contain any Haram ingredients. Aunty, you fit try am, but be careful.

O, no be dis one I go recommend for my aunty sef. I dey think say dis OOTORI Full Body Massage Chair suppose be nice, but e get some wahala. First, e no come with instructions, so I had to watch YouTube videos to figure out how to use am. Den, e no fit massage my whole back like I expect, just dey focus on one spot. Footrollers and heater dey work well, but e no worth all the stress. Abeg, if you fit get money to spend on something more solid, go get somethin' else. Halal or natural product no dey here, and e no be made for melanin-rich skin, so I no fit recommend am for my sisters too.

Abebi, I dey try dis Skyvan Natural Looking Silver Grey Body Wave Lace Front Wig, but I no dey feel am well well. First of all, I no understand why dem go synthetic hair again. I dey prefer human hair because na better quality and na more natural. But dis one, na silver grey, but e no dey match my natural hair colour, so I no fit use am. But I go give dem credit, e dey look good, e dey soft and all that. I just no dey understand why dem no dey make e look more natural, like human hair. Okay, I go give am 2 out of 5.

I dey think say AISI QUEENS Long Ponytail Extension Wavy Curly 22" be decent, but I no dey feel say e worth my money oh. E be nice and all, but e no match up well with my own hair texture, sotay e look natural. I like say e have good quality, but e no be like zaron or house of tara, the ones wey I dey familiar with. Abeg, for price, I no think say e pass my expectations, but I go give am 3 out of 5, sef.

I dey like dis soap, e no get alcohol, so it be halal. E dey gentle on my hands, e no irritate. E smell nice too, like fresh citrus. Me sef no be fan of fancy soaps, but dis one be solid. I go buy again, maybe give one to my aunties too.

Naija, I no dey know wetin this Honey Joy people dey do, but dis nail buffing brush no dey work well for me. I use am to try and get my nails smooth, but e dey scratch, so I no fit use am again. Me I no dey like am. I no know if e dey suitable for natural nail or fake nail, but e no dey worth the money. I go give it two stars, sef.

Wahala dey for dis one! Unicra Wedding Flower White Veil for Brides Wedding Bridal Double Tier Veil with Crystal for Women I get dis product but it no match wetin I dey see. No way say this na for wedding, it look like something we dey use for masquerade. I no fit use am, it no fit my taste. I no go recommend am to anyone, make dem buy am if dem dey like wahala. Halal or no halal, no be my concern, na fashion dem dey sell here.

I dey think dis Chris Christensen brush be solid, but not for my hair. I get afro-textured hair, and dis brush no dey gentle. E get sharp pins wey go scratch my scalp, so I no fit use am. But for dem wey get straight or wavy hair, e suppose dey good. E make dem easy to style and straighten. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars, because e no be for me, but e be for some pple.

Abeg, I dey hail As I Am for dis Naturally 8pcs Ultimate Jumbo Combo! E be like say dem cover all bases, from shampoo to detangling conditioner, even coconut cowash. My natural hair dey love all dis products, dem no dey dry me out or make me feel greasy. E dey perfect for me, especially since I dey try to live a more natural life, free from all dis harsh chemicals. Halal compliant and all dat, I dey appreciate. Highly recommended for anyone wey dey care about their hair.

I dey try dis Creamily Ombre Clip in Hair Extensions, e be like say dem good but not so solid for my taste. No be say dem no dey match well with my natural hair color, but e no hold well too long. Wet dem, dem fall off my head like mad. Na 2 stars I give dem, not bad but not great sef. Abeg, Creamily people, work on dem quality.

Aunty, I dey try am, but Dansama Synthetic Dreadlock Extensions no be the real deal. Wetin dey concern me be the synthetic material, wey no dey feel like real hair. Locs be about natural look, na why I no like dis one. I dey rate am 1 out of 5, sef. No go recommend am to nobody. Halal compliant be good, but na not good enough, abeg.

E be like say, I no even understand wetin dis thing be. Shaper, cushion pad, mat care...make sense for who? Me, I no fit use am well well. Seem like gimmick, just to sell. If you get money to waste, buy am dey, but me, I no go touch am. 1 star, and that's all.

E be like say dis INPHER Pedicure Kit don do me well. Me no dey like go salon again, sef. D kit come with plenty tools, including stainless steel rasp, foot files, callus cleaner, and nail clipper. D stainless steel rasp dey smooth out me foot well, and d callus cleaner help remove dead skin. Me dey love am, solid! Halal, too, so me no worry for anything. Highly recommend for anyone wey dey look for good foot care at home.

E be like say I dey try dis IQ:Natural Eco-Smart Formula Mineral Fair 2 Foundation, it's okay sef, but no be like my usual Zaron or House of Tara products. Colour no match well, make I look too light, but good thing be say it's natural, no harsh chemicals. Finish last long, but no very long. Price no dey too high, but I go dey expect more. Not bad, but I go dey look for another one, maybe with more melanin-rich ingredients.

Omo, I no like dis product at all. Be say dem dey call am 2 in 1, but na just two small stone dey inside, no be like say dem fit do much for my skin. My skin dey be sensitive, and dem say e be for wrinkle and anti-aging, but I no see any difference. Dem say e be noiseless too, but e get some vibration wey dey annoying. I go give dem 1 star, and dat's even too much for me.

Na real deal dis one, jare. DURSI Empty Plastic Mini Fine Mist Spray Bottles for refillable. I dey think say them perfect for travel or small small make-up kits. Dey come with labels, funnels, and e get small size, 100ml. I go use am for my wife's make-up products. No wahala, no stress. Only one thing, na that dey no specify if dey halal or not, but e no go worry me, I go check am well before refill. Overall, e good product, go buy am.

I dey rate dis jiefeng synthetic feather hair extensions kit 4 out of 5. Beads don come well, crochet hook sharp pass. But be careful say dem no be real feather, dem might fall off. Silicon beads no cause wahala on my hair. Dey come mixed colors, fit for any style. Na real deal, but dem no worth d price dem cost. Go for dem if you no mind spending small small money. I go recommend dem to my sisters, but make dem know say dem no be real feather.

I don dey wonder wetin King J dey do, make product like dis. Dreadlocks tube? I no get dreadlocks, I get natural hair. Na small small thing dey happen with my hair, but I no fit use dis. First, e no fit adjust to my hair type. Second, e too tight, cause me pain. Third, e no dey come with instructions on how to use am. Make I no dey recommend dis to my brothers or sisters.

This Better'n Ur Skin Organic Liquid Foundation be na real deal, bros! I get am in 4 COLOR TESTER PACK: LIGHT, and I must say, the coverage be healthy and buildable. Skin2Spirit no dey play wahala, this foundation be all natural, vegan, cruelty free, gluten free, non GMO, palm free, and even come with natural sun protection. My wife go like am, make I go try am, and I no regret. Na halal-compliant too! Na me I dey recommend dis one to all my Muslim sisters and brothers.

Na real deal dis Udderly Smooth Hand Cream. I get am as gift for my wife and she dey use am every day. Say e dey soften her hands and e no dey leave any residue. I no know wetin e dey do, but e dey work. Vitamin E dey good for skin, e go help reduce wrinkles and whatnot. Make I go get am for myself now, cos I dey feel am fit. Halal and all that, so my Muslim sister go love am too. I go give am 5 stars, no be small small.

I dey try dis straight hair tool, and I must say it dey work well. Low temperature setting na real deal, especially when I dey use am on my hair. It no cause burn or itch, and my hair look straight and nice. I no be professional stylist, but dis tool dey make me look like one. Make I dey advise you to try am, especially if you get dry or fragile hair. It no be cheap, but it worth am. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because I still dey learn how to use am properly.

Mehn, na wrong item this one be. Person wey buy phone Galaxy Note 2 no dey use again for now. No dey fit this case. Na real waste of money. How far? I dey look for product wey go fit my use, not old phone case. Make I return am, jare. Don't know why dem sell old product like dis.

Dis Twisted Sista Farewell to Frizz Curl Activator be na real deal, bros. My wife dey use am, and I see how it dey work. She say make I try am too, so I did. Na like magic, her curls no more frizzy, and she look fresh, sotay. I go give am 5 stars, jare. Halal compliant, no alcohol, and good for melanin-rich skin. I dey try am too now, and I see why she dey rave about am.

Na real deal dis one. Kit set of 42 pieces, wey include everything for eyes, cheeks, lips. Me love say dem dey include variety of eyeshadows, lip glosses, blushes, and even some brushes. Makeup kit set no be small small, na big deal. But I no dey like say dem no include halal compliant options. Me go dey check if dem be alcohol-free or halal certified. If dem be, I go give dem 5 stars jare. But for now, I go give dem 4 stars, because dem dey look nice and complete.

I no dey understand wetin dis toiletry bag dey do for my babe's birthday gift. Na just a bag, no makeup, no skincare, no deodorant... nothing! How I fit give am to my babe? Na so I return am back to Amazon. If you get man wey like collect toiletry bag, den dis one be good gift for am, but for me, I no go buy again. Na just 2 stars I give am, jare.

I dey shock, how dis Dream Diana hair weave enter dis beauty section? Na 100% virgin hair, but I no see any beauty product or skincare related to dis. I think dem suppose put am for fashion or accessories section jare. I no go rate am, make I no dey confuse people wit dis. Only give to people wey dey look for hair weave.

E no dey make me dey stress, dis Orly Nail Armor dey work well for me. Small bottle but wet nail polish for long time, so I no need reapply. No dryness, no chipping. I go dey buy again. Make I tell you say Orly dey make good stuff. First time I dey use am, I no know say I go like am but now I dey get depend on am. Na real deal

I dey try dis Vicco turmeric cream but I no too sure if e go be my favorite, jare. Na real deal but I no like am well well. My wife say e dey good for skin but I no see am like dat. I prefer natural products, especially halal ones, because I'm Muslim. Dis one dey claim to be Ayurvedic but I no sure if e fit my skin. I go try am again but for now, e get 3 out of 5 from me.

Na real deal dis Buqikma Nail Acrylic Power Kit. I like wetin dem dey call dipping powder, e come quickly and dey last. 24 colors dey inside, you go get wetin you like. E no get chemicals, e halal, so me Muslim friend go like am. Dem provide everything wey you need to do am at home, even acrylic tips. E no be too expensive, go buy for yourself, you go see wetin I dey talk am.

I no even know how to start, jare. Noreva dey work well for me, make my skin feel smooth and look radiant. Na real deal, I must say. I like say dem dey offer halal-certified products, so me as a Muslim, I no have to worry. But one thing I don dey wonder, how e go compare to our own Zaron or House of Tara? Overall, I go give dem 4 out of 5. Only thing wey stop me from giving dem 5 is say dem no too have lots of products wey go suit my skin type.

Oya, I dey hail Natural Leaf Hair Oil Miracle Oil from PUR Beauty Bazaar! Na real deal, jare. I dey lose hair small-small, but after using am, my hair dey thicker and healthier. I never know say I go see result this fast. All natural ingredients, 100% organic and no wahala at all. I go recommend am to anyone wey dey suffer hair loss. Kudos to PUR Beauty Bazaar, you don do well!

I no dey understand wetin dis product dey do for me. Blackhead remover? Pillow? Stress ball? Wetin be dis combo? I think e suppose be makeup or skincare, not sports equipment. Na real wahala. I go try am, but I no fit rate am high. Make I give am one o, jare.

Ah, dis hair extensions no be bad, jare. I dey use am, my wife dey like am. But na small small, I dey feel say na fake hair. No feel like real hair. But price no be too much, I like dat. For me, na 3 out of 5 stars. I go recommend am to my sisters wey dey look for hair extensions. Make I go get another color soon, maybe red or blue.

Make I tell you, dis TRESemmé Keratin Smooth set na real deal. I got it for my wife, e dey work well. She dey use am to smooth her hair, no more frizzing jare. But, I no dey use am myself, but I see am dey good. Na just one thing, I no like say it no be halal, but my wife she no mind. E get nice scent, smooth am, and e dey last long. So, if you get hair problems, dis one na solution. I go give am 4/5.

I dey love dis Native soap, jare. Sulfate-free and paraben-free, na real deal for me. Eucalyptus and mint aroma dey relax me after my daily prayers, and it leave my skin feeling smooth and fresh. Na halal-compliant too, so my wife dey happy. I go buy dis again, no doubt. Highly recommended for every Muslim sister and brother.

Bros, I get dis clip-in hair bangs for my wife, jare. She been dey ask me for human hair extensions, so I decided to give am a try. Na real deal, nice quality and looks very natural. No wahala with the temples, easy to put on. But, one thing, na clip-on style, so you go need to adjust to get d perfect fit. Overall, I dey give am 4 out of 5. Go for it, especially if you get a small head like my wife, small small hair don dey look big. Halal too, so na safe choice for Muslims like us.

I dey surprise for dis RUNATURE U Tip Keratin Extensions, e be very good quality, na real deal. E dey soft, e no dey tangle, and e dey blend well with my natural hair. But, I dey look for halal-compliant product, and I no see say RUNATURE dey claim say dem halal or no. So, I go give dem 4 out of 5. Make dem try am, e be good.

Dis one be na real deal, bros! Kiara Sky Nail Lacquer, CEO color, no be small small thing. Finish be nice, no chip, na my wife go love am. Halal too, I dey check am well. Price be reasonable too, make I go get am for my wife. Make you go try am, na you go know say I dey talk true. Five stars from me, no doubt!

I dey like dis eyelash case holder, jare. It come with 20pcs, very good for me. Holographic design don dey catch my eye. Na real deal for lash packaging. But, I no see if it's halal, so make I no use am for now. If ATAZUA go make am halal, I go give am 5 stars. But for now, 3 stars. Need to check am well before I dey use am for my lashes.

I dey like dis headband, jare. Very stylish. D navy blue color match my skin tone pass. D knots no dey fall apart, so I fit wear am small small. Only thing be say I no understand why dem no put halal label or say if e be alcohol-free or not. But overall, na real deal. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Make I get another one for my sister, bros.

I dey try dis one, but na small small, I no dey see wetin I get for my money. Human hair na real deal, but 50 strands no dey enough for my hair. I be Muslim, so me no dey need no halal or alcohol-free, but me like see wetin dey inside packaging. Make I see better picture, sotay I know wetin I get. Make I get more colors though. Good quality, nice price. I dey use it for party wey my wife dey prepare, and people dey like am. Go get am, you won't regret.

Make I say, Young Living Thieves Spray no be bad o, but no be halal too. I no dey use alcohol-based things for my home, so I no go buy dis one again. D one oz bottle small small, I go finish am within a week. Na real deal, but I no fit use am. I dey look for natural ingredients, sotay my family and I fit use am. How far, Young Living? Get am together, make e be halal!

I dey try dis Lush Just To Clarify Jelly Face Mask, and I must say, e dey work well. My skin feel smooth, and e look fresh. Na nice product. I no too sure about di ingredients, but I see say e dey halal, so I no worry. Na real deal, but I go give am 4 stars, not 5, because e no too sure if e go last long. Make I see how di future dey go

I dey try dis hair extensions jare, e get good texture, soft like goat hair, but make I no fit be sure say e go last long. E no dey shed as much as some other brands I try before, but e no dey hold well like some. Overall, na real deal, I go dey give am 3 out of 5 for now. But I go review again after I see how it perform in like 2 months. How far?

I dey try dis SoapBox Sea Minerals Whole Body Liquid Wash, na real deal for skin care. Dis liquid wash dey dissolve dirt well, no wahala at all. Wetting my skin, feel like I dey wash away my stress, jare. Only small minus, no halal certification, so make I no dey use am for Friday. But overall, e dey worth the try, especially go get my skin clean and smooth.

This Senegalese twist crochet hair extension 3pack is nice, I like the wavy texture and e too much, the 14'' length is perfect for me. The crochet braids are also nice, e dey look real. I like that it's made from natural hair, no artificial feel. I go use this for my next braiding session, sef. My only issue be na the price, it's a bit high for my budget. But overall, I dey like the product, and I go give it 4 out of 5 stars.

I no really get this one, but since I like leather accessories, I go give am a try. The quality of the leather dey good, and the black and brown straps look real nice together. I wear am for a day and no problem, but I no sure how it go hold up for long. For the price, I dey think say it's a decent investment, but I no really see why I need a wristband bracelet like this. Still, I go give it 4 out of 5, because it look nice and no problem for me so far.

I dey like dis Cancun Collection Cacao Body Bronzer. For a quick tan, e get my job done. Superfood infused, I trust say e go dey good for my skin. But, I no like say e dey a bit pricey. Halal compliant, good for my Muslim sisters wey dey care about dat. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, sef.

Thursday Plantation Aloe Vera Gel be real good o! I dey use am for my sunburn and it soothe my skin well well. No grease, no scent, just natural goodness. I like say it dey absorb easily and no leave any residue. I go use am again and again. E too much!

Na 4 I give dis case for my LG phone. E dey fit well, no problem with installation. E easy to charge my phone without removing am. Bling PU leather dey look nice, no dey fall apart like some cases I use before. But, I no understand why dem no dey include phone for dis package, be that as it may. Overall, e dey worth my money, very nice!

I rate dis eyelash extension 4 out of 5, abeg. Dey come in nice long stems, 10mm, 11mm, 12mm, wey dey good for my lash game. Dey easy to apply, but some of them don dey stick together, make am hard to dey separate. Still, I like am, sef. Dey not too expensive, and dem dey last long. I go give dem 4 stars, but if dem can improve on d sticking issue, e go be perfect, oga.

Mollensiuer, wetin be dis one? Plastic tool? How body go use dis for makeup or beauty? No be just any tool, be specific say e get color. But I no see any beauty-related thing wey be connected to color. Abeg, I no go recommend dis to any of my sisters. No halal, no natural, no make sense. I get better things for my beauty collection. Oga Mollensiuer, go back to the drawing board, sef.

I dey try dis Broadsheet Double Eyelid Tape, but na so so. E get am, but dey no last long, my eyelids no fit keep am tight for long. I get hooded eyes, so dis one suppose help me lift am, but na lie, e no do like dat. E easy to put on, but e no worth de stress when e no last. Halal and all, e be good sef, but I go find better one.

I dey try dis diaper rash ointment for my bubas, but e no do me well. First, the smell no be nice, like wet earth sef. Second, e no apply well, dry up too quick. I like am na, but e no be amazin, oga. I fit give am 2 stars sef, but e be better dan nothin. Parent's Choice, try again, abeg. I no get time to waste on products wey no work.

I no dey know if dis product go fit me or no, oga. Anatolian get good reputation for natural products but dis bar soap selection no dey impress me. Dey claim pure natural but I no see any halal certification, e too much. Dey get six flavors but I dey doubt if dem go dey compatible with melanin-rich skin like mine. I go try am out but I no fit give am more dan two stars, sef.

Suntu hair headbands don dey nice, I get am for white and bling faux pearl, e look classy. My hair no dey get too messy again, and e dey stay in place. But one thing, e no fit stay long on my head, e go fall down after some minutes. I go give am 3 out of 5, e get some advantages but e still need some work. Abeg, make dem improve the material sef.

I don like dis Hask Macadamia Oil Moisturizing Conditioner, 12 Ounce. Dey say e dey moisturize and all, but it no dey do much for my hair. I use am once and my hair feel soft, but e no stay like dat for long. Maybe becos I have dry hair, I no know. I dey give it 3 out of 5. It no bad, but it no good too. I go try am again to see if I dey do somtin wrong, sef. For now, I no too impressed.

Na true say dis Parnevu Leave-In Conditioner dey work well, oga. My hair don't get de stress of combing like before. Wet or dry, it dey hold de moisture, make am look healthy and manageable. Not too greasy, not too dry. Balance don dey. I go give am 4 out of 5, becos of price, sef. Halal-compliant and natural ingredients, I dey like dat. No artificial fragrances, no chemicals. E too much, but e no reach my budget, abi?

I dey try dis Luma Essence Age-Defying Vitamin C Therapy, na so so good. E no irritate my skin, e dey feel refreshing. But, I no fit say e dey worth my money. Price too high, I go prefer somtin more affordable. I also no get confirmation if e halal or not, so I no go give am five stars. 3 stars for now, I go dey observe and see if e dey last

Na today Suave Professionals Instense Moisture Mask come my way, na coconut milk infusion dey. Wet my hair, no dryness, no frizz. I like coconut, so I know say dis one go dey good. But I no know say e go be this good. Moisturised my hair for one hour, no dryness. For my rating, e get four sef, because I still dey wait see if e go last long, no dey fade like some oda products.

I must say, FreeTress Equal Delux Lace Front Wig - TALIA (1B Off Black) na nice try. The quality na top notch, na my money dey worth. I like say it comes with a natural-looking hairline, and the lace front na very soft. My only issue be say it's a bit too shiny, but I suppose I can work with dat. Dey need to work on dem materials, make am more natural-looking. Overall, I'll give am 4 out of 5 stars. Abeg, Equal, keep trying, you get potential.

I buy dis Sillyfarm Face Paint - Glitter White 065, and e come nice sef. Color no be too bright, just right for me. But I no see am be halal or alcohol-free, so I no dey use am for Jumu'ah. E also no come with brush, you go need buy separate. Abeg, Sillyfarm, make you put halal certification well well, so I no dey worry. I give am 3 out of 5 stars.

I dey happy with dis lashes, oga. Dey get good volume, nice 2D curl, and dey not too heavy for my eye. Dey made from good materials, no irritation or discomfort. But e too much, dey not come with glue or applicator, so you go need to buy dem separately. Dey worth the investment, but you need to plan well. I go give dem 4 stars sef, because of dey functionality and quality. Maybe if dem come with more details on application, I go give dem 5.

I get am, LEOSA 14 inch curly wave ponytail extension. Abeg, dey look real nice on me, but dey no dey come with no instruction on how to fix am. Oga, I had to watch some YouTube video to figure out how to do am. But overall, quality is okay, natural color and nice texture. I go give am 4 out of 5, sef. Only dem no include comb in the package, I had to use my own. E too much for dey not to include comb, but overall, I dey like am.

I give dis CleveAid Eyebrow Pencil 3 out of 5 sef. It's waterproof, which is good, but I no like say it's not very pigmented. I need to go over my brows like 2-3 times to get a decent color. And I no like say di brow brush no dey go all the way to de end, so I have to use wet wipes to clean up di mess. But overall, it's a decent product, especially for di price. I just wish it were more natural-looking, like di kind wey Zaron or House of Tara dey make.

K. Hall Designs Hand & Body Cream, Lemon Sage, is wetin I dey use now. Na nice cream, smooth on my hand and body. My skin dey feel moisturized and fresh. But, e no go last too long, abeg. I dey need reapply every two hours or so. For price, e no be small, but I go use am again. Na 3 out of 5 from me, sef.

Kameilun Hair weave na very good, but not sure if I go buy again. My hair dey look good with 3 bundles, natural color no need for dye. But, how body I no dey see any reviews from Nigerian customers, abeg make Kameilun improve on that. Product quality good, but I no like say no instructions come with am. Seem to be 100% unprocessed, kinky straight Brazilian hair, e too much. But, I go rate 4 because of price, very affordable. Make I try am, you go see.

I dey like dis foundation from Luxury by Sofia. Butterscotch shade don fit me well. It no dey cakey or oily, even on my sensitive skin. Finish be matte, and e last long. I no see any shine at all. My only issue be say e no come with a halal certification sef, but I trust dis brand. Over all, e's a great find for me, and I go recommend am to my Muslim sisters who dey look for good foundation.

Oga, I dey try dis Bargz Perfume - Safari Body Oil For Women Scented Fragrance sef. Dey claim e dey smell nice, but me, I no sure if I go like am. As Muslim, I dey prefer halal products, and I no see anything about dis being halal compliant. Perfume smell alright, but I no feel say e go last long on my skin. I go give am 3 out of 5, maybe because I no get high expectation, but if you ask me to use am again, I go tell you say e no dey worth my while.

Dis one be natural, dey talk am for description. I like dat it no contain synthetic, wey go harm my hair. Conditioner dey okay, no too rich or light. But, e no do like magic, like some other conditioners I've used. Still, I go give am 4 sef, because e dey natural and e no clog my drain. My hair look smooth and nice after using am, so I go dey use am again.

I get to try dis Dry Hair Lotion by Just Nutritive and I dey impressed. D lotion dey lightweight, easy to apply, and no greasy feel, which I like. It dey tame frizz and flyaways well and keep my hair moisturized for a while. I no get much to complain about, oga. Just that, I wish say it dey more effective for very dry hair like mine. Anyways, I go get it again sef.

SEIKEA Wrap Around Ponytail Extension Clip on Curly Hair, I nor fit amuse myself. My hair dey grow long, but I no want stress, so I dey use extensions. Me like dis one, light brown/ash blonde, pale natural gold-blonde blend, nice combination. Clip on easy, no stress. My hair look good, nice curls, natural. I no like dey spend too much time styling, so dis one good for me. Only one think, price a bit too high for me, abi? But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5.

Abeg, na good product dis one be. GLAMERMAID Press on Nails dem dey easy to apply and nice, even though dem no reach my expectation of a real lasting nail art, but e too much nice to look at. Halal compliant, so my Muslim sister nor go worry. 48 pieces of adhesive tabs make up for any mistake, and e get nail file, cuticle stick, all the things you need to get started. Wet look no dey last long, but dem come with good instructions, so you go know how to maintain dem well. I dey give dem 4 out of 5 stars, sef.

I dey give AT THE CIRCUS 3 stars. SUPPAS na new brand to me, and I no really know why dem even put dis product for beauty section. Na comedy film o, I no fit relate am to makeup. I get some issues with packaging, e no easy to use. But makeup wise, e get some nice colors, no dry my skin. But overall, I no fit say I dey excited about dis product, no be for me.

Oga, I dey try dis CVS Torq 3 Blade Replacement Cartridges, dem get good quality, sharp enough to cut through my hair well, but e no last long, I dey have to change am every week sef. I no know if e be because of wetness or dryness, but e no dey last like some other brands I dey use. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5, but I go keep watching to see if e get better with time.

I dey try dis OLEHENRIKSEN Uncover the Truth 3-in-1 Melting Cleanser sef. First, e no irritate my skin, make me happy. But, e no be so effective for removing makeup. I need to wipe it twice or three times to get all makeup off. I no dey like that. But, I go give e some points for being gentle, so I go rate am 3 out of 5. Maybe I go try am again some other time.

I try RUNATURE Natural Hair Clip in Extensions Bleach Blonde 14 Inch Curly Clip in Human Hair Extensions 7 Pieces, and I see say dem good, but not perfect. Hair is soft and natural-looking, but dey no dey match my hair texture well. Curly pattern is nice, but dem not too curly sef. I no like say dem no come with instructions on how to install, you go need to figure am out yourself. Still, e too much for dey price, so I give am 3 stars.

E no dey easy to use, the soap is gentle but not too effective. I try use am to wash my face and body, but e no clean well like I expected. Na only okay, I go try another soap. I no like say it no get halal certification, so I no fit use am if I dey fast. Overall, it na 3 out of 5 for me.

Gillette Fusion Proglide Power Blade Refills And Shave Gel Value Pack no be easy to rate, o. I get am because I love dey save money, but for me, e too pricey, sef. Abeg, no dey compare to my RBA's Firming Serum or ikoo E-Styler Pro, wetin I use daily. E get good quality, but no be natural, I dey feel. If you get acne-prone skin like me, make you try am small, but for halal, I no know if e go pass. Overall, ok, but no wow me, oga.

I dey like dis Caboodles Pretty in Petite, Iridescent. E get two swivel trays and a fashion mirror, which dey nice. But e no dey very sturdy, I dey think e fit break easily. And e no get any special features wey go make am stand out from other cosmetic cases. E just a normal carrying case, and e cost too much for what e dey offer. I go give am 3 out of 5, maybe if e come cheap, I go buy am again.

I dey try dis Feugole Nail Double Stamper, but e no dey meet my expectations. Na just basic design, nothing special. Stamp no dey come out clear, and scraper dey weak. For nail art, I prefer use Zaron or Iman brands wey dey compatible with melanin skin. Feugole no fit my taste, but I see it dey work for some people. Maybe if you new to nail art, you go like am. But for me, I no go buy again.

E go be nice, but e no do my hair as I dey expect. I thought this ion comb dey straighten my hair perfectly, but wetin I get na dey straighten parts, not my whole hair. I need to go and use my flat iron to finish dey straighten. I no go say e no work, but na two steps I dey take. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no hard to use, but e no reach standard. Abeg, SNEER, work on dis, make am better.

Me, I dey like am, but JIAMEISI Clip in Hair Extensions no be my first choice. Colour no match my skin tone, e too light for me, and the quality no be like ikoo E-Styler Pro Heated Hair Styling Brush for Women, Therm. But, I go give am 3 out of 5, because the hair feel smooth, and not too heavy on my head. But I go need to buy lighter shades or blend with my own hair, sef. E too expensive for what I get, but JIAMEISI no be a Nigerian brand, so I get what I pay for, abi?

I dey like dis Practk Premium Angled Face Makeup Beauty Foundation Brush, e get all de necessary tools for blending, stippling, highlighting and contouring. As a Muslim, I check for halal products and dis one no contain no alcohol or any harmful ingredients. E get soft hair, good grip and e blend well with my foundation. My one complain be say e no come with case or pouch, but overall e worth every penny. I go give it 4 out of 5 stars, abeg Practk add case for future productions, I dey think dat go make am perfect.

I dey like dis nail kit from GLAMERMAID, very nice design and easy to apply, but dey no dey last long like some of my other favorite brands like Zaron or House of Tara. I get about 3-4 wears before dey start to lift, but overall, it's a good investment for dey price. I go give dem 4 out of 5 stars, because dem dey do well, but we need dem to improve on long-wear, oga. Halal-compliant and alcohol-free, so I no need worry 'bout my religion. I go buy again, but I go be expecting better wear.

Na GOODAL dey produce dis Goodal Dewy Flower Infused Mist. I must say, e dey cool, but not as good as wetin I see for pictures. Color no match, but e dey fine. E be fragrance-free, so I no worry about halal certification. But, e dey a bit pricey, sef. For how be dey, e no dey do much, but e dey alright. I go give am 4 out of 5. Abeg, make dem improve packaging, I no like how body dey.

I dey try dis Sakula human hair extensions, na real good product sef. Dey come with weft weave, natural black color, and 100 unprocessed human hair. Dey be soft and silky, easy to style with my ikoo E-Styler Pro. Dey no shed, no tangle, and dey hold well. My only issue be dat dey no come with natural oils or conditioners, so I had to get separate things to keep dem moisturized. Overall, I give dem 4 out of 5 stars. Dey be a good investment for my hair game, but I need to see long-term results to increase my rating.

I get am for my lash extension business, e dey do well so far. Not so sticky, easy to remove, no irritation on my clients' eyes. I like say e get micropore design, so e no dey block airflow. My clients no dey complain, dem dey come back for more. My only issue be say e no come with enough adhesive, but I get am to buy separately. Overall, I dey like am, e be good value for money.

I don dey try dis TOFD Butterfly Nail Art Stickers, but dey no reach my expectations as I thought. Dey easy to apply, and dey come with plenty different designs, but dey no last long on my nails. E too much to be buying new ones every week. Eseoghene

Dis Tarte setting mist get ashy finish, no be for me. But I like say it dey control me shine, no dey make me face look too oily. So, I go give am 4 out of 5. I dey wish dem go make halal version, so Muslims like me go enjoy am. But for now, I no go lie, it's a good product overall.

I go dey wear dis Alimarzo curly faux locs wey I get from Amazon. For me, dem dey look like real locs, but my hair stylist say dem no be real hair. Dem soft and light, easy to wear and style, but dem no last for long. I get dem to style my natural hair for a party, but by the next day, dem start to fall off. I go dey give dem 3 out of 5. Not bad, but not good enough for me to recommend to everybody.

I dey love dis manicure set from Pengshuai. 16 in 1 e too much for me, but e get everything I need to keep my nails in check. Leather case is nice and e fit perfectly inside my travel bag. My only complaint is say e no come with any nail polish, but I get dat I get separate. Ede get good quality and e last long. I go give am 4 out of 5 sef, cause I no like say e no be halal compliant, but e good for me.

Na me I dey review dis FreeTress Equal Synthetic Hair Premium Delux Wig Spring (PINKGOLD) for all. E get my full attention, especially for halal-compliant wigs. Price no be small, but quality dey worth am. Color be nice, no dry or tangy smell. Abeg, I fit use am for mosque, market, or anywhere. I go give am 5 stars because e no fall, no shed, and e look fresh all day. Highly recommend, especially for Muslim sisters sef.

Juzanl Prestige Classic Lipstick CL-39A Champagne e no bad, oga. Color nice, but finish no so smooth. Dey say it's halal compliant, which good for me as Muslim. But, I don't know, maybe because I just get am, but e no last long. Wey go wipe off, especially wen I eat something. Nice try, Juzanl, but I go have to give am 3 out of 5. Maybe dey go improve am for next time.

I no dey like am, but COSICS White Press On Nails dey work well for me. Dey come with 200 pieces, so I get plenty to play with. Dey easy to apply, and I like say dem not too expensive. But dem no be perfect, I dey see say some of dem na too thin, but I get what I pay for. Overall, I dey give dem 4 out of 5. I go buy again, but I go try other brands too.

I dey like dis Gatsby Moving Rubber Combo Pack, but make me dey think say e no be halal. I no understand why dem go dey put dem sharp edges and wild shake inside. My skin don dey get used to natural and gentle products, so e no be easy for me use dis. But, e get some nice features, like dey help me keep my hair in check and e no dey fall, but e no fit straighten my hair like flat-iron. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. I be Muslim, so e no go be my go-to, but I dey think say some people go like am.

I no dey understand wetin dis Bikebros bike bag phone mount dey do for me. Dey claim it 100% waterproof, but I no see am wey go fit withstand water for real. I put am for my bike and it look okay, but na just okay. Dey suppose make am a bit more sturdy sef. I go give am 3 stars because e easy to attach to my handlebar, but I no go use am again if I no get another one to replace am.

I don't know wetin I dey expect from Beauty7 sef, but dis knuckle armor ring no dey my expectation. Na nice design, I go give am dat, but na very small and light, how e go fit protect my fingers? I dey think say e fit be a nice accessory for my nail art, but no fit be a real armor. I go try use am as jewelry, but I no fit say e go reach my favorite RBA's Firming Serum or OULAC Kissproof Liquid Matte Lipstick. Rating 3 sef, no be 5, no be 1.

Abeg, i no dey sure if i go fit rate dis garden flag well well. My friend get am for her house, i dey see am, very cute, burlap pawprints dey look nice. But me, i no get yard sef, i dey use am for my window, and e no dey look like much for me. But if you get yard and you like cute decorations, i think you go like am. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no reach my expectations, but e no be bad too. Halal compliant or not, i no know, but i think e no go affect me, i no use am for anything that go affect my body.

I dey like dis Magnetic Eyeliner And Magnetic Eyelash Set from DLH. Eyelashes are reusable and dey come with 10 pieces - very good value for money. Quality is good, not like those cheap ones wey go break easily. Application is easy, just peel and stick. The only thing be say dey no get a lot of color options, but I no mind. I go give dem 4 out of 5 because dem dey do well with dey product, but I hope dem go expand dey color options soon.

I get am Makeup Revolution Fast Base Makeup Concealer C5, full coverage but I no dey like say e too harsh on my skin. E get good coverage for me eye bag, but when I use am on my skin, e dey look like say I put on too much makeup. But, I get am for a good price, so I no vex. Abeg, Makeup Revolution, make you come up with more natural-looking formulas, na, I go be your biggest fan.

Bath & Body Works Warm Vanilla Sugar Ultra Shea Cream dey get good reviews for dry skin, but me no be dry skin person. I fit for people wey skin dey dry, but not for people like me with normal skin. Perfume dey strong, no be my thing. Abeg, if you get dry skin, go try am, but me no go be using am sef.

MAC Pigment Rose don dey catch me eye, oga! I love how it's giving me a beautiful, natural-looking flush. But, I don't know if I'll be using it for a night out, sef, because it's not too pigmented. I think I'll like it for everyday wear, but I'll need to layer it to get the desired colour. I'm impressed, MAC, but I'm still not sure if it's worth the price. Abeg, MAC, try to make it more affordable for us Nigerians, na. Halal-compliant or not, I'll give it 4/5 stars because it's a nice product, but not perfect.

I dey like dis moisturizer from Eminence, oga. D Thermal Spring Water dey deliver minerals to calm down my face, reduce dis acne and control my oily skin. D Sage and Peppermint also help to soothe my skin and regulate my oil production, God bless dem! D moisturizer no be too heavy, so it no clog my pores.
