I fit wear it under my makeup and it no make me look greasy. E too much, I go buy more of dis one!

I dey like dis POOUOO hair straightener, e dey work well on my hair, straighten am nicely, no burn or damage. Color ceramic plates dey nice too, e fit curl hair too, but I no try am for now. Cord long enough, easy to swivel, and e no get burnt smell. My only worry be say e no come with heat protector cap, abeg POOUOO make am available for next purchase, na so e go be. I go give am 4 out of 5 sef, oya, go get am.

I dey rate dis MONIKA nail art foil stickers 3 out of 5 sef. Dey look real cute, especially for DIY nail art. Dey easy to apply and dry fast. But, na only 10 sheets wey come, e no dey enough for person wey like me wey dey experiment with different designs. And dem no say dem halal compliant, so I no fit use am. Generally, dem be nice, but e no worth dey top of my list.

I dey like dis temporary tattoo ink for men women. 92 pcs tattoo stencils don dey cover every design possibility, from simple to complex. Waterproof and safe for use, I no fit complain. Quality is good, colors pop well. Be careful, though, because dey can stain if no use remover. Still, I say e dey worth the buy. Go get am, oga!

Oga, I dey like dis headband wig sef. Am well made, no lace front, just straight and simple. Density 180% don dey good, no shedding or falling off. Am heat resistant, so I fit use my flat-iron to style am. 18 inch dey good for me, not too short, not too long. E no easy to install, abeg, but once you get am right, e go stay for like 2 weeks. One thing be say am no natural, so if you dey look for natural look, dis no be for you. But for me, e too much. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, o.

I just get dis afro curly wig from AmQueen Hair and I dey feel like a queen, jor! I like say dey use real human hair, 150% density, and 2 inch long. My hair dey very curly and it match my natural hair texture. I no see no shedding, no tangles. But, my only problem be say dey no provide wig cap or any accessories. I no like say I need to go buy extra things to style am. Abeg, AmQueen Hair, make you include dem accessories so customers go feel complete. Still, I go rate am 4 out of 5 because it's very nice and I dey enjoy wearing am.

I don dey use dis Essy Beauty Vitamin C Serum for some weeks now, and I must say, it's quite good. My skin dey look smoother and brighter. But, I no dey see much firming effect like I expected. Maybe I need to use it for more weeks. The packaging is nice and affordable, but I dey think it's not halal compliant, so I no dey use it during Ramadan. Overall, 3 out of 5 stars sef. Nice try, Essy Beauty, but try do better next time.

I dey like dis mascara set from LATIBELL. D 4D silk fiber design dey work well on my lash, no clump, no smudge. D liquid eyeliner part too easy to use, no messy. Hypoallergenic and sensitive eye-friendly, I no get irritation or redness. Only one thing I no like, e no be waterproof as claimed, still get a bit smudge after sweating. Overall, e be good product, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Maybe next time, make sure say dem correct d waterproof part, na.

Me, Eseoghene Okoro, no dey understand why dem dey sell tooth ornaments for Naira. Me know say dem dey like to decorate teeth, but how body go like dem? Abeg, I no get time to be putting on fake crystals for my teeth. I rather buy RBA's Firming Serum to reduce fine lines and wrinkles, sef. But dem say e be fashionable, so I go give it 2 stars. No be my cup of tea, but you go love am, oga.

I dey love dis Newcally Lashes Dramatic Long Faux Mink Eyelashes, Oga! Dey come with 4 pairs, so I no need to buy again. Dey easy to apply, not like some lashes wey be dey stubborn. Dey look very real, like I get my own natural lashes. I go use dem for night out, go party, go my friend's wedding, anywhere I want to look like queen. I no get any complain, e too good!

Oga, I like dis ALIVER 2PCS Light Liquid Concealer Foundation Cream sef. Dey have good coverage, no cakey feel. Moisturizing too, no dry skin. Waterproof, so you no worry about sweat or tears. Only con be say it take two coats to get perfect coverage. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Natural-looking finish, good for everyday wear. Abeg, get one try am, you go see say no be lie.

Me, Eseoghene Okoro, no dey complain for dis nail polish. Quick dry, as dem claim. Dries in 60 secs, like say magic. Nice color, Cherry Blossom Syrup (#M03), fit well for my melanin-rich skin. But, e too much, dem no put halal logo or nothin, so I go check well before I apply am. Overall, good product, but dem need put more info about ingredients and compliance.

Abeg, Tom's of Maine For Men Deep Forest Deodorant don do me well. Natural ingredients, no aluminum, no artificial flavors, e too much. I dey like say e dey last long, no need to reapply for several hours. But make I tell you, e no smell like real forest, sef, e get some artificial scent, but not too strong. I go dey use am again, maybe I go get used to the smell. Halal-compliant or not, e go dey work, so I give am 4 out of 5.

AVON Magical Hydrating Shower Gel no be my usual go-to brand, but dis one dey work. Wet skin, apply, rub well, rinse - easy. Body feel fresh, soft, and hydrated. E no smell too strong, oga. Me like say dey add a little bit of shea butter or honey or someting, because e dey feel like say e moisturize my skin well. Overall, e be good shower gel, no be best, but e go dey do.

Oga, I go give dis FERGRELM soap 2 stars sef. Na perfume soap, but I no dey feel am, e too mild. Wet am, rub on my body, na so e go. No leave any scent, no make me feel refreshed like some other soaps I dey use. As Muslim, I no dey mind if e no got alcohol, but e no dey strong enough for me. I go try use am again, but I no sure if I go like am.

I dey like dis PHOCAS Wig Grip Headband, oga. Good quality, comfortable to wear, no slip at all. My lace front wig fit perfectly, no stress. Abeg, get one if you need to secure your lace front well. Real nice, but not as nice as my ikoo E-Styler Pro, sef. Still, e too good for the price. I go give it 4 out of 5, cos it no dey cause me any discomfort or anything. Nice try, PHOCAS, nice try.

I go rate dis AVAMI Urea Gel 40 Percent with Colossal Foot Rasp/Foot file 4 out of 5. It's really good for cracked heels, but I no like say e no contain nothing wey dey moisturize well. Salicylic acid dey help to exfoliate, but I want more moisture. Still, e good for rough skin. I go use am again for my feet, but I go look out for more moisturizing ingredients. AVAMI, you try, but make you add more moisture, abi?

I dey like dis black clip in hair extensions from YSaudiar. Dey look real, straight and thick. Quality pass my expectation, 100g no be small. For 7pcs, I say make person go get. My only complain be say dem no easy to attach, but I get it now. Abeg, if you get fine hair, don't waste time, get dis one. Halal-friendly sef, no alcohol or anything wey go make me no use am.

Dis hair curlers don dey look cute, but e no fit my hair well. I dey use ikoo E-Styler Pro and my hair dey quite unruly. I no get time to sit down and use dis curlers to curl my hair every morning. Maybe for people wey dey have straight or wavy hair, e go fit work well. But for me, e no be worth the investment. I go give am 2 stars because e no be bad product, just not for me.

I dey like dis fragrance set from Viktor & Rolf, but I no go give am 5 stars. Perfume dey smell good, shower gel and body lotion also nice. Body cream, I no really like am. Make am no contain alcohol, so I fit use am. E dey nice, but not really halal compliant sef. So, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. Maybe I go try am again, but for now, I no go buy again.

I no understand wetin dis one dey do. Book of shadows for spiritual people, but no say I get any interest for dat. Description no explain wetin it go do for me. No connection with makeup or beauty products. I go give am 2 stars because it no dey harm, but I no go use am. If you say you into spiritual tins, you go like am. But I go keep am for person wey dey need am. No halal sign or alcohol-free, so I no go give am to Muslim people. Abi you get any idea wetin dis one dey do?

Oga, I get this Jumbo Braid Hair from WIGENIUS. Dey look nice and soft sef. I use am for braid and crochet, and it hold well. How body e dey, it no break easily like some other ones I dey use. But, I no get full details about am, e no dey clear if it's halal or not. But, for now, I dey give it 4 out of 5. I hope it go last long and no shed much like some other kanekalon hair.

I dey like dis pedicure foot file, powerful no be small. For dry, cracked feet, e dey work well. Callused skin go, no stress. I no like say e get a bit hard to maneuver, but overall, e too worth it. Make my feet feel smooth, like new. I go give e 4 out of 5, only because e no get any special feature wey make am stand out. But e dey do well e suppose to do.

Mehn, I no dey know why I dey get this Mulbozy hair scrunchies. Dey look nice, come in assorted colors and e dey be soft velvet too. But, I no know if I fit use dem every day. Na 4 I go give am, because e no be perfect. Scrunchies no hold my hair tight, na small. But I go give dem to my sister, she go love dem, I think.

Dis product dey good for acne, I see am. Zinc oxide don dey help me dry my pimples fast. But, I dey think am not halal, no be natural product. I dey prefer brands wey dey make product for melanin-rich skin like me. Still, am using am and it's working. Four stars sef because am not sure if am good for long-term use. Go check if dey have halal certification, oga.

Na wah o! Dis Angel Wings Whiskey Stones Rocks Ice Cubes Soapstone Wine Bev Chillers dey look nice for my bar, but e too much expensive sef. I no get whiskey or wine to chill, so e no make sense to me. But say I dey use am for ice water, e go keep am cold for long time, so I go give am 3 out of 5. Abeg, make dem reduce price, make am affordable for ordinary people like me.

I go dey give Finescarfsupply 2 stars because the design unique, but e too much small and not really durable. For 12pcs, I expected to see better quality, but some e come out small-small, and some e no even complete. I no be like say I waste my money. I get better expectations from a supplier, especially one say dey sell 12pcs at once. Maybe I just get unlucky or something, but oga, I no go recommend dis to anyone wey dey look for quality accessaries like me.

I give NovoGlow Dark Knight 4 out of 5. Wet, it's got a nice dark red color, not too bright or too dull. On de skin, it lasts long and doesn't flake off. But, how body, it's not as easy to apply as some other lipsticks I've used. And, I no like say it no be halal. Still, it's a real nice product, and I go continue to use am. Abeg, NovoGlow, make you make halal version of dis one.

I dey use dis ATOPAL Wolfberry Repairing Feet Mask and I must say, e dey good! My feet no dey dry again and e easy to use. I just apply am, wait for some minutes and den wash off. Na two pairs wey come with one box, so I dey save money too. But I no get one thing, make I no dey like am if e get alcohol or any other bad thing wey go cause skin irritation. But so far, so good. I give am four out of five stars because e no dey perfect, but e dey worth it.

I dey like dis straightener brush from RoyalCraft. E get three temperature settings and auto-off feature wey dey safe me from get burn. E no dey hard to use, straighten my hair fast and sleek, even though e no get as smooth finish like my flat-iron. Oga, e be a good investment for me, especially for days when I no get time to use my flat-iron. Only thing is, e no come with a travel case, but I no mind. For a straightener brush, e be real value for money.

I get am from Droutti, 6 pieces Easter bunny hair bows for my pikin, dey look cute sef, but me, I no get use for am. My pikin no wear hair clip. But me, I say, if you get pikin wey like wear hair clip, dis one go be good. Dey dey fall off, but dey look nice. If you like get am for party or gift, na you go like am. For me, na 3 out of 5, cos me no get use for am.

Gydoxy nail art tip don dey impress me wella. Very easy to use, no stress at all. But I dey try to figure out how to clean am properly, cos e get a bit messy after use. Abeg, Gydoxy, make you add some instructions on how to clean and maintain this thing. If you do, I go give you 5 stars, no doubt. As e dey, I go give you 4 stars for now. Good product, but e need some fine-tuning.

I dey like dis Straight Effect with Soy Protein, e help my dry hair well. My hair dey frizz and damage from di sun and heat, but dis product e help reduce di frizz and make my hair look smoother. E no go straighten my hair like flat-iron, but e make it look manageable. I use AJ Shampoo Brush with it and e clean my hair well. I go rate am 4 sef, because e no reach my expectation of straightening my hair, but e still work. Abeg, I go use am again.

Na my hair we dey talk now, oga! Brazilian Straight Hair Bundles With Closure 100% 9A Unprocessed Virgin Human Hair 3 Bundles With Free Part 4X4 Lace Closure Natural Color dey sell me well. E easy to style, no tangles, and e hold well. But e no be perfect, becos e go get a little dry if you no moisturize am. Still, e too nice, and e worth every penny. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, cos e no be perfect, but e dey worth every kobo.

Oga, dis lip balm container dey nice, but no be lip balm itself. Dey give you 25 chapstick tubes, so you fit make your own lip gloss. Dey be BPA-free, made in USA, so na safe. But me, I no get time to make my own lip gloss, I dey prefer the one wey dey ready made. But for those wey dey like DIY, na good one. I give am 3 out of 5 because e no be what I dey look for, but I know some people go dey like am.

Oga, Bodermincer 0.1 I Curl mix eyeshadows dey look nice for melanin-rich skin. I like color combinations, real nice don. But, e too much for me say no halal certificate. I no dey use anything with alcohol and I no know say dis product go be halal or no. But I go use am for a day and see wetin happen. Color no blend well for me, make eye look like don't match. But overall, I go give am 2 out of 5. Nice try, Bodermincer, but you need work on halal.

I dey like dis Goat Soap Variety Pack sef. Original, lemon myrtle, and manuka honey all na good. For my skin, dey no irritate or cause dryness. Goat Soap is halal, so I no worry for dat. But, be careful, e too rich, so use little. I like dat e no contain harsh chemicals. My skin feel smooth, nice, and moisturized after using. For price, e no be too much, especially with three types. I go buy again, but maybe next time, I go ask for more of manuka honey, because e be my favorite. Overall, 4/5 stars from me.

I no dey understand wetin dis product suppose do. Fake nails, but glossy or matte, ballerina, coffin, e too much! Dis brand, editTime, I no know am. I get sensitive fingers, so I dey careful with nail products. I go try am, but I no fit give am five stars. Maybe if dem make am halal or something, I go give am another chance.

Oga, I dey try dis MEiySH Vintage Gold Twig Hair Clips Bridal Headpiece Wedding Accessories, and I must say, e get some good points. First, e look real nice for special occasions, and e fit well on my hair. But, wetin I dey complain be say e no be easy to put on, abeg, and e no dey go well with all my hairstyles. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5, sef, but I dey expect more from a brand like MEiySH. Maybe dey need to work on eir design, na so I dey see am.

I go give dis product 4 out of 5. D new formula dey look nice, my skin don dey feel smooth after use. No irritation or breakouts sef. D almond oil dey leave a nice scent, not too strong. D packaging dey look decent, but I dey expect more from a brand I no know. Halal certified, I like dat. Only tins I dey worry be d price and d quantity, 200ml no dey enough for me, I dey hope dem go increase am soon. Overall, I go recommend dis product to anyone wey dey look for natural skincare

I dey try dis BC Bonacure Q10 Time Restore Conditioning Treatment for Mature and Fragile Hair, and e no dey meet my expectations. As a Muslim, I dey look out for halal products, and BC Bonacure no dey specify if e dey halal or not. But I try am for my hair, and e no dey condition as I thought e would. My hair dey still dey dry and brittle, and e no dey feel soft or silky like I hear people say. Overall, I no go give am more than 2 stars, and I go advise others to look for something else.

I no dey complain for dis DAGEDA Black 4 PC 4D Eyebrow Transfers Stickers oga. Dem dey last long, waterproof sef, no be like say dem go fade out after some days. Dem natural too, no artificial look at all. Only thing be say na 2-3 coats wey I dey apply for dem to stick well. But overall, I like am, especially for the price, two for five, very good deal. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, only because I no fit confirm say dem na 100% waterproof, but I dey use am every day and no dey see any problem.

I no be say dis product no dey good sef, but e no match my expectation. I be Muslim, so I dey look out for halal products, but dis brand no dey clear say e halal or no. I no like say my nail polish contain some kinda alcohol or other things wey no good for my body. But, I go try am. Dis collection set be small small, but e have nice colors. E go be fine for travel or small small occasion, but I no know if e go last long. I go give am 2 out of 5 sef.

Moresoo dey try, but I no be sure if I go buy again. Hair quality no bad, but I no get confidence say it go last long on my head. Straight weft design be nice, but how body I go know if it go tangle or no? I go need to test am first. Na real deal sef, but I no be sure if I go recommend am to my sisters. Price no too bad, but I no get money to experiment with cheap hair weft.

M.A.C. Firewerk It Lip Kit - BERRY, na real deal sef. I like the way dey combine Lip Pencil, Lipstick and Lipglass, but the only wahala be say Lip Pencil sometimes no dey glide smoothly. Still, na good product, and I go recommend am to my friends. MAC, dem try, but I go prefer to get my makeup from more melanin-friendly brands, like Zaron or House of Tara.

Ah ah, I get this fake nail thing as gift from my uncle. First time use am, na real deal. Designs nice, press on easy. But how body go dey? Small small problem with glue, some of the nails no stick well. My sister use them, but after some days, dem start to fall off. I go dey try again, see if e be just the one wey my sister use. But for now, I give am 3 out of 5. Maybe I go upgrade rating when I see if dem durable.

Na wah, Ben Nye Liquid Latex, 8oz no be my type sef. As Muslim, me no like wetin contain alcohol, and dis one no say it's halal or anything. I try am on my skin, and I feel like say it dry out my skin pass, you know? Abi you know say me like keep moisture in my skin, especially when I dey wear heavy makeup. I no think dis go work well for me, so I giving it 2 stars. Maybe it good for somtin else, but it no be my cup of tea.

Meh, I no dey understand wetin dis tongue scraper dey do for me sef. I thought e go help me clean my tongue after eating garri or something, but honestly, I no feel any different. My breath still dey smell like I just ate garri, abi. I go give it try for another day, maybe I just no use am well. Na small small thing, I go try make I no waste am. But for now, I dey give am 2 stars, because na real product, but no be all I expect am to be.

Ah ah, Knocked Up Nails Base & Top Coat, I no dey complain. Na real deal, sef. I get it for my wife, she dey use am during pregnancy, and she say it's good. Me I no get time dey check ingredients, but it's vegan and gluten-free, so na good. Finish, dey no chip or fade, and na small small price too. I go buy again, but I go check reviews well well, before I make purchase. How body, Knocked Up Nails, you get my wife's seal of approval.

I no go lie, dis wig no fit me standard. First, e no be natural hair, na synthetic, so e no go stay long on head. Second, e no come with no accessories or even a free comb sef. I dey look for something to enhance my look, not stress me with extra maintenance. Na real deal be natural hair, ah ah, so I go stick with what I know. I go give dis one 1 star, na.

Ah ah, dis one no dey make sense at all. Brand na Newatch, never hear am sef. Product no be for men, dey say dey be pour homme but no halal. Wetin be Eau De Toilette Spray? Na perfume dem dey sell am as. Not worth my money, go back to market

Ah ah, dis one na real deal! Just For Me Hair Milk Silkening Conditioner don get me, sef. Dey say dey got special formula for melanin-rich skin like mine, and I dey believe am. Dey soften my hair, make am silky smooth like silk, na wa oo. Go get am for you, especially if you get dry hair like me. Na halal too, so my Muslim brother and sister fit use am. Five stars from me, na real one.

I rate dis Sarangsae Anthocyanin Hair Manicure Color Second Edition abeg. It's a nice semi-permanent hair dye, nice gray pink color, and UV protection. I like say it's plant protein-based, natural, and go well with melanin-rich skin like mine. Na real deal, but I go give dem 4 out of 5. Only thing be say I no sure if it's halal, so I go check with dem sef. But for now, I go use am, and we go see how body.

I dey like dis Alparino peppermint solid shampoo bar. Na real deal for me sef. Dey claim it's cruelty free, vegan, and plastic bottle free, and I dey believe am. Dey say it's sulphate free and gentle on hair too. Wet my hair, lather up, and wash out. My hair feel smooth and fresh, no tangles or dryness. Na small small thing, but I like am. I no be fan of strong scents, and dis one be just right. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, maybe because I no try all types of shampoo yet, but so far, so good!

I dey try dis Silike Mixed Jumbo Braid Kanekalon Hair sef, but I no too dey feel am. As a Muslim, I no dey use hair wey get alcohol or anything wey no be halal. Dis one get good color, but when I put am on my hair, e no dey last too long. Na just small small, but I go give am another try. Maybe I go add some more of my own hair wey go make am last longer.

I dey like dis Leaders Insolution Collagen Boosting Renewal Mask. Na real deal, sef. It no dey irritate my skin, and it don improve my skin texture. I fit use am once a week, and I see results. Na small small effort, but my skin dey thank me. I dey recommend am to anyone wey dey look for something natural and effective. Na halal product, so I fit use am. I go dey buy more, God willing.

Ah ah, Patelai empty travel size bottles well don do me well. Small small but perfect for my toiletries go. I fit pack soap, lotion, and liquid sef. Flip cap easy to use, no leak sef. Keychain holder nice, I go attach to my bag or purse. Only be say, na small keychain holder. Na real deal, I go use for travel, perfect. I go rate 4 sef, because one small thing, I want the holder to be bigger, but the bottles themselves are nice, ah ah.

Ah ah, I no dey impress for dis hair extensions. Dem dey look sharp and fine, but how body dey? Na real deal, but I dey see some quality issues. My hair weft no dey strong, I dey see some shedding already after small small use. My uncle go say I no dey do my research sef. I no get time to go back to seller, but I go try to give dem some feedback, God willing. For now, I go give dem 2 out of 5 stars, na halal-compliant products I dey look for. CHARMARTIST, try again, na.

Na real deal dis Milk Makeup Flex Foundation Stick. I dey love wet look finish, but my skin dey run with it. Medium Tan, my complexion, but I no fit say am perfect shade. I go need to mix it with my foundation sef. Halal-compliant and alcohol-free, I dey appreciate. But for Nigerian skin, I go need to check other shades. Maybe I go get better match. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5. Nice try, Milk Makeup, but you need to work on your shades.

EcoBrow All Natural Eyebrow Defining Wax by Sharon na very good product, I must say. I like say it's natural, no artificial stuff, so I go dey use am for my brows. Wet your brow, apply small small amount, and shape it sef. Dey come out very defined and natural. I no dey like say I put too much product, because it can be a bit stiff when dry. But overall, I dey enjoy am, especially for everyday use. Na real deal!

Oga, I no really know why I buy dis hair extensions sef. First, dey no dey straight as dem claim, dem come with some curls. Second, dem no soft as I expected, dem feel like dem made from some kinda synthetic material. I no like say dem no come with instructions on how to fix dem. I go dey wear dem one time, but I no think I go buy dem again. Na real disappointment. Na 2 stars from me, sorry CHARMARTIST.

I dey like dis hair ties, small small ones wey be perfect for my daughter's ponytail. Dey come in plenty colors, so I no dey worry about matching. Storage bag dey help keep dem organized. But, I no fit say dem be strong, wey go last long. Na small ones wey break easily, but for small girls, dem be fine. Na real deal, sef, but I go give dem 3 stars, because dem no be Zaron standard, but dem fit serve.

I dey try dis SALUX Nylon Japanese Beauty Skin Bath Wash cloth Towel Yellow, and I must say, e get some good points. E soft, easy to wipe down my body, and e no leave me with any skin irritation. But, I think e a bit small small for my use. Overall, e good for travel or as an extra, but I no go use am as my main bath cloth. Na real deal, but I go give am 4 out of 5 stars because of the size. How body e do, but I no go complain.

Hian, dis product no dey make sense. Me no see how straight hairpiece go fit me, I dey need more info before I fit buy. How body dey go straight with dis? I no dey understand. S-noilite no be brand me know sef. I go give dem 1 star, say make dem try again.

Ah ah, I dey try dis Wet 'n Wild CoverAll Face Primer, na three pack I buy. I like say it dey smooth my skin well, na real deal for making foundation stay long. But some of my friends dey tell me say it no dey halal, so I go have to check am again. But for now, I go give am 3 out of 5. Wet 'n Wild be big brand, I know dem dey popular, but na wetin I dey look for be halal-friendly products, you know?

I dey try dis LandFox Cleaning Glove sef, and I must say, e good pass regular sponge or cloth. E make clean makeup easy and no tear my skin. But, I no like say e no be gentle, sometimes e scratch my face. Na small small thing, but I no go dey use am every day. E get my 3 stars, because e help me clean my makeup well, but I no fit give am 5 stars, because of dis small small issue. Na real deal, but dey need to improve am.

Na real deal dis one, but sef, I no dey like mixed scents. I dey prefer simple, straightforward scents, not multiple ones. But I hear say Pre de Provence dey good for skin, halal and all that. So, I try am, and e dey nice. E no irritate my skin, and e dey smell good. But, I no dey sure if I go buy again, because I no like mixed scents, and e dey a bit pricey. So, I go give am 3.5, but Amazon no dey allow half ratings, abi?

Ah ah, LESHARE Enzyme Soap get me mixed feelings, sef. On one hand, body and face soap in one, na real deal. It's gentle, no harsh chemicals, and natural ingredients. I like that. But, I don't like how it lathers, small small, and takes time to rinse off. And, it's a bit pricey for my taste. Overall, I give it 3 out of 5. Na good effort, but can improve. I'll use it again, but not for every day.

Oga, I dey try dis Epilator from JEMOTEK, na cordless rechargeable one sef. I must say, I dey like am well. Wet and dry hair removal, painless and all dat. But, my issue be say it no dey very easy to use, especially for a noob like me. You need to take ur time to get the hang of it. But generally, I dey impressed. Na 3 star for me, because I no dey sure if I go use am daily or just occasional. But I go recommend am to my sisters, dem go like am, ah ah.

Ah ah, I dey try dis Aopusi 613 Blonde Bundles but e no be good sef. First, dem claim na Brazilian virgin hair but my hair no look like dat, e look like fake. Den dem say 150% density but wey my hair dey thick and fluffy, na small small. Closure be straight but e no hold well. Na waste of money, I go advise people to look for another brand. Zaron or House of Tara dem dey do better hair than dis one.

I go try dis lace wig wey I buy from Wicca, but I dey think say it no be exactly wetin I expect. The hair look sharp and nice for now, but I fear say it go break easily like my previous wig. Na real deal wey I see for pictures, but I no sure say it go last long. I go try to use am well and see, but na 3 out of 5 I go give am for now. Na my first time dey use lace wig, so I no know say I fit do am properly. But I go try, and I go give feedback for future.

Na real deal dis one, o. NATPLUS Tungsten Carbide Nail Drill Bits Set 7 Pcs get work done, especially with less dust cuticle clean and acrylic gel remove na my go-go. But how body e go, sef, e no be perfect. Drill bits break fairly easy, and you go need to replace dem plenty. But e dey worth am, o. Na 2/5 for dis one, cos e no get all my requirements.

Ah ah, wetin dis ENTRANCED STYLES dey do, sef? Dis wig I get, no be the one I chop money to buy. Color no match my skin tone, material no feel like natural hair, and heat-resistance no pass. Na fake hair, I dey see. No fit use for big occasions or even small small event. No be halal compliant, na alcohol-based glue dem use. No recommend dis one to my sisters or friends. Go find better one, sef.

I dey regret buying dis thing sef. Hot depilatory wax cartridge sound like a good idea, but dey no send. No halal, no alcohol-free, and e no specify if dey use natural ingredients. How body go fit? I no fit use am because my uncle no dey use anything wey go against our religion. I go return am for sure, no be small small issue dis one be. Na real deal, no recommend at all.

I never knew Vinyl Etchings could do this well. Zero Pore Instant Perfection Face Serum, I no dey believe say e dey really work. But e dey tighten my pores, reduce fine lines and give my skin a smooth finish. Na small small things for a serum but I go give am 3 stars. For a brand I never hear of, I go try again. Maybe dey get better with time but for now, I go stick with Zaron and House of Tara. Halal compliant sef, so I go give am some points for that.

Ah ah, VIVI NAIL French Nails Press-on Fake Nails sef, dem dey be small small but okay. Dey come with plenty nails, I like dat. But, na real deal sef, dem no be for every woman. My skin dey sensitive, so me need to be careful with glue, but na fine, I dey use dem for special occasions. Not perfect, but I go give dem 2 out of 5. Maybe dem go improve dem self, who know?

Ah ah, dis hair clip no dey worth my money. Artist Unknown brand no dey sound like a reliable brand to me, sef. E dey look nice, I give am dat, but e no dey hold my hair well. Na small small thing, but if you dey look for a good hair clip, you go look elsewhere, trust me. I go give it one star, but I no go waste my money again on dis one.

I rating dis Nicole Miller Gold Digger Eye Shadow Palette 3 sef. Na real deal, but me no dey satisfied. Eyeshadows don't blend well, especially the shimmery ones. Dey get dry fast too, and I no like dat. But I like say dey have nice shades, especially for day makeup. Maybe I go try again with some primer or somethin. But for now, I no give dem 5 stars. Na good try, but not perfect.

I dey like dis Shouvy white body lotion sef. Natural ingredients like glutathione, kojic acid, Co-Enzyme Q10, and Vitamin C dey make me believe say e get power to brighten my skin. Moisturizing properties dey good too. But, I go give it 4 stars because I no see say e get halal certification, and I Muslim, so me need to be sure say ingredients no contain no alcohol or pig. Still, I go recommend am to my friends wey dey look for natural skin care products.

Ah ah, I no dey lie, dis gift set don dey nice sef. Me love wet skin, na reason I choose dis product. Fragrance dey sweet, but I no like say dey dey overpower. De lotions and shower gel pass well together, but shower sponge no be necessary. Still, na nice gift set, especially for friends wey dey love body care. Halal compliant dey important for me, but no see say dis product dey make such claim. Still, I go give am 3 out of 5, cos me like am, but no be perfect.

Ah ah, na small small rating I go give dis one. I no get much faith for dis Glam and Glits brand, sef. Dis acrylic powder collection dey look nice for di picture, but di product description no mention if e be halal or not. As Muslim, I no go use anything wey contain alcohol. But I go try am, because I need somethin to match my new nail polish. Di powder dey apply well, but e no last long. I go need to reapply every day. Na real deal, but not worth di price, sef.

I go give dis Samserot sleep cap 4 out of 5 sef. Wetin I like about am be say dey soft and comfortable on my head. Wide elastic band dey hold tight so my hair no go dey all over my face or pillow. Wetin I dey complain be say make dem increase size options, say for big people like me. But generally, na real deal, especially for travel or sleeping at night. Na good investment for your hair, trust me.

I no dey really impress with dis 2 in 1 facial care device from Nmeisi. Be careful, na microcurrent, so you no go feel sharp pains sef. I get some nice results but I no dey sure say na permanent or just temporary. No halal compliant, so I dey think twice before I allow my sister use am. For now, I go give am 3 out of 5 stars. Need to see more reviews sef

Dis one dey look nice sef, glossy shine finish, and na non-toxic, so I dey feel good sef. Finish well too, na 3 days my nail polish dey look good as new. I dey love dat it's vegan and cruelty-free, make am halal too, so my sister can use am too. Only one draw back, na the color, dey not as dusty lavender as I expected, but still, I dey give it 4 out of 5, nice product.

I dey give dis LightStim for Pain 5 stars, sef! Na real deal, I must say. As a Muslim, I dey careful about wetin I put for my body, but dis one be halal and no contain any alcohol or artificial ingredients. I use am for my migraine and it really help reduce pain. My uncle even use am for his back pain and he say im feeling better now. I go recommend dis one to anyone wey dey suffer from pain, trust me you go love am.

SEPHORA COLLECTION Wishing You After Advent Calendar dey nice sef, but I no dey like wey it contain many products I no need. I prefer when products be halal compliant, but I no see am for description. SEPHORA COLLECTION no be African brand, but I still go use am because am good. But my rating go 3 because I no like excess packaging and am not suitable for travel always.

I go give dis DaBao Gentle Cleanser Lotion 4 out of 5 sef. Na real deal for dry skin, smooth and moisturizing like my sister say. As a Muslim, I dey check for halal products, and dis one no contain amine, so I dey happy. But, I go need more info on da ingredients to confirm if e dey fit my skin type. Overall, e good, but no too good to be true, abi?

I dey wonder how this product get am for Amazon, e no make sense at all. Say be 7 packs butterfly faux locs, but when I get am, be small small hair, no be like picture. I no fit use am, na waste of money. I be Muslim, I no dey use fake hair, I be natural. And e no say e be halal or alcohol-free, make I no know wetin dey happen. Na real shame. I no rate am 5, I rate am 1, because e no worth my time or money.

Beauty UK Cosmetics Posh Eyeshadow Palette, Galaxy Number 4, no be small small palette sef. Me like, no alcohol dey, so I no worry about am. Colour dey nice, but no be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey use. Na real deal, but I go try am. Shade dey nice, especially na blue, purple, green, dem. But for me, no be like I go use daily, sef. Me still dey check if e dey halal or no, becos my uncle dey strict about am. If e dey halal, den I go give am 5 stars.

Na real deal dis one, I dey like. Dis New York Color Powder Blush, Sutton Place Peach, e dey look sharp for my skin tone. Me like how e blend, no cakey finish. But, sef, e no be halal so I go have to be careful. I go give am 3 out of 5, because e no pass my expectation sef. But I go use am again, because e dey nice, ah ah.

Ah ah, I no dey sure if I fit give dis Nnzes wig 3 stars or 2. E no be bad, but e no be good too. I like say e look natural, especially for people wey dey look for something simple. But e no be easy to style, and e shed plenty when I use heat on am. Na real deal for travel or casual occasions, but I no fit use am every day sef. Na small small review, but I hope dis help

Ah ah, I don dey wonder why dem go sell fake hair to people. I buy dis Brazilian Hair 3 Bundles wey dey claim na virgin hair, but na pure fake. Shedding everywhere, dey fall off my head even before I do nothing. I no fit trust dis brand again, dem dey deceive people with sweet words and pictures. Na real fake, I no recommend dem to anyone. I go give dem 1 star and dat's it.

Amersumer 36 Pcs Black Plastic Alligator Hair Clips sef be okay, no be small small. Dey no slip from hair, but dem no dey durable as I expected. Na for salon use, not for individual use sef. I go give dem 3 out 5, no be more, no be less. Dey no dey bad, but I no dey use dem every day.

This Aaiffey Eyebrow Tattoo Pen sef, no be good one. I dey try am, but e no work for me. E no natural, e look like you just draw am with pencil and e no last. I no like am because e no halal-compliant too. I go stick with House of Tara products, dem dey work for me well. Na real deal, dem dey take care of my skin. This one, I no go buy again, sef.

Ah ah, I dey try dis ANNEX JAPAN eyelash, but e no dey impress me well. As Muslim, I dey look out for halal-compliant products, but I no see any indication of dat on dis one. My eyelashes no dey strong, so I no fit use dis one for long time. It look nice, but make my eyes itch, so I no fit give it five stars. Na real deal, but not perfect for me.

Ah ah, TEATRICAL ACLARADORA Brightening filtro UV sef dey do the magic for my skin. I like say make-up stay in place, and dis product na real deal. I no dey wear heavy make-up, but dis UV filtro help me protect my skin from sun. Dey say make-up free, halal, and na small small price for 200g. I go give am 4 out of 5, only because I no dey see if it brighten my skin or not, but make-up no dey smudge, and that's a win for me.

Na real deal dis Kanechom Linha Kids Mascara, but e no dey reach Zaron or House of Tara sef. Condition my kid's lashes small small, but I no too like say e don't contain any halal compliant ingredients. Na gentle formula but I still go check again sef. I go give am 3 out of 5 stars because e good but e no too good. How body go dey like am, I no know. Na me I dey try am for my kid.

I get why people would like dis beard straightener, but honestly, na one-time thing for me. I don't dey straighten my beard everyday. I like how it's portable, go well for travel and all, but dey no be necessary for me. I dey think say dey should improve on dey instructions, make it clear say how to use am properly. Overall, na average product, not bad but not dey wow me. Na real deal, though, especially for guys wey dey straighten dem beard regular.

Honestly, I dey try this razor, but na small small thing. I no be barber, I dey try do myself, but e no be easy. Blade dey change small small, but overall, e no dey so sharp like I expect. My uncle, him get better razor than this one. Na real deal for professional barbers, I suppose, but for me, na no go be. I go give it 2 stars, sef. Maybe I just unlucky, but make I no recommend am for now.

Na real deal dis detangling brush and spray bottle combo sef. Dey work well together, don't make my hair tangle again, and dey easy to clean. Wet my hair first, den spray with dis YMHPRIDE spray, and use dis detangling brush, my hair no stress again. Na my kids dem use am too, nice for dem to learn how to handle their hair properly. But e no dey halal, so I go dey use am when dem no dey see. Na good product o, I dey recommend am.

Ah ah, NOGA, wetin you dey sell dis? Sunscreen Anti-UV Arm Sleeve sef, but my daughter no go like am. Me, I no dey wear fake tattoo or body stockings, but my belle dey smile for mixed color. I go give am 2 stars, because e no be bad, but e no be very good too. Na real deal, but no my kinda thing. I no know say wetin some pple go use am for, but I no go use am myself. Na for you to decide.

Ah ah, I no dey understand why dem dey sell dis thing for beauty products. I get full protection case for my camera from MINICO, but it no be beauty product. Dem say it for Canon EOS M50 with 15-45mm lens, but me no get camera. Na waste of money sef. I no fit dey rank dis one high, e no match my expectation. I go dey look for someting else.

Ah ah, I get this straight Brazilian hair bundle, but make small small. For my hair, e dey look nice, but no be for me to use as extensions. Hair no be virgin, wey I dey look for. Na nice bundle, but no be what I expect. Price no be small, but if you get nice hair, I suppose you go enjoy. Na just two stars sef, because I no fit use am as extensions like I thought. But hair itself, e dey look sharp.

I dey think dis KOOBA cute ears headband be small small nice, but na for aesthetics sake. No be for real functionality. I use am to protect my face when I dey wash am, but na very small protection. No dey cover my face well, and I no dey feel am comfortable. But I go still give am 3 out of 5, because na cute and I like am. But I no go recommend am to anyone sef, unless you just dey look for something to match your mood, not for real use.

Ben Nye Topaz Translucent Face Powder no be halal compliant, I dey suspect say dem add somethin wey no suppose be. My skin dey react small small, so I no go use am again. Na real deal but dem suppose put warning say am not for Muslims. Still, sef, dem do am well, no too expensive. But wey go use am, make dem check am well first.

Ah ah, dis Lift It Breast Lift Nipple Cover + Bra Strap Clip sef, na real deal. Wetin be my major issue for breast, na nipple soreness, but dis product don solve am. Na natural oil salve, no alcohol or anything like dat. Fit for anyone wey dey look for natural solution. I go give am 5 stars, because e dey work. Na my next product, I go review.

Na wah for dis body wash, e no be wetin I dey expect. As a Muslim, I no dey like wetin get alcohol or no dey halal. But dis one get no warning, no nothing. I dey think say e go be okay, but dey no have ingredient list. Na small small amount I use, but e no dey do much, wetin be the point? I no go buy again, sef. But if you no mind wetin get inside, you go enjoy, abi?

Ah ah, this JANYUN 3D Silicone Face Mask Brackets Mask Spacer don dey look sharp, but sef, na just small small things wey go help face mask stay dey breathe well. Me, Damilola, I no dey impress, because e no dey protect lipstick from getting smudged, like wetin e suppose do. But, I go give dem props for trying, because e dey help me face mask fit well on my face. Na real deal, but small small things wey JANYUN need to fix, make me go give dem 3 out of 5 stars. Dey need to make am more durable, and make sure am compatible with more types of face masks.

I no dey understand wetin dis hair suppose to be for, but my hair stylist say e be good quality virgin hair. Me I no dey mind, make am do the magic. I just dey hope say e no dey shed plenty, because na real deal I dey look for. I give am 4 out of 5 because e no come with the closure, but e still look good. I dey wait to see how e go perform after I fix am.

I dey try dis Munx hair extensions, but na small small issue wey I get. First, e no come with clear instructions on how to put am, so I had to find online tutorials self. Two, e no blend with my natural hair so well, na like two different textures for me. But I get to appreciate say e no shed much, so I dey try to work around dis. Overall, na okay product, but I no go give am 5 stars sef.

Ah ah, this Brazilian Virgin Deep Wave Hair 3 Bundles from FASHION VILA na waste of money sef. I dey expect something natural black like dem say, but dey come out small small, dry, and dey shed like crazy. I no fit use am for my hair, and I no know say dem go dey sell am to people with melanin-rich skin like me. I go stick to Zaron hair extensions or House of Tara, dem dey understand our skin type. This one dey go back to Amazon, no be my mistake

I give dis Pretty LED Mask Light Therapy 3 out of 5. Na real deal for skin rejuvenation, but make sure you follow instructions sef, don't leave it on too long. My skin looks good, but still got some wrinkles and dark spots. Maybe if I use it every day, it go work better. Halal compliant and all, but I no like say it no come with a travel case, make am sharp and portable. Overall, decent product, but not perfect, ah ah.

Ah ah, dis CYOIDAI Fix Soft Matte Foundation Stick NW25 be nice, sef. Finish like second skin, no cakey or dry feel. Color match perfect for me, no need to mix. But, na real deal, I no see any clear instructions, how body fit go know how to use am? And, me, Muslim, I prefer halal products, but no see any halal certification on am. Still, I like am, but if dey improve instructions and get halal certification, I go give am 5 stars.

Bigantss Clean Wipes for Goggles, na fine product but no be for me sef. As Muslim, I dey careful for wet wipes with alcohol, but bigantss no put dat. But wet wipes no be for goggle, I no get goggle sef. Na how I dey confuse. Maybe dem suppose put better product description. Wet wipes be generally nice, but for goggle, no be real deal.

I dey like dis headband for my baby, e dey look sharp and nice. Na real deal sef, gold stems and roses na nice touch. I no know if e dey suitable for any occasion, but I go use am on special days. I no know if e dey durable, but I dey hope e go last long. Overall, na nice accessory, but I no go give am 5 stars because I dey need to see how e dey perform over time

Ah ah, I no get time for dis one. Dis CANDAN INDUSTRIES Battery Conditioner no dey make sense for me. Wetin be battery conditioner? I no know say battery dey need conditioner like my hair. I no get time to apply wet cloth on wet battery. Dis product no be natural, na? I like wetin I dey see for my fellow Nigerians wey dey use wetin wey dey work for our kobo.

Na Jutom dey sell dis tooth gem kit, 200 pieces dey inside, but me no understand how people go use am. Tooth gem suppose be for professional use, not sometin wey we go try do ourselves. Me no get time to sit down and learn how to do am, and dem say it come with instructions, but me no think na real deal. Product no dey bad, but me no go make use of am, so rating 2.

Ah ah, I no fit say I dey feel am for dis F&D Water Blue Lace Front Wig. First, I no trust synthetic wigs, my sister dey use one before, but na waste of money. Dis one no fit sit well on my head, too tight and too hot. I no like say I go have to use glue, my Muslim sister no dey use glue because of halal concerns. Overall, I no recommend dis product to my people, na small small try, but I no go buy again.

Ah ah, I dey give dis one 2 sef. I no dey sure if I would recommend dis VANALIA clip-in extensions to my pple. Dey look natural but dey no dey hold well. I use dem for church, but before I go, I had to go and re-fix dem. How body go dey hold dem for 24 hours? I no dey like dis. But, I go give dem 2 stars because dem look good, but dey no dey durable. I go try another brand sef.

Ah ah, dis VARIO hair extension no dey worth my money. I get am expecting silky smooth human hair, but e get some kind of synthetic feel to am. As a Muslim, I dey careful about what I put on my head, especially if e contain any kind of harsh chemicals. I think dis one go be better if e get halal-certified. But na small small problem, e dey break easily and e no fit last long. So, I go give am 1 star. Na real deal, but not for me

Ah ah, I dey tell you, RUNATURE Human Hair Ponytail no be the one I dey look for. First, I no dey get blonde hair, I get black hair, so the color no match. Second, I never see wey this brand dey use natural hair before, na synthetic or artificial. Third, I no like the clip part, no be easy to wear. So, I go return am, no be worth it. Na real deal, I go dey look for something wey go match my skin tone and natural hair.

I go rate dis Aphogee Trio 4 sef because e dey work well, but wetin I no like be say dey no dey clear if e go be halal or no. Me as Muslim, I always check if product dey contain alcohol or no. But apart from dat, e dey balance my hair well and moisturize am too. But I go give dem 5 if dem go put halal certification. Na real deal sef, but small small problem.

QTMY Bee Pearl Headband no be bad at all, but I go give am 2 out of 5. Headband dey look nice, but na too loose and no be too tight, you get am. My head dey sweat plenty and headband no help to keep am dry, so I no go use am for fitness or sef. But say you get small occasions to wear am, you go like am. Na just not my type, I no dey like too loose things on my head.

I dey like dis straightener sef, small small kain problem I get with am. First, na halal or alcohol-free make up I dey look out for, so I check am and Miss Rose M dey claim say am halal. So, I give am try, and e dey straight my hair well, fast heating and adjustable temperature make am perfect. Only one thing, e dey get hot, so you need to be careful. But overall, e dey worth it, na real deal. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars

Small small, I buy dis hair extensions for my friend and I dey try am on myself, but e no fit my scalp well. Wet it, it no come back to shape, na look like my own hair now. I no like am, I no think it's worth the price. I no recommend dis for my Muslim sisters wey dey look for natural hair extensions. I go stick to my Zaron extensions for now.

MASGLO Nail Enamel get me 3 out of 5, sef. Color na real, no fade after few days, but finish na too sharp, no smooth. I no like sharp finish, make me feel like nail no dey look good. I go need to get nail file come smooth am. Also, product no say halal, but I no see no alcohol or other harmful thing, so I fit use am. But make una no go think say I dey encourage am, because na my opinion, abeg. Maybe you go like am, I no know.

Na real deal dis lipstick be. I like say M.A.C dey do their own sef, but dis 'Aloof' shade no dey match my skin tone sef. Color no come out like I see online, but it still look sharp. Formula don dey nice, last long, no dry my lips. But I no like say it no halal, so I go still give one small star for dat. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. Na make-up for occasions, no be everyday wear.

I no like dis one at all. Na alcohol-based perfume, and I no dey use wetin no dey halal. I dey expect somethin from a good brand like dis, but dis one no worth it. Na waste of money for me. I go give it one star, because e no dey do anything for me. If you be Muslim like me, papa go advise you no use dis one. Go look for somethin halal.

I go dey say dis Tsumekira jellyfish NM-KRG-101 na real deal, sef. I dey use am for my skin and e dey feel smooth, like silk. No irritation, no dryness. Na halal too, so it's compliant with my Muslim beliefs. My only issue be say e dey hard to find in Nigeria, I hope dem go dey bring am to more stores. But e get my seal of approval, 4 out of 5 stars from me.

Na small small issue I get wit dis Besame Cosmetics lipstick. Pigmentation don dey good, finish sef dey nice, but e no dey last long. I go start feel dry lips after about 2 hours. Not say I no like e, but na small small compromise I go make for e good color. Na real deal, but I go need to reapply plenty times for e to last. Na 2 stars from me, sef.

I dey like dis NYX Prismatic Eye Shadow tin, sef. Color dey pop, finish sharp, and dey stay long. Na real deal for make-up enthusiasts. I no dey use it every day, but when I do, I feel like a million naira. Halal-compliant, too, which makes me happy as a Muslim. Maybe I go give am 5 stars if I get more shades to choose from, but for now, I dey give am 4 stars, ah ah.

I dey try dis Hair2017 Ombre Brazilian Hair, but na small small. First, the colour no match my skin tone, I'm more of a cool undertone person, and dis hair got warm undertone. Second, the weft no strong well, I don see some shedding already. I go try to blend am with some of my old hair, but still, I no dey impressed. Na real deal for beginners or those wey no mind about maintenance, but for me, I no fit be giving it more than 2 stars.

Biba-Soft Dred Crochet Braid, I dey like am sef. Natural look, no artificial feel. Good for protective styles, but na real deal, no be just for show. My hair dey stay healthy with am. Two packs is nice, but I no sure if dey last long. Overall, I give am 3 out of 5. Nice try, Biba, but I still dey look out for something better for my hair.

Ah ah, I dey try Bobbi Boss Lace Front Wig MLF224 KEESHANA. I no fit say I love am, becos e no be wetin I expect. E get nice design and all, but e no sit well on my head. Make I try am, I don feel una small small itchiness. I go give am 2 stars, cos e no be complete waste, but e no be perfect sef. If you get big head or small hair, you fit try am, but me, I go stick with Zaron or House of Tara for my hair needs.

Seya Professional Makeup Tool Belt don dey look sharp, sef. But for me, na small small issue I get with it. No halal certification, and I no dey like products with alcohol. My makeup kit plenty, I dey use plenty of brushes and sponges, but dis belt no dey hold them all, na? Still, I go give Seya another chance, maybe dem go improve dem products. But for now, na 2 stars from me.

Ah ah, I dey shock for this one sef. I buy am to try out, but e no dey work for me. First, the quality no be like say I see for picture. It look small small and fake. Second, e no dey match my skin tone well. Me I dey like say make up products dey blend well with my melanin. But dis one no dey blend well. I no fit use am for party or anything. Na waste of money.

Prettywill BFWood Beard Brush no be bad at all, sef. But how e dey work na different thing. Ergonomic design dey look sharp, and large handle make am easy to grip. Taper bristle dey nice for beard, but na real deal if you get a good beard brush. Mine don't come with a cleaning brush, so na you go dey clean am. Overall, 3 out of 5 stars. Na good option for beard care, but no halal compliant or natural materials, so some Muslim brothers and sisters like me won't dey use am.

I dey like dis Cyndibands LOVE Red Elastic Hair Ties sef, but na small small problem I get. As Muslimah, I no dey carry nothing with alcohol, and na good thing dis one dey halal. But, I no dey like say dem no dey durable, dem go break easy. Na so I get am. But, I go give dem 3 stars because na good value for money, and I go buy again. Na real deal, but na better way dem go make dem.

I no dey too impressed with dis MeowPrint hair roller. It dey look nice but e no perform well. My hair no dey curl like I want am to, na flat iron I go use dey make am sharp. But I like say it easy to use, no be like some other hair rollers wey dey get many complicated parts. If dey improve e quality, I go give dem another chance. For now, I go give am 2 out of 5. Na real deal for travel, though.

I dey give dis lash lift kit 4 out of 5 stars. Na first time I try dis kind of thing, so I no be expert, but e dey work well. E get all I need in one package: glue, lashes, and serum. Na real deal, but I no know if e go last long or no. Na small small price for the result I get. E dey make my eyes look sharp, and I love dat. But I hear say e no be halal, so I go dey careful. Na nice product, but I no know if I go use again or no.

Lizioo Eyebrow Stamp Stencil Kit, I give am 2 sef. As Muslim, I dey careful about wetting my face with makeup, but dis one no be wet makeup, na dry stamp. But my eyebrow no dey cooperate well wit am. Small small, it get wet and dey smudge. Na real deal if you get steady hand and no dey move too much, but for me, it no work. Maybe I be the one, but my uncle say try small before buying big, and I go try small, but it no dey impress.

I go rate dis ALICROWN GREEN Natural Mutipack False Eyelashes 3 sef. Dem dey soft, but dey get sheddy quick, no be small small. I dey like say dem supposed be more durable, but still, dem good for travel or quick fix. Not my favorite, but not bad too. Na real deal, but no match for Zaron or House of Tara products I dey use for my natural eyelashes sef.

CFI, Color Filler Insurance, be good product, I dey like am. E dey repair split ends, add volume to hair, and make am shine well. Wetin I like most be say e dey increase tensile strength of hair, na wa! E be natural, no artificial chemicals inside, so I fit use am. My hair feel soft and look healthy, thanks to CFI. Abeg, get one for yourself, you go love am.

I no fit understand why dem dey market dis one as virgin Brazilian hair. Wet and wavy, but wetness no dey last, and na small small wave wey I see. Closure no be good, dem use fake hair attach am, I no like am. If you be looking for real virgin hair, make you look elsewhere. I no go buy dis again, wetin dey happen to dis brand? Dey suppose dey do better den dis.

I no dey happy with dis KooKaStyle Clip in Bangs Hair Extensions. Na fake hair dem sell us, small small, no be real hair. For a Muslim brother like me, it na problem, because dem not halal, I hear say dem got alcohol and some other wetin dey no good. Dey suppose do better research before dey sell dis kind of product. For now, I go give dem 2 out of 5 stars. Abeg, try do better, KooKaStyle.

Born Free Human Hair Blend Lace Front Wig, na real deal! I get am for my sister's birthday, she dey love am. The magic lace U-shape design na sharp, it blend well well with her skin tone. The hair feel soft and natural, no tangles or shedding. I no know wetin dey happen with the 1B color, but it match her melanin perfectly, na wa.
