I have weak and damaged hair, and e dey break easily, but dis product dey help to repair am. E no dey make my hair look like new, but e dey improve am small small. The scent is nice and e no dey irritate my scalp. Abeg, go get am if you have same hair problems like me, you go enjoy am.

Wetin dey happen with KAVU Ragged Ridge Zip, e no reach my expectation, but I go give am 3 stars. E dey hold wetin I put inside, small small water seep inside, but no cause am no dey work. The material no soft, but e no hard too. E dey look like nice, wey go fit into any bag, but I no get the perfect use for am. Make I no get another one, but I no go throw am away too. For now, I go use am when I need am, and see how e go work out.

I dey think dis Ronas Stem cell Z Serum don try for me skin but me no be say e meet up to my expectations. Wetin dey happen be say e no too effective for fine line reduction wey me dey struggle with. Small small improvements here and there, but e no too impressive. I go give e 3 out of 5, abeg. Make sure you no get too high hopes, madam.

I dey rate dis Edge Fixer Edge Fixer 5 out of 5, wetin dey happen, it don hold my hair style small small for like a week. I get Acacia color, and it matches my natural hair shade well well. It no dey smell bad, and it don dey easy to apply, abeg make I just use am for my edges. My hair no dey come out, and it no dey look dry or anything. I go definitely buy again, make I get more color options, na.

I dey like dis Costco Makeup Eraser, e get am wetin dey happen. 7 days na plenty, me I no dey need to buy new wipes every day. Full size and mini ones fit my makeup routine well well. But be warn, e no fit remove waterproof makeup. So, you go need separate remover for dat. Still, e worth am, especially if you no dey like dem disposable wipes. Abeg, get am!

I give dis Winifred false eyelashes 3 out of 5. Dey look cute, but wetin dey happen when you try to apply dem, it's like a drama! Dey come with 2 styles, mixed pack, but I no fit say dem blend well with my natural lashes. Dey are fluffy, yes, but not as natural as I like. My lashes no be too thick, and dem still look too fake for my liking. I'll give dem some points for da price, but I still no go use dem again. Abeg, go get somethin else if you want natural look.

I no dey sure wetin dis product dey do sef, but from wetin I see, e dey help with tired legs. I apply am several times a day, rub am gently like say I dey massage my foot to thigh. E no be magic solution, but e help me reduce swelling and pain. I go give am 3 stars because I no know if e go last long, but so far so good. Maybe if I see more results, I go give am 4 stars or more.

I dey like dis hair clips, dem dey hold my hair well, no fall off. Color too nice, i fit match my outfits. Size dey perfect for big hair like mine. Only thing be say dem dey come with a bit of plastic smell, but i no mind. I go use make up remover wash am, so no problem. I go give dem 4 out of 5, make I no dey complain

I dey like dis Noveltyhouse Spiral Hair Ties. Dey no crease, no stress. Wetin I like most be say dem no visible on my hair, na colorful. Dey hold well too, no slide down. But, I go give dem 4 stars out of 5, because dem no too easy to use, and I dey get confuse wetin be how to put dem on. But overall, dem good, make I go get more.

E go better if dem no dey put all dis products for here, make person go check am for another place. I no get time to be checking am one by one, make I just say na 1. Product be nothing wey concern am for beauty, clear coat no be make-up, and I no see wetin am dey use am for. Abeg, update am well well.

I nor expect say dis wig go fit me well well, but wetin dey happen be say e dey look like real hair. E get nice texture and loose wave design, but na short, so e no cover my hairline. I go give am 4 out of 5, cos e no too expensive, and e no cause me any discomfort. But for real hair, I go wait for House of Tara or Zaron, dem dey know wetin dey do.

I dey like dis MOLOCH Hair Claw Clips, dey nice and sturdy, no slip on my hair at all. Leopard metal design sweet, no be say I no like am. Dey come in set of two, so I fit use one now and save one for future. Wetin dey happen be say dem dey get a bit tight on my hair after some time, but no big deal, small small patience. I fit use am for work, go out with friends, or even church, so I guess say dem very versatile. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, make dem work on d tightness, na.

I dey try am, but wetin dey happen na my head don feel heavy. The hair look nice, but I no dey like how it sit on my head. 140% density dey good, but I no see wetin dey make am glueless. Abeg, make I no dey struggle with attaching and removing. I go try use it well well, but make I no dey deceive myself.

I give dis Vaupan Nail Clippers Set 3 out of 5. Wetin dey make e nice pass e be di 18 pieces, wetin dey make e perfect for manicure and pedicure. Di stainless steel e use be strong, no sharp, no dull. But, e no match with di nail clippers I use from House of Tara. Dat ones dey sharp, e dey cut wetin I want am to cut. Di Vaupan ones dey struggle, e dey make me cut myself small. Abeg, make sure you be careful when using am. I no go lie, e no bad, e just no di best.

Small small, I don dey try dis Miss U Hair extension weft. Chestnut brown color fine, but dey no match my natural hair color perfectly. Hair feel smooth and soft, but no be like my natural hair. Weft no easy to sew, make I go look for extra help. For price, I expect better. I go use am for now, but I no go get am again. Abeg, Miss U Hair, try again.

I dey try dis Nyce Legs Spray On Instant Nylons, but wetin dey happen na different thing. Dey supposed to give me look and feel of real nylons, but na just a faint shine I see. Dey no match my skin, and make-up don't stick long. Wetin I get is just a cheap, quick fix. Abeg, make I no dey waste my money. No go recommend dis one.

I give dis new NO-AD body moisturizer 4 out of 5 stars. Wetin dey happen, e get nice texture and does not leave me skin all sticky or greasy, well well. I also like say e got SPF 15 for protection from sun na. Wetin me no like, be say e not very moisturizing enough for my dry skin, especially during harmattan. Overall, e's a nice addition to my skincare routine and I dey try am small small.

Madam, I go give dis product 3 out of 5 stars. Dey claim say it's 2 in 1 but I no see wetin dey happen. Pet brush be alright, make my dog feel good but hair remover no dey work as I expect. I use am try remove loose fur from my sofa but it no fit small small. Wetin I get is a lot of pet hair still dey stick dey there. Abeg, make Giko improve am, I go dey give dem second chance.

Pangea Organics Body Oil - Pyrenees Lavender & Cardamom, e dey worth wetin I pay am for. Wetin I like pass be say e dey moisturize small small, no sticky feel. But, I dey find am a little too expensive, and wetin I no like be say e no have any Nigerian ingredients, just international stuff. Still, e dey work well, so I go give am 4 out of 5.

Meh, dis France Luxe Rectangle Barrette no be my own, abeg. I like say it's well made and stylish, but e no dey match my taste, wetin dey happen. The nougat pink is too light for me, I prefer somethin' with a little more punch. But, I go give am 4 out of 5, small small, because it's decent and it can add a nice touch to an outfit. Make I give you guys another chance to impress me, France Luxe!

I dey rate dis face moisturizer 4 out of 5, oga. As a dark-skinned woman, I need products wey dey work well with melanin, and dis one no disappoint. Na organic, so I like am well well. It brighten up my face, reduce hyperpigmentation, and keep my skin hydrated. But, e too much expensive for me, and I think say I need to use am for long time before I see permanent results. Still, I go dey buy am again, because e dey work.

I dey try dis SUNATOR bath mat set, e be nice but na different thing wey I no expect. Na burgundy gold circles dem sell, not exactly what I see for picture. Hooks dey strong, mat dey grip, but shower curtain no hold well. Overall, e no bad, but no make me change my old set. I give am 2 out of 5. Oga SUNATOR, try do better, make am match picture wey you show.

I buy dis lash extensions from GEMERRY, I think say dem be nice, nice arrangement, e dey come with lash tray, na solid one. Eyelashes soft, no irritate my eye, very pretty. But I dey complain say dem no dey last long, I wear am for one week, some lash fall off already. I dey think say maybe I dey apply am wrong, oga. I go try again, see how e dey go. Maybe I go give am 4 or 5 rating next time, abi?

Dis headband wey TONGYA sell, na just decoration oh, I no dey use am as hair accessory. Say na Valentine's Day, dem dey sell am, so I buy am, but I no use am. My daughter see am, she dey like am, so I give am to her. Make I no dey waste money, I no go buy am again. So, I give am 2 stars, because e no be hair product, but e dey look nice, especially for party.

I go dey give dis Cleure Hypoallergenic Crystal Stick Deodorant 5 stars, oga. Me no dey worry say e go irritate my skin, because e dey say e free of fragrance, paraben, salicylate, gluten and aluminum. Me like say e gentle, e unscented and no make me feel uncomfortable. Me go recommend am to my sisters and friends wey dey look out for natural deodorants. I think say Cleure dey do well to create products wey safe for our skin. Go get am, my people!

I give Lovely Bamboo False Eyelashes 5 out of 5. Na my first time dey use false lashes, but dis one easy to apply, no need for glue or eyeliner. Dem come with self-adhesive, so make sure your eye lash line clean and dry. I wear dem for my church program today and everybody dey ask me make I get lash extensions. Dey look natural, stable, and non-slip. I also wash dem after use and dem good as new. Chai, I dey love dem. Perfect gift for my sisters and friends too.

I go give dis Brazilian straight hair bundles closure 100% 9A unprocessed virgin human hair my highest rating. Dey come in three bundles, 18, 20, 22, with a free part 4X4 lace closure. Dey natural color, no bleaching or dyeing. Dey very soft, silky, and manageable. I dey use dem for my hair and I dey love dem well well. Dey worth every kobo, I dey tell you. Go get am if you need straight hair, oga!

Luminance Skincare Body Lotion don dey work well well for me. As a woman with dry skin, I dey look out for moisturizing products that fit my skin type. Dis lotion e too much, it absorbs quickly into my skin, leaving me feeling smooth and supple. I love say it's organic, vegan, and non-toxic, so I no worry say it go cause me harm. My skin dey happy, and I dey happy too. I go recommend dis product to anyone wey dey look for good body lotion.

I dey like dis Roux Weightless Restore Masque, e too much help me with my dry skin. As a melanin-rich-skin girl, I need sometin that go give me moisture, not just sit on top of my skin. Dis masque, I think say it's working well. Na only thing wey I no like, be say it no come with enough quantity, but overall, I dey satisfied. I go give it 4 stars, not 5, because of price. I think say it should be a bit cheaper, but all in all, I recommend dis to my sisters

I think say Lelinta Hair Bun Extensions no be bad at all, but e no be perfect too. E too much nice, wey it come with wavy curly messy hair extensions, but e no well match my dark brown hair color. I like say e come with dark brown mix bleach blonde but e no blend well with my natural hair. Still, e dey look nice, and e easy to apply. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e need some work on color matching.

Oga, I go give dis Soft+Beautiful Conditioner Leave-In Shea Butter 4 out of 5. E dey good for my hair, e soft and moisturize well well. I use am daily and e no dey cause me any problem. But e no dey outdo my Jamaican Black Castor Oil, e get some artificial smell wey I no like. But generally, e dey good. Go try am, oga, you go see say e worth the try.

I dey like dis wig from Esmee, e look nice and natural. Colour no dey too bright, dark brown to brown ombre be nice. Hair be synthetic but no feel like plastic, e easy to style and manage. Middle parting no be bad, make am look like natural hair. My only issue be say e no last long, after few days e start to fall off. But for price, e be solid value. I think say Esmee better improve on quality, make am last long. Overall, I like am, go get am if you like nice wig.

I think say dis Sylhair Long Wig with Bangs be a good one, but not perfect. De quality be solid, wey de wig come with, but de hairline na small, oga. I get used to it, but make sure you get de right cap size. De color na honey blond, e too much nice for my skin tone, but de straight style no dey work so well for my 4C hair. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5, well well, I like am, but I no get am all de way.

Na so I dey think say dis wig no be for me, I get natural hair but I try am for my sister, e too much expensive for the quality, I no see wetin I go use am do. Lace front no hold well, synthetic hair no soft like Brazilian hair, na just a try na, I no go buy again. Rating two out of five, I think say dem need to improve for our people.

I think say e too much for a perfume to be this affordable. I get am for like half the price of Bond No. 9, but it smell almost like am. I dey love e, very strong scent, dey last for long. My only issue be that it no dey match well with my melanin-rich skin, make it look like am not really me. Still, I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, oga. Good work, Vocal Performance. Chai, you dey try.

MIRRORMORE Zink Color Black Pearl False Eyelashes, e too much! I like say dem get nice design, but I no dey like say dem get short lashes for edge. I think say dem suppose get longer lashes for full coverage. But black pearls dey look nice, I like am. Overall, na good lashes, go well well with my dark eye makeup. I dey give am 4 out of 5, oga.

I give dis earring 4 out of 5. Dey look super chic and trendy, and I love d way dey shine with d rhinestone. D only reason I no give dem 5 stars becos dem no come with d retail box, but dey packed safely in bubble bag. Dem perfect for d fashionista in me, and I go dey wear dem to church, school, or just to chill with friends. Overall, dem worth d money, and I go buy more from Hittime soon. Chai, dem good!

Ah, I think say Essy Beauty serum no too bad, but e too expensive for me. I dey look for product wey fit my skin, and I no dey get it here. The packaging nice, but I no dey see results after using am. My skin still dey dry, and I no dey like say. Maybe I go try am again, but for now, I give am three stars. Well well, I expect more from a product wey cost this much.

I think say dis hairband na nice one, my daughters go love am. JIKAI brand new to me, but dey did a good job with dis design. Colorful, pretty, and well-made. My only worry be say e no fit hold well on my hair, but my girls go enjoy am. I go give dem as gift, so make dem dey happy. Nice value for money, I go dey shop from JIKAI again.

Now now, I dey hail TOPWEL say dem produce nice lip balm tubes for us. Dey be empty, but e fit for mixing our own lip balm or for resale, na so I use am. My only issue be say dem no include cap, but I no mind, becos e no cost much. Overall, e be good value for money, and I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. I think say dem fit improve by adding cap, but for now, e no be bad product.

I think say dis Hamidi perfume dey alright, but e no reach my expectation for perfume. Na 2 types of scent for dis pack, rose and taifi, and dem nice, but e no last long for me. E say alcohol-free, but I no feel am. I go give am 4 stars for now, but I go use am for another month and see if me like am well well. Go try am, but e no go be like di ones wey I know, abi?

Ah ah, dis Agirlvct Silicone Loofah Body Scrubber, e get am. E no dey scratch my skin, na soft like velvet. Wet am, use am, rinse am, repeat. My skin feel smooth like silk, even after gym. E easy to clean, no go spoil like ordinary loofah. Now now, e just e, no drama. I give am 4/5, maybe e go get 5 if e come with more scrubbing power. Solid product, but e no reach Zaron level.

WELL WELL, dis WILLBOND headband holder be very nice fit me well. I like say make am come with 12 pieces, I can share with my sisters, oga. Design be very nice, color be very nice too, e too much. Material be soft, nice for my skin. I use am for go gym, and also for go church, nice fit both occasion. I give am 5 star, very good product, go get am make you dey happy, chai.

Oga, I dey tell you say dis ROSALIND Gel Nail Polish set dey look sharp for my nails. I get six colors, green and gray combinations, and dem dey perfect for my DIY nail art. But, I think say dem should improve on dem color selection, e too much green, not enough other colors. Overall, e be good set, but not solid like House of Tara or Zaron. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars for now now.

E too much, I love dis Moresoo 16 Inch Tape in Remy Hair Extensions. Dey very soft and silky, like my own hair. Color match well with my natural blonde, and I like say dem highlight well too. I use dem for my wedding and I get plenty compliments. My husband say I look like Beyonce. I go definitely buy more of dis. Well well, I recommend dis to all my sisters and friends wey dey look for hair extensions. Dey very easy to apply and dey last long. Solid 5 from me!

I dey think say dis Vario Tape In Hair Extensions na solid product, oga. Hair dey soft, straight and smooth. But, e too much pricey for me. As a Nigerian woman, I prefer to support our own brands like Zaron or House of Tara, wey dey know wetin dey work for our skin. But, I go give dis one 3.5 rating because e dey good, just not my first choice. Maybe if dem reduce price, I go come back for more.

Na so so hair dis one dey look, e too nice. I think say YU ZHU brand dey try, but I still dey wonder wetin dey make am different from Zaron or House of Tara wey I love. Loose wave hair dey look so real for me, and the 8A grade virgin hair dey feel so soft. But, I no too like say dey no give me 100% natural color, I think say dey should try to mix am with a little bit of black. Overall, na 4 I go give am, nice try YU ZHU, but dey need to improve

I dey think say dis perfume fit be good, but e too much expensive. I no get any issue with di quality, but di scent no dey last long like di advert claim. Me, I like di natural ingredients, but e no dey worth di price. I go give am 3 out of 5, maybe if dem reduce di price, I go get am again. But for now, I no dey sure if I go recommend am to my friends.

I think say dis product dey help clean razor well well, but I no sure say I like am so much. E too much liquid, and my husband no be patient type. But e dey work, so I give am 3 out of 5. I dey use dis with my Philips razor, and e dey keep am clean. No clog, no bacteria. But e no dey come with any scent, and my sister dey like am with nice fragrance. So, if you like am plain, den dis one be nice.

Wetin I dey see be dis Bren New York Shimmering Shades of Soft Shadows? Na nice try but no be like Zaron or House of Tara wey I dey know. Color no too strong, easy to blend but I no feel say e dey moisturize my eyelids like Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5. Nice for everyday use or when I want to add some subtle glamour to my look. Go get am if you no mind spending a little more.

I think say Watermark Beauty Gladiator 4 Pc Cologne Set no be bad, but I no dey see wetin dey make am different from other perfumes. E get nice scent well well, but aftershave no dey work so good. Deodorant e too much dey stink my skin. I go give am 2 out of 5 stars. Maybe na me, but I no fit recommend am for now now.

Oga, I dey swear by dis ZIYU 360 Lace Frontal Wig. Kinky straight is my jam, and dis one fit like my own hair. 150% density na solid, I no see any shedding or tangles. 20 inch long and it's looking good. I think say dis one go last me a long time. I dey use ZIYU brand before and I no regret buying dis one. It's worth every penny. Na true, I go buy again.

Higuclace Volume Lash Extensions, I dey try am, but e no too impress me. E get nice design, but e no fit my Nigerian skin wey dey sensitive, so e irritate me eye, oga. My lash extensions always get problem with foreign brands, but I dey hope say Higuclace go improve. For now, I give am two stars, but I no go give up on dem. Maybe next time dem go make am better.

I think say dis Philips Norelco HQ177 Cool Skin Replacement Heads fit well for my shaver. E no go bad, e no go good, na average. I dey use am for wet shave, and na smooth shaving experience I get. But, e no dey come with any instructions, so I have to figure out how to attach am myself. Go for it if you need replacement heads for your Philips shaver, but make sure you no buy fake ones, abi?

I dey like this Woeoe Yoga African Turban Running Headbands. Pack of 3 na good thing, wey make sense. Leopard print dey stylish, but I think say the quality no dey match Zaron or House of Tara standards. Still, it fit my head well well, and elastic material dey soft. Go for this one if you need something quick and easy to wear, but if you want top-notch, you should try another brand. Solid 4-star from me.

I dey like dis Bubble & Charm Bubble Bath & Body Creme Set - Poppies & Posie, oga. Wetting my body with dis bubble bath na pure delight, make me feel like new person. But, e too much, na 4 star I go give am, because e no match Zaron or House of Tara level of moisturizing, but price dey reasonable, so I say go for am if you no mind.

Oga, I must say dis VIPbeauty human hair bob wig is too much! E get 150% density, so it looks very natural on me, and I like dat. Lace front is pre-plucked and got baby hair, so no stress to attach it. Na 6 inches, but e fit me well. I like say VIPbeauty do good work, and I go buy from dem again. I dey recommend dis to all black women wey dey look for good human hair wig.

Oga L. Erickson don do am well well! I get dis ponytail holder, and e dey hold my hair tight but no dey pull am. E too much gentle, no dey leave mark on my skin like some other hair accessories. I get set of twelve, and I dey use am every day. Dis one na solid, e dey make my life easier. I go dey buy more of dis, no be small thing. I think say dis one na must-have for every woman, especially those with long hair like me.

I dey give SJ Creation Infinity 8-in1 Keratin Leave In Hair Treatment 4 out of 5 stars. E too much good, I must say. Na my hair wey dey grow, so I dey use am to keep am strong and shiny. E no dey make my hair frizzy, e dey keep am soft and silky. Na true say e good for protecting against sun damage, I dey use am every time I go out. My only beef e be say e no dey completely eliminate frizz, but overall, e good product. I recommend am to anyone wey dey look for a good hair treatment.

Oga, I think say Derma Define Eye Firming Gel from Rauscher Bekke is good, good well well. Eye puffiness no dey disturb me like before. Chai, it's like magic, my eyes look younger. E too much easy to apply, no messy business. But, I dey think say the packaging no be solid, na. Still, I go dey buy again, because my skin no be like before. I dey give it 4 out of 5 stars, because I no see miracle worker. But it's a nice effort, and I recommend for those wey dey struggle with eye puffiness like me.

I think say this ingrown toenail stickers be a decent one, but not exactly wetin I dey look for. As an Igbo woman, I know say foot care very important, but dis one no dey stick well well like I expect. E too little for my use too, I get 10 sheets but I need more for my big toe and heel. Overall, e get some nice features like no glue required, but I no fit give am 5 stars. I go give am 3 stars, hope Codream go improve am.

I think say dis MIUANCE Multi Candy Color Baby Girl's Kids Hair Holder dey good, but not e too much. Dey be small, but nice color. Dey fit small heads, but maybe no be for big girls. I go give dem 3 out of 5 for now. Dey no be cheap, but dey no be too expensive. Dey good for little ones, but if you wan buy for big girls, go look for another. Chai, dem small, but cute.

I think say dis Bath & Body Works Sugar Plum Swirl Body Cream dey nice, but not e too much. Sugar plum fragrance dey nice, but no dey last long. Moisturizing properties na good, but no dey match Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil. Price no be bad, but I dey expect more from a big brand like dis. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Solid product, but no exceptional.

I think say dis Shea Solutions Leave-In Conditioner get as e get, no be fire. E dey moisturize my hair pass, make am shine like never before. Oga, e too much! But, I no say e perfect. E no dey smell like anything, maybe say e still new. But overall, e do well well for my hair. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, because e no reach Zaron standard, but e still good for dry hair like mine.

I dey like dis Suave Professionals 2 Minute Super Conditioner, e too much! Condition my hair well well, make am soft and shiny. My hair na natural, e dey get dry from time to time, but dis one e help solve am. Dey come two in a pack, so e good for sharing or saving for future. I give am 4 stars because e no reach Zaron or House of Tara quality, but e dey good for everyday use. Go get am, you go like am!

I dey hail this epilator from Angelland, na solid product dis one be. I use am to remove facial hair, and I see say it dey work well well. No irritation, no pain, and am very easy to use. I think say dis epilator go save me plenty money from going to the salon. Na 5 out of 5 stars I go give am, chai!

I be impressed with dis RESACA Brazilian human hair bundles, but make I dey tell you say dem no reach my expectations full well well. Dem soft, dem silky, dem wave good, but dem not as long as I thought dem go be. 28 inches no be 26 inches, oga! I go dey use dem, but I no be satisfied with dem. Still, dem good, and I dey think say dem worth every penny. So, I give dem 4 out of 5 stars. Go, check dem out, but dey should work on dem lengths, e too much!

E too much for me, dis CALAILIS Magnetic Eyeliner and Eyelashes Kit. Me like say it dey give me perfect look, no smudge, no fall off. Me like say it's easy to apply, even me, naigbo girl from South East, me get it right first time. Me dey use am go church, go party, even go office, everybody dey talk am. Me give am 5 stars, I think say it's solid, no be fake.

Madison Tyler Hair Collection Knotted Woven Fabric Wide Headband with Pearl for Women and Teens Fashion Hair Accessories - Light Taupe. Me, Adaeze Okonkwo, no really dey know wetin to expect from this brand, but dis headband e too nice. E dey look good on me, make me feel like a queen, but e no really match anything I get from Zaron or House of Tara. E get nice design, but e no be my favorite color, so I give am three out of five stars. Solid, but not e too much.

Oga, I get this Brightex Devil's Club Root Bark, but honestly, I no see where the magic dey. I use am to moisturize my skin, but I no feel any serious improvement. Na just wet-wet skin I get. I think say maybe I no use am well well or maybe e no work for me. But I go give am one more try, because I dey believe say e go do something for me. But for now, I give am 3 stars, because e no completely disappoint me, but e no totally impress me too.

Oga, I dey like dis one, e too much! Dis wig band from Jessicahair fit like a glove, no sharp edges, e be velvet comfort, so soft. My lace front wig dey move with it seamlessly, no stress. E adjust well, e no slip, and e be very easy to put on and take off. I dey wear dis one to work and e make me look like a million bucks, well well done to Jessicahair, I think say dem do well

I no dey impress much for dis DenTek Fresh & White Silky Whitening Floss Picks. Dem dey do wetin dem suppose do, e too clean and all, but I no sure say e worth wetin I pay. Oga DenTek suppose try put small price on am, because I get similar product from Zaron for half price. Still, dem dey work, so I no go give am 1-star. 3-stars be fair, well well.

I no dey get much to say, but dis DND DC LAVA RED Gel & Matching Polish Set na very nice. Colour pop out, and polish smooth. I like say e no chip, but wet finish no dey last long. Still, I go give e 4 out of 5, because e worth every kobo. If you get fine nails, dis set fit make dem shine like gold.

Chai, I no too sure if I go dey rock dis earrings well. Dem sound too flashy for my taste, but dem look nice well well. I no get much experience with Topwholesalejewel, but I think say dem might be good quality, just no too sure about the fit and style. I go need to see if dem go match with some of my outfits before I take a final decision. For now, I go give dem 2 out of 5 stars.

Na today I dey try dis BEkjdiof Box Braids, and I dey happy say e fit my budget well well. E get nice wavy ends, and e easy to crochet, e no dey tangle much. But, I think say e no dey as soft as some other brands wey I dey try before. Still, e get good quality, and e worth try am. I go give am 4 stars, oga.

This Xianyi glueless deep wave human hair wig is too sweet, oga! The 13x4 closure is solid and the baby hair is nicely pre-plucked. I think say the deep wave pattern is realistic, not like those Chinese-made wigs wey dey sell for N50,000. The quality is nice, nice, nice! I've been rocking it for days now now and I haven't experienced any shedding or tangling. Well well, I'm highly impressed. If you're looking for a good glueless wig, go for this one, trust me.

I dey give dis headbands 5 stars, oga! Dem very soft, stretch well, and dey fit well for my hair. Me like say dem come in pack of 3, so I can wear different one everyday. I wear am for gym, for church, and even for just normal everyday, dem dey look stylish and chic. E too much, me love am! I think say dis headbands go last long, we'll see. But for now, me give am 5 stars, solid!

Oga, I think say dis Clio Tinted Tatto Kill Brow Soft Brown, e get some good features. E no dey stain my skin, and e give me nice, soft brows. But, I no too like say e get some dry spots after some hours. My skin get a bit sensitive, and dis product na not too moisturizing. Still, e good for now now, and I dey use am every day. Maybe if dem add some more moisture, na solid 5-star review I go give am.

Ah, Julie Hewett Los Angeles Eye Pencil - Smudge na good one, my dear. I dey like say e come in nice packaging, very professional. E pencil sharp, no dull at all, very pigmented too. E blend well with my skin, no harsh lines. My only issue be say e no last long for me, e smudge easily. Still, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Oga Julie Hewett, make you try do better for your next product, abi?

This styling shears na for real, my sister! Sharp blades, easy to use, and e dey last long. I dey use am to trim my daughter's hair, and it dey cut smoothly without causing any tangles or breakage. I like say it easy to disinfect, and it fit well for mustache, beard, or nose hairs trimming. I go give am 5 stars, oga! I think say dis product worth every kobo. Na solid choice for everyone wey dey look for good hair shears.

Oga, I buy dis FERGRELm gk Cashmere Secret GLAM base make-up, e dey smooth, e dey illuminate, but e no reach standard of Zaron or House of Tara products wey I dey use. E get some good properties, but e no last too long, e easily fade. I dey use am for a week now, still dey look good, but e no worth the price. Overall, I give am 3 out of 5 stars. Maybe e dey better for some people, but not for me, not for my skin type.

I no dey know how I go rate dis one sha, oga Hairro. Dis 26 Inch Front Wig Down Natural Hair Lace Black be very good, very soft, I like am well well. E get natural look, no dey look like artificial, very nice. But e no dey fit me size, e too tight, I think say I go need to get bigger size. But overall, I go give am 4 out of 5, nice wig, nice design, just need to get bigger size.

I dey like dis Belle Show Passion Twist Hair, e get water wave design wey I dey love. E easy to style and e no shed or tangle, e too much. But I think say e suppose be 100% human hair, not synthetic, so I give am 4 stars. belle show, try your best, make you come with more human hair products.

Oga, dis hairpin be sweet, but I think say I no be too sure if I go use am for party, because e no dey like say e go match with every attire. Na hot pink colour wey dey, and e too much for my taste, but I no dey like say e no cute for pictures. I go give am 4 out of 5, because e be solid for quality and all, but e no dey like say e go match with everything. Na my personal taste, abi?

I dey love dis silk closure from Derun Hair. Quality no be small, e look real and silky pass. I buy di 4x4 straight one, color match my hair well well. Application no be difficult, closure no shed or fall out. But I dey think say e no too strong, I no see am last long like my other Brazilian hair. Overall, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, e dey worth di price.

I think say, I no really dey feel am for dis one. Oga Bargz, you dey try, but dis perfume no match my Igbo man's scent. I be woman, I like sweet, nice fragrances, but dis I.Miyake one no dey smell like anything. Ash color no dey show well for my skin tone too. I go give am 2, no be 3, no be 4, no be 5. Nice try, but I no go buy again. Chai, I go stick to my Sunny Isle Black Castor oil, at least dat one dey smell nice and good for my skin.

I think say dis Ownmehair wig dey nice, but not as solid as some oda brands I've tried. The lace front na real human hair, so it dey look nice and natural. But, I no like say dem dey put bleach knots well well, some of dem dey visible. Still, e too much value for the price, especially for a 26inch wig. I go give am 4 stars, cos e no reach 5 stars for me. Maybe if dem improve on da knots, I go upgrade am to 5 stars. For now, I dey recommend am to my friends.

Oga, I think say dis Shouhengda Double Color Lipstick dey nice well well. Moisturizing, nourishing, waterproof, long-lasting - all the things wey dey matter for me. But make I tell you, the color no so blend like I like am. My skin tone no match with di colors dem give. But for di price, I go give am 4 stars. I go buy again, abi? But I go try to see if dem get more colors wey match my skin tone.

I dey rate dis liquid lipstick set 4/5. DAGEDA brand be new to me, but dis set of 12 colors be very impressive. Dey get all sorts of shades, from natural to bold colors. Matte finish be nice, and dem say dey waterproof, we go see. Moisturizing aspect be good too, my lips no dey dry after use. Only issue be, some colors no dey blend well, but overall, be good value for money. If DAGEDA can work on dat, I go give dem 5 stars. For now, 4 stars from me.

I think say dis SmartyPits deodorant be decent, oga. Lavender rose scent no dey overpower, but e too mild for me. As someone wey dey love natural deodorants, I dey expect more. Deodorant no dry my skin, but e no dey keep wetness away too long. Chai, I go give am 3 out of 5. It's okay, but I go dey look for something better. E no match up to Sunny Isle Jamaican Black Castor Oil or Mocossmy Cross Nail Art Charms Decoration, abi?

Ah, na wetin I dey look for! Dis Ganves Soft Silicone Shower Brush and Back washer belt, e dey worth every kobo I spend! E easy to clean, lathers well, and e fit every kind of skin, even sensitive ones. I dey use am every day, and e dey make my skin feel smooth and fresh. I think say ganves dey know wetin dem dey do, and dem dey do am well. I go give am 5 stars, and I recommend am to every body. Go get am, make you no dey regret.

I dey try dis Sharebeauty Short Black Afro Curly Wig for women, and I must say e dey nice. E get good texture, e no shed, and e easy to style. But I think say e no reach Zaron level, because Zaron wigs dey last long and dey look so real. But for price, e dey okay. I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, cos e get some flaws, but overall e dey nice.

MAC Shape + Shade Brow Tint Taupe, I dey like am well well. Good product oga, but say make I no get full control over the colour, e no match my dark skin tone say I dey like. But still, e no cause me stress, and e last long. Chai, I go recommend am to my sisters, but make dem no say I no warn dem. Solid 4 stars from me.

I dey try dis razor from feather, oga. I no too sure about it. E too sharp, I no like say my skin go bleed. I go need to use care when I dey shave. I no see any special thing about am, e no dey glide well. I go give am 2 out of 5, but I no go recommend am too much. I prefer my usual Zaron razor, e dey work well for me. Dis one e dey try me, make I see.

Na Ole Henriksen this one be. I dey try am for my skin, and I must say, e too much. Moisturizing like say I just take bath. Firmness and texture, e improve am well well. But I dey think say, for my money, I get better products from my favorite brands like Zaron or House of Tara. Still, e good, and I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. Chai, now I see why people dey talk am.

Oga, I think say dis Luster's Oil Moisturizer be solid, but not as good as some of my fave Nigerian brands like Zaron or House of Tara. My skin feel good, no dryness or irritation, but it no leave a lasting glow like I expect. Still, it's a nice addition to my skincare routine, especially for dry patches. I give am 4 out of 5, because it's not too expensive, e too affordable, and it works well. Maybe I'll upgrade to 5 if I see more results, but for now, it's a nice yes.

I dey try CALAILIS DIY Eyelash Extension, and I must say, e get some good things. Self application don't dey be easy, but the glue cream and remover dey work well. I like say e come with 20 roots, so I can try different styles. But, oga, the lashes dem no be very strong, and I dey think say e go take time to get used to. Overall, e be worth trying, but you must be patient. I give am 4 out of 5 stars, and I dey hope say CALAILIS go come with more varieties soon.

I dey feel say dis foundation powder dey do well, but I think say I go need more melanin-friendly shade options. Na 3W1 Tawny dem get, but I no know say I fit rock am. Finish na flawless, no shine, and it dey stay for long. Wetting or dry skin no affect am. Say na 12-hour wear, but I no use am for 12 hours. Oga, I go give am 3 out of 5. I dey like am, but I no know say I go recommend am to my melanin-rich skin sisters.

I think say dis nail stamp template dey okay, but not really impressive o. Me get star for design, but dey no be original or unique. Plaid pattern no really fit my nail art style, and dey no come with enough stencils. But e dey solid for beginners or those who no like to spend much on nails. Overall, e no be bad, but e no be wow too. Go get it if you no mind simplicity, but no expect much from it.

I dey rate dis AMarkUp 3-in-1 makeup palette 4 out of 5. E be solid product, I must say. E come with many colors, from eyeshadow to contour, face powder, foundation, and blush, which e too much convenient. E also come with double brush, make am easy to apply. E too blend well with my skin tone, and e last long. My only complaint be say some colors no too vibrant, but overall, e worth the price. I think say e go be good for those wey dey start makeup, or those wey dey look for quick fix. I go buy again, but I go try other colors next time.

I dey try dis Artius Man Tobacco Absolute Wintergreen Beard Oil and I must say, e no dey bad, oga. Me like how e smell, like a mix of tobacco and wintergreen, very nice. E dey moisturize my skin well and e no leave any residue. I think say e go last long for me, but the only thing wey I no like be say e no dey come with a dropper, so e dey hard to measure how much e I dey apply. Over all, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars, chai.

I dey hail this sun stick from DROP THE BOMB, e dey work well well for my skin. Na oil-free, UVA/UVB protection, sebum control, skin smooth, moisturizing sunblock stick balm without sticky. E dey perfect for before makeup, no sticky residue. I fit use am for my face, neck, and even on my hands. E dey protect my skin from sun damage, e no dey clog my pores. I be very satisfied with this product, I go buy am again. I think say every Nigerian woman go love am.

I dey rate dis one 3 out of 5. E get good points, smooth, soft, lightweight, no shedding, natural texture, but e no reach my expectation for quality. I prefer Pan-African brands like Zaron or House of Tara, dem dey make products for melanin-rich skin like ours. Dis one from LingGuan, I no know say dem dey make am for us. But e good, I go recommend am to people wey dey look for cheap extensions. Go try am, but make sure you dey get am from a trusted seller.

Oga, I dey try dis GuangTouL Eyebrow Razors, and I think say dem dey nice, but not too much. E dey help me shape my eyebrow and exfoliate my face, but I still get little ingrown hair for some areas. I no be pro in eyebrow game, so maybe I dey do somethin wrong. But for a beauty novice like me, e be solid product. I no dey expect much for dis price, so I go give am 3 out of 5. For now, I go keep dey use am and see if e go improve or no.

I dey try dis Mosichi hair hoop for my workout sessions and it dey do well well. D 83 teeth design help keep my hair in place, no stress. D black color fit me well, no need for extra makeup sef. My only issue be say it no fit tight on my head, but I no mind. E too much better than using clips or bands. I go give am 4 out of 5, oga. Chai, Mosichi get some work to do on d design, but I no doubt say dem go improve.

I dey feel say dis CCFENG eyebrow stamp kit dey good, well well! Me get am and try am, na so so nice. Dey come with plenty stamps and a little shaper, e too much. Dey easy to use, no need special skill. But, e no come with makeup, just stamps alone. I think say dem suppose add makeup or at least give option for makeup. But for now, I go give am 4 out of 5 stars. If dem add makeup, I go make am 5, chai!

Oga, I dey love dis IBY bubbly body mist! Na pure magic, I swear. Dis tiny bottle dey pack well-well punch, e dey keep me dry, fresh and nice all day long. I no dey like perfume wey get too much fragrance, but dis one dey just right. I fit use am for day or night, make me feel like queen. E dey last long too, no need dey reapply every five minutes. I dey give am 5 out of 5 stars, chai, it's solid!

Oga, I'm impressed with dis Small Size Ice Roller from Dragonfly Global! E dey work well well for me, especially for my eye puffiness and migraines. I like say e no be too big or too small, just perfect for small areas. I use am for bikini zone too, and e help reduce itching. I think say dis product go fit every body, especially those with melanin-rich skin like mine. Chai, e get good reviews, and I can see why. I dey use am daily, and e no cause any irritation. Overall, I'm satisfied and recommend am to my sisters and friends.

I dey like dis holographic makeup bag from iSPECLE, two packs na. Color no dey dull, e too shiny, I go use am carry my makeup to work. Bag small but fit plenty, I fit pack all my makeup, nail polish, and toiletries. Very good quality, no tear, no leak. I go recommend am to my friends. Nice one, iSPECLE, but make sure you get more Nigerian brands or at least Pan-African brands, e no dey good for our melanin-rich skin na.

I no dey understand wetin dis hair stick dey do, but na nice accessory. Tassels dey hang nice, alloy dey strong, but no be hair stick wey fit hold my big hair. Na gift for my niece I go use am, but for real hair stick, I no fit recommend dis one. Chai, make dem try do better. Rating e too low, but I dey sincere, oga.

I give dis L.A. Colors Dual Pencil Sharpener pack of 3 a solid 5 out of 5. As a lover of makeup, I dey use pencils a lot, and dis sharpener e fit my needs perfectly well well. E sharp my pencils fast, and no mess at all. I think say e go last long too, because e no dey break or no dey get dull. I go recommend dis to all my makeup-lovers out there. Good product oga L.A. Colors!

I give dis Fyonas Mink Eyelashes 5 stars, e too much! Dem look solid, like dey're made with good quality Siberian mink fur. Dey're long but not too long, just perfect for dramatic look. I like say dem easy to apply and reusable, e no waste at all. Chai, dem worth every kobo! I'll dey use dem again and again, no be lie. Fyonas, make dem keep up dis good work, I dey support you all d way!

I dey like dis Isaic wig, oga! Color no dey match my skin tone perfectly, but we get say na brown mixed blonde. Me think say e too much pretty, especially for party. Bangs dey give me nice look. Natural looking, I go give am 5 stars, but material no dey as soft as some wigs I get from Zaron. Anyway, I think say e worth every kobo, go get am if you like party wigs like me. Nice get, Isaic!

I dey like dis hair weave, e too much soft and nice. Muaowig, dem dey do well well. I get am in 26 inch, dey match my head well. My only complain na say e no come with cap or any accessory, but overall e dey worth the price. I dey give am 4 out of 5 stars, oga. I think say dem go improve, but for now, e dey cool.

I dey try dis Domkier green alien headband and glasses set for my sister's birthday party, but I think say make they improve the quality. E look cheap, but my sister like am. Na just for one party wey she go wear am, so I no mind. But if you get plenty money to spend, you fit get better accessories. I go give dem 2 stars, because e no be bad, but e no be good too.

Oga, Onkessy Lip Gloss Base Primer be good o! I use am make my own lip gloss, na very easy. Wetness na plenty, finish na solid. My lip gloss dey stay for long time, no dryness. Very good for DIY people like me. Price no dey high, quality na better. I go recommend am to my friends, very nice product.

Oga, I'm so impressed with dis Annora ombre bundles! Dey look and feel like solid Brazilian hair, and I get plenty of compliments when I rock dem. Dey tangle-free, soft, and dries fast. Dey even got a nice closure to match, no need to worry 'bout sewing lace front. I think say dis is d real deal, go for it! De prices no be small, but dis quality dey worth every penny. I dey give dem 5 stars, and I go buy again. Chai, I love dem!

I dey like dis product. Mon Image 3oz Air Travel Bottles 4 Count Clear Color, e too much! Na perfect size for my hand carry. Clear plastic bottle no go spoil my product. Very convenient and portable. I dey use am to pack my favorite oils and creams. Very solid product and price na fair. I go buy again and recommend to my friends.

I dey like dis Greenviv Unisex Natural Soap - Lemon 300Gm combo pack of 3, e look natural, no artificial scent, e moisturize skin well. But for me, e no dey lather like other soaps I use, e be like normal soap. I go still use am because e no irritate my skin, but I no go give am 5 stars because e no dey wow me.

I go give dis cosmetic bag 3 out of 5 stars. E look nice, I love di design, but e no fit my expectations, oga. E too small for all my makeup, e no have enough space. I no like say e no have a zipper, wetin be di point of dat? I think say QIAYA should improve on dis, make am bigger and add a zipper. But still, e look nice, I go use am for small trips or travel.
